V010-N00060.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00060.label: 胞肿如桃

V010-N00060.definition: 以胞睑红赤热痛，高肿如桃，睑闭难睁为主要表现的眼病。

V010-N00060.definition: Characterized by severe pain, swelling and redness of the eyelid that resembles a ripe peach. Often results from exuberant heat obstructing the flow of qi and blood.

V010-N00048.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00048.label: 胞虚如球
V010-N00048.path: 眼病类术语｜外障类病｜胞睑病
V010-N00048.definition: 因脾肾阳虚，水湿上泛，或心肺气虚，推动无力所致。临床以胞睑肿胀，虚软如球，皮色如常,按之不痛等为特征的胞睑病。

V010-N00048.definition: 以胞睑肿胀，皮色正常，虚软如球而按之不痛为主要表现的眼病。

V010-N00048.label: 胞虚如球
V010-N00048.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜眼科疾病
V010-N00048.definition: 以胞脸肿胀，皮色正常，虚软如球而按之不痛为主要表现的眼病。

V010-N00048.label: 胞虚如球
V010-N00048.path: 中医药学名词：外科学等（2013）｜眼科学｜治疗

V010-N00048.definition: Characterized by non-painful swelling of the eyelid that feels soft and hollow, with no change in the local skin colour. Often results from water/dampness retention in the eyelid due to yang deficiency of the spleen and kidney, or due to qi deficiency of the heart and lung.

V010-N00063.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00063.label: 混睛障
V010-N00063.path: 眼病类术语｜外障类病｜黑睛病
V010-N00063.definition: 因肝经风热或肝胆热毒，郁久伤阴,邪伏风轮，气血瘀滞所致。临床以黑睛深层呈现一片灰白翳障，或赤脉从深层侵入,翳障浑赤,混浊不清,漫掩黑睛,妨碍视力，伴见目痛、畏光等为特征的黑睛病。

V010-N00063.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00063.label: 混睛障
V010-N00063.definition: 以黑睛深层起灰白色翳障一片，混浊如雾，漫掩黑睛，妨碍视力，且羞明流泪,眼珠疼痛为主要表现的眼病。

V010-N00063.label: 混睛障
V010-N00063.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜眼科疾病
V010-N00063.definition: 以黑睛深层起灰白色翳障一片，混浊如气雾，漫掩黑睛，妨碍视力，且羞明流泪，眼珠疼痛为主要表现的眼病。

V010-N00063.label: 混睛障
V010-N00063.path: 中医药学名词：外科学等（2013）｜眼科学｜治疗
V010-N00063.definition: 以黑晴深层起灰白色翳障一片，混浊如雾，漫掩黑睛，妨碍视力，且羞明流泪，眼珠疼痛为主要表现的眼病。相当于角膜基质炎。hun jing zhang gan dän ré du zheng

V010-N00063.label: 混睛障

V010-N00063.definition: Characterized by corneal opacity and vision blurring. Individuals may experience eye pain and sensitivity to light. Often results from local stagnation of qi and blood due to wind heat in the liver meridian or toxic heat in the liver and gallbladder.

V010-N00052.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00052.label: 五风内障
V010-N00052.path: 眼病类术语｜内障类病｜瞳神病
V010-N00052.definition: 因情志失调,气郁血瘀,肝胆火炽,神水积滞等所致。临床以眼压升高，头目胀痛，视力昏蒙,抱轮红赤，瞳神散大等为特征的瞳神病。

V010-N00052.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00052.label: 五风内障
V010-N00052.path: 第8部分：眼科学｜瞳神疾病
V010-N00052.definition: 青风内障、绿风内障、黄风内障、乌风内障、黑风内障的总称。

V010-N00052.label: 五风内障
V010-N00052.path: 中医药学名词：外科学等（2013）｜眼科学｜治疗
V010-N00052.definition: 青风内障、绿风内障、黄风内障、黑风内障、乌风内障的总称。

V010-N00052.label: 五风内障
V010-N00052.englishNames: five kinds of wind glaucoma; five wind glaucoma; Wind glaucoma disorder
V010-N00052.path: 中医疾病｜眼病类术语｜内障类病｜瞳神病

V010-N00052.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00052.label: 五风内障
V010-N00052.englishNames: five kinds of wind glaucoma; five wind glaucoma; Wind glaucoma disorder; Glaucoma
V010-N00052.pinyinNames: wu feng nei zhang; wǔ fēng nèi zhàng
V010-N00052.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00052.definition: Characterized by increased pressure in the eye, headache, eye distension/pain, blurred vision, red eyes and dilation of the pupil. Often results from emotional stress, qi stagnation and blood stasis, and exuberant fire in the liver and gallbladder.

V010-N00041.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00041.label: 脏躁
V010-N00041.definition: 因情志不舒,气机逆乱,心脾气血暗耗,郁火不得发越,或天癸将绝，阴阳失调,扰动心神所致。临床以妇女情志异常，精神恍惚，烦躁不宁，无故悲伤，哭笑无常，呵欠频作等为特征的情志病。

V010-N00041.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00041.label: 脏躁
V010-N00041.path: 第6部分：妇科学｜妇科杂病
V010-N00041.definition: 以妇女情志异常，精神抑郁，心中烦乱，无故悲伤欲哭，哭笑无常,呵欠频作为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00041.label: 脏躁
V010-N00041.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜妇科疾病
V010-N00041.definition: 以精神抑郁,心中烦乱，无故悲伤欲哭，哭笑无常，呵欠频作为主要表现的情志疾病。

V010-N00041.label: 脏躁
V010-N00041.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜妇科学｜妇科杂病
V010-N00041.definition: 以精神抑郁，心中烦乱，无故悲伤欲哭，哭笑无常，呵欠频作为主要表现的情志疾病。

V010-N00041.label: 脏躁

V010-N00041.label: 脏躁
V010-N00041.englishNames: hysteria; visceral agitation(hysteria); Hysteriform Diseases; Uneasiness disorder; Hysteria
V010-N00041.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00041.definition: A paroxysmal mental disorder in women characterized by mood swings, mind wandering, sadness with no apparent reason, restlessness, crying or laughing with unexplained reason and frequent sighing. Often occurs when emotional disturbance causes qi disorder and consumes heart blood and spleen qi. It may also occur as a result of yin–yang disorder due to menopause.

V010-N00041.label: 脏躁

V010-N00041.label: 脏躁
V010-N00041.definition: a paroxysmal mental disease marked by depression and melancholy, irritability, lack of control over emotions, sadness with an urge to weep, and sighing for no apparent reason

V010-N00040.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00040.label: 郁病
V010-N00040.definition: 因长期情志不遂,或性格内向、偏颇,致使气机郁滞,不得发越,初病在肝,及于心脾，久则郁损成劳所致。临床以抑郁寡欢,情绪不宁,善悲易怒,焦虑多疑,强迫自责,兴趣索然，情感淡漠,甚则有消极避世，自虐、自杀意念，伴见胸胁痞满、胀痛,纳差不食,虚烦、失眠,健忘,消瘦等为特征的情志病。

V010-N00040.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00040.label: 六郁
V010-N00040.path: 第1部分：内科学｜气血津液病
V010-N00040.definition: 气郁、湿郁、痰郁、火郁、血郁、食郁六种郁病的总称。

V010-N00040.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00040.label: 郁病
V010-N00040.path: 第1部分：内科学｜气血津液病
V010-N00040.definition: 以心情抑郁，情绪不宁，夜眠不安，胸部满闷，胁肋胀痛，或易怒易哭，或咽中如有物堵塞等为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00040.label: 郁病
V010-N00040.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜内科疾病｜气血津液疾病
V010-N00040.definition: 以心情抑郁,情绪不宁，胸部满闷，胁肋胀痛,或易怒易哭,或咽中如有异物梗塞等为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00040.label: 六郁
V010-N00040.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜气血病
V010-N00040.definition: 气郁、湿郁、痰郁、火郁、血郁、食郁六种郁病的合称。

V010-N00040.label: 郁病
V010-N00040.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜气血病
V010-N00040.definition: 以心情抑郁，情绪不宁，夜眠不安，胸部满闷，胁肋胀痛，或易怒易哭，或咽中如有物堵塞等为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00040.label: 郁病
V010-N00040.path: 中医疾病｜情志病类术语

V010-N00040.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00040.label: 六郁
V010-N00040.path: 中医基础理论术语｜病因类
V010-N00040.definition: A collective term for stagnation of qi, blood, phlegm, fire, food and dampness. Often results from qi stagnation of the liver and spleen.

V010-N00040.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00040.label: 郁病
V010-N00040.aliases: 郁证； Depression disorder； Depressive disorder； Melancholy disorder
V010-N00040.englishNames: depression disease; Depression; depressive disease; depression
V010-N00040.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00040.definition: Characterized by a low mood, lack of interest, fullness and stuffiness in the chest and subcostal region, and a poor appetite. In severe cases, a sense of guilt, dejection, paranoia, self-harm and tendency to commit suicide. Often occurs when long-term emotional disturbance or character defects causes qi to stagnate. It is first associated with the liver and later with the heart and spleen.

V010-N00040.label: 郁病

V010-N00040.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00040.label: 郁证

V010-N00040.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00040.label: 六郁
V010-N00040.definition: a collective term for stagnation of qi, blood, damp, fire, phlegm and food, the same as six stagnations

V010-N00224.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00224.label: 便秘
V010-N00224.definition: 临床以7天内排便少于2次，或长期无便意，或虽有便意，大便质硬难解等为特征的症状。多因胃肠积热，或阳虚寒凝，或气血阴津亏损，或腹内块阻结等所致。

V010-N00224.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00224.label: 便秘病
V010-N00224.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病
V010-N00224.definition: 因胃肠积热，或老年阳虚寒凝，气血阴津亏损，或腹内瘤块、腹部手术等,致使肠道痹阻，传导不利所致。临床以排便困难,3天以上不排便，大便质硬，或怒挣难下等为特征的脾系病。

V010-N00224.label: 便秘
V010-N00224.path: 中医疾病｜临时诊断用术语

V010-N00224.label: 便秘病
V010-N00224.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V010-N00224.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00224.label: 便秘
V010-N00224.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00224.definition: Less than two bowel movements per week or difficulty passing hard stools. Often results from heat accumulating in the stomach and intestines, cold retention due to yang deficiency, deficiency of qi, blood and yin fluids or abdominal masses. It is commonly seen in intestinal disorders, anal lesions, muscle flaccidity, post-stroke hemiplegia, Parkinson’s disease, parenteral lump compression, overuse of dry, warm or astringent medicines, abdominal surgery, the aged or general debilitation.

V010-N00224.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00224.label: 便秘病
V010-N00224.pinyinNames: bian mi bing; biàn mì bìng
V010-N00224.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00224.definition: Characterized by hard stools and difficult, infrequent bowel movements, usually less than three stools per week. Patients may also experience straining with bowel movements. Contributing factors may include heat accumulating in the stomach and intestines, deficiency cold, consumption of qi, blood and yin fluids, abdominal masses or abdominal surgery.

V010-N00224.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00224.label: 便秘

V010-N00070.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00070.label: 腰痛
V010-N00070.definition: 临床以自觉腰部脊柱或其两侧疼痛，或切按则痛等为特征的症状。多因肾系病变及腰部外伤、劳损，寒湿或湿热侵着等所致。

V010-N00070.label: 腰痛
V010-N00070.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法

V010-N00070.label: 腰痛
V010-N00070.path: 中医疾病｜临时诊断用术语

V010-N00070.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00070.label: 腰痛
V010-N00070.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V010-N00070.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00070.label: 腰痛
V010-N00070.englishNames: Lower back pain; lumbago; Lumbago disorder; Lumbago
V010-N00070.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00070.definition: Pain on one or both sides of the lumbar vertebrae. Often results from kidney problems, low back trauma/strain or cold damp/damp heat affecting the lumbar region. It is commonly seen in kidney diseases, impediment, strangury, gynaecological conditions, acute lumbar sprain or sciatica.

V010-N00070.label: 腰痛

V010-N00070.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00070.label: 腰痛

V010-N00120.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00120.label: 头痛
V010-N00120.definition: 临床以患者自觉头部疼痛为特征的症状。多因风寒湿热等邪侵袭，或情志所伤，风阳火毒上扰，痰浊瘀血阻滞,致经气不利,气血逆乱，或气血营精亏虚,清阳不升，脑失所养等所致。

V010-N00120.label: 头痛
V010-N00120.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00120.definition: 头部疼痛,包括头的前、后、偏侧部疼痛和整个头部疼痛。

V010-N00120.label: 头痛
V010-N00120.path: 中医疾病｜临时诊断用术语

V010-N00120.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00120.label: 头痛
V010-N00120.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V010-N00120.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00120.label: 头痛
V010-N00120.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00120.definition: A subjective feeling of pain in the region of the head. Contributing factors may include contraction of wind, cold, damp or heat, emotions, ascending of wind yang and toxic heat, turbid phlegm or stagnant blood impairing the flow of meridian qi and blood, or malnourishment of the brain due to deficiency of qi, blood, Ying nutrients and essence. It is often seen in head wind, migraine, hemilateral head wind, facial wind and pain, cerebral arteriosclerosis, brain tumour, ear, nose and throat problems, exogenous diseases or other systemic conditions.

V010-N00120.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00120.label: 头痛

V010-N00120.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00120.label: 头痛

V010-N00229.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00229.label: 腹痛
V010-N00229.definition: 临床以胃脘与季肋以下，耻骨毛际以上的腹部自觉疼痛，或切按则痛等为特征的症状，有心下痛、胁腹痛、脐腹痛、小腹痛、少腹痛之分。多因外感六淫及虫、食、石、粪等内外损伤,痹阻脏腑气血,或气血亏虚等所导致的各种急慢性病变。

V010-N00229.label: 腹痛
V010-N00229.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00229.definition: 腹部疼痛，是脐腹疼痛、小腹疼痛、少腹疼痛的统称。

V010-N00229.vocabName: 简帛医药文献词典（2018）（未校勘）
V010-N00229.label: 腹痛
V010-N00229.path: 上編 簡帛醫學詞語｜病症詞語

V010-N00229.label: 腹痛
V010-N00229.path: 中医疾病｜临时诊断用术语

V010-N00229.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00229.label: 腹痛
V010-N00229.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V010-N00229.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00229.label: 腹痛
V010-N00229.englishNames: abdominal pain; Abdominal pain disorder; Abdominal pain
V010-N00229.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00229.definition: Pain that occurs between the chest and pelvic regions. It can be acute or chronic, often resulting from external contraction of six pathogenic factors, parasitic worms, improper diet, stones obstructing the flow of qi and blood or deficiency of qi and blood.

V010-N00229.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00229.label: 腹痛

V010-N00229.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00229.label: 腹痛
V010-N00229.definition: pain in the region between the hypochondrium and pubic hairline

V010-N00042.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00042.label: 失眠
V010-N00042.definition: 临床以经常不能获得正常睡眠时间和质量等为特征的症状。多因思虑劳神太过，气血亏虚，或因情志所伤，气机不舒，以及火热内扰、痰浊阻滞等，使阴阳不和，神气不宁所致。

V010-N00042.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00042.label: 不寐病
V010-N00042.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜心系病
V010-N00042.definition: 因忧思劳神，营卫失和,心虚胆怯,或肝郁化火，胃气不和,痰火扰心，或年老久病，心脾两虚，阴虚阳亢,心肾不交所致。临床以经常不能获得正常睡眠，或不易入睡，睡眠短浅易醒，甚则彻夜不眠,白天困乏，精力不济，可伴见头晕、耳鸣，健忘等为特征的神志病。

V010-N00042.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00042.label: 不寐［病］
V010-N00042.definition: 以不易入睡或睡眠短浅，易醒早醒，甚至整夜不能入睡为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00042.label: 不寐
V010-N00042.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00042.definition: 又称"失眠”。经常性的睡眠减少，或不易入睡,或睡眠短浅而易醒，甚或彻夜不眠的表现。

V010-N00042.label: 不寐[病]
V010-N00042.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜脑病
V010-N00042.definition: 又称“失眠”。以不易人睡或睡眠短浅易醒，甚至整夜不能入睡为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00042.label: 失眠
V010-N00042.path: 中医疾病｜临时诊断用术语

V010-N00042.label: 不寐病
V010-N00042.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜心系病

V010-N00042.label: 不寐
V010-N00042.path: 分类与代码表｜必要信息（基本症状）｜骨干症状｜心神系症状类

V010-N00042.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00042.label: 不寐
V010-N00042.aliases: 失眠； 不得眠； 不得卧； 不眠； 目不瞑； 少寐； 少睡； 无眠
V010-N00042.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V010-N00042.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00042.label: 不寐
V010-N00042.aliases: 不寐病； Insomnia disorder； Sleeplessness； 失眠
V010-N00042.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00042.definition: Characterized by an inability to obtain normal sleep and drowsiness and low energy during the day. Associated symptoms may include dizziness, tinnitus and poor memory. Often results from emotional disturbances, mental exhaustion and, subsequently, the disharmony between the Ying-nutrients and Wei-defence.

V010-N00042.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00042.label: 失眠
V010-N00042.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00042.definition: Prolonged inability to get sufficient sleep. Contributing factors may include over-thinking, deficiency of qi and blood, liver qi stagnation, internal fire heat, or retention of turbid phlegm. These factors may cause disharmony between yin and yang and subsequently, mental restlessness. It is often seen in sleeplessness, neurasthenia, depression, mania, hysteria and/or some systemic conditions.

V010-N00042.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00042.label: 失眠

V010-N00042.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00042.label: 失眠
V010-N00042.definition: inability to sleep or abnormal wakefulness, the same as insomnia

V010-N00047.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00047.label: 耳鸣
V010-N00047.definition: 临床以无相应声源时自觉耳中或头颅有鸣响声为特征的症状。多因阴血亏虚,或肾精不足、中气下陷，耳窍失养，以及风阳痰火上扰，风邪上乘或药毒犯耳等所致。

V010-N00047.label: 耳鸣
V010-N00047.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00047.definition: 自觉耳中有鸣响声的表现。

V010-N00047.label: 耳鸣
V010-N00047.path: 中医药学名词：外科学等（2013）｜耳鼻喉科学｜诊断
V010-N00047.definition: 外界无声源而病人自觉耳中鸣响的表现。

V010-N00047.label: 耳鸣
V010-N00047.path: 中医疾病｜临时诊断用术语

V010-N00054.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00054.label: 耳聋
V010-N00054.definition: 临床以双耳或单耳听声不真或不闻声音，检查听力严重障碍等为特征的症状。多因寒热痰火内扰，或气血亏虚，外伤及药物中毒等闭塞耳窍所致。

V010-N00054.label: 耳聋
V010-N00054.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00054.definition: 听觉障碍,不能听到外界声响的表现，轻者听而不真，重者不闻外声

V010-N00054.label: 耳聋
V010-N00054.path: 中医药学名词：外科学等（2013）｜耳鼻喉科学｜诊断
V010-N00054.definition: 不同程度听力减退的表现。

V010-N00054.label: 耳聋
V010-N00054.path: 中医疾病｜临时诊断用术语

V010-N00054.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00054.label: 耳聋
V010-N00054.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜五官科类

V010-N00054.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00054.label: 耳聋
V010-N00054.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V010-N00054.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00054.label: 耳聋
V010-N00054.pinyinNames: dong long; er long; ěr lóng
V010-N00054.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00054.definition: Hearing loss in one or both ears (also known as severe hearing impairment). Often results from internal phlegm fire, deficiency of qi and blood, trauma or drug side-effects/poisoning. It is commonly seen in ear problems or other systemic conditions that may affect the hearing.

V010-N00054.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00054.label: 耳聋

V010-N00054.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00054.label: 耳聋
V010-N00054.definition: loss, complete or partial, of the sense of hearing

V010-N00247.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00247.label: 胁痛
V010-N00247.definition: 临床以自觉一侧或两侧胁肋部疼痛，或切按则痛等为特征的症状。多因气机郁滞，脉络失和,或胆汁淤积等所致。

V010-N00247.label: 胁痛
V010-N00247.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00247.definition: 一侧或两侧胁肋部位疼痛。

V010-N00247.label: 胁痛
V010-N00247.path: 中医药学名词：外科学等（2013）｜外科学｜疾病

V010-N00247.label: 胁痛
V010-N00247.englishNames: Hypochondriac Pain; hypochondriac pain; Hypochondrium pain disorder
V010-N00247.path: 中医疾病｜临时诊断用术语

V010-N00247.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00247.label: 胁痛
V010-N00247.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V010-N00247.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00247.label: 胁痛
V010-N00247.englishNames: Hypochondriac Pain; hypochondriac pain; Pain in the subcostal region; Hypochondrium pain disorder
V010-N00247.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00247.definition: Pain on one or both sides of the subcostal region often results from qi stagnation or bile accumulation. It is commonly seen in liver cancer, liver abscess, liver heat, liver distension, ascites, gallbladder heat, gallbladder distension, pleural effusion, masses below the left subcostal region or fibrinous pleurisy.

V010-N00247.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00247.label: 胁痛

V010-N00247.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00247.label: 胁痛
V010-N00247.definition: pain in the area between the armpit and the lowest rib, unilateral or bilateral

V010-N00226.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00226.label: 胃痛
V010-N00226.definition: 临床以自觉剑突下的上腹部疼痛，或切按则痛等为特征的症状。多因寒热侵扰，或饮食失调，阴阳气血不足，气滞血瘀等，使胃失和降所致。

V010-N00226.label: 胃痛
V010-N00226.path: 中医疾病｜临时诊断用术语

V010-N00226.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00226.label: 胃痛
V010-N00226.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V010-N00226.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00226.label: 胃痛
V010-N00226.aliases: 胃脘痛； 脘痛； Gastric pain
V010-N00226.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00226.definition: A subjective pain in the upper abdominal below the xiphoid process. Often results from failure to stomach qi to descend due to cold/heat, improper diet, deficiency of qi, blood, yin and yang, and stagnation of qi and blood. It is commonly seen in stomach problems or problems of the intestines, pancreas, gallbladder, liver and spleen. It may also be seen in severe cardiac pain.

V010-N00226.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00226.label: 胃痛

V010-N00226.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00226.label: 胃脘痛

V010-N00250.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00250.label: 黄疸
V010-N00250.definition: 临床以白睛、皮肤黏膜及小便发黄等为特征的症状。多因外感湿热疫毒，或酒客湿热内蕴，或寒湿困脾，血瘀气滞，致使胆汁外溢等所致。

V010-N00250.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00250.label: 黄疸病
V010-N00250.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肝系病
V010-N00250.definition: 泛指因外感湿热疫毒，或酒客湿热内蕴，或寒湿困脾，或结石、肿块梗阻，气滞血瘀,迫使胆汁外溢等引起以面目发黄、身黄、小便黄为特征的一类疾病。

V010-N00250.label: 黄疸
V010-N00250.path: 中医疾病｜临时诊断用术语

V010-N00250.label: 黄疸病
V010-N00250.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肝系病

V010-N00250.label: 黄疸病
V010-N00250.pinyinNames: huang dan bing; huáng dǎn bìng
V010-N00250.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00250.definition: Characterized by yellow discolouration of the skin, sclera and urine. Contributing factors may include external contraction of epidemic damp heat, alcohol-related internal build up of damp heat, cold dampness affecting the spleen, or stones/lumps/stasis forcing the bile to flow superficially.

V010-N00225.label: 嘈杂
V010-N00225.definition: 临床以自觉胃中空虚，似饥非饥,似痛非痛，似辣非辣，懊震莫可名状等为特征的症状。多因伤食、胃寒、胃热、阴血亏虚及肝胃不和等所致。

V010-N00225.label: 嘈杂
V010-N00225.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00225.definition: 自觉胃中空虚难耐,烦杂不适的表现。

V010-N00225.label: 嘈杂
V010-N00225.englishNames: stomach upset; Epigastic Upset; gastric upset; Epigastric upset disorder; epigastric upset

V010-N00225.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00225.label: 嘈杂
V010-N00225.englishNames: stomach upset; Epigastic Upset; gastric upset; Gastric upset; Epigastric upset disorder; epigastric upset
V010-N00225.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00225.definition: A subjective feeling of stomach emptiness, the sensation of fullness after a very small amount of food, abdominal distension or unexplained discomfort. Often results from an improper diet, stomach cold, stomach heat, yin blood deficiency or disharmony between the liver and stomach. It is commonly seen in problems of stomach, oesophagus, gallbladder or pancreas.

V010-N00108.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00108.label: 眩晕
V010-N00108.definition: 临床以自觉头晕眼花，视物旋转动摇的症状。多因气血营精不能上荣于头，或因风阳、火热上扰,痰浊、瘀血阻滞，清阳被遏等所致。

V010-N00108.label: 眩晕
V010-N00108.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜内科疾病｜脑系疾病
V010-N00108.definition: 以头晕、目眩为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00108.label: 头晕
V010-N00108.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00108.definition: 头脑昏沉,视物昏花旋转，严重者张目即觉天旋地转,不能站立。

V010-N00108.label: 眩晕
V010-N00108.path: 中医疾病｜临时诊断用术语

V010-N00108.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00108.label: 眩晕
V010-N00108.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00108.definition: Subjective dizziness, blurred vision and feeling like a spinning or swaying movement. Contributing factors may include failure of qi, blood and essence to nourish the head, wind phlegm or fire heat disturbing the head or stagnant blood obstructing clear yang. It is commonly seen in wind dizziness, cerebral arteriosclerosis, deficiency dizziness, aural vertigo, pregnancy dizziness, eclampsia, postpartum blood dizziness, motion sickness, cerebral atrophy or mental over-exertion. It may also be secondary to head trauma, neck pain, drug poisoning, brain tumour or ear, nose and throat conditions.

V010-N00108.label: 眩晕

V010-N00212.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00212.label: 咳嗽
V010-N00212.path: 临时诊断用术语
V010-N00212.definition: 临床以从肺经喉发出“咳、咳"有声为特征的症状。多因六淫外邪袭肺，或有害气体刺激，痰饮停肺，气阴亏虚等致使肺失清肃，肺气上逆所致。

V010-N00212.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00212.label: 内伤咳嗽
V010-N00212.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病｜咳嗽病
V010-N00212.definition: 因久咳伤肺，肺虚气弱，或由脏腑内伤,脾失健运，痰湿中阻，或肝火乘肺，或肾虚水泛，气阴两虚等所致。临床以咳嗽时轻时重,时作时止,咳痰或多或少,可伴见疲倦乏力,容易感冒,胸闷、喘促,胁肋疼痛，咯唾痰血，面目浮肿等为特征的慢性内伤肺系病。

V010-N00212.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00212.label: 外感咳嗽
V010-N00212.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病｜咳嗽病
V010-N00212.definition: 因六淫之邪犯肺，或温邪上受，肺卫失宣，肺气上逆所致。临床以起病较急，咳声急迫，或咳而不爽，或干咳、少痰,痰白或黄,可伴见发热、头痛，鼻塞、流涕,咽红、口干,喉痒或痛等为特征的急性外感肺系病。

V010-N00212.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00212.label: 暴咳病
V010-N00212.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病｜肺咳
V010-N00212.definition: 临床以急性发作，剧烈咳嗽，病程短等为特征的肺咳。

V010-N00212.path: 第1部分：内科学｜肺病
V010-N00212.definition: 由于肺气虚弱或其他脏腑病变累及于肺引起的咳嗽病。

V010-N00212.definition: 以骤然发作剧烈咳嗽为特征的咳嗽病。

V010-N00212.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00212.label: 内伤咳嗽
V010-N00212.englishNames: Cough due to internal dysfunctions; endogenous cough; cough due to internal damage
V010-N00212.pinyinNames: nei shang ke su; nèi shāng ké sou
V010-N00212.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00212.definition: Characterized by intermittent coughs varying in intensity. Associated symptoms may include fatigue, frequent common colds, chest tightness, panting, pain in the subcostal region, haemoptysis and puffy face or eyes. Contributing factors may include chronic cough damaging lung qi, phlegm dampness due to spleen deficiency, liver fire affecting the lung, water retention due to kidney deficiency or deficiency of qi and yin.

V010-N00212.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00212.label: 咳嗽
V010-N00212.aliases: 暴咳； 内伤咳嗽； 外感咳嗽； 咳逆
V010-N00212.pinyinNames: ké sou; ke sou; ke su
V010-N00212.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00212.definition: The noisy expulsion of “cough” sound from the lungs. Contributing factors may include six exogenous pathogenic factors six exogenous pathogenic factors affecting the lung, exposure to irritant gas, phlegm fluid retention in the lung, or deficiency of qi and yin. These factors may cause lung qi to ascend. It is often seen in early-stage exogenous diseases, lung diseases, or conditions of other zang–fu organs that affect the lung.

V010-N00212.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00212.label: 外感咳嗽
V010-N00212.aliases: Cough upon exposure to exogenous factors
V010-N00212.englishNames: exogenous cough; cough due to external contraction; Cough due to external contraction
V010-N00212.pinyinNames: wai gan ke su; wài gǎn ké sou
V010-N00212.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00212.definition: Characterized by a sudden onset, urgent coughing sound, difficult expectoration of sputum, or coughing with scanty, yellow or white sputum. Associated symptoms include fever, headache, stuffy/runny nose, a red, sore and scratchy throat, and a dry mouth. Often occurs when six exogenous pathogenic factors or pestilence attack the lung and causes lung qi to ascend.

V010-N00212.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00212.label: 暴咳病
V010-N00212.pinyinNames: bao ke bing; bào ké bìng
V010-N00212.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00212.definition: Characterized by severe coughing with an acute attack and a short duration.

V010-N00185.label: 尿浊
V010-N00185.definition: 临床以小便混浊，白如泔浆，排尿时多无疼痛等为特征的症状。多因湿热下注、脾肾亏虚等所致。

V010-N00185.englishNames: turbid urine; Cloudy urine; turbid urine (disease); Turbid urine disorder
V010-N00185.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00185.definition: Turbid, white urine (like rice-washed water). Often results from downward flow of damp heat or deficiency of the spleen and kidney. It is commonly seen in filariasis, renal tuberculosis, chronic prostatitis, kidney cancer, and chest or abdominal trauma or surgeries. It may also be seen in children with external contraction of pathogenic factors or internal dysfunctions.

V010-N00236.label: 心悸
V010-N00236.definition: 临床以自觉心搏异常跳动,心慌不安,或时作时止等为特征的症状。多因气虚血弱,心失所养,或因情绪刺激、外邪直中心络，或痰饮、瘀血等痹阻心脉所致。

V010-N00236.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00236.label: 心悸
V010-N00236.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00236.definition: Unpleasant, involuntary sensations of rapid, irregular and/or forceful beating of the heart. Often results from failure of qi and blood to nourish the heart, emotions, exogenous pathogens affecting the heart or phlegm stasis obstructing the heart vessels. It is commonly seen in heart impediment, heart heat, lung conditions, emotional disorders, chronic debility, or thyroid problems.

V010-N00220.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00220.label: 腹泻
V010-N00220.definition: 临床以大便次数增多，粪质稀薄等为特征的症状，有暴泻与久泻之分。多因外感风寒湿热疫毒之邪，或饮食所伤，或情志失调，或久病脾肾阳气亏虚等所致。

V010-N00220.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00220.label: 泄泻病
V010-N00220.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病
V010-N00220.definition: 因外感风寒湿热之邪，或饮食所伤，情志失调，或久病脾肾阳气亏虚等所致。临床以大便次数增多，粪质稀薄，或完谷不化，甚至泻出如水样便等为特征的脾系病。

V010-N00220.label: 泄泻
V010-N00220.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜内科疾病｜脾胃疾病
V010-N00220.definition: 以腹泻、便溏为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00220.label: 腹泻
V010-N00220.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00220.definition: 粪便稀薄，排便次数增加的表现，是多种类似症状的统称。

V010-N00220.label: 腹泻
V010-N00220.path: 中医疾病｜临时诊断用术语

V010-N00220.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00220.label: 泄泻病
V010-N00220.pinyinNames: xie xie bing; xiè xiè bìng
V010-N00220.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00220.definition: Characterized by increased frequency of bowel movements, loose stools, stools containing undigested food or watery stools. Contributing factors may include external contraction of wind, cold, damp or heat, an improper diet, emotional disturbance or yang qi deficiency of the spleen and kidney.

V010-N00220.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00220.label: 下利

V010-N00220.label: 泄泻
V010-N00220.definition: abnormally frequent intestinal evacuations with soft or fluid stool

V010-N00191.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00191.label: 水肿
V010-N00191.definition: 临床以眼睑或头面、四肢、全身浮肿，或按之凹陷等为特征的症状。多因外邪侵袭，或劳倦内伤，或饮食失调，使气化不利而水液潴留，泛滥肌肤所致。

V010-N00191.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00191.label: 水肿类病
V010-N00191.definition: 泛指因外邪侵袭，或劳倦内伤，或饮食失调，致使气化不利，水液潴留，或泛滥肌肤而引起的一类疾病。

V010-N00191.label: 水肿
V010-N00191.path: 中医疾病｜临时诊断用术语

V010-N00191.label: 水肿类病
V010-N00191.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语

V010-N00191.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00191.label: 水肿类病
V010-N00191.englishNames: category of disease with edema; Oedema; edema diseases
V010-N00191.pinyinNames: shui zhong lei bing; shuǐ zhǒng lèi bìng
V010-N00191.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00191.definition: A group of conditions caused by impaired qi transformation and retained water flowing over the skin. Contributing factors may include external pathogenic factors, over-exertion or improper diet.

V010-N00191.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00191.label: 水肿

V010-N00107.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00107.label: 健忘
V010-N00107.definition: 临床以与增龄不相称的记忆力明显减退,遇事易忘等为特征的症状。多因心脾亏虚,心肾不交、年老精衰，或瘀痰痹阻清空等所致。

V010-N00107.label: 健忘
V010-N00107.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜内科疾病｜脑系疾病
V010-N00107.definition: 以记忆力减退、遇事易忘为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00107.label: 健忘
V010-N00107.path: 中医疾病｜临时诊断用术语

V010-N00107.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00107.label: 健忘
V010-N00107.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜情志情况｜神乱

V010-N00107.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00107.label: 健忘
V010-N00107.aliases: 多忘； 好忘； 善忘； 喜忘； 易忘
V010-N00107.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V010-N00107.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00107.label: 健忘
V010-N00107.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00107.definition: A noticeable memory decrease that does not conform to age-related effects. Often results from deficiency of the heart and spleen, disharmony between the heart and kidney, ageing, or phlegm stasis affecting the heart mind. It is commonly seen in mental over-exertion, cerebral atrophy, insomnia, emotional disorder, dementia, head trauma or poisoning.

V010-N00107.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00107.label: 健忘

V010-N00174.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00174.label: 虚劳类病
V010-N00174.definition: 泛指因劳倦或饮食、七情、酒色等所伤，或大病后失于调理，致使阴阳或气血脏腑等虚损不复而引起的以气、血、阴、阳及五脏虚损等为特征的一类虚衰性疾病。

V010-N00174.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00174.label: 虚劳
V010-N00174.path: 第1部分：内科学｜气血津液病
V010-N00174.definition: 以阴阳、气血、脏腑虚损为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00174.label: 虚劳
V010-N00174.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜气血病
V010-N00174.definition: 以阴阳、气血、脏腑虚损为主要表现的虚衰性疾病。

V010-N00174.label: 虚劳类病
V010-N00174.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语

V010-N00174.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00174.label: 虚劳类病
V010-N00174.englishNames: consumptive diseases diseases; category of consumptive disease; Deficiency/consumption
V010-N00174.pinyinNames: xu lao lei bing; xū láo lèi bìng
V010-N00174.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00174.definition: A collective term for chronic deficiency or consumption of qi, blood, yin, yang and the five zang organs. Contributing factors may include over-exertion, an improper diet, emotions, alcohol consumption, sexual indulgence or major medical conditions.

V010-N00174.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00174.label: 虚损
V010-N00174.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00174.definition: A group of chronic consumptive conditions characterized by a lustreless complexion, lassitude, shortness of breath, a low voice, dizziness, blurred vision and poor appetite. Associated symptoms include abdominal distension, loose stools, palpitations, forgetfulness, nocturnal emissions, irregular menstruation, spontaneous sweating, night sweats, weight loss, feverish sensations in the palms, soles and chest, cold intolerance and cold limbs. Contributing factors may include major or chronic disease, heavy blood loss during childbirth or surgery, congenital weakness or ageing. These factors may consume qi, blood, yin, yang and the zang–fu organs.

V010-N00174.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00174.label: 虚劳

V010-N00209.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00209.label: 悬饮
V010-N00209.path: 气血津液病类术语｜痰饮类病
V010-N00209.definition: 因肺、胸部的痨、癌等病变，以及某些全身性疾病，使饮邪停积胸腔,阻碍气机升降所致。临床以胸胁饱满、胀闷，咳唾引痛等为特征的痰饮病。

V010-N00209.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00209.label: 悬饮
V010-N00209.definition: 饮邪停留于胁肋部，以胸胁饱满、胀闷，咳唾引痛为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00209.label: 悬饮
V010-N00209.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜内科疾病｜肺系疾病
V010-N00209.definition: 饮邪停留于胁肋部引起的，以胸胁饱满、胀闷，咳唾引痛为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00209.label: 悬饮
V010-N00209.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜肺病
V010-N00209.definition: 饮邪停留于胁肋部，以胸胁饱满、胀闷，咳唾引痛为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00209.label: 悬饮
V010-N00209.englishNames: Pleural fluid retention disorder; suspending fluid retention; pleural fluid retention; suspending fluid
V010-N00209.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜痰饮类病

V010-N00209.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00209.label: 悬饮
V010-N00209.englishNames: Pleural fluid retention disorder; suspending fluid retention; pleural fluid retention; pleural fluid retention [disease/disorder]; Pleural fluid retention; suspending fluid
V010-N00209.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00209.definition: Characterized by fullness, distension and tightness in the chest or subcostal region and cough-induced pain. Often occurs when fluid retention in the chest cavity (due to lung tuberculosis/cancer or other systemic conditions) obstructs the flow of qi.

V010-N00209.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00209.label: 悬饮

V010-N00172.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00172.label: 消渴病
V010-N00172.path: 气血津液病类术语
V010-N00172.definition: 因恣食肥甘,或情志过极,房事不节,或温热邪伤,或滥服金石药物等,致使胃热液涸,或肺热化燥、心火偏盛、肾阴受灼,致使气化失常，津液精微不约而下泄等引起的，以多饮、多食、多尿为特征的一类疾病。

V010-N00172.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00172.label: 上消
V010-N00172.path: 气血津液病类术语｜消渴病
V010-N00172.definition: 因上焦燥热，肺热耗损阴津，或胃热液涸所致。临床以随饮随渴,小便清利或甜，大便如常等为特征的消渴病。

V010-N00172.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00172.label: 下消
V010-N00172.aliases: 肾消； 痟肾； 消肾
V010-N00172.path: 气血津液病类术语｜消渴病
V010-N00172.definition: 因心火偏盛，肾阴受灼，或蒸化失司,津液精微不约而下泄，肾水亏竭所致。临床以口渴引饮，饮一溲二，溲似淋浊，或如膏油，或甜，面黑，耳焦，形体消瘦等为特征的消渴病。

V010-N00172.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00172.label: 中消
V010-N00172.aliases: 消中； 痟中； 消脾； 胃消
V010-N00172.path: 气血津液病类术语｜消渴病
V010-N00172.definition: 因中焦燥热，胃阴耗损所致。临床以善饥多食，形体消瘦，口渴、多饮，大便秘结等为特征的消渴病。

V010-N00172.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00172.label: 消渴
V010-N00172.path: 第1部分：内科学｜气血津液病
V010-N00172.definition: 以多饮、多食、多尿、乏力、消瘦或尿有甜味为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00172.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00172.label: 上消
V010-N00172.path: 第1部分：内科学｜气血津液病｜消渴
V010-N00172.definition: 上焦燥热，以口渴多饮少食为特征的消渴。

V010-N00172.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00172.label: 下消
V010-N00172.path: 第1部分：内科学｜气血津液病｜消渴
V010-N00172.definition: 以小便量多，或如膏油，或甜，口渴多饮，面黑耳焦，日渐消瘦等为特征的消渴。

V010-N00172.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00172.label: 中消
V010-N00172.path: 第1部分：内科学｜气血津液病｜消渴
V010-N00172.definition: 以善饥多食，形体消瘦为特征的消渴。

V010-N00172.label: 消渴
V010-N00172.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜内科疾病｜气血津液疾病
V010-N00172.definition: 以多饮、多食、多尿为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00172.label: 上消
V010-N00172.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜气血病
V010-N00172.definition: 上焦燥热，以多饮水而少食，大便如常，或小便清利为主要表现的消渴。

V010-N00172.label: 下消
V010-N00172.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜气血病
V010-N00172.definition: 以小便量多，或如膏油，或甜，口渴多饮，面黑耳焦，日渐消瘦等为主要表现的消渴。

V010-N00172.label: 中消
V010-N00172.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜气血病
V010-N00172.definition: 以善饥多食，形体消瘦为主要表现的消渴。

V010-N00172.label: 消渴
V010-N00172.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜气血病
V010-N00172.definition: 以多饮、多食、多尿为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00172.label: 消渴病

V010-N00172.aliases: 胃消； 消脾； 消中； 痟中

V010-N00172.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00172.label: 上消
V010-N00172.englishNames: wasting of the upper jiao; upper consumption; Wasting of the upper jiao; upper wasting-thirst
V010-N00172.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00172.definition: Characterized by excessive thirst, excessive drinking, and clear urine with a sweet or fruit-like smell. Individuals often have normal bowel movements. Often occurs when lung heat consumes yin fluids.

V010-N00172.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00172.label: 下消
V010-N00172.aliases: 肾消； 痟肾； 消肾； Kidney wasting
V010-N00172.englishNames: lower consumption; Wasting of the lower jiao; lower wasting-thirst; wasting of the lower jiao
V010-N00172.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00172.definition: Characterized by thirst, excessive drinking, profuse urination with turbid, oily and sweet smelling urine, a dark complexion, and weight loss. Often occurs when hyperactive heart fire consumes kidney yin or disturbs the qi transformation.

V010-N00172.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00172.label: 中消
V010-N00172.aliases: 消中； 痟中； 消脾； 胃消； Spleen/stomach wasting
V010-N00172.englishNames: middle consumption; wasting of the middle jiao; middle wasting-thirst; Wasting of the middle jiao
V010-N00172.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00172.definition: Characterized by increased appetite but rapid hunger after eating food, weight loss, thirst, excessive drinking and constipation. Often occurs when dry heat in the middle jiao consumes stomach yin.

V010-N00172.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00172.label: 消渴类病
V010-N00172.englishNames: category of wasting and thirst disease; Wasting and thirst disorders
V010-N00172.pinyinNames: xiao ke lei bing; xiāo kě lèi bìng
V010-N00172.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00172.definition: A group of disorders characterized by polydipsia, polyphagia and polyuria. Contributing factors include overeating of oily, sweet food, emotions, sexual indulgence, exposure to pathogenic warm heat or abuse of medicinal minerals. These factors may cause stomach heat, lung dryness, hyperactive heart fire to consume yin and disturb qi transformation.

V010-N00172.label: 上消

V010-N00192.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00192.label: 风水
V010-N00192.path: 气血津液病类术语｜水肿类病
V010-N00192.definition: 因风邪侵袭，肺失宣降，不能通调水道，风水相搏，泛溢肌表所致。临床以骤然发热、恶风,咽喉肿痛,骨节疼痛，面目浮肿,继而全身浮肿，可伴见气急、尿少,蛋白尿及血压增高等为特征的急性水肿病。

V010-N00192.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00192.label: 风水
V010-N00192.path: 第1部分：内科学｜肾膀胱病｜水肿［病］
V010-N00192.definition: 风邪外袭，以突发头面部及四肢水肿为主要表现的水肿病。

V010-N00192.label: 风水
V010-N00192.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜内科疾病｜肾膀胱疾病
V010-N00192.definition: 以突发局限性水肿为主要表现的水肿病。

V010-N00192.label: 风水
V010-N00192.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜肾膀胱病
V010-N00192.definition: 风邪外袭，以突发头面部及四肢水肿为主要表现的水肿病。

V010-N00192.label: 风水
V010-N00192.path: 中医疾病｜气血津液病类术语｜水肿类病

V010-N00192.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00192.label: 风水
V010-N00192.englishNames: wind edema; Wind edema disorder; Wind oedema
V010-N00192.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00192.definition: Characterized by a sudden fever, aversion to wind, sore, swollen throat, joint pain, and swelling of the face and eyelid. Over time, individuals may experience generalized oedema. Associated signs and symptoms may include shortness of breath, scanty urine, proteinuria and elevated blood pressure. If often occurs when pathogenic wind affects the lung’s functions in dispersing and descending qi and regulating water passage.

V010-N00192.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00192.label: 风水

V010-N00061.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00061.label: 乳蛾
V010-N00061.definition: 因邪客喉核(腭扁桃体)，或脏腑虚损,虚火上炎，气血瘀滞所致。临床以发热,咽痛,喉核红肿胀大，形如乳头或蚕蛾，或表面有黄白色脓点，或喉核肥大、质硬、暗红等为特征的咽喉病。

V010-N00061.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00061.label: 乳蛾
V010-N00061.path: 第9部分：耳鼻喉科学｜咽喉病
V010-N00061.definition: 以咽痛或咽异物感不适，喉核红肿，形如蚕蛾，表面或有黄白色脓点为主要表现的咽喉病。

V010-N00061.label: 乳蛾
V010-N00061.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜耳鼻喉科疾病｜咽喉病
V010-N00061.definition: 以发热,咽痛,喉核红肿胀大,形如蚕蛾,或表面呈黄白色脓血,或喉核肿大、质硬、暗红等为主要表现的喉核疾病。发于·侧者为单乳蛾,发于两侧者为双乳蛾。

V010-N00061.label: 乳蛾
V010-N00061.path: 中医药学名词：外科学等（2013）｜耳鼻喉科学｜咽喉病
V010-N00061.definition: 以咽痛或咽异物感不适，喉核红肿，形如蚕蛾，表面或有黄白色脓点为主要表现的咽喉病。相当于扁桃体炎。

V010-N00061.label: 乳蛾
V010-N00061.englishNames: nippled moth; tonsillitis; Nippled Moth; Tonsillitis disorder
V010-N00061.path: 中医疾病｜咽喉病类术语

V010-N00061.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00061.label: 乳蛾
V010-N00061.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜五官科类

V010-N00061.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00061.label: 乳蛾
V010-N00061.englishNames: tonsillitis; nippled moth; Nippled Moth; Tonsillitis; Tonsillitis disorder
V010-N00061.pinyinNames: ru dong; ru e; rǔ é
V010-N00061.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00061.definition: Characterized by fever, sore throat, and enlargement of the tonsils that resembles a nipple or silkworm moth. Individuals may also present with white pus-filled spots on the surface of the tonsil or swollen, hard and dark red tonsil. Often results from exogenous pathogens affecting the tonsil, ascending of deficiency fire, or stagnation of qi and blood.

V010-N00061.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00061.label: 乳蛾
V010-N00061.path: 眼、耳鼻喉科病｜耳鼻喉科病

V010-N00061.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00061.label: 乳蛾
V010-N00061.path: 临床各科｜耳鼻喉口齿科
V010-N00061.definition: inflammation of the palatine tonsils, sometimes covered with a yellowish white secretion like milk

V010-N00049.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00049.label: 喉瘖
V010-N00049.definition: 因外邪犯喉，或烟酒熏灼,耗损阴津，咽喉失养所致。临床以声哑失音，咽喉疼痛不适等为特征的咽喉病。

V010-N00049.label: 喉瘖
V010-N00049.path: 中医疾病｜咽喉病类术语

V010-N00049.label: 小儿音哑

V010-N00049.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00049.label: 喉喑
V010-N00049.path: 眼、耳鼻喉科病｜耳鼻喉科病

V010-N00109.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00109.label: 中风病
V010-N00109.path: 头身形体病类术语｜颅脑类病
V010-N00109.definition: 泛指因年老或脏腑虚衰，情志变动,外因诱发,致使风痰入络，或气血逆乱，脑络痹阻,或血溢于脑所引起，以突然昏仆，或半身不遂，口眼斜，肢体麻木，舌蹇难言等为特征的一类急慢性颅脑病。

V010-N00109.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00109.label: 风痱
V010-N00109.path: 头身形体病类术语｜颅脑类病｜中风病
V010-N00109.definition: 因年老体衰，中风后风痰蒙蔽清窍，瘀阻经络，或精亏髓空，元神失养所致。临床以中风后言语不清，发音难辨,思维迟钝，记忆力锐减,站立不稳，步态慌张，容易跌倒，手足颤动，口角流涎，甚则口不能言，足废不用等为特征的中风病。

V010-N00109.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00109.label: 中风
V010-N00109.definition: 以突然半身不遂，语言謇涩或失语，口舌斜，偏身麻木，严重者突然昏仆为主要表现，并具有起病急，变化快，如风邪善行数变特点的疾病。

V010-N00109.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00109.label: 风痱
V010-N00109.path: 第1部分：内科学｜脑病｜中风后遗症
V010-N00109.definition: 以言语不清，发音难辨，思维迟钝，记忆力锐减，站立不稳,步态慌张，容易跌倒，手足颤动，口角流涎，甚则口不能言，足废不用等为特征的中风后遗症。

V010-N00109.label: 中风
V010-N00109.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜内科疾病｜脑系疾病
V010-N00109.definition: 以突然昏扑，半身不遂，语言赛涩或失语，口舌歪斜，偏身麻木为主要表现，并具有起病急,变化快，如风邪善行数变的特点的疾病。

V010-N00109.label: 中风
V010-N00109.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜脑病
V010-N00109.definition: 以突然昏仆，半身不遂，语言謇涩或失语，口舌蜗斜，偏身麻木为主要表现，并具有起病急，变化快，如风邪善行数变的特点的疾病。

V010-N00109.label: 风痱
V010-N00109.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜脑病
V010-N00109.definition: 中风所致失音不语的疾病。

V010-N00109.label: 中风病
V010-N00109.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜颅脑类病

V010-N00109.label: 风痱
V010-N00109.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜颅脑类病｜中风病

V010-N00109.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00109.label: 中风病
V010-N00109.aliases: 中风； 卒中； Wind stroke disorders； Apoplexy
V010-N00109.pinyinNames: zhong feng bing; zhòng fēng bìng
V010-N00109.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00109.definition: Characterized by sudden fainting, hemiplegia or deviation of the eyes and mouth corner. Often results from wind phlegm attacking the meridians, disorder of qi and blood, or bleeding in the brain. It includes trismus, haemorrhagic stroke, ischemic stroke, facial palsy and hemiplegia.

V010-N00109.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00109.label: 风痱
V010-N00109.aliases: 中风后遗症； 喑痱； Post-stroke disability
V010-N00109.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00109.definition: Characterized by post-stroke tongue stiffness and disuse muscle atrophy. Contributing factors may include wind phlegm disturbing the heart mind, stagnant blood obstructing the meridians, or deficiency of essence and marrow.

V010-N00109.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00109.label: 中风

V010-N00109.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00109.label: 卒中

V010-N00109.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00109.label: 中风

V010-N00116.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00116.label: 口僻
V010-N00116.path: 头身形体病类术语｜颅脑类病｜中风病
V010-N00116.definition: 因卫外不固,风邪或夹寒、热、暑湿等乘虚入中面部一侧筋脉，或因风痰阻滞经络，筋脉失养所致。临床以突发一侧面部麻木、肌肉瘫痪,口眼向健侧歪斜,额纹消失,眼睑闭合不全,口角流涎,鼻唇沟平坦或消失，言语不利等为特征的中风病。

V010-N00116.label: 口僻
V010-N00116.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜内科疾病｜脑系疾病
V010-N00116.definition: 以口眼歪斜于一侧，目不能闭，口角流涎为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00116.label: 口僻
V010-N00116.englishNames: Facial paralysis disorder; deviated mouth; wry mouth
V010-N00116.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜颅脑类病｜中风病

V010-N00116.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00116.label: 面瘫
V010-N00116.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜机体活动情况｜瘫痪

V010-N00116.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00116.label: 口眼斜
V010-N00116.aliases: 吊线风； 面瘫； 歪咀风； 口眼歪斜
V010-N00116.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V010-N00116.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00116.label: 口僻
V010-N00116.englishNames: Facial paralysis disorder; deviated mouth; wry mouth; Deviation of the mouth corner
V010-N00116.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00116.definition: Characterized by a sudden facial numbness, deviation of the eyes and mouth corner and slurred speech. Often occurs when wind cold or wind heat affects the face or wind phlegm obstructs the meridians.

V010-N00116.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00116.label: 口僻

V010-N00116.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00116.label: 口僻
V010-N00116.path: 临床各科｜耳鼻喉口齿科
V010-N00116.definition: a diseased state characterized by skewing of the mouth to one side of the face with drooling from the corner of the mouth and inability to close the eye

V010-N00121.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00121.label: 头风病
V010-N00121.path: 头身形体病类术语｜颅脑类病
V010-N00121.definition: 泛指因风邪或夹带寒、热、暑、湿等邪侵袭，或情志变动，肝阳化风,风痰上扰清空，脉络拘急或失养而引起的反复发作性头痛等为特征的一类疾病。

V010-N00121.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00121.label: 颤病
V010-N00121.path: 头身形体病类术语｜颅脑类病
V010-N00121.definition: 因感染病邪或中毒、电击等损伤，或因痰浊、瘀血阻痹脑络，经气不利，或年老精血亏虚，脑失所养，虚风内动所致。临床以头部或手足颤动，或头摇不能自主，口眼臞动等为特征的颅脑病。

V010-N00121.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00121.label: 头风
V010-N00121.definition: 头痛病经久不愈，以头痛部位不定,作止无常，发作则持续不已，愈后遇触复发为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00121.label: 头风
V010-N00121.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜内科疾病｜脑系疾病
V010-N00121.definition: 头痛病经久不愈者。以其痛作止无常，发作则持续不已，愈后遇触复发为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00121.label: 头风
V010-N00121.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜脑病
V010-N00121.definition: 头痛病经久不愈，以头痛部位不定，作止无常，发作则持续不已，愈后遇触复发为主要表现的疾病。tou feng gān y&ng shäng kang zheng

V010-N00121.label: 头风病
V010-N00121.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜颅脑类病

V010-N00121.vocabName: T/CIATCM 104-2023（表14-表27）张仲景经方术语代码表
V010-N00121.label: 头风
V010-N00121.path: 经方病机（金匮要略）代码表｜中风病机

V010-N00121.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00121.label: 头风病
V010-N00121.aliases: 头风； 头痛病； Head wind disorder； Headache
V010-N00121.pinyinNames: tou feng bing; tóu fēng bìng
V010-N00121.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00121.definition: Characterized by chronic, recurrent headache with no fixed positions. Contributing factors may include external contraction of wind heat, wind cold or summer heat and dampness, hyperactive liver yang transforming into wind, or wind phlegm disturbing the mind. This condition is subcategorized into migraine, parietal headache or thunderclap headache.

V010-N00121.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00121.label: 颤病
V010-N00121.aliases: 脑风； 颤症； Parkinson’s disease
V010-N00121.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00121.definition: Characterized by tremor of hands and feet, involuntary shaking of the head or twitching of the mouth and eyes. Contributing factors may include medical conditions, poisoning, electrical shock, or age-related deficiency of essence and blood. It may also occur when phlegm or stagnant blood obstructs the brain collaterals or meridian qi.

V010-N00121.label: 头风

V010-N00122.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00122.label: 偏头风
V010-N00122.path: 头身形体病类术语｜颅脑类病｜头风病
V010-N00122.definition: 因内伤久病,肝阳或郁火、风痰、瘀血等邪内伏，复由外感六淫或情志变动等外因诱发，上攻头巅，痹阻经络,或脉络拘急所致。临床以头痛偏于一侧，剧烈难忍,突发突止,反复发作等为特征的头风病。

V010-N00122.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00122.label: 偏头风［痛］
V010-N00122.definition: 以反复发作，来去突然的一侧剧烈头痛为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00122.label: 偏头痛
V010-N00122.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00122.definition: 又称"偏头风”。偏于一侧的头部疼痛,往往比较顽固，可能定期发作，常伴有恶心、呕吐、眼睛牵扯痛等症。

V010-N00122.label: 偏头风[痛]
V010-N00122.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜脑病
V010-N00122.definition: 又称“偏正头风”。以反复发作，来去突然的一侧剧烈头痛为主要表现的疾病。lei t6u feng

V010-N00122.label: 偏头风
V010-N00122.englishNames: hemilateral head wind; Migraine disorder; migraine
V010-N00122.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜颅脑类病｜头风病

V010-N00122.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00122.label: 偏头痛
V010-N00122.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V010-N00122.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00122.label: 偏头风
V010-N00122.aliases: 偏头痛； Migraine disorder； Migraine pain disorder； Migraine； 偏正头风
V010-N00122.englishNames: hemilateral head wind; Migraine disorder; migraine; Hemilateral head wind
V010-N00122.pinyinNames: pian tou feng; piān tóu fēng
V010-N00122.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00122.definition: A condition characterized by sudden, recurrent and intense headache occurring on one side of the head. Contributing factors may include wind cold, wind fire that carries phlegm, liver yang transforming into wind or stagnant blood obstructing the meridians. These factors may cause disordered qi and blood to affect the head.

V010-N00122.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00122.label: 偏头痛

V010-N00119.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00119.label: 脑鸣
V010-N00119.path: 头身形体病类术语｜颅脑类病
V010-N00119.definition: 因年老肾虚,或恣情纵欲,损伤肝肾阴精，髓海空虚,或心脾两虚，脑失所养,或痰湿内蕴，情志不畅，火郁化风,风痰上扰清空所致。临床以病人自觉脑内鸣响而非耳鸣,可伴见抑郁、焦虑,失眠、烦躁，记忆力下降等为特征的颅脑病。

V010-N00119.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00119.label: 脑鸣
V010-N00119.definition: 以自觉脑内如虫蛀鸣响为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00119.label: 脑鸣
V010-N00119.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00119.definition: 又称"头中鸣响”。自觉头脑内有声音鸣响。

V010-N00119.label: 脑鸣
V010-N00119.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜脑病
V010-N00119.definition: 以自觉脑内如虫蛀鸣响为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00119.label: 脑鸣
V010-N00119.englishNames: cerebral tinnitus; intracranial tinnitus; Cerebral tinnitus disorder
V010-N00119.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜颅脑类病

V010-N00119.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00119.label: 脑鸣
V010-N00119.englishNames: ringing in the brain; Ringing in the brain; cerebral tinnitus; intracranial tinnitus; intracranial tunnitus; Cerebral tinnitus disorder
V010-N00119.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00119.definition: Characterized by a subjective sensation of ringing in the brain instead of the ear. Associated symptoms may include depression, anxiety, insomnia, restlessness and poor memory. Often results from aged-related kidney deficiency. Alternatively, it may also occur when stagnant fire (due to stress or anxiety) ascends to affect the head.

V010-N00067.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00067.label: 痿证类病
V010-N00067.definition: 泛指因湿热浸淫、伤及筋脉，或情志所伤，或先天不足及年老肾衰，肝肾亏损,肺脾气虚等致使筋骨、肌肉等失于濡养而引起的一类疾病。

V010-N00067.label: 肢体痿废
V010-N00067.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00067.definition: 四肢痿软无力，肌肉萎缩，出现功能障碍甚至功能丧失的表现。

V010-N00067.label: 痿证类病
V010-N00067.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语

V010-N00067.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00067.label: 肢体痿废
V010-N00067.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V010-N00067.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00067.label: 肢体痿废
V010-N00067.englishNames: disabled wilted limbs; Limb flaccidity and disuse
V010-N00067.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V010-N00067.definition: Flaccidity, weakness and muscular atrophy of the four extremities, coupled with loss or impairment of functions. Often results from malnourishment of the muscles or sinews due to damp heat or deficiency of essence and fluids.

V010-N00067.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00067.label: 痿证类病
V010-N00067.aliases: 痿病； 痿证； Flaccidity disorder； Wilting disorder； Wei-flaccidity pattern
V010-N00067.englishNames: category of wilting disease; Wei-flaccidity disorders; flaccidity diseases
V010-N00067.pinyinNames: wei zheng lei bing; wěi zhèng lèi bìng
V010-N00067.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00067.definition: A group of disorders characterized by limb weakness and muscle atrophy caused by malnourishment of the muscles or sinews, resulting from damp heat, emotions, congenital weakness, age-related deficiency of the liver and kidney, or qi deficiency of the lung and spleen.

V010-N00171.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00171.label: 气瘿
V010-N00171.path: 头身形体病类术语｜瘿类病
V010-N00171.definition: 因饮食、居住环境缺碘，或因情志失调，禀赋遗传因素等，致使痰气互结、凝聚于颈前所致。临床以颈前结喉两侧呈弥漫性肿大，皮色如常,触之柔软，偶有结块,可随喜怒消长等为特征的癭病。

V010-N00171.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00171.label: 气瘿
V010-N00171.path: 第2部分：外科学｜瘿瘤岩疾病｜瘿
V010-N00171.definition: 以颈前漫肿，肿块柔软无痛，可随喜怒而消长为主要表现的癭。

V010-N00171.label: 气瘿
V010-N00171.englishNames: qi goiter; Qi goiter disorder; simple goiter; endemic goiter
V010-N00171.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜瘿类病

V010-N00171.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00171.label: 气瘿
V010-N00171.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜皮肤科类｜瘿

V010-N00171.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00171.label: 气瘿
V010-N00171.englishNames: qi goiter; Qi goiter disorder; simple goiter; endemic goiter; Qi goiter
V010-N00171.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00171.definition: Characterized by diffuse swelling in the front of the neck with a normal skin colour. It may feel soft or nodular and its size changes with emotions. Contributing factors may include diet, iodine deficiency, emotions or heredity. These factors may cause phlegm qi stagnation in the front of the neck.

V010-N00171.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00171.label: 气瘿

V010-N00171.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00171.label: 瘿
V010-N00171.aliases: BNG120； 粉瘿瘤； 气瘿； 瘿瘤； Goiter Like Diseases

V010-N00171.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00171.label: 气瘿
V010-N00171.definition: a goiter that is painless and soft to the touch and that swells and shrinks with the patient’s moods

V010-N00171.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00171.label: 瘿
V010-N00171.aliases: BNG120； 粉瘿瘤； 气瘿； 瘿瘤； Goiter Like Diseases
V010-N00171.definition: enlargement of the thyroid gland, causing a swelling in the front part of the neck

V010-N00139.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00139.label: 乳癖
V010-N00139.path: 头身形体病类术语｜乳房类病
V010-N00139.definition: 因情志内伤，冲任失调,气血痰凝于乳腺所致。临床以乳房部位出现形状大小不一的肿块，或伴疼痛，可随月经周期或情绪变化而消长等为特征的周期性乳房病。

V010-N00139.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00139.label: 乳癖
V010-N00139.path: 第2部分：外科学｜乳房疾病
V010-N00139.definition: 以乳房部疼痛结块，与月经周期及情志变化密切相关为主要表现的良性增生性疾病。

V010-N00139.label: 乳癖
V010-N00139.path: 中医药学名词：外科学等（2013）｜外科学｜疾病
V010-N00139.definition: 以乳房部疼痛结块，与月经周期及情志变化密切相关为主要表现的良性增生性疾病。相当于乳腺增生病。

V010-N00139.label: 乳癖
V010-N00139.englishNames: breast lump; lump in breast; mammary hyperplasia; Breast lump disorder; breast lump(hyperplasia of mammary gland)
V010-N00139.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜乳房类病

V010-N00139.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00139.label: 乳癖
V010-N00139.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜儿科类

V010-N00139.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00139.label: 乳癖
V010-N00139.englishNames: breast lump; lump in breast; mammary hyperplasia; Breast lumps; Breast lump disorder; breast lump(hyperplasia of mammary gland)
V010-N00139.pinyinNames: ru xian; ru pi; rǔ pǐ
V010-N00139.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00139.definition: Characterized by breast lumps with or without pain that change with emotions or menstrual cycles. Contributing factors may include emotional disturbance and disharmony between the Chong and Ren meridians. These factors may cause stagnant qi, blood and phlegm to remain in the mammary gland.

V010-N00139.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00139.label: 乳癖
V010-N00139.englishNames: mammary hyperplasia; lump in breast; breast lump(hyperplasia of mammary gland)

V010-N00139.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00139.label: 乳癖
V010-N00139.englishNames: mammary hyperplasia; lump in breast; breast lump(hyperplasia of mammary gland)

V010-N00071.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00071.label: 痹证类病
V010-N00071.aliases: 风湿病； 风湿痹病； 痹证； 痹病
V010-N00071.definition: 泛指因风寒湿等邪侵袭或凝滞肌肤筋骨，经络痹阻而引起肢节疼痛、麻木、屈伸不利等为特征的一类疾病。

V010-N00071.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00071.label: 痹病
V010-N00071.definition: 以肌肉、筋骨、关节酸痛、麻木、重着、灼热，或关节肿大、僵直、畸形为主要表现的疾病的统称。

V010-N00071.label: 痹病
V010-N00071.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜肢体病
V010-N00071.definition: 以肌肉、筋骨、关节酸痛、麻木、重着、灼热，或关节肿大、僵直、畸形为主要表现的疾病的统称。

V010-N00071.label: 痹证类病
V010-N00071.aliases: 风湿病； 风湿痹病； 痹证； 痹病
V010-N00071.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语

V010-N00071.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00071.label: 痹证类病
V010-N00071.aliases: 风湿病； 风湿痹病； 痹证； 痹病； Impediment disorders； Joint impediment disorders； Bi-impediment disease/pattern
V010-N00071.englishNames: bi-impediment diseases; category of impediment disease; Bi-impediment disorders
V010-N00071.pinyinNames: bi zheng lei bing; bì zhèng lèi bìng
V010-N00071.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00071.definition: A group of disorders characterized by joint pain, numbness and impaired movement due to wind, cold and dampness or heat attacking the meridians.

V010-N00071.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00071.label: 痹病

V010-N00196.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00196.label: 肾着
V010-N00196.englishNames: low back pain due to cold dampness
V010-N00196.path: 头身形体病类术语｜痹证类病｜腰痹
V010-N00196.definition: 因寒湿侵袭腰部，痹阻经脉所致。临床以腰部冷痛重着，转侧不利等为特征的肢体痹病。

V010-N00196.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00196.label: 肾著
V010-N00196.path: 第1部分：内科学｜肾膀胱病
V010-N00196.definition: 以腰部冷痛重着，转侧不利，遇阴雨则加重，多伴腹重下坠为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00196.label: 肾著
V010-N00196.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜内科疾病｜肾膀胱疾病
V010-N00196.definition: 以腰部冷痛重着，转侧不利，遇阴雨则加重，多伴腹重下坠为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00196.label: 肾著
V010-N00196.englishNames: kidney disorder with cold painful waist
V010-N00196.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜肾膀胱病
V010-N00196.definition: 以腰部冷痛重着，转侧不利，遇阴雨则加重，多伴腹重下坠为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00196.label: 肾着
V010-N00196.path: 中医疾病｜头身形体病类术语｜痹证类病｜腰痹

V010-N00196.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00196.label: 肾着
V010-N00196.englishNames: low back pain due to cold dampness; kidney affection by cold dampness; Lower back pain due to cold dampness
V010-N00196.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00196.definition: Characterized by lower back pain and heaviness with a cold sensation and difficulty turning over. Often occurs when cold dampness obstructs the meridians in the low back.

V010-N00196.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00196.label: 肾着

V010-N00073.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00073.label: 着痹
V010-N00073.path: 头身形体病类术语｜痹证类病｜风寒湿痹
V010-N00073.definition: 因湿邪为主侵袭人体肢节所致。临床以所侵犯关节及肌肉等处重着酸痛，固定不移，或患处关节肿胀等为特征的肢体痹病。

V010-N00073.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00073.label: 着痹
V010-N00073.path: 第1部分：内科学｜肢体病｜痹病
V010-N00073.definition: 湿性黏腻滞着,以肢体关节重着酸痛，痛处固定，下肢为甚,或有肿胀，肌肤麻木，阴雨加重为特征的痹病。

V010-N00073.label: 著痹
V010-N00073.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜内科疾病｜经络肢体病

V010-N00075.definition: 因寒邪为主侵袭人体肢节所致。临床以所侵犯关节冷痛、固定不移，得热则舒等为特征的肢体痹病。

V010-N00066.path: 头身形体病类术语｜痹证类病
V010-N00066.definition: 因下肢受寒，或老年经气不利,肢体筋肉痉挛所致。临床以小腿或指趾筋肉掣痛、僵硬，屈伸不得，局部扳伸、搓揉、热敷即可缓解等为特征的发作性肢体痹病。

V010-N00187.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00187.label: 疝气类病
V010-N00187.definition: 泛指因小儿发育不全，老年体弱，中气不足，或因寒热邪聚阴分，气血不畅，或由哭泣、咳嗽、排便、排尿及七情变动导致腹内负压增高，迫使腹腔内游离脏器突入阴囊而引起的一类疾病。

V010-N00187.label: 疝气
V010-N00187.definition: 以阴囊、小腹疼痛肿起,涉及腰、胁、背以及心窝部、脐周，伴有四肢厥冷,冷气抢心，止作无时为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00187.definition: Characterized by an abnormal protrusion of abdominal cavity contents into the scrotum or inguinal canal. Contributing factors include maldevelopment, ageing, spleen qi deficiency or stagnation of qi and blood. It may also result from increased negative abdominal pressure due to crying, coughing, emotions or straining due to constipation or problems with urination.

V010-N00062.definition: 因禀质特异，脏腑虚损，兼感外邪，或感受花粉、粉尘及不洁之气所致。临床以突然或反复的鼻痒，喷嚏频作，鼻流清涕如水，鼻塞等为特征的鼻病。

V010-N00062.path: 第9部分：耳鼻喉科学｜鼻病

V010-N00053.definition: 因外邪侵袭，或脏腑蕴热，蒸灼鼻窍，或因脏腑虚损,邪留鼻窦所致。临床以鼻流浊涕，量多不止，鼻塞，嗅觉减退，或鼻道有脓，可伴见头晕胀闷等为特征的鼻病。

V010-N00010.definition: 因尿布未能及时更换，湿热秽浊浸渍肌肤所致。临床以婴儿臀部、阴部及大腿内侧尿布包裹部位皮肤出现红斑、糜烂、渗液等为特征的小儿皮肤病。

V010-N00010.definition: 以臀部、会阴、大腿尿布包裹部位内侧皮肤及外阴黏膜出现红斑、糜烂、渗液为主要表现的小儿皮肤病。

V010-N00010.definition: Characterized by sore, red and irritated skin on the convex surfaces of the buttocks and the bulge of the groin. Often occurs when the baby’s skin become exposed to urine and faeces in a nappy/diaper.

V010-N00016.definition: 因体质虚弱,病久正虚，脾阳受伤，肝风内动，或由急惊风转化所致。临床以肢体颤动或蠕动，或抽搐时作时止,嗜睡、露睛，神疲、面白，或吐或泻，大便色青等为特征，反复发作的小儿慢性痉病。

V010-N00016.label: 慢惊风
V010-N00016.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜儿科疾病
V010-N00016.definition: 病势缓慢，以反复抽痉，昏迷或瘫痪为主症的惊风。

V010-N00016.englishNames: chronic infantile convulsion; Recurrent convulsion disorder
V010-N00016.path: 中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病｜小儿惊风

V010-N00016.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00016.label: 慢惊
V010-N00016.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V010-N00016.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00016.label: 慢惊风
V010-N00016.englishNames: chronic infantile convulsion; Recurrent convulsion disorder; Chronic infantile convulsion
V010-N00016.pinyinNames: man jing feng; màn jīng fēng
V010-N00016.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00016.definition: Characterized by repeated twitching of hands and feet, intermittent convulsions, fatigue, a pale face, sleepiness with eyes unclosed, vomiting and diarrhoea of bluish stools. Often results from healthy qi deficiency, damage to spleen yang or internal stirring of liver wind. It may also develop from acute infantile convulsion.

V010-N00016.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00016.label: 慢惊风

V010-N00016.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00016.label: 慢惊风
V010-N00016.definition: repeated infantile convulsion of gradual onset, associated with loss of consciousness or paralysis and poor prognosis

V010-N00011.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00011.label: 急惊风
V010-N00011.path: 小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病｜小儿惊风
V010-N00011.definition: 因感染时邪疫毒，高热或肠胃积滞、惊恐、风痰等邪陷心肝所致。临床以突发高热、神昏，目直，牙关紧闭，颈项强直，四肢抽搐等为特征的小儿急性痉病。

V010-N00011.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00011.label: 急惊风
V010-N00011.path: 第7部分：儿科学｜心肝系病｜惊风
V010-N00011.definition: 以发病急骤，发热、抽搐、昏迷为特征的惊风。

V010-N00011.label: 急惊风
V010-N00011.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜儿科疾病
V010-N00011.definition: 以发病急骤,高热抽搐，昏迷为特征的惊风。

V010-N00011.label: 急惊风
V010-N00011.englishNames: acute infantile convulsion; Acute convulsion disorder
V010-N00011.path: 中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病｜小儿惊风

V010-N00011.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00011.label: 急惊
V010-N00011.aliases: 抽风； 急惊风； 惊厥
V010-N00011.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V010-N00011.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00011.label: 急惊风
V010-N00011.englishNames: acute infantile convulsion; Acute convulsion disorder; Acute infantile convulsion
V010-N00011.pinyinNames: ji jing feng; jí jīng fēng
V010-N00011.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00011.definition: Characterized by a sudden onset of fever, loss of consciousness, blank staring, trismus, neck stiffness and convulsions of the limbs. Often results from seasonal pathogens, heat or indigestion in the stomach, fear/fright and phlegm accumulation that affects the heart and liver.

V010-N00011.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00011.label: 急惊风

V010-N00011.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00011.label: 急惊风
V010-N00011.definition: infantile convulsion of acute onset, accompanied by high fever and loss of consciousness

V010-N00221.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00221.label: 食积
V010-N00221.path: 小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病｜积滞
V010-N00221.definition: 因饮食所伤，积滞肠胃所致。临床以皖腹胀满，暖腐吐酸，食欲减退，大便酸臭，或如败卵，或伴见腹痛、哭闹，大便不调等为特征的小儿积滞病。

V010-N00221.label: 食积
V010-N00221.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜儿科疾病
V010-N00221.definition: 岁以上小儿因伤食所致的积滞。

V010-N00221.label: 食积
V010-N00221.englishNames: food accumulation; Food retention disorder; food dyspepsia; Spleen system disorders; dyspepsia
V010-N00221.path: 中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病｜积滞

V010-N00221.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00221.label: 食积
V010-N00221.englishNames: food dyspepsia; food accumulation; Food retention disorder; Spleen system disorders; dyspepsia; Food stagnation
V010-N00221.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00221.definition: Characterized by abdominal distension and fullness, belching, acid reflux, decreased appetite, and strong-odoured stools. Associated symptoms may include abdominal pain, crying and irregular bowel movements. Often occurs when improper diet damages the spleen and stomach and food is retained in the stomach and intestines.

V010-N00221.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00221.label: 食积

V010-N00221.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00221.label: 食积
V010-N00221.definition: a diseased state characterized by the accumulation of undigested food in the stomach and intestines, causing abdominal distension and pain, vomiting, diarrhea and anorexia

V010-N00013.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00013.label: 疳病
V010-N00013.path: 小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病
V010-N00013.definition: 因喂养不当，或先天不足，或久病损伤，脾胃虚弱，气血精微不足以濡养脏腑，影响生长发育所致。临床以面黄肌瘦，腹部膨大等全身虚羸征象为特征的小儿脾系病。

V010-N00013.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00013.label: 疳证
V010-N00013.path: 第7部分：儿科学｜脾胃系病
V010-N00013.definition: 以小儿慢性营养不良，形体虚弱羸瘦为特征的疾病。

V010-N00013.label: 疳病
V010-N00013.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜儿科疾病
V010-N00013.definition: 以形体虚弱羸瘦为特征的慢性营养不良疾病。

V010-N00013.label: 疳病
V010-N00013.englishNames: Infantile malnutrition disorder; infantile malnutrition; infantile malnutrition disease; gan
V010-N00013.path: 中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病

V010-N00013.label: 疳积
V010-N00013.englishNames: infantile malnutrition; infantile malnutrition with accumulation; gan disease with food stagnation; mild (infantile) malnutrition with accumulation; Infantile Malnutrition
V010-N00013.path: 中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病｜疳病

V010-N00013.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00013.label: 疳证
V010-N00013.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜儿科类

V010-N00013.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00013.label: 疳病
V010-N00013.aliases: 疳证； Infantile malnutrition disorder； Malnutrition pattern
V010-N00013.englishNames: Infantile malnutrition disorder; infantile malnutrition; infantile malnutrition disease; gan; Infantile malnutrition
V010-N00013.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00013.definition: Characterized by a sallow complexion, muscle wasting and bulging abdomen. Often results from improper feeding, congenital weakness or deficiency of the spleen and stomach. These factors may cause the failure of qi, blood and nutrients to nourish the zang–fu organs, hence delaying the growth and development of babies.

V010-N00013.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00013.label: 疳积
V010-N00013.englishNames: infantile malnutrition; infantile malnutrition with accumulation; gan disease with food stagnation; mild (infantile) malnutrition with accumulation; Infantile Malnutrition; Mild malnutrition with food stagnation
V010-N00013.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00013.definition: An intermediate stage of infantile malnutrition characterized by emaciation, a sallow complexion, bulging abdomen, veins showing through the skin, poor spirit, and restlessness. Often results from improper feeding or food stagnation in the stomach and intestines.

V010-N00013.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00013.label: 疳病

V010-N00008.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00008.label: 客忤
V010-N00008.path: 小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病
V010-N00008.definition: 因小儿神气未定，骤见生人或突遇异物，扰动心神所致。临床以突然惊叫啼哭，甚或伴见面色变异，呕吐，腹痛，腹泻，手足疝等为特征的小儿心系病。

V010-N00008.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00008.label: 客忤
V010-N00008.path: 第7部分：儿科学｜心肝系病
V010-N00008.definition: 以小儿骤见生人异物，或骤闻巨大声响,突然惊叫啼哭,甚或面色变异,呕吐，腹痛，腹泻，手足疝等为主要表现的儿科疾病。

V010-N00008.label: 客忤
V010-N00008.englishNames: sudden frightening in infant; fright seizure; infantile fright; Fright seizure disorder
V010-N00008.path: 中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病

V010-N00008.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00008.label: 客忤
V010-N00008.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜儿科类

V010-N00008.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00008.label: 客忤
V010-N00008.aliases: 小儿客忤； Fright seizure disorder； Infantile fright seizure
V010-N00008.englishNames: sudden frighten in infant; sudden frightening in infant; fright seizure; infantile fright; Fright seizure disorder; Fright seizure
V010-N00008.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00008.definition: Characterized by sudden screaming or crying, vomiting, facial colour change, diarrhoea and abdominal pain. Often results from fright upon exposure to strangers or unknown events.

V010-N00008.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00008.label: 客忤

V010-N00008.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00008.label: 客忤
V010-N00008.definition: a seizure of fright that causes vomiting, abdominal pain, and even convulsions

V010-N00018.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00018.label: 夜啼
V010-N00018.path: 小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病
V010-N00018.definition: 因脾寒、心热、惊恐等扰动心神所致。临床以1岁以内婴儿经常在夜间啼哭不停,甚至通宵达旦，而白天如常等为特征的小儿心系病。

V010-N00018.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00018.label: 夜啼
V010-N00018.path: 第7部分：儿科学｜心肝系病
V010-N00018.definition: 以婴儿日间安静，夜间啼哭不安为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00018.label: 夜啼
V010-N00018.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜儿科疾病
V010-N00018.definition: 以新生儿日间安静，夜间啼哭不安为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00018.label: 夜啼
V010-N00018.englishNames: Night Crying; nocturnal crying; night crying; Night crying disorder; nisht crying
V010-N00018.path: 中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜小儿杂病

V010-N00018.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00018.label: 夜啼
V010-N00018.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜儿科类｜小儿啼哭

V010-N00018.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00018.label: 夜啼
V010-N00018.englishNames: Night Crying; nocturnal crying; night crying; Night crying disorder; nisht crying; Night crying
V010-N00018.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00018.definition: A condition that often occurs in babies under the age of one year. Characterized by continuous crying during or even through the night but appearing normal at daytime. Often results from spleen cold, heart heat and fear or fright that disturb the heart mind.

V010-N00018.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00018.label: 夜啼

V010-N00018.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00018.label: 夜啼
V010-N00018.definition: morbid night crying in babies, but quiet at daytime

V010-N00080.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00080.label: 鹅口疮
V010-N00080.path: 小儿相关病类术语｜新生儿类病
V010-N00080.definition: 因胎禀不足，感受秽毒，或心脾积热，上熏口舌所致。临床以口腔、舌上出现点片状白屑，状如鹅口等为特征的新生儿及婴儿病。

V010-N00080.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00080.label: 鹅口疮
V010-N00080.path: 第7部分：儿科学｜脾胃系病
V010-N00080.definition: 以小儿口腔黏膜、舌头上布满白屑状物，状如鹅口为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00080.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00080.label: 雪口
V010-N00080.path: 第9部分：耳鼻喉科学｜口腔病
V010-N00080.definition: 以口内黏膜满布白屑或白色斑膜为主要表现的口腔病。

V010-N00080.label: 鹅口疮
V010-N00080.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜儿科疾病
V010-N00080.definition: 以小儿口腔黏膜、舌头上布生白屑状物，状如鹅口为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00080.label: 雪口
V010-N00080.path: 中医药学名词：外科学等（2013）｜耳鼻喉科学｜口腔病
V010-N00080.definition: 又称“鹅口疮”。以口内黏膜满布白屑或白色斑膜为主要表现的口腔病。

V010-N00080.label: 鹅口疮
V010-N00080.pinyinNames: e kou chuang; dong kou chuang
V010-N00080.path: 中医疾病｜小儿相关病类术语｜新生儿类病

V010-N00080.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00080.label: 小儿鹅口
V010-N00080.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V010-N00080.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00080.label: 雪口

V010-N00080.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00080.label: 鹅口疮

V010-N00080.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00080.label: 鹅口疮
V010-N00080.definition: a disease marked by white patches on the buccal mucosa and tongue

V010-N00134.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00134.label: 石瘕
V010-N00134.definition: 因气血瘀滞等，使胞宫宫体生瘤所致。临床以月经周期提前，经期延长，经量增多，甚或腹大如孕，按之坚硬等为特征的妇人瘤病。

V010-N00134.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00134.label: 石瘕
V010-N00134.path: 第6部分：妇科学｜妇科杂病
V010-N00134.definition: 以胞宫长有包块，质地坚硬，固定不移为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00134.label: 石瘕
V010-N00134.englishNames: stony conglomeration; stony uterine mass; Uterine mass disorder
V010-N00134.path: 中医疾病｜瘤癌病类术语｜瘤类病

V010-N00134.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00134.label: 石瘕
V010-N00134.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜妇科类｜其他

V010-N00134.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00134.label: 石瘕
V010-N00134.englishNames: stony conglomeration; stony uterine mass; Stony masses; Uterine mass disorder
V010-N00134.pinyinNames: shi xia; shi jia; shí jiǎ
V010-N00134.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00134.definition: A condition that may cause earlier period, prolonged period, and heavy menstrual volume. In severe cases, individual may have solid, bulky masses that can enlarge the uterus. They often occur as a result of stagnation of qi and blood.

V010-N00134.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00134.label: 石瘕
V010-N00134.englishNames: stony conglomeration; stony uterine mass; Strong Uterine Mass

V010-N00134.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00134.label: 石瘕
V010-N00134.englishNames: stony conglomeration; stony uterine mass; Strong Uterine Mass
V010-N00134.definition: a mass as hard as stone formed in the uterus

V010-N00082.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00082.label: 蛇皮癣
V010-N00082.path: 皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病
V010-N00082.definition: 因血虚风燥，皮肤失于濡养，或为遗传所致。临床以四肢、躯干皮肤干涩少汗，有蛇皮样鳞屑等为特征的皮肤疾病。

V010-N00082.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00082.label: 蛇皮癣
V010-N00082.definition: 以四肢、躯干皮肤干涩少汗，有蛇皮样鳞屑为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V010-N00082.label: 蛇皮癣
V010-N00082.path: 中医药学名词：外科学等（2013）｜皮肤科学｜疾病
V010-N00082.definition: 以四肢、躯干皮肤干涩少汗，有蛇皮样鳞屑为主要表现的皮肤疾病。相当于鱼鳞病。

V010-N00082.label: 蛇皮癣
V010-N00082.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病

V010-N00082.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00082.label: 蛇皮癣
V010-N00082.englishNames: ichthyosis; Dry skin disorder; Snake skin-like tinea
V010-N00082.pinyinNames: she pi xuan; shé pí xuǎn
V010-N00082.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00082.definition: Characterized by dry, thickened, scaly skin that resembles snake skin. Often results from genetic factors or malnourishment of the skin due to blood deficiency and invasion of wind dryness.

V010-N00079.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00079.label: 丹毒
V010-N00079.path: 皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病
V010-N00079.definition: 因皮肤、黏膜破损，火毒与血热搏结，蕴阻肌肤，不得外泄所致。临床以患部突然皮肤鲜红成片、色如涂丹，灼热肿胀，迅速蔓延，可伴见寒战、高热等为特征的皮肤疾病。

V010-N00079.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00079.label: 丹毒
V010-N00079.path: 第2部分：外科学｜疮疡类疾病
V010-N00079.definition: 以皮肤突然发红成片，色如涂丹为主要表现的急性感染性疾病。

V010-N00079.label: 丹毒
V010-N00079.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜外科疾病｜疮疡疾病
V010-N00079.definition: 以皮肤突然发红,色如涂丹为主要表现的急性感染性疾病。

V010-N00079.label: 丹毒
V010-N00079.path: 中医药学名词：外科学等（2013）｜外科学｜疾病
V010-N00079.definition: 以皮肤突然发红成片，色如涂丹为主要表现的急性感染性疾病。

V010-N00079.aliases: 火丹； 丹熛； Erysipelas disorder
V010-N00079.englishNames: erysipelas; e	canula drainagerysipelas; Erysipelas disorder; Erysipelas

V010-N00079.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00079.definition: Characterized by sudden onset of bright red, swollen and warm skin lesions that enlarge rapidly. Individuals may also experience chills and high fever. Often occurs when toxic fire and blood heat affects the skin.

V010-N00079.definition: an acute infection of the skin marked by intense local redness

V010-N00105.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00105.label: 黄水疮
V010-N00105.aliases: 浸淫疮； 滴脓疮； 脓窝疮
V010-N00105.path: 皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病
V010-N00105.definition: 因脾胃湿热，外感暑湿热毒，引发气机不畅，熏蒸皮肤所致。临床以脓疱、结痂、流黄水，浸淫成片，瘙痒疼痛，有接触传染及自体接种等特征的皮肤病。

V010-N00105.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00105.label: 黄水疮
V010-N00105.definition: 以皮肤脓疱、结痂、破流黄水，浸淫成疮，瘙痒为主要表现的传染性皮肤疾病。

V010-N00105.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00105.label: 浸淫疮
V010-N00105.path: 第3部分：皮肤科学｜疾病｜湿疮
V010-N00105.definition: 以皮疹浸淫全身，滋水较多为特征的湿疮。

V010-N00105.label: 黄水疮
V010-N00105.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜皮肤科疾病
V010-N00105.definition: 以生于皮肤的脓疱、结痂、流黄水，浸淫成片,瘙痒为主要表现的皮肤病。

V010-N00105.label: 浸淫疮
V010-N00105.path: 中医药学名词：外科学等（2013）｜皮肤科学｜疾病
V010-N00105.definition: 以皮疹浸淫全身，滋水较多为主要表现的湿疮。

V010-N00105.label: 黄水疮
V010-N00105.path: 中医药学名词：外科学等（2013）｜皮肤科学｜疾病
V010-N00105.definition: 又称“滴脓疮”。以皮肤脓疱、结痂、破流黄水，浸淫成疮，瘙痒为主要表现的皮肤疾病。相当于脓疱疮。

V010-N00105.label: 黄水疮
V010-N00105.aliases: 浸淫疮； 滴脓疮； 脓窝疮； 脓疱疮； Impetigo
V010-N00105.englishNames: Impetigo disorder; yellow-water sore（impetigo); yellow fluid ulcers; impetigo; Yellow Fluid Ulcers
V010-N00105.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病

V010-N00105.label: 黄水疮

V010-N00105.label: 浸淫疮
V010-N00105.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜皮肤科类｜湿疹

V010-N00105.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00105.label: 天疱疮
V010-N00105.englishNames: lingering pemphigus; Pemphigus; pemphigus and pemphigoid
V010-N00105.pinyinNames: tian pao chuang; tiān pào chuāng
V010-N00105.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00105.definition: Commonly affects children in summer or autumn. Characterized by initial skin blisters that contain pus and have an inflamed base, which often begin on the scalp and torso. Some individuals may also experience skin lesions that do not cause itch or pain. Often results from summer heat and dampness that affects the lung meridian and scorches the skin.

V010-N00105.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00105.label: 黄水疮
V010-N00105.aliases: 浸淫疮； 滴脓疮； 脓窝疮； Impetigo disorder； 脓疱疮； Impetigo
V010-N00105.englishNames: Yellow-water sore; impetigo; Impetigo disorder; yellow-water sore（impetigo); yellow fluid ulcers; Yellow Fluid Ulcers
V010-N00105.pinyinNames: huáng shuǐ chuāng; huang shui chuang
V010-N00105.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00105.definition: Characterized by itchy or painful small vesicles that may develop into scab-like, yellowish crust. Often occurs when exogenous summer heat and dampness obstructs the flow of qi and fumigates the skin.

V010-N00105.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00105.label: 黄水疮
V010-N00105.aliases: BWP040； 滴脓疮； 脓窝疮； 脓疱疮； Impetigo
V010-N00105.englishNames: Yellow Fluid Ulcers; yellow-water sore（impetigo); yellow fluid ulcers; impetigo

V010-N00089.definition: 泛指因风热毒邪搏于肌肤，或怒动肝火，肝旺血燥，筋气不荣等所引起，以皮肤黏膜发生良性赘生物等为特征的一类皮肤病。

V010-N00081.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00081.label: 圆癣
V010-N00081.path: 皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病｜癣
V010-N00081.definition: 因湿热内蕴，外感邪毒所致。临床以皮肤平滑处起红疹、水疱、结痂、脱屑，呈环状有框廓,瘙痒等为特征的癣病。

V010-N00081.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00081.label: 圆癣
V010-N00081.path: 第3部分：皮肤科学｜疾病｜癣
V010-N00081.definition: 发生于面部、颈部、躯干及四肢近端，以疹如钱币有匡廓，瘙痒为特征的癣。

V010-N00081.label: 圆癣
V010-N00081.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜皮肤科疾病
V010-N00081.definition: 发生于面部、躯干及四肢近端，呈圆状的癣病。

V010-N00081.label: 圆癣
V010-N00081.path: 中医药学名词：外科学等（2013）｜皮肤科学｜疾病
V010-N00081.definition: 发生于面部、颈部、躯干及四肢近端，以疹如钱币有匡廓，瘙痒为特征的癣病。相当于体癣。

V010-N00081.label: 圆癣

V010-N00081.definition: Characterized by itchy, red rashes, blisters, crusting and scaling with a ring, especially on glabrous (hairless) skin. Often results from internal build up of damp heat and contraction of exogenous pathogens.

V010-N00088.definition: 因感受风毒,风湿蕴肤，血虚风燥，或湿热蕴结肌肤，或邪毒相染所致。临床以手掌水疱脱屑、粗糙、变厚、干燥皸裂，形如鹅掌，自觉痒痛等为特征的癣病。

V010-N00088.definition: 以手掌部皮肤粗糙、肥厚、干裂为特征的癣。

V010-N00088.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜皮肤科疾病
V010-N00088.definition: 发生于手掌部的浅部真菌皮肤病。

V010-N00088.path: 中医药学名词：外科学等（2013）｜皮肤科学｜疾病
V010-N00088.definition: 以手掌部皮肤粗糙、肥厚、干裂为特征的癣病。相当于手癣。

V010-N00091.definition: 因湿热下注，或感染邪毒所致。临床以足丫水疱、浸渍糜烂，渗流滋水，脱屑，自觉剧痒等为特征的癣病。

V010-N00091.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语

V010-N00091.path: 第3部分：皮肤科学｜疾病｜癣
V010-N00091.definition: 发生于足跖趾丫，以趾间浸渍糜烂，渗流滋水，足跖水疱，角化过度，脱屑,瘙痒等为特征的癣。注：相当于足癣。

V010-N00091.label: 脚湿气
V010-N00091.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜皮肤科疾病
V010-N00091.definition: 发生于趾丫，以趾间浸渍糜烂，渗流滋水，角化过度，脱屑，瘙痒等为主要表现的癣病。

V010-N00091.definition: 又称“田螺疱”。发生于足跖趾丫，以趾间浸渍糜烂，渗流滋水，足跖水疱，角化过度，脱屑，瘙痒等为主要表现的癣病。相当于足癣。
