V010-N00103.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00103.label: 湿疮
V010-N00103.definition: 以多形损害，对称分布，剧烈瘙痒，渗出倾向，反复发作，易成慢性等为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V010-N00103.label: 湿疮
V010-N00103.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜皮肤科疾病
V010-N00103.definition: 以对称分布，多形损害，剧烈瘙痒，倾向湿润，反复发作，易成慢性等为主要表现的过敏性炎症皮肤病。

V010-N00103.label: 湿疮
V010-N00103.path: 中医药学名词：外科学等（2013）｜皮肤科学｜疾病
V010-N00103.definition: 以多形损害，对称分布，剧烈瘙痒，渗出倾向，反复发作，易成慢性等为主要表现的皮肤疾病。相当于湿疹。

V010-N00103.label: 湿疮
V010-N00103.englishNames: Dampness sore disorder; eczema; dampness sore
V010-N00103.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病

V010-N00084.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00084.label: 蛇串疮
V010-N00084.path: 皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病
V010-N00084.definition: 因肝脾湿热，或肝经火盛,循经蕴肤，湿热火毒蕴积肌肤所致。临床以成簇疱疹沿身体单侧呈带状分布,初起红斑,随即为丘疹、水疱,累累如串珠,剧烈疼痛,灼痛或针刺样痛，或部分破溃,局部渗液，干燥结痂、脱落，可伴见臀核肿痛等为特征的皮肤病。

V010-N00084.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00084.label: 蛇串疮
V010-N00084.definition: 以集簇性水疱等沿身体单侧，断续排列成带,宛如蛇形，四畔が红，伴疼痛为主要表现的皮肤疾病。

V010-N00084.label: 蛇串疮
V010-N00084.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜皮肤科疾病
V010-N00084.definition: 以成簇水疱沿身体单侧呈带状分布，排列宛如蛇形，疼痛剧烈为主要表现的急性疱疹性皮肤病。

V010-N00084.label: 蛇串疮
V010-N00084.path: 中医药学名词：外科学等（2013）｜皮肤科学｜疾病
V010-N00084.definition: 又称“缠腰龙”，“缠腰火丹”。以集簇性水疱沿身体单侧，断续排列成带，宛如蛇形，四畔が红，伴疼痛为主要表现的皮肤疾病。相当于带状疱疹。

V010-N00084.label: 蛇串疮
V010-N00084.aliases: 蛇丹； 缠腰火丹； 缠腰龙
V010-N00084.englishNames: snakelike sores; herpes zoster; Herpes zoster disorder; snake-like sore; snake-clustered sores
V010-N00084.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜皮肤类病

V010-N00084.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00084.label: 蛇串疮
V010-N00084.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜皮肤科类

V010-N00084.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00084.label: 蛇串疮
V010-N00084.aliases: 蛇丹； 缠腰火丹； 缠腰龙； 带状疱疹； Shingles； Herpes zoster
V010-N00084.englishNames: snakelike sores; herpes zoster; Herpes zoster disorder; snake-like sore; Snake-shaped sore; snake-clustered sores
V010-N00084.pinyinNames: she chuan chuang; shé chuàn chuāng
V010-N00084.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00084.definition: Characterized by severely painful, bean-sized skin rash with a single stripe (snake-shaped) of blisters that wraps around one side of the torso. Often results from liver qi stagnation transforming into fire, damp heat retention in the spleen meridian or stagnation of damp heat and toxic fire in the skin.

V010-N00084.englishNames: Herpes  Zoster; herpes zoster; snakelike sores

V010-N00084.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00084.label: 蛇丹

V010-N00101.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00101.label: 肛痈
V010-N00101.path: 皮肤黏膜病类术语｜肛肠类病
V010-N00101.definition: 因过食肥甘、辛辣、醇酒等物，或肛门破损染毒，或肺脾两虚,湿热下注,蕴阻肛门,气血瘀滞，热毒化腐成脓所致。临床以发热、恶寒,肛门部红肿、灼热、疼痛，化脓溃后易成肛瘘等为特征的肛肠病。

V010-N00101.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00101.label: 肛痈
V010-N00101.definition: 肛管直肠周围间隙发生急、慢性感染而形成脓肿的疾病。

V010-N00101.label: 肛痈
V010-N00101.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜肛肠科疾病
V010-N00101.definition: 直肠周围间隙发生急性感染而形成的脓肿。

V010-N00101.label: 肛痈
V010-N00101.englishNames: anal abcess; anorectal abscess; perianal or perirectal abscess; Anal abscess disorder; anal abscess
V010-N00101.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜肛肠类病

V010-N00101.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00101.label: 肛痈
V010-N00101.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜肛肠科类

V010-N00101.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00101.label: 肛痈
V010-N00101.englishNames: Anorectal abscess; anal abcess; anal abscess; anorectal abscess; perianal or perirectal abscess; Anal abscess disorder
V010-N00101.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00101.definition: Characterized by fever, chills, redness, swelling, hotness and pain around the anus. In some cases, it can result in painful anal fistulas upon pus rupture. Often results from overeating of oily, sweet, hot and spicy food, excessive alcohol drinking, anal tears, deficiency of the lung and spleen, or downward flow of damp heat to affect the anus.

V010-N00101.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00101.label: 肛痈
V010-N00101.aliases: BWG040； 肛门直肠周围脓肿
V010-N00101.englishNames: anal abscess; perianal or perirectal abscess

V010-N00085.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00085.label: 内痔
V010-N00085.path: 皮肤黏膜病类术语｜肛肠类病｜痔疮
V010-N00085.definition: 因脏腑本虚，饮食不节，或久坐、久立、负重、便秘等因素引起的气血瘀滞于肛门，筋脉交错，结滞不散所致。临床以肛门齿线以上发生静脉曲张团块,表面覆以黏膜，常有便血和痔核脱出等为特征的痔疮病。

V010-N00085.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00085.label: 内痔
V010-N00085.path: 第4部分：肛肠科学｜疾病｜痔漏｜痔
V010-N00085.definition: 生于肛门齿线以上，由直肠末端黏膜下静脉丛曲张或肛垫病理性肥大移位形成的柔软团块，以便鲜血和有肿物脱出为主要表现的痔。

V010-N00085.label: 内痔
V010-N00085.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜肛肠科疾病
V010-N00085.definition: 生于肛门齿线以上，直肠末端黏膜下的痔。

V010-N00085.label: 内痔
V010-N00085.path: 中医药学名词：外科学等（2013）｜肛肠科学｜疾病
V010-N00085.definition: 生于肛门齿线以上，由直肠末端黏膜下静脉曲张或移位形成，以便鲜血和有肿物脱出为主要表现的痔。

V010-N00085.label: 内痔
V010-N00085.englishNames: internal hemorrhoid; Interior haemorroid disorder; internal hemorroid
V010-N00085.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜肛肠类病｜痔疮

V010-N00085.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00085.label: 内痔
V010-N00085.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜肛肠科类｜痔疮

V010-N00085.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00085.label: 内痔
V010-N00085.englishNames: internal hemorrhoid; internal hemorroid; Internal haemorrhoids; Interior haemorroid disorder
V010-N00085.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00085.definition: Characterized by varicose dilatation of a vein above the dentate line, bloody stools and prolapsed haemorrhoids. Internal haemorrhoids often result from deficiency of the zang–fu organs, an improper diet, sitting or standing for an extended period of time, weight-bearing or constipation.

V010-N00085.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00085.label: 内痔
V010-N00085.englishNames: internal hemorrhoid; Interal Piles; Internal Hemorrhoids

V010-N00085.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00085.label: 内痔
V010-N00085.englishNames: internal hemorrhoid; Interal Piles; Internal Hemorrhoids
V010-N00085.definition: varicose dilatation of a vein of the superior hemorrhoidal plexus, situated proximal to the pectinate line

V010-N00104.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00104.label: 肛裂
V010-N00104.path: 皮肤黏膜病类术语｜肛肠类病
V010-N00104.definition: 因热结肠燥，或阴津不足,燥屎裂伤肛门皮肤，或湿热下注所致。临床以肛管皮肤全层裂开，形成溃疡，便秘，排便时和排便后肛门部疼痛、出血等为特征的肛肠病。

V010-N00104.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00104.label: 肛裂
V010-N00104.definition: 肛管的皮肤全层纵行裂开并形成溃疡的疾病。

V010-N00104.label: 肛裂
V010-N00104.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜肛肠科疾病
V010-N00104.definition: 以肛门周期性疼痛，即排便时阵发性刀割样疼痛，便后数分钟缓解，随后又持续剧烈疼痛可达数小时，伴有习惯性便秘，便时出血为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00104.label: 肛裂
V010-N00104.path: 中医药学名词：外科学等（2013）｜肛肠科学｜疾病
V010-N00104.definition: 又称“裂痔”，“钩肠痔”。肛管的皮肤全层纵行裂开并形成感染性溃疡的疾病。

V010-N00104.label: 肛裂
V010-N00104.aliases: 裂痔； 钩肠痔； 裂肛
V010-N00104.englishNames: anal fissure; Fissured anus disorder; fissured anus
V010-N00104.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜肛肠类病

V010-N00104.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00104.label: 肛裂
V010-N00104.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜肛肠科类

V010-N00104.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00104.label: 肛裂
V010-N00104.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V010-N00104.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00104.label: 肛裂
V010-N00104.aliases: 裂痔； 钩肠痔； 裂肛
V010-N00104.englishNames: anal fissure; Anal fissure; fissured anus; Fissured anus disorder
V010-N00104.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00104.definition: Characterized by a break or tear in the skin of the anal canal. It may cause pain during or after defaecation and bleeding. Often results from heat in the intestine, insufficiency of yin fluids or downward flow of damp heat.

V010-N00104.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00104.label: 肛裂

V010-N00100.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00100.label: 流注
V010-N00100.path: 皮肤黏膜病类术语｜疮疡类病
V010-N00100.definition: 泛指因正气不充,感染邪毒,流窜血络,好发于肌肉深部的漫肿、疼痛、裹脓，皮色如常，此消彼长等为特征的一类疮疡病。

V010-N00100.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00100.label: 流注
V010-N00100.path: 第2部分：外科学｜疮疡类疾病
V010-N00100.definition: 以脓肿好发于肌肉深部，漫肿疼痛，皮色如常，此处未愈，他处又发为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00100.label: 流注
V010-N00100.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜外科疾病｜疮疡疾病
V010-N00100.definition: 发于肌肉深部的多发性脓肿。

V010-N00100.label: 流注
V010-N00100.path: 中医药学名词：外科学等（2013）｜外科学｜疾病
V010-N00100.definition: 以好发于肌肉深部，漫肿疼痛，皮色如常，此处未愈，他处又发为主要表现的多发性脓肿。

V010-N00100.label: 流注
V010-N00100.aliases: 流注； 母子发； Multiple Metastatic Abscess
V010-N00100.englishNames: Deep multiple abscess disorder; Gravitational Abscess; multiple abscess; deep multiple abscess; gravitational abscess
V010-N00100.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜疮疡类病

V010-N00100.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00100.label: 流注
V010-N00100.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜皮肤科类

V010-N00100.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00100.label: 流注
V010-N00100.aliases: 流注； 母子发； Multiple Metastatic Abscess
V010-N00100.englishNames: Deep multiple abscess disorder; Gravitational Abscess; deep multiple abscess; multiple abscess; Deep multiple abscess; gravitational abscess
V010-N00100.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00100.definition: Characterized by multiple, deeply located and painful abscesses with diffuse swelling but no skin colour changes.

V010-N00100.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00100.label: 流注
V010-N00100.aliases: BWC120； 母子发； Multiple Metastatic Abscess
V010-N00100.englishNames: deep multiple abscess; Gravitational Abscess; multiple abscess; gravitational abscess

V010-N00100.label: 流注
V010-N00100.aliases: BWC120； 母子发； Multiple Metastatic Abscess
V010-N00100.englishNames: deep multiple abscess; Gravitational Abscess; multiple abscess; gravitational abscess
V010-N00100.definition: a secondary abscess, usually multiple, deeply located, and distant from the primary lesion, also called metastatic abscess

V010-N00086.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00086.label: 褥疮
V010-N00086.path: 皮肤黏膜病类术语｜疮疡类病
V010-N00086.definition: 因久病卧床，气血运行失畅，肌肤失养，长期摩擦，皮肤损坏所致。临床以多发于尾骶、肘踝、背脊等容易受压部位，以局限性浅表皮肤破损,疮口经久不愈，甚则坏死等为特征的疮疡病。

V010-N00086.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00086.label: 褥疮
V010-N00086.path: 第2部分：外科学｜疮疡类疾病
V010-N00086.definition: 长期卧床，躯体重压引起的慢性溃疡。

V010-N00086.label: 褥疮
V010-N00086.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜外科疾病｜其他疾病
V010-N00086.definition: 长期卧床不起的患者，由于躯体的重压与摩擦而引起的，以局限性浅表皮肤破损，疮口经久不愈为主要表现的慢性疮疡类疾病。

V010-N00086.label: 褥疮
V010-N00086.path: 中医药学名词：外科学等（2013）｜外科学｜疾病
V010-N00086.definition: 由于长期卧床，躯体重压引起的慢性溃疡。

V010-N00086.label: 褥疮
V010-N00086.englishNames: bedsore; decubital ulcer; Bed sore disorder; bed sore; decubitus
V010-N00086.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜疮疡类病

V010-N00086.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00086.label: 褥疮
V010-N00086.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜皮肤科类

V010-N00086.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00086.label: 褥疮
V010-N00086.aliases: 席疮； Bed sore disorder； Pressure ulcer
V010-N00086.englishNames: bedsore; bed sore; Bedsores; decubital ulcer; decubitus; Bed sore disorder
V010-N00086.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00086.definition: Characterized by localized, superficial and persistent skin lesion or necrosis that usually occurs on the sacrum, elbows, ankles, or the hips. Often results from malnourishment of the skin due to obstructed flow of qi and blood, or an extended period of friction.

V010-N00086.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00086.label: 褥疮

V010-N00086.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00086.label: 褥疮
V010-N00086.definition: an ulceration caused by prolonged pressure in a patient lying in bed for a long period of time

V010-N00093.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00093.label: 疔疮
V010-N00093.path: 皮肤黏膜病类术语｜疮疡类病
V010-N00093.definition: 泛指因竹木刺伤,诸虫螯咬,皮肤破损后染毒，火热邪毒蕴结于肌滕，或脏腑失调，火毒循经上攻等所引起,以好发于颜面、四肢,具有形小根深,坚硬如钉，肿痛灼热，反应剧烈,易于走黄或损筋伤骨等为特征的一类急性疮疡病。

V010-N00093.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00093.label: 疔疮
V010-N00093.path: 第2部分：外科学｜疮疡类疾病
V010-N00093.definition: 好发于颜面、四肢,以形小根深,坚硬如钉，肿痛灼热,易于走黄、损筋伤骨为特征的疮疡。

V010-N00093.label: 疔疮
V010-N00093.englishNames: Furuncle disorders; hard furuncle; ding; deep-rooted sore; boil and sore; Hard Furuncle
V010-N00093.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜疮疡类病

V010-N00093.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00093.label: 疔
V010-N00093.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜皮肤科类

V010-N00093.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00093.label: 疔
V010-N00093.definition: a boil with its central core deeply rooted

V010-N00094.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00094.label: 疔疮走黄
V010-N00094.path: 皮肤黏膜病类术语｜疮疡类病｜疔疮
V010-N00094.definition: 因疗疮火毒炽盛，早期失治未能及时控制，或因挤压等，使邪毒走散入血，内攻脏腑所致。临床以原发病灶疮顶黑陷无脓，肿势散漫，迅速向周围扩散，伴见寒战、高热，烦躁，甚至神昏、谵语等为特征的疗疮。

V010-N00094.label: 疔疮走黄
V010-N00094.englishNames: Septicemic furunculosis disorder; Septimic Furunculosis; worsened rooted boil
V010-N00094.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜疮疡类病｜疔疮

V010-N00094.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00094.label: 疔疮走黄
V010-N00094.englishNames: Septicemic furunculosis disorder; Boil toxins entering the zang–fu organs; Septimic Furunculosis; worsened rooted boil
V010-N00094.pinyinNames: dīng chuāng zǒu huáng; ding chuang zou huang
V010-N00094.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00094.definition: Characterized by swollen sores or ulcers that rapidly spread over the surrounding area. The sores/ulcers appear black on the top and contain no pus. Systemic symptoms include chills, high fever, restlessness, unconsciousness and delirium. Often results from delayed treatment of boils or toxins entering the blood and zang–fu organs upon squeezing.

V010-N00097.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00097.label: 脱疽
V010-N00097.path: 皮肤黏膜病类术语｜疮疡类病
V010-N00097.definition: 因先天不足，正气虚弱，寒凝血瘀，或阴虚热毒蕴结,癡阻脉络，气血不畅，甚或痹阻不通所致。临床以初起肢冷、麻木，行走时突然疼痛，出现间歇性跛行，继则疼痛加剧，趾(指)节黑腐溃烂，疮口经久不愈，后期趾(指)节坏死脱落等为特征的脉管病。

V010-N00097.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00097.label: 脱疽
V010-N00097.path: 第2部分：外科学｜周围血管疾病
V010-N00097.definition: 发生于四肢末端,以局部疼痛、坏死,严重时趾(指)节坏死脱落为主要的慢性周围血管疾病。

V010-N00097.label: 脱疽
V010-N00097.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜外科疾病｜其他疾病
V010-N00097.definition: 发生于四肢末端,严重时趾(指)节坏疽脱落的一种慢性周围血管疾病。

V010-N00097.label: 脱疽
V010-N00097.path: 中医药学名词：外科学等（2013）｜外科学｜疾病
V010-N00097.definition: 血脉瘀阻，以患趾酸胀疼痛加重，步履沉重乏力，活动艰难，患趾肤色由苍白转为暗红，下垂时更甚，抬高则见苍白，小腿可有游走性红斑、结节或硬索，疼痛持续加重，彻夜不能入寐，舌质暗红或有瘀斑，舌苔白，脉弦或涩，跌阳脉消失为常见症的脱疽证候。发生于四肢末端，局部疼痛、坏死，严重时趾(指)节坏死脱落的慢性周围血管疾病。热毒伤阴，以皮肤干燥，毫毛脱落，趾(指) 甲增厚变形，肌肉萎缩，趾(指)多呈干性坏疽，舌质红，舌苔黄，脉弦细数为常见症的脱疽证候。

V010-N00097.label: 脱疽
V010-N00097.englishNames: Gangrene disorder; digital gangrene; Gangrene of Digit; toe or finger gangrene; gangrene; gangrene of digit
V010-N00097.path: 中医疾病｜皮肤黏膜病类术语｜疮疡类病

V010-N00097.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00097.label: 脱疽
V010-N00097.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜皮肤科类

V010-N00097.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00097.label: 脱疽
V010-N00097.englishNames: Digital gangrene; Gangrene disorder; digital gangrene; Gangrene of Digit; toe or finger gangrene; gangrene; gangrene of digit
V010-N00097.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00097.definition: Characterized by limb coldness, numbness and sudden pain during walking, followed by intermittent claudication, severe pain, a change in skin colour to red or black, and eventually toe/finger necrosis. Often results from deficiency of anti-pathogenic qi, cold retention and blood stasis due to yang deficiency, toxic heat retention due to yin deficiency, or stagnation of qi and blood.

V010-N00097.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00097.label: 脱疽
V010-N00097.aliases: BWC200； 脱骨疽； Finger Toe Gangrene
V010-N00097.englishNames: digital gangrene; Gangrene of Digit; gangrene of digit

V010-N00097.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00097.label: 脱疽
V010-N00097.aliases: BWC200； 脱骨疽； Finger Toe Gangrene
V010-N00097.englishNames: digital gangrene; Gangrene of Digit; gangrene of digit
V010-N00097.definition: gangrene of the extremities, especially referring to thromboangiitis

V010-N00197.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00197.label: 遗精
V010-N00197.path: 生殖病类术语｜男性生殖病｜精液类病
V010-N00197.definition: 因阴虚火旺，或劳伤心神、湿热下注、肾失封藏,致使精关不固所致。临床以不因性交而精液自行遗泄，一月4次以上等为特征的精液病。

V010-N00197.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00197.label: 滑精
V010-N00197.path: 生殖病类术语｜男性生殖病｜精液类病｜遗精
V010-N00197.definition: 因房事过度，肾失封藏,精关不固所致。临床以遗精一月4次以上，不伴性梦而无所知，甚或随意念所动而精自流出等为特征的精液病。

V010-N00197.label: 遗精
V010-N00197.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜内科疾病｜肾膀胱疾病
V010-N00197.definition: 以不因性交而精液频繁遗泄为主要表现，并伴有头昏，耳鸣，健忘，心悸，失眠，腰酸腿软，精神萎靡等症状的疾病。

V010-N00197.label: 滑精
V010-N00197.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00197.definition: 无梦而遗，甚则在清醒状态下滑泄不禁。

V010-N00197.label: 遗精
V010-N00197.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00197.definition: 不性交而精液自行遗泄的表现。包括梦遗与滑精。

V010-N00197.label: 遗精
V010-N00197.englishNames: seminal emission (disease); Involuntary ejaculation disorder; spermatorrhea; Spermatorrhea; seminal emission
V010-N00197.path: 中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜男性生殖病｜精液类病

V010-N00197.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00197.definition: Characterized by more than four times of involuntary discharge of semen in one month. Often results from kidney qi failing to secure the essence gate due to sexual indulgence.

V010-N00197.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00197.label: 遗精
V010-N00197.englishNames: Nocturnal emissions; seminal emission (disease); Involuntary ejaculation disorder; spermatorrhea; seminal emission; Spermatorrhea
V010-N00197.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00197.definition: Characterized by more than four times of involuntary ejaculations experienced during sleep in one month. Often results from fire hyperactivity due to yin deficiency, mental over-exertion, downward flow of damp heat, kidney qi failing to secure the essence gate.

V010-N00200.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00200.label: 房事早泄
V010-N00200.definition: 因阴虚火旺，或心肾两亏,精关失固等所致。临床以男子房事持续时间极短即泄精，阴茎插入阴道不到1min 便射精，或交媾前泄精等为特征的房事病。

V010-N00200.label: 早泄
V010-N00200.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜内科疾病｜肾膀胱疾病
V010-N00200.definition: 以性交之始即行排精，甚至性交前即泄精，不能进行正常性生活为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00200.label: 房事早泄
V010-N00200.path: 中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜房事病

V010-N00200.englishNames: premature ejaculation; prospermia; Premature ejaculation; Prospermia; premature ejaculation (disease); Premature ejaculation disorder
V010-N00200.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00200.definition: A condition that ejaculation always or nearly always occurs prior to sexual intercourse or within about one minute. Often results from fire hyperactivity due to yin deficiency or deficiency of the heart and kidney.

V010-N00188.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00188.label: 房事阳痿
V010-N00188.definition: 因命门火衰,肝肾亏虚，或因惊恐、抑郁等所致。临床以性交时阴茎萎软，或举而不坚，不能插入阴道等为特征的房事病。

V010-N00188.label: 阳痿
V010-N00188.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00188.definition: 又称"阳萎”。成年男子阴茎不能勃起,或勃起不坚，或坚而短暂，致使不能进行性交的表现。

V010-N00188.label: 房事阳痿
V010-N00188.path: 中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜房事病

V010-N00188.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码

V010-N00188.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V010-N00188.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00188.label: 阳痿
V010-N00188.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00188.definition: Characterized by the inability to develop or maintain an erection of the penis during sexual activity. Often results from decline of the vital gate, deficiency of the liver and kidney, fear/fright or depression.

V010-N00188.label: 阳痿
V010-N00188.definition: lack of copulative power in the male

V010-N00164.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00164.label: 产后恶露不绝
V010-N00164.aliases: 恶露不绝； 恶露不净； 恶露不尽
V010-N00164.path: 生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜产后类病
V010-N00164.definition: 因气虚、血热、血瘀，冲任损伤，气血运行失常，或感染邪毒所致。临床以产后血性恶露持续10 天以上，仍淋漓不尽为特征的产后病。

V010-N00164.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00164.label: 恶露不绝
V010-N00164.definition: 以产后血性恶露持续10 天以上，仍淋漓不净为主要特征的产后病。

V010-N00164.label: 产后恶露不绝
V010-N00164.aliases: 恶露不绝； 恶露不净； 产后恶露不净； 恶露不尽
V010-N00164.pinyinNames: chan hou er lu bu jue; chan hou dong lu bu jue
V010-N00164.path: 中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜产后类病

V010-N00164.aliases: 恶露不净； 恶露不止； 恶露不尽； 恶露不绝

V010-N00164.aliases: 恶露不绝； 恶露不净； 产后恶露不净； 恶露不尽
V010-N00164.pinyinNames: chǎn hòu è lù bù jué; chan hou er lu bu jue; chan hou dong lu bu jue
V010-N00164.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00164.definition: Characterized by abnormally prolonged discharge of lochia for more than 10 days after childbirth. Often results from blood heat, blood stasis, qi deficiency, or contraction of external pathogens.

V010-N00164.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00164.label: 恶露不止

V010-N00164.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00164.label: 恶露不绝
V010-N00164.englishNames: lochiorrhea; persistent flow of the lochia

V010-N00164.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00164.label: 恶露不绝
V010-N00164.englishNames: persistent flow of the lochia; Lochiorrhea
V010-N00164.definition: abnormally prolonged discharge of lochia for more than 3 weeks after childbirth, the same as lochiorrhea

V010-N00162.label: 产后身痛
V010-N00162.englishNames: postpartum body pain; Postpartum Pantalgia; postpartum unilateral pain; postpartum pain of body
V010-N00162.path: 中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜产后类病

V010-N00162.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00162.label: 产后身痛
V010-N00162.englishNames: postpartum body pain; Postpartum Pantalgia; postpartum unilateral pain; Postpartum body ache; postpartum pain of body
V010-N00162.pinyinNames: chan hou shen tong; chǎn hòu shēn tòng
V010-N00162.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00162.definition: Characterized by joint pain, numbness and heaviness after childbirth. Often results from blood deficiency, kidney deficiency, malnourishment of the tendons and joints, or obstructed flow of qi and blood due to contraction of external pathogens.

V010-N00162.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准

V010-N00162.englishNames: postpartum pain of body; postpartum body pain

V010-N00165.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00165.label: 产后腹痛
V010-N00165.path: 生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜产后类病
V010-N00165.definition: 因产后气血运行不畅，子宫收缩所致。临床以产妇在产褥期，发生与分娩有关的小腹疼痛为特征的产后病。

V010-N00165.label: 产后腹痛
V010-N00165.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜妇科疾病
V010-N00165.definition: 又称"儿枕痛”。以产妇分娩后，小腹疼痛为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00165.label: 产后腹痛
V010-N00165.path: 中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜产后类病

V010-N00165.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00165.definition: Characterized by lower abdominal pain after childbirth. Often results from uterine contraction due to obstructed flow of qi and blood.

V010-N00163.definition: 因气血不足，不能生乳，或肝气郁结，乳汁阻滞所致。临床以哺乳期内，产妇乳汁甚少，甚则全无为特征的产后病。

V010-N00135.definition: 因腑气失调,或气滞痰阻于胞宫所致。临床以阴道时或排出气体,或气出有声,状如矢气等为特征的妇科疾病。

V010-N00135.path: 第6部分：妇科学｜妇科杂病
V010-N00135.definition: 以妇女阴道中时时出气，或出气有声，状如矢气为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00135.definition: Characterized by an emission or expulsion of air from the vagina. The sound is somewhat comparable to flatulence from the anus. Often results from qi disorder of the fu organs or qi stagnation and phlegm affecting the uterus.

V010-N00129.label: 月经先后无定期
V010-N00129.path: 生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜月经类病
V010-N00129.definition: 因肝郁、肾虚,冲任失调，血海蓄溢失常所致。临床以月经周期时或提前时或延后7天以上，交替不定且连续3个周期以上为特征的月经病。

V010-N00129.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00129.label: 月经先后无定期
V010-N00129.definition: 以月经周期时或提前时或延后7天以上，交替不定，且连续3个周期以上为特征的月经病。

V010-N00129.label: 月经先后无定期
V010-N00129.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜妇科疾病
V010-N00129.definition: 以月经周期提前错后不定为主要表现的月经病。

V010-N00129.label: 月经先后无定期
V010-N00129.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜妇科学｜月经病
V010-N00129.definition: 以月经周期或前或后7天或7天以上，连续3个周期以上者为常见症的月经病。

V010-N00153.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00153.label: 痛经
V010-N00153.path: 生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜月经类病
V010-N00153.definition: 因月经期前后冲任不和，气血阻滞，或精血不足，胞脉失养等所致。临床以经期或经行前后出现周期性小腹疼痛,或痛引腰骶,牵掣大腿内侧,甚则剧痛、汗出、晕厥,伴见面色苍白等为特征的月经病。

V010-N00153.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00153.label: 痛经
V010-N00153.definition: 以行经前后、经期,出现周期性小腹痛，或痛引腰骶，甚至剧痛晕厥，经后缓解为特征的月经病。

V010-N00153.label: 痛经
V010-N00153.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜妇科疾病
V010-N00153.definition: 以经期、经行前后，出现周期性腹痛,痛引腰骶,甚至剧痛晕厥为主要表现的月经病。

V010-N00153.label: 痛经
V010-N00153.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜妇科学｜月经病
V010-N00153.definition: 以经期、经行前后，出现周期性腹痛，痛引腰骶，甚至剧痛晕厥为常见症的月经病。

V010-N00153.label: 痛经
V010-N00153.path: 中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜月经类病

V010-N00153.aliases: 月经痛； 经行腹痛； Dysmenorrhea disorder； Painful periods disorder； Menstrual cramp disorder
V010-N00153.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00153.definition: Characterized by lower abdominal cramps or weight-bearing sensation before or during menstruation. The pain may radiate to the lumbosacral region. In severe cases, individuals may faint from severe pain. Often occurs when emotional disturbance or six exogenous pathogens obstruct the Chong and Ren meridians. Alternatively, it may also result from the failure of essence and blood to nourish the uterus.

V010-N00153.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00153.label: 痛经
V010-N00153.definition: lower abdominal pain or referring pain to the lower back occurring around or during the menstrual period

V010-N00157.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00157.label: 闭经
V010-N00157.path: 生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜月经类病
V010-N00157.definition: 因肝肾不足、气血亏虚、阴虚血燥，血海空虚,或因痨虫侵及胞宫，或气滞血瘀、痰湿阻滞冲任所致。临床以女子年逾16岁，虽有第二性征发育但无月经来潮，或年逾14岁，尚无第二性征发育及月经,或月经周期建立后又中断6个月以上，或月经停闭超过既往3个周期以上为特征的月经病。

V010-N00157.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00157.label: 闭经
V010-N00157.definition: 以女子年逾16 周岁无月经来潮，或已有月经中断6个月以上为特征的月经病。

V010-N00157.label: 闭经
V010-N00157.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜妇科疾病
V010-N00157.definition: 以女子年逾18 周岁，月经尚未来潮,或已来潮、非怀孕而又中断3个月以上为主要表现的月经病。

V010-N00157.label: 闭经

V010-N00157.label: 闭经

V010-N00157.aliases: 经闭； 经水不通； 经水断绝； 女子不月； 血枯； 月事不来； 月水不通
V010-N00157.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V010-N00157.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00157.label: 闭经
V010-N00157.aliases: 经闭； 避年居经； Amenorrhoea disorder； No periods disorder
V010-N00157.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00157.definition: An absence of menarche by the age of 16 with normal secondary sexual characteristics, absence of menarche or secondary sexual characteristics by the age of 14, an abnormal stoppage of the menses for more than six months after an established menstruation, or a stoppage of menses for three consecutive cycles. Contributing factors may include deficiency of the liver and kidney, deficiency of qi and blood, blood dryness due to yin deficiency, tuberculosis, qi stagnation and blood stasis, or phlegm dampness. These factors may affect the normal functioning of the Chong and Ren meridians.

V010-N00157.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00157.label: 经闭

V010-N00157.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00157.label: 闭经

V010-N00157.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00157.label: 闭经
V010-N00157.definition: failure of menstruation to occur at puberty or abnormal stoppage of the menses for more than three months after menarche

V010-N00131.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00131.label: 月经后期
V010-N00131.path: 生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜月经类病
V010-N00131.definition: 因肾虚、血虚致使冲任不足，或因血寒、气滞、痰湿等阻滞冲任所致。临床以月经周期延后7天以上,甚或长达3个月～5个月一行，经期正常,连续3个周期以上等为特征的月经病。

V010-N00131.label: 月经后期
V010-N00131.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜妇科疾病
V010-N00131.definition: 以月经周期比正常错后为主要表现的月经病。

V010-N00131.label: 月经后期
V010-N00131.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜妇科学｜月经病
V010-N00131.definition: 以月经周期比正常错后7天以上，甚至3个月以内不行，并且连续发生两个周期以上为常见症的月经病。

V010-N00131.label: 月经后期
V010-N00131.englishNames: delayed menstruation; retarded menstruation; Delayed menstruation disorder
V010-N00131.path: 中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜月经类病

V010-N00131.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00131.label: 月经后期
V010-N00131.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜妇科类｜经

V010-N00131.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00131.label: 月经后错
V010-N00131.aliases: 月经后期； 经行后期； 月经落后； 经水后期； 经迟； 过期经行； 经期错后
V010-N00131.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V010-N00131.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00131.label: 月经后期
V010-N00131.aliases: 经行后期； 经迟； Delayed menstruation disorder
V010-N00131.englishNames: delayed menstruation; retarded menstruation; Delayed menstruation disorder; Delayed menstrual period
V010-N00131.pinyinNames: yue jing hou qi; yuè jīng hòu qī
V010-N00131.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00131.definition: A menstrual cycle that begins at least one week or up to three months late for three consecutive cycles, with a normal menstrual duration. Often results from insufficiency of the Chong and Ren meridians (due to kidney deficiency and blood deficiency) or phlegm dampness obstructing the Chong and Ren meridians (due to blood cold and qi stagnation).

V010-N00131.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00131.label: 月经后期
V010-N00131.aliases: BFY020； 经行后期； 经迟； 月经落后； 月经延后

V010-N00131.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00131.label: 经迟

V010-N00131.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00131.label: 月经后期
V010-N00131.aliases: 经行后期； 经迟； 月经落后； 月经延后
V010-N00131.definition: periods that come one week or more after due time, for more than two successive periods

V010-N00152.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00152.label: 经期延长
V010-N00152.path: 生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜月经类病
V010-N00152.definition: 因阴虚内热、气虚血失统摄，或瘀阻冲任、血不归经等所致。临床以月经周期正常,经期超过7天以上,甚或淋漓2周方净等为特征的月经病。

V010-N00152.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00152.label: 经期延长
V010-N00152.definition: 以月经周期正常,经期超过7天以上，甚或淋漓2周方净为特征的月经病。

V010-N00152.label: 经期延长
V010-N00152.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜妇科疾病
V010-N00152.definition: 以月经周期正常,经期超过7天以上，甚或二周方净为主要表现的月经病。

V010-N00152.label: 经期延长
V010-N00152.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜妇科学｜月经病
V010-N00152.definition: 以月经周期正常，经期持续8～15天方净为主症的月经病。

V010-N00152.label: 经期延长
V010-N00152.englishNames: menostaxis; prolonged menstruation; Prolonged menstruation disorder
V010-N00152.path: 中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜月经类病

V010-N00152.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00152.label: 经期延长
V010-N00152.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜妇科类｜经

V010-N00152.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00152.label: 经期延长
V010-N00152.aliases: 经候不止； 经来不止； 经脉不止； 经事延长
V010-N00152.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V010-N00152.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00152.label: 经期延长
V010-N00152.englishNames: menostaxis; prolonged menstruation; Prolonged menstruation; Prolonged menstruation disorder
V010-N00152.pinyinNames: jing qi yan chang; jīng qī yán cháng
V010-N00152.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00152.definition: A menstrual duration that lasts more than a week or up to two weeks long, with a normal menstrual cycle. Often results from internal heat due to yin deficiency, qi failing to keep blood within the vessels, or stagnant blood obstructing the Chong and Ren meridians.

V010-N00152.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00152.label: 经期延长

V010-N00152.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00152.label: 经期延长
V010-N00152.definition: excessively prolonged menstruation in regular cycles, the same as menostaxis

V010-N00130.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00130.label: 月经先期
V010-N00130.path: 生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜月经类病
V010-N00130.definition: 因气虚冲任不固，或热扰冲任，血海不宁所致。临床以月经周期提前7天以上，连续3个周期以上，经期基本正常等为特征的月经病。

V010-N00130.label: 月经先期
V010-N00130.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜妇科疾病
V010-N00130.definition: 以月经周期比正常提前为主要表现的月经病。

V010-N00130.label: 月经先期
V010-N00130.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜妇科学｜月经病
V010-N00130.definition: 以月经提前1星期至半月以内者，并且连续发生2个周期以上为常见症的月经病。

V010-N00130.label: 月经先期
V010-N00130.aliases: 经行先期； 经早； precocious menstruation
V010-N00130.path: 中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜月经类病

V010-N00130.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00130.label: 月经提前
V010-N00130.aliases: 月经先期； 经早； 月经前期； 经水先期； 经行先期； 一月经再行； 经期赶前
V010-N00130.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V010-N00130.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00130.label: 月经先期
V010-N00130.aliases: Advanced menstruation disorder； 经行先期； 经早； precocious menstruation
V010-N00130.englishNames: advanced menstruation; Early menstrual period; Advanced menstruation disorder
V010-N00130.pinyinNames: yue jing xian qi; yuè jīng xiān qī
V010-N00130.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00130.definition: A menstrual cycle that begins at least one week early for three consecutive months, with a normal menstrual duration. Often results from insecurity of Chong and Ren meridians (due to qi deficiency) or heat disturbing the Chong and Ren meridians.

V010-N00130.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00130.label: 月经先期
V010-N00130.aliases: BFY010； 经行先期； 经早

V010-N00130.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00130.label: 经早

V010-N00130.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00130.label: 月经先期
V010-N00130.aliases: 经行先期； 经早； 经期超前
V010-N00130.englishNames: advanced menstruation; Menstruation Ahead of the Time; Preceded Menstrual Cycle
V010-N00130.definition: periods that come one week or more ahead of due time, for more than two successive periods

V010-N00156.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00156.label: 月经过多
V010-N00156.path: 生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜月经类病
V010-N00156.definition: 因气虚冲任不固，或热伤冲任，迫血妄行,或瘀阻冲任，血不归经所致。临床以月经量较正常明显增多,或每次总量超过80 mL,周期、经期基本正常为特征的月经病。

V010-N00156.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00156.label: 月经过多
V010-N00156.definition: 以月经周期正常,经量明显多于正常,超过80mL,连续发生2个周期以上为特征的月经病。

V010-N00156.label: 月经过多
V010-N00156.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜妇科疾病
V010-N00156.definition: 以月经经量明显多于既往为主要表现的月经病。

V010-N00156.label: 月经过多
V010-N00156.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜妇科学｜月经病
V010-N00156.definition: 以月经经量明显多于正常超过100毫升而月经周期正常，连续发生2个周期以上者为常见症的月经病。

V010-N00156.label: 月经过多
V010-N00156.aliases: 经水过多； 月水过多
V010-N00156.englishNames: profuse menstruation; Menorrhagia; menorrhagia; menorrhagin; hypermenorrhea; Menorrhagia disorder
V010-N00156.pinyinNames: yue jing guo duo; yue jing guo dong; yue jing guo er
V010-N00156.path: 中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜月经类病

V010-N00156.label: 月经过多

V010-N00156.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V010-N00156.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00156.label: 月经过多
V010-N00156.aliases: 经水过多； 月水过多
V010-N00156.englishNames: profuse menstruation; Menorrhagia; menorrhagia; menorrhagin; hypermenorrhea; Heavy menstruation; Menorrhagia disorder; heavy menstrual bleeding
V010-N00156.pinyinNames: yue jing guo duo; yue jing guo dong; yue jing guo er; yuè jīng guò duō
V010-N00156.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00156.definition: An abnormally heavy menstrual volume (>80 ml), with a normal menstrual cycle and duration. Often results from insecurity of Chong and Ren meridians (due to qi deficiency) or heat forcing the blood to move recklessly.

V010-N00158.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00158.label: 崩漏
V010-N00158.path: 生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜月经类病
V010-N00158.definition: 因肾虚、血热、湿热、气虚、血瘀、外伤等,致使冲任不固所致。临床以妇女非正常行经期间阴道下血如崩或淋漓不尽等为特征的月经病。

V010-N00158.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00158.label: 崩中
V010-N00158.path: 生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜月经类病｜崩漏
V010-N00158.definition: 因血热而迫血妄行，或瘀血阻滞，血不循经，或气虚冲任不固所致。临床以月经周期紊乱，子宫出血量多而势急如崩等为特征的崩漏病。

V010-N00158.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00158.label: 漏下
V010-N00158.path: 生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜月经类病｜崩漏
V010-N00158.definition: 因肾虚、血瘀，冲任失约，肝不藏血所致。临床以月经周期紊乱，子宫出血量少而势缓，淋漓不尽等为特征的崩漏病。

V010-N00158.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00158.label: 崩中
V010-N00158.path: 第6部分：妇科学｜月经病
V010-N00158.definition: 以妇女月经周期紊乱，阴道下血不止，量大而势急如崩为主要表现的月经病。

V010-N00158.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00158.label: 崩漏
V010-N00158.path: 第6部分：妇科学｜月经病
V010-N00158.definition: 以妇女月经周期紊乱，阴道突然大量下血不止，或小量下血淋漓不断为主要表现的月经病。

V010-N00158.label: 崩漏
V010-N00158.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜妇科疾病
V010-N00158.definition: 朋澜metrorrhagia；metrostaxis以妇女不在行经期间，阴道突然大量下血，或淋漓下血不断为主要表现的月经病。

V010-N00158.label: 崩中
V010-N00158.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜妇科学｜月经病
V010-N00158.definition: 以妇女月经非时而下，突然大量下血不止为常见症的月经病。

V010-N00158.label: 崩漏
V010-N00158.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜妇科学｜月经病
V010-N00158.definition: 以妇女月经非时而下，突然大量下血不止， 或下血淋漓不净为常见症的月经病。

V010-N00158.label: 漏下
V010-N00158.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜妇科学｜月经病
V010-N00158.definition: 以妇女月经非时而下，下血淋漓不净为常见症的月经病。

V010-N00158.label: 崩中
V010-N00158.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00158.definition: Characterized by irregular menstrual cycle and sudden, profuse uterine bleeding. Often occurs when heat forces the blood to move recklessly. Alternatively, it may occur as a result of stagnant blood or qi failing to secure the Chong and Ren meridians.

V010-N00158.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00158.label: 崩漏
V010-N00158.aliases: 暴崩； 崩中； 漏下； 血崩； Uterine Bleeding
V010-N00158.englishNames: metrorrhagia; metrostaxis; Metrorrhagia and metrostaxis; metrorrhagia and metrostaxis; Metrorrhagia disorder; metrostaxis and metrorrhagia; Metrorrhagia; flooding and spotting
V010-N00158.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00158.definition: Characterized by a sudden onset of excessive uterine bleeding or small but continuous uterine bleeding. It includes metrorrhagia and metrostaxis, often resulting from insecurity of the Chong and Ren meridians. Contributing factors may include kidney deficiency, blood heat, damp heat, qi deficiency, blood stasis, or trauma, etc.

V010-N00158.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00158.label: 漏下
V010-N00158.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00158.definition: Characterized by irregular menstrual cycle and small but continuous uterine bleeding. Often occurs as a result of kidney deficiency, blood stasis and insecurity of the Chong and Ren meridians.

V010-N00158.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00158.label: 崩中
V010-N00158.path: 妇科病

V010-N00158.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00158.label: 崩漏
V010-N00158.englishNames: metrorrhagia and metrostaxis; metrorrhagia; metrostaxis; flooding and spotting
V010-N00158.path: 妇科病

V010-N00158.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00158.label: 漏下
V010-N00158.path: 妇科病

V010-N00158.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00158.label: 崩漏
V010-N00158.aliases: 暴崩； 崩中； 漏下； 血崩； Uterine Bleeding
V010-N00158.path: 临床各科｜妇产科
V010-N00158.definition: sudden onset of profuse uterine bleeding or incessant dripping of blood, occurring not in the regular menstruation period, the same as metrorrhagia

V010-N00158.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00158.label: 漏下
V010-N00158.path: 临床各科｜妇产科
V010-N00158.definition: slight but persistent leakage of blood from the uterus, the same as metrostaxis

V010-N00158.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00158.label: 血崩
V010-N00158.path: 临床各科｜妇产科
V010-N00158.definition: sudden massive uterine bleeding, the same as metrorrhagia

V010-N00154.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00154.label: 月经过少
V010-N00154.path: 生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜月经类病
V010-N00154.definition: 因精血亏少，血海失充，或经脉阻滞，血行不畅所致。临床以月经周期正常,经量明显少于平时正常经量的1/2,或少于20 mL,或经期不足2天,甚或点滴即净等为特征的月经病。

V010-N00154.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00154.label: 月经过少
V010-N00154.definition: 以月经周期正常，经量明显少于正常经量的二分之一，或少于20mL,或经期不足2天,甚或点滴即净，且连续2个周期以上为特征的月经病。

V010-N00154.label: 月经过少
V010-N00154.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜妇科疾病
V010-N00154.definition: 以月经经量明显少于既往为主要表现的月经病。

V010-N00154.label: 月经过少
V010-N00154.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜妇科学｜月经病
V010-N00154.definition: 月经周期正常，经期不足2天或点滴即净为常见症的月经病。

V010-N00154.label: 月经过少
V010-N00154.englishNames: hypomenorrhea; Hypomenorrhea; Decreased menstruation disorder; scant menstruation; scanty menstruation; hypermenorrhea
V010-N00154.path: 中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜月经类病

V010-N00154.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00154.label: 月经过少
V010-N00154.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V010-N00154.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00154.label: 月经过少
V010-N00154.aliases: Scanty menstruation disorder； 月经涩少
V010-N00154.englishNames: hypomenorrhea; Scanty menstruation; Hypomenorrhea; Decreased menstruation disorder; scant menstruation; scanty menstruation; hypermenorrhea; decreased menstruation; haypomenorrhea
V010-N00154.pinyinNames: yue jing guo shao; yuè jīng guò shǎo
V010-N00154.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00154.definition: An abnormally scanty menstrual volume (less than 1/2 of the normal menstrual volume, <20 ml, less than two days of menstrual duration, or just drops of menstrual blood). Often results from essence/blood deficiency or blood stagnation.

V010-N00154.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00154.label: 月经涩少

V010-N00154.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00154.label: 月经过少
V010-N00154.englishNames: hypomenorrhea; scant menstruation; hypermenorrhea; scanty menstruation

V010-N00154.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00154.label: 月经过少
V010-N00154.definition: menstrual discharge of less than the normal amount occurring at regular intervals

V010-N00159.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00159.label: 绝经前后诸症
V010-N00159.aliases: 绝经前后诸病； 更年期综合征
V010-N00159.path: 生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜月经类病
V010-N00159.definition: 因肾气渐衰，天癸将竭，阴阳失调所致。临床以妇女在绝经前后月经紊乱，渐至绝经，伴见潮热、烘热,手足心热，面红，汗出，烦躁，心悸,失眠，健忘，眩晕，耳鸣,腰背酸痛，皮肤燥痒或有蚁行感等为特征的妇科病。

V010-N00159.label: 绝经前后诸症
V010-N00159.aliases: 绝经前后诸病； 更年期综合征
V010-N00159.englishNames: Menopausal disorder; premenopausal and postmenopausal syndrome
V010-N00159.pinyinNames: jue jing qian hou zhu zheng
V010-N00159.path: 中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜月经类病

V010-N00159.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00159.label: 绝经前后诸症
V010-N00159.aliases: 绝经前后诸病； 更年期综合征； Menopausal disorder； Menopausal pattern
V010-N00159.englishNames: Perimenopausal disorders; premenopausal and postmenopausal syndrome; Menopausal disorder
V010-N00159.pinyinNames: jue jing qian hou zhu zheng; jué jīng qián hòu zhū zhèng
V010-N00159.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00159.definition: A group of disorders involving irregular menstruation and gradual menopause. Individuals may experience tidal fever, hot flashes, feverish sensations in the palms, soles and chest, flushed face, sweating, restlessness, palpitations, insomnia, poor memory, dizziness, tinnitus, and low back soreness. These conditions often result from kidney qi failure and imbalance between yin and yang.

V010-N00143.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00143.label: 恶阻
V010-N00143.path: 生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜胎孕类病
V010-N00143.definition: 因胎气上逆，胃失和降所致。临床以妊娠早期出现严重的恶心、呕吐，头晕厌食，甚至食入即吐等为特征的胎孕病。

V010-N00143.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00143.label: 妊娠恶阻
V010-N00143.definition: 以严重的恶心呕吐，头晕厌食,甚则食入即吐等为特征的妊娠病。

V010-N00143.label: 妊娠恶阻
V010-N00143.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜妇科疾病
V010-N00143.definition: 以妊娠早期,出现严重的恶心呕吐，头晕厌食，甚则食人即吐为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00143.label: 妊娠恶阻
V010-N00143.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜妇科学｜妊娠病
V010-N00143.definition: 以妊娠早期，出现较重的恶心呕吐，头晕厌食，甚则食入即吐为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00143.label: 恶阻
V010-N00143.aliases: 妊娠呕吐； 妊娠恶阻
V010-N00143.pinyinNames: dong zu; e zu; er zu
V010-N00143.path: 中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜胎孕类病

V010-N00143.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00143.label: 妊娠呕吐
V010-N00143.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V010-N00143.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00143.label: 恶阻
V010-N00143.aliases: 妊娠呕吐； Morning sickness disorder； Vomiting during pregnancy disorder； Pregnancy vomiting； 妊娠恶阻
V010-N00143.englishNames: Morning sickness; Morning sickness disorder; morning sickness
V010-N00143.pinyinNames: dong zu; è zǔ; e zu; er zu
V010-N00143.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00143.definition: Characterized by nausea, vomiting and aversion to food and smelling of oily food after one to two months of pregnancy. In severe cases, individuals may vomit immediately after eating. Often results from ascending of foetal qi and failure of stomach qi to descend.

V010-N00143.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00143.label: 妊娠呕吐

V010-N00143.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00143.label: 妊娠恶阻

V010-N00143.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00143.label: 恶阻
V010-N00143.aliases: 妊娠呕吐； 妊娠恶阻

V010-N00143.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00143.label: 恶阻
V010-N00143.definition: nausea and vomiting during early pregnancy

V010-N00144.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00144.label: 子痫
V010-N00144.path: 生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜胎孕类病
V010-N00144.definition: 因胎孕期间肝肾阴虚、阴血亏耗，致使肝风内动或痰火上扰所致。临床以妊娠晚期、临产时、新产后,忽然眩晕、倒仆,昏不知人，两目上视，牙关紧闭，口吐白沫,四肢搐搦,全身强直，少顷可醒，时或复发，甚则昏迷不醒为特征的胎孕病。

V010-N00144.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00144.label: 子痫
V010-N00144.definition: 以妊娠晚期、临产时、新产后，忽然眩晕、倒仆，昏不知人，两目上视，牙关紧闭，口吐白沫，四肢抽搐，全身强直，少顷可醒，时或复发，甚则昏迷不醒为特征的妊娠病。

V010-N00144.label: 子痾
V010-N00144.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜妇科疾病
V010-N00144.definition: 又称"子痫”。以妊娠晚期、临产时、新产后，眩晕头痛，突然昏不知人，两目上视,牙关紧闭，四肢抽搐，腰背反张，少顷可醒，醒后复发,甚则昏迷不醒为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00144.label: 子痫
V010-N00144.englishNames: eclampsia; Eclampsia disorder; Eclampsia; eclampsia of pregnancy
V010-N00144.path: 中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜胎孕类病

V010-N00144.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00144.label: 子痫
V010-N00144.aliases: 妊娠痫证； 子冒； Eclampsia disorder
V010-N00144.englishNames: eclampsia; Eclampsia of pregnancy; Eclampsia disorder; Eclampsia; eclampsia of pregnancy
V010-N00144.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00144.definition: Characterized by sudden vertigo, fainting, loss of consciousness, eyes fixed upward, trismus, vomiting white foam, convulsions of the limbs, and rigidity during the late pregnancy or before, during or after delivery. Individuals may return to normal after a while; however, some may develop into coma. Often results from internal stirring of liver wind or ascending of phlegm fire due to yin deficiency of the liver and kidney or consumption of yin blood.

V010-N00144.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00144.label: 妊娠痫证

V010-N00144.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00144.label: 子痫

V010-N00144.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00144.label: 子痫
V010-N00144.definition: sudden onset of convulsions and loss of consciousness occurring in a pregnant or puerperal woman with headache and vertigo

V010-N00149.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00149.label: 胎动不安
V010-N00149.path: 生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜胎孕类病
V010-N00149.definition: 因冲任气血不和，胎元不固，或跌仆举重，损伤胎气所致。临床以妊娠期间自觉胎动，或有轻微腰酸、腹痛，或伴见下腹坠胀,少量阴道出血等为特征的胎孕病。

V010-N00149.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00149.label: 胎动不安
V010-N00149.definition: 以自觉胎动，下腹坠胀，腰酸腹痛，或伴阴道少量流血为特征的妊娠病。

V010-N00149.label: 胎动不安
V010-N00149.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜妇科疾病
V010-N00149.definition: 以妊娠期，出现腰酸腹痛，胎动下坠，或伴阴道少量流血为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00149.label: 胎动不安
V010-N00149.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜妇科学｜妊娠病
V010-N00149.definition: 以妊娠期，出现腰酸腹痛，胎动下坠，或伴阴道少量流血为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00149.label: 胎动不安
V010-N00149.englishNames: threatened abortion; excessive movement of fetus; threatened atbortion; Threatened Atbortion; Unstable fetus disorder
V010-N00149.pinyinNames: tai dong bu an; tai er bu an
V010-N00149.path: 中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜胎孕类病

V010-N00149.label: 胎动不安
V010-N00149.aliases: Restless fetus； Excessive movement of foetus
V010-N00149.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜四诊
V010-N00149.definition: Threatened abortion often starts with a bearing-down sensation, low back soreness, and abdominal pain/discomfort, followed by a small amount of vaginal bleeding. Often results from insecurity of the Chong and Ren meridians due to qi deficiency, blood deficiency, kidney deficiency, blood heat, or traumatic injuries.

V010-N00149.label: 胎动不安

V010-N00149.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00149.label: 胎动不安
V010-N00149.definition: continuous moving of the fetus with lumbar pain and abdominal pain or small amount of vaginal bleeding

V010-N00148.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00148.label: 子悬
V010-N00148.path: 生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜胎孕类病
V010-N00148.definition: 因肝气犯脾，或秉质阴虚，孕后阴亏于下，胎气上冲所致。临床以妊娠中晚期孕妇出现胸腹胀满，甚则呼吸喘急，烦躁不安等为特征的胎孕病。

V010-N00148.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00148.label: 子悬
V010-N00148.englishNames: floating sensation pregnancy disease; gestational suspension
V010-N00148.definition: 以妊娠中晚期孕妇出现胸胁胀满，甚则呼吸喘急，烦躁不安为特征的妊娠病。

V010-N00148.label: 子悬
V010-N00148.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜妇科疾病
V010-N00148.definition: 以妊娠胸腹胀满，甚则喘急，烦躁不安为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00148.label: 子悬
V010-N00148.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜妇科学｜妊娠病
V010-N00148.definition: 又称“胎气上逆”。以妊娠胸腹胀满，甚则喘急，烦躁不安为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00148.label: 子悬
V010-N00148.englishNames: pregnancy suspension; Floating sensation pregnancy disorder; distention in chest during pregnancy; gestational suspension; chest fullness during pregnancy; chest distention during pregnancy
V010-N00148.path: 中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜胎孕类病

V010-N00148.englishNames: pregnancy suspension; chest fullness during pregnancy; Floating sensation pregnancy disorder; distention in chest during pregnancy; gestational suspension; chest distention during pregnancy; floating sensation pregnancy disease; Ascending of fetal qi
V010-N00148.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00148.definition: Characterized by a feeling of distension and fullness in the chest. Often results from disharmony between qi and blood due to liver qi stagnation or spleen deficiency.

V010-N00148.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00148.label: 子悬
V010-N00148.englishNames: distention in chest during pregnancy; pregnancy suspension; chest distention during pregnancy

V010-N00148.label: 胎气上逆

V010-N00148.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00148.label: 子悬
V010-N00148.definition: feeling of pressure in the abdomen and thorax, even with dyspnea and irritability, during pregnancy, the same as gravid oppression or upward flow of fetus qi

V010-N00147.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00147.label: 妊娠转胞
V010-N00147.aliases: 转胞； 妊娠小便不通
V010-N00147.path: 生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜胎孕类病
V010-N00147.definition: 因肾虚或气虚，胎儿压迫膀胱，水道不利所致。临床以妊娠期间小腹胀急而小便不通为特征的胎孕病。

V010-N00147.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00147.label: 妊娠小便不通
V010-N00147.englishNames: bladder pressure disorder;urine retention during pregnancy
V010-N00147.definition: 以妊娠期间小便不通，小腹胀急疼痛为特征的妊娠病。

V010-N00147.label: 妊娠小便不通
V010-N00147.pinyinNames: ren shen xiao bian bu tong
V010-N00147.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜妇科学｜妊娠病
V010-N00147.definition: 以妊娠期间小便不通，小腹胀急疼痛为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00147.label: 妊娠转胞
V010-N00147.aliases: 转胞； 妊娠小便不通
V010-N00147.path: 中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜胎孕类病

V010-N00147.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00147.label: 妊娠转胞
V010-N00147.aliases: 转胞； 妊娠小便不通
V010-N00147.englishNames: bladder colic during pregnancy; Urine retention in pregnancy
V010-N00147.pinyinNames: ren shen zhuan bao; rèn shēn zhuǎn bāo
V010-N00147.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00147.definition: Characterized by urine retention and, in severe cases, sudden onset of lower abdominal distension and pain. Often occurs when downbearing fetal qi compresses the urinary bladder due to kidney deficiency or qi deficiency.

V010-N00147.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00147.label: 转胞
V010-N00147.englishNames: bladder colic and pregnant dysuria; shifted bladder

V010-N00147.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00147.label: 转胞
V010-N00147.definition: a disease marked by acute pain below the umbilicus associated with anuresis

V010-N00140.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00140.label: 不孕
V010-N00140.path: 生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜女性杂病
V010-N00140.definition: 因性器官发育不全、畸形，或肾虚、肝郁、痰湿、血瘀等，致使冲任失调、胞宫孕育功能障碍所致。临床以育龄期女性有正常性生活，未采取避孕措施，与配偶同居1年以上而不受孕等为特征的妇科疾病。

V010-N00140.label: 不孕
V010-N00140.path: 中医疾病｜生殖病类术语｜女性生殖病｜女性杂病

V010-N00140.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00140.label: 不孕
V010-N00140.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜妇科类｜孕

V010-N00140.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00140.label: 不孕
V010-N00140.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V010-N00140.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00140.label: 不孕
V010-N00140.aliases: Female infertility disorder； Female sterility disorder； Infertility disorder
V010-N00140.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00140.definition: Characterized by the inability of women of childbearing age to become pregnant after one year (or longer) of unprotected sex. Often results from dysfunctions of the uterus and Chong and Ren meridian. Contributing factors may include kidney deficiency, liver qi stagnation, phlegm dampness, and blood stasis.

V010-N00140.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00140.label: 不孕

V010-N00140.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00140.label: 不孕
V010-N00140.definition: lack of capacity to produce offspring

V010-N00222.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00222.label: 噎膈病
V010-N00222.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病
V010-N00222.definition: 因忧思不解,痰气凝结，以及火郁或血瘀、津枯、癌毒等致使食道梗阻所致。临床以吞咽不顺，食入即吐，或饮食梗阻不下等为特征的脾系病。

V010-N00222.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00222.label: 噎膈
V010-N00222.definition: 以吞咽不利，饮食梗塞难下为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00222.label: 吞食梗塞
V010-N00222.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00222.definition: 又称"噎膈”。吞咽食物时梗噎不顺,甚或隔阻不通的表现。

V010-N00222.label: 噎膈
V010-N00222.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜脾胃病
V010-N00222.definition: 以吞咽不利，饮食梗塞难下为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00222.label: 噎膈病
V010-N00222.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V010-N00222.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00222.label: 噎膈病
V010-N00222.pinyinNames: ye ge bing; yē gé bìng
V010-N00222.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00222.definition: Characterized by difficulty in swallowing, vomiting immediately after eating food or inability to swallow solid food (a feeling of food stuck or held up before it either passes into the stomach or is regurgitated). Often occurs when phlegm qi stagnation (plum pit qi), stagnant fire, blood stasis or cancer toxin obstructs the oesophagus.

V010-N00222.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00222.label: 噎膈

V010-N00222.englishNames: blockage when swallowing; blockage in deglutition

V010-N00222.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00222.label: 吞食梗塞
V010-N00222.englishNames: blockage when swallowing; blockage in deglutition
V010-N00222.definition: difficulty or even inability to swallow

V010-N00219.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00219.label: 胃胀病
V010-N00219.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病
V010-N00219.definition: 因胃病日久，脾胃失健，或湿浊痰瘀内蕴，阻滞气机所致。临床以长期皖腹痞胀作痛，嘈杂、噫酸，或伴见浮肿等为特征的慢性脾系病。

V010-N00219.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00219.label: 胃痞
V010-N00219.definition: 以胃皖部痞塞、满闷不舒，触之无形、按之柔软、压之无痛，纳食减少为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00219.label: 胃胀
V010-N00219.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜脾胃病
V010-N00219.definition: 以长期皖腹痞胀作痛、嘈杂等为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00219.label: 胃胀病
V010-N00219.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V010-N00219.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00219.label: 胃胀病
V010-N00219.pinyinNames: wei zhang bing; wèi zhàng bìng
V010-N00219.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00219.definition: Characterized by persistent stomach stuffiness, distension, pain and discomfort. Associated symptoms include acid reflux and oedema. Often results from dysfunctional spleen and stomach or internal turbid phlegm obstructing the flow of qi.

V010-N00223.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00223.label: 肠痈
V010-N00223.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病
V010-N00223.definition: 因热毒内聚、淤结于肠道，肉腐成脓所致。临床以发热，右少腹疼痛拘急，腹部压痛拒按，或触及包块等为特征的脾系病。

V010-N00223.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00223.label: 肠痈
V010-N00223.path: 第2部分：外科学｜其他｜内痈

V010-N00223.label: 肠痈
V010-N00223.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜外科疾病｜其他疾病
V010-N00223.definition: 以发热，右少腹疼痛拘急，或触及包块为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00223.label: 肠痈
V010-N00223.englishNames: intestinal abscess; Intestinal abscess disorder; Acute Appendicitis; acute appendicitis
V010-N00223.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V010-N00223.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00223.label: 肠痈
V010-N00223.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜皮肤科类

V010-N00223.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00223.label: 肠痈
V010-N00223.englishNames: intestinal abscess; Intestinal abscess; Intestinal abscess disorder; Acute Appendicitis; acute appendicitis
V010-N00223.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00223.definition: Characterized by fever, right lower abdominal pain and contracture, abdominal tenderness or palpable lumps. Often results from toxic heat accumulating in the intestines.

V010-N00223.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00223.label: 肠痈
V010-N00223.englishNames: intestinal abscess; Acute Appendicitis; acute appendicitis
V010-N00223.definition: a localized pyogenic inflammation of the intestine, referring to acute appendicitis

V010-N00186.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00186.label: 关格
V010-N00186.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病
V010-N00186.definition: 因水肿、癃闭、淋病等晚期,脾肾阴阳衰惫，气化不利,湿浊毒邪上攻犯胃，或化热动风,甚或上蒙清空所致。临床以小便不通与呕吐不止并见,伴见皮肤瘙痒，口中臭秽,或有尿味,甚或手足搐搦，昏睡,神识不清等为特征的肾系病重症。

V010-N00186.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00186.label: 肠结
V010-N00186.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病
V010-N00186.definition: 因腹部手术损伤，或因肿瘤压迫、癌毒积聚等,致使肠道痹阻，气机闭结所致。临床以腹部阵发性绞痛，腹胀，频繁呕吐，无肠鸣、矢气，大便闭结等为特征的脾系病重症。

V010-N00186.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00186.label: 关格
V010-N00186.path: 第1部分：内科学｜肾膀胱病
V010-N00186.definition: 关与格的合称。以小便不通(关)与呕吐不止(格)并见为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00186.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00186.label: 肠结
V010-N00186.definition: 以腹胀如鼓，腹痛，呕吐，便秘，无肠鸣，矢气为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00186.label: 关格
V010-N00186.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜内科疾病｜肾膀胱疾病
V010-N00186.definition: 以小便不通与呕吐并见为主要表现的疾病。 小便不通称为关，呕吐不止称为格。

V010-N00186.label: 关格
V010-N00186.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜肾膀胱病
V010-N00186.definition: 以小便不通与呕吐并见为主要表现的疾病。 小便不通称为关，呕吐不止称为格。

V010-N00186.label: 关格
V010-N00186.englishNames: block and repulsion (disease); anuria and vomiting; obstruction and rejection; Block and repulsion disorder; dysuria and frequent vomiting; Anuria and Vomiting
V010-N00186.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病

V010-N00186.label: 肠结
V010-N00186.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜脾系病

V010-N00186.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00186.label: 大便干结
V010-N00186.aliases: 肠结； 大便燥结； 干结便
V010-N00186.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V010-N00186.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00186.label: 关格
V010-N00186.englishNames: block and repulsion (disease); anuria and vomiting; urinary retention and vomiting; obstruction and rejection; Block and repulsion disorder; dysuria and frequent vomiting; block and repulsion disease/disorder; Anuria and Vomiting; Urinary block and vomiting
V010-N00186.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00186.definition: A critical condition characterized by urinary retention and persistent vomiting, coupled with skin itching, and a strong-odoured breath. In severe cases, convulsions of the hands and feet, drowsiness and mental cloudiness may be present. Often occurs in late-stage oedema, urinary retention or strangury. Contributing factors may include impaired qi transformation due to yin/yang failure of the spleen and kidney and toxic, turbid dampness attacking the stomach. Alternatively, it may also occur when dampness transforms into heat and stirs wind, or in severe cases, to disturb the heart mind.

V010-N00186.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00186.label: 肠结
V010-N00186.englishNames: intestinal painful impediment; intestinal binding; Intestinal obstruction
V010-N00186.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00186.definition: Characterized by paroxysmal abdominal colic, abdominal bloating, absence of bowel sounds, flatus, and constipation. Often occurs when abdominal surgery, tumour compression or carcinoma toxins obstruct the flow of intestinal qi.

V010-N00186.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00186.label: 关格

V010-N00198.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00198.label: 强中病
V010-N00198.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病
V010-N00198.definition: 因肝火、瘀阻、湿热下注，或滥用壮阳药,火毒内盛，引动相火，或色欲过度，肾阴亏耗，虚阳妄动等所致。临床以阴茎挺举，持久不倒等为特征的肾系病。

V010-N00198.label: 阳强
V010-N00198.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜内科疾病｜肾膀胱疾病
V010-N00198.definition: 以阴茎久举不痿，精液自泄为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00198.label: 强中病
V010-N00198.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病

V010-N00198.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V010-N00198.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00198.label: 强中
V010-N00198.aliases: 阳强； Persistent erection disorder； 强中病
V010-N00198.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00198.definition: Characterized by abnormally prolonged erection of the penis. Contributing factors may include liver fire, stasis, damp heat, overuse of aphrodisiac drugs or sexual indulgence. These factors may cause internal toxic fire and trigger ministerial fire to consume kidney yang and result in hyperactivity of deficiency yang.

V010-N00177.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00177.label: 癃闭
V010-N00177.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病
V010-N00177.definition: 因湿热下注，或瘀血、败精、结石、肿瘤等阻塞膀胱、尿道，或因肾阳不足、气化无权，肾阴亏损、津液内耗,以及阴部手术等所致。临床以小便量少或点滴而出，甚至闭塞不通，小腹胀痛等为特征的肾系病。

V010-N00177.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00177.label: 癃闭
V010-N00177.englishNames: dribbling urinary block disease/disorder;dribbling and retention of urine

V010-N00177.definition: 以小便量少，点滴而出，甚至闭塞不通为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00177.label: 癃闭
V010-N00177.englishNames: dribbling urinary block (disease); retention of urine; Dribbling urinary block disorder; dribbling and retention of urine; dribbing urinary block
V010-N00177.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病

V010-N00177.label: 小便不利
V010-N00177.aliases: 癃闭； 排尿困难； 小便不通
V010-N00177.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V010-N00177.label: 癃闭
V010-N00177.englishNames: Urinary retention; dribbling urinary block (disease); dribbing urinary block; retention of urine; Dribbling urinary block disorder; dribbling and retention of urine; dribbling urinary block disease/disorder
V010-N00177.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00177.definition: Characterized by scanty urine, dripping urination and lower abdominal distension/pain. In severe cases, individuals may experience an inability to empty the bladder. Contributing factors may include damp heat in the urinary bladder, stagnant blood, stones or tumours obstructing the urethra, kidney yang failing to perform qi transformation, kidney yin deficiency or surgery.

V010-N00184.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00184.label: 尿崩
V010-N00184.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病
V010-N00184.definition: 因肾虚不固，或脑病及肾，气化失约，水津直趋膀胱而下泄所致。临床以尿多如崩，尿清如水，烦渴、多饮等为特征的肾系病。

V010-N00184.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00184.label: 尿崩
V010-N00184.path: 第1部分：内科学｜肾膀胱病
V010-N00184.definition: 以尿多如崩，尿清如水，烦渴多饮为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00184.definition: 以尿多如崩，尿清如水，烦渴多饮为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00184.label: 尿崩
V010-N00184.englishNames: flooding urination disease/disorder; flooding urination; profuse urination; diabetes insipidus; Flooding urine disorder; Profuse urination (diabetes insipidus); profuse urine
V010-N00184.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00184.definition: Characterized by large amounts of dilute urine and excessive thirst. Often occurs when the kidney fails to perform the qi transformation of the urinary bladder.

V010-N00190.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00190.label: 遗尿病
V010-N00190.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病
V010-N00190.definition: 因先天不足，肾气不固，或湿热瘀血内蕴，膀胱失约所致。临床以入睡后尿液不随意地流出为特征的肾系病。

V010-N00190.label: 遗尿
V010-N00190.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00190.definition: 睡眠或昏迷中不自觉地发生排尿的表现。

V010-N00190.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病

V010-N00190.label: 遗尿
V010-N00190.aliases: Enuresis disorder； 遗溺； 遗尿病
V010-N00190.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00190.definition: Characterized by repeated inability to control urination during sleep. Contributing factors may include congenital weakness, kidney qi deficiency or internal retention of damp heat and stagnant blood. These factors may impair the qi transformation of the urinary bladder.

V010-N00179.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00179.label: 淋证
V010-N00179.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病
V010-N00179.definition: 泛指因湿热侵袭或蕴结下焦，或脾肾亏虚、肝郁气滞，或因痨虫、结石、岩瘤等,致使膀胱气化不利而引起，以小便频数涩痛、痛引腰腹等为特征的一类疾病。

V010-N00179.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00179.label: 淋证
V010-N00179.path: 第1部分：内科学｜肾膀胱病
V010-N00179.definition: 以小便频急，淋漓不尽，尿道涩痛，小腹拘急，痛引腰腹为主要表现的疾病的统称。

V010-N00179.label: 淋证
V010-N00179.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜内科疾病｜肾膀胱疾病
V010-N00179.definition: 以小便频急，淋沥不尽，尿道涩痛，小腹拘急，痛引腰腹为主要表现的疾病的统称。

V010-N00179.label: 淋证
V010-N00179.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜肾膀胱病
V010-N00179.definition: 以小便频急，淋漓不尽，尿道涩痛，小腹拘急，痛引腰腹为主要表现的疾病的统称。可分热淋、石淋、气淋、血淋、膏淋、劳淋等。

V010-N00179.label: 淋证
V010-N00179.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病

V010-N00179.aliases: 淋证； 溲数； 小便数
V010-N00179.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V010-N00179.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00179.label: 淋证
V010-N00179.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00179.definition: Characterized by frequent, urgent, hesitant and painful urination. The pain during urination may radiate to the low back and abdomen. Contributing factors may include damp heat affecting the lower jiao, deficiency of the spleen and kidney, liver qi stagnation, tuberculosis, stones or tumours. These factors may impair the qi transformation of the urinary bladder.

V010-N00180.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00180.label: 石淋
V010-N00180.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病｜淋证
V010-N00180.definition: 因湿热之邪蕴积下焦，煎熬尿浊杂质，结为砂石，停阻于肾系所致。临床以尿出砂石，或经检查发现结石，尿道窘迫疼痛，腰腹剧烈绞痛，或伴见尿血，影像学检查结石征象等为特征的淋证。

V010-N00180.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00180.label: 石淋
V010-N00180.path: 第1部分：内科学｜肾膀胱病｜淋证
V010-N00180.definition: 以小便排出砂石为主症,或排尿时突然中断，尿道窘迫疼痛,腰腹绞痛难忍为主要表现的淋证。

V010-N00180.label: 石淋
V010-N00180.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜内科疾病｜肾膀胱疾病
V010-N00180.definition: 以小便排出砂石为主症，或排尿时突然中断，尿道窘迫疼痛，腰腹绞痛难忍为主要表现的淋证。

V010-N00180.label: 石淋
V010-N00180.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜肾膀胱病
V010-N00180.definition: 以小便排出砂石为主症，或排尿时突然中断，尿道窘迫疼痛，腰腹绞痛难忍为主要表现的淋证。

V010-N00180.label: 石淋
V010-N00180.path: 中医药学名词：外科学等（2013）｜外科学｜疾病
V010-N00180.definition: 以小便排出砂石为主症，或排尿时突然中断，尿道窘迫疼痛，腰腹绞痛难忍为主要表现的为淋证。相当于泌尿系结石。

V010-N00180.label: 石淋
V010-N00180.englishNames: Stony stranguria disorder; stony strangury; urolithic stranguria; stone strangury
V010-N00180.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病｜淋证

V010-N00180.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00180.definition: Characterized by lower back painlower back pain, haematuria or discharge of stones, coupled with positive imaging findings of urinary stones. Often occurs when damp heat scorches the urine into stones.

V010-N00182.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00182.label: 热淋
V010-N00182.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病｜淋证
V010-N00182.definition: 因湿热等邪客肾，蕴积膀胱所致。临床以小便频数、短赤，尿道灼热、涩痛，伴见寒热，腰痛，少腹拘急胀痛，舌苔黄腻，脉滑数等为特征的急性发作性淋证。

V010-N00182.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00182.label: 热淋
V010-N00182.path: 第1部分：内科学｜肾膀胱病｜淋证
V010-N00182.definition: 以起病急，尿频，尿急，尿道灼热涩痛，尿黄为主要表现的淋证。

V010-N00182.label: 热淋
V010-N00182.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜内科疾病｜肾膀胱疾病
V010-N00182.definition: 以起病急，尿频，尿急，尿道灼热涩痛，尿黄为主要表现的淋证。

V010-N00182.label: 热淋
V010-N00182.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜肾膀胱病
V010-N00182.definition: 以起病急，尿频，尿急，尿道灼热涩痛，尿黄为主要表现的淋证。

V010-N00182.label: 热淋
V010-N00182.englishNames: heat strangury; heat stranguria; Heat stranguria disorder
V010-N00182.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肾系病｜淋证

V010-N00182.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00182.label: 热淋
V010-N00182.aliases: 急淋； 湿热淋； Heat stranguria disorder； Damp heat stranguria； acute stranguria
V010-N00182.englishNames: heat strangury; heat stranguria; Heat stranguria disorder; Heat strangury
V010-N00182.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00182.definition: Characterized by frequent, urgent and painful urination with scanty, red urine and a burning sensation. Associated symptoms may include fever, chills, lower back painlower back pain, lower abdominal cramps, distension and pain, a yellow, greasy tongue coating and a slippery, rapid pulse. Often occurs when damp heat affects the kidney and urinary bladder.

V010-N00246.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00246.label: 肝痈
V010-N00246.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肝系病
V010-N00246.definition: 因湿热或虫毒等淤积于肝，气血腐败，酿成痈脓所致。临床以骤然发热，右胁胀痛，逐渐加剧，日渐消瘦，甚或肝脏脓肿溃破，剧烈腹痛，或伴见咳吐脓血，下痢脓血及虚脱等为特征的肝系痈病。

V010-N00246.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00246.label: 肝痈
V010-N00246.definition: 以发热，右胁腹部疼痛拒按，右胁下肿块为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00246.label: 肝痈
V010-N00246.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜内科疾病｜肝胆疾病
V010-N00246.definition: 以急起发热疼痛，右胁下肿块为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00246.label: 肝痈
V010-N00246.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜肝胆病
V010-N00246.definition: 以急起发热，右胁腹部疼痛拒按，右胁下肿块为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00246.label: 肝痈
V010-N00246.englishNames: liver abscess; Liver abscess disorder; Liver Abscess
V010-N00246.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肝系病

V010-N00246.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00246.label: 肝痈
V010-N00246.englishNames: liver abscess; Liver abscess disorder; Liver abscess; Liver Abscess
V010-N00246.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00246.definition: Characterized by a sudden fever, gradually increased distending pain in the right subcostal region, and gradual weight loss. In severe cases, patients may experience severe abdominal pain following abscess rupture, coughing with phlegm that contains pus and blood, diarrhoea with stools that contain pus and blood and fainting. Often occurs when damp heat or parasitic toxin retains in the liver and form pus or abscess.

V010-N00243.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00243.label: 臌胀病
V010-N00243.aliases: 臌胀； 鼓胀； 蛊胀
V010-N00243.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肝系病
V010-N00243.definition: 泛指因酗酒伤肝,或肝病或痨病、腹内积、蛊虫病日久，阻碍气血运行,水积于腹等引起以腹部膨胀如鼓为特征的一类疾病。

V010-N00243.label: 臌胀病
V010-N00243.aliases: 臌胀； 鼓胀； 蛊胀
V010-N00243.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肝系病

V010-N00243.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00243.label: 单腹胀大
V010-N00243.path: 附录A/B 基本症状与同义词信息分类代码表

V010-N00243.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00243.label: 臌胀病
V010-N00243.aliases: 臌胀； 鼓胀； 蛊胀； 单腹胀； Tympanites disorder
V010-N00243.pinyinNames: gu zhang bing; gǔ zhàng bìng
V010-N00243.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00243.definition: Characterized by severe abdominal bulging (like a drum). Contributing factors may include excessive alcohol drinking, liver disease, tuberculosis, abdominal masses or schistosomiasis. This condition is subdivided into alcohol tympanites, water tympanites, qi tympanites, blood tympanites and parasitic tympanites.

V010-N00243.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00243.label: 鼓胀

V010-N00249.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00249.label: 肝着
V010-N00249.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肝系病
V010-N00249.definition: 因劳怒所伤,肝木侮金，肺气不利，或寒凝气血，邪气痹阻肝经所致。临床以胸胁痞闷或胀，按揉捶击或舒，喜热饮，善太息，可伴见咳唾气急，暖气,因情志不遂而诱发等为特征的肝系病。

V010-N00249.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00249.label: 肝胀
V010-N00249.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肝系病
V010-N00249.definition: 因饮食、劳倦或外邪伤肝,肝失疏泄，气血郁滞所致。临床以右胁胀痛，右胁下触及肿块，喜按喜揉，叩击则痛，可伴见疲劳、乏力，纳滞，腹痛等为特征的肝系病。

V010-N00249.label: 肝著
V010-N00249.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜内科疾病｜肝胆疾病
V010-N00249.definition: 以右胁痛、右胁下肿块为主要表现的肝系疾病。

V010-N00249.label: 肝著
V010-N00249.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜肝胆病
V010-N00249.definition: 肝经气血郁滞，留着不行，以右胁或胸胁重着疼痛，或右胁下肿块，喜按喜揉等为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00249.label: 肝着
V010-N00249.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肝系病

V010-N00249.label: 肝胀
V010-N00249.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肝系病

V010-N00249.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00249.label: 肝胀
V010-N00249.aliases: 肝着； 肝著； Liver distension disorder； Liver fixity
V010-N00249.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00249.definition: Characterized by pain and lumps in the right subcostal region that alleviate upon pressing or patting. Often occurs as a result of liver qi/blood stagnation.

V010-N00244.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00244.label: 胆胀病
V010-N00244.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肝系病
V010-N00244.definition: 因湿热痰瘀等邪滞着于胆，或因饮食失节、情志刺激，使胆气郁滞不舒所致。临床以右胁痞胀或隐痛,胁下或可触及痞块,暖气、泛恶，口苦、纳差,厌油腻,时作时止或反复发作等为特征的肝系病。

V010-N00244.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00244.label: 胆胀
V010-N00244.definition: 以反复发作右上腹(胆区)疼痛、痞胀为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00244.label: 胆胀
V010-N00244.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜内科疾病｜肝胆疾病
V010-N00244.definition: 以反复发作右上腹疼痛、痞胀为主要表现的胆道疾病。

V010-N00244.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00244.definition: Characterized by recurrent right upper abdominal pain with stuffiness and distension. Often results from retention of damp heat or phlegm stasis in the gallbladder or anger-related gallbladder qi stagnation.

V010-N00035.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00035.label: 百合病
V010-N00035.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜心系病
V010-N00035.definition: 因继发于急性热病，或中毒、脑部损伤之后，余邪未尽,气血失调，阴液亏损,经脉失养，心神惑乱所致。临床以神情恍惚，行、卧、饮食等皆觉不适，口苦，小便短赤等为特征的神志病。

V010-N00035.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00035.label: 百合病
V010-N00035.definition: 以神情恍惚，行、卧、饮食等皆觉不适为主要表现的神志疾病。

V010-N00035.label: 百合病
V010-N00035.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜内科疾病｜脑系疾病
V010-N00035.definition: 以神情恍惚,行、卧、饮食等皆觉不适为主要表现的神志疾病。

V010-N00035.label: 百合病
V010-N00035.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜脑病
V010-N00035.definition: 以神情恍惚，行、卧、饮食等皆觉不适为主要表现的神志疾病。

V010-N00035.label: 百合病
V010-N00035.englishNames: lily disease; Baihe Disease; Lily disorder; disease of all vessels
V010-N00035.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜心系病

V010-N00035.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00035.label: 百合病
V010-N00035.englishNames: lily disease; Lily bulb disease; Baihe Disease; Lily disorder; disease of all vessels
V010-N00035.pinyinNames: bai he bing; bǎi hé bìng
V010-N00035.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00035.definition: Characterized by mental strain, listlessness, insomnia, and a poor appetite. Often results from disordered qi and blood, deficiency of yin fluids, malnourishment of meridians and disturbance of the heart mind after acute febrile diseases, poisoning or brain trauma.

V010-N00232.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00232.label: 真心痛
V010-N00232.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜心系病
V010-N00232.definition: 因胸阳虚损，或气阴不足，或癡痰阻痹，心脉闭塞所致。临床以猝发心胸剧痛，甚或持续不解，可伴见汗出、肢冷，面白，唇青，手足青至节，脉微欲绝或结代等为特征的突发性心系病重症。

V010-N00232.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00232.label: 真心痛
V010-N00232.definition: 以心胸剧痛，持续不解，伴汗出肢冷，面白唇青，手足青至节，脉微欲绝为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00232.label: 真心痛
V010-N00232.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜内科疾病｜心系疾病
V010-N00232.definition: 以心胸剧痛，持续不解，伴有汗出肢冷，面白唇青，手足青至节，脉微欲绝为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00232.label: 真心痛
V010-N00232.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜心病
V010-N00232.definition: 以心胸剧痛，持续不解，伴汗出肢冷，面白唇青，手足青至节，脉微欲绝为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00232.label: 真心痛
V010-N00232.englishNames: real heart pain; angina pectoris; true heart pain; True heart pain disorder
V010-N00232.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜心系病

V010-N00232.label: 厥心痛
V010-N00232.englishNames: Pericordial Pain with Cold Limbs; precordial pain with cold limbs; precordial pain; true heart pain with cold limbs
V010-N00232.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜心系病｜真心痛

V010-N00232.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00232.label: 厥心痛
V010-N00232.englishNames: precordial pain; Cardiac pain with cold limbs; true heart pain with cold limbs; Pericordial Pain with Cold Limbs; precordial pain with cold limbs
V010-N00232.pinyinNames: jué xīn tòng; jue xin tong
V010-N00232.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00232.definition: A paroxysmal heart condition characterized by cardiac pain radiating toward the back and aggravates upon physical exertion and alleviates after rest. Associated symptoms include upward rushing of qi to the throat, chest discomfort, repeated sighing, cold limbs and a dark-bluish facial complexion. Often results from deficiency of the five zang organs, emotional disturbance, and pathogenic factors affecting the pericardium or phlegm stasis obstructing the heart.

V010-N00232.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00232.label: 真心痛
V010-N00232.englishNames: real heart pain; angina pectoris; true heart pain; true cardiac pain; True heart pain disorder; True cardiac pain
V010-N00232.pinyinNames: zhen xin tong; zhēn xīn tòng
V010-N00232.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00232.definition: A critical heart condition characterized by sudden, severe or persistent cardiac pain. Associated symptoms include sweats, cold limbs, a pale face, bluish lips and an extremely feeble or regularly/irregularly intermittent pulse. Often results from heart yang deficiency, insufficiency of qi and yin, or phlegm-stasis obstructing the heart vessels.

V010-N00232.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00232.label: 真心痛

V010-N00232.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00232.label: 真心痛

V010-N00231.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00231.label: 胸痹心痛
V010-N00231.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜心系病
V010-N00231.definition: 因胸阳不振，阴寒、痰浊、血瘀等留踞胸廓，或心气不足,鼓动乏力，致使气血痹阻，心失血养所致。临床以胸闷、气短及发作性心胸疼痛等为特征的心系病。

V010-N00231.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00231.label: 胸痹
V010-N00231.definition: 胸阳不振，以胸闷或发作性心胸疼痛为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00231.label: 胸痹
V010-N00231.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜内科疾病｜心系疾病
V010-N00231.definition: 以胸闷或发作性心胸疼痛为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00231.label: 胸痹
V010-N00231.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜心病
V010-N00231.definition: 胸阳不振，以胸闷或发作性心胸疼痛为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00231.label: 胸痹心痛
V010-N00231.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜心系病

V010-N00231.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00231.label: 胸痹心痛
V010-N00231.englishNames: Chest bi-impediment /cardiac pain; heartache due to chest impediment
V010-N00231.pinyinNames: xiong bi xin tong; xiōng bì xīn tòng
V010-N00231.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00231.definition: Characterized by chest tightness, shortness of breath and paroxysmal cardiac pain. Often occurs when heart qi fails to pump blood and results in malnourishment of the heart.

V010-N00231.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00231.label: 胸痹

V010-N00210.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00210.label: 哮喘病
V010-N00210.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病
V010-N00210.definition: 因先天不足，或久病肺、脾、肾三脏虚损,致使宿痰留伏体内，或由外邪引动，痰阻气道所致。临床以发作性咳喘、气促，胸廓胀满，端坐呼吸,喉中哮鸣有声,甚则喘息不得平卧等为特征的肺系病。

V010-N00210.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00210.label: 哮病
V010-N00210.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病｜哮喘病
V010-N00210.definition: 因禀赋异常,触及粉尘或刺激性气体等即发，或因外邪、劳累及饮食、情志失调等诱发，引动宿痰留饮,痰气交阻,气道挛急所致。临床以突发呼吸急促,喉中哮鸣有声,不得平卧，发作前可见鼻痒、喷嚏，咳嗽、胸闷等先兆症状为特征的反复发作性肺系病。

V010-N00210.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00210.label: 哮病
V010-N00210.definition: 以发作性喉中哮鸣有声，呼吸困难，甚则喘息不得平卧等为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00210.label: 哮病
V010-N00210.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜内科疾病｜肺系疾病
V010-N00210.definition: 又称"哮喘”。以发作性喉中哮鸣有声，呼吸困难，甚则喘息不得平卧为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00210.label: 哮病
V010-N00210.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜肺病
V010-N00210.definition: 又称“哮喘”。以发作性喉中哮鸣有声，呼吸困难，甚则喘息不得平卧等为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00210.label: 哮喘病
V010-N00210.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病

V010-N00210.label: 哮病
V010-N00210.englishNames: Wheezing disorder; asthma; wheezing; wheezing disease
V010-N00210.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病｜哮喘病

V010-N00210.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00210.label: 哮喘
V010-N00210.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜病理声音情况｜呼吸声

V010-N00210.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00210.label: 哮喘病
V010-N00210.pinyinNames: xiao chuan bing; xiào chuǎn bìng
V010-N00210.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00210.definition: Characterized by recurrent episodes of difficulty breathing, wheezing and shortness of breath with an inability to lie flat. Contributing factors may include congenital deficiency or impaired functions of the lung, spleen and kidney. These factors may generate phlegm to obstruct the airway.

V010-N00210.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00210.label: 哮病
V010-N00210.aliases: 哮喘； 哮证； Wheezing disorder； Wheezing pattern
V010-N00210.englishNames: Wheezing disorder; asthma; wheezing disease; wheezing; Wheezing; wheezing [disease/disorder]
V010-N00210.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00210.definition: Characterized by sudden, whistling sounds with an inability to lie flat. Precursory symptoms may include an itchy nose, sneezing, cough and chest tightness. Contributing factors may include heredity, exposure to dust or irritant gas, exogenous pathogenic factors, fatigue, improper diet or emotions. These factors, coupled with pre-existing phlegm may cause phlegm qi to stagnate and obstruct the respiratory airways.

V010-N00210.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00210.label: 哮喘
