V010-N00210.label: 哮病

V010-N00206.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00206.label: 喘病
V010-N00206.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病｜哮喘病
V010-N00206.definition: 因外感风寒邪热束肺,或痰浊壅肺，痰气交结，肃降无权，或因先天不足，久咳伤肺，肾不纳气等所致。临床以气短喘促,呼吸困难,稍动尤甚,甚则张口抬肩，鼻翼煽动,不得平卧,伴见咳嗽、痰多,胸闷、紫绀，胸高胁胀等为特征的肺系病。

V010-N00206.label: 喘病
V010-N00206.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病｜哮喘病

V010-N00206.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00206.label: 喘病
V010-N00206.aliases: 喘证； Dyspnoea disorder； Dyspnoea pattern
V010-N00206.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00206.definition: Characterized by shortness of breath, rapid breathing, and difficulty breathing that worsens upon exertion. In severe cases, breathing with an open mouth and elevated shoulder, nasal flaring and an inability to lie flat may be present. Associated symptoms may include cough with profuse phlegm, chest tightness, cyanosis, raised chest and distension in the subcostal region. Contributing factors may include heredity, exogenous pathogenic wind cold affecting the lung, turbid phlegm accumulating in the lung, chronic cough damaging lung qi or kidney failing to absorb qi.

V010-N00206.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00206.label: 喘证

V010-N00204.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00204.label: 肺痿
V010-N00204.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病
V010-N00204.definition: 因咳喘日久不愈，肺气受损，津液耗伤，使肺叶枯萎或痿弱不用所致。临床以气短，咯吐浊唾涎沫等为特征的慢性肺系病。

V010-N00204.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00204.label: 肺痿
V010-N00204.definition: 肺叶枯萎不荣或痿弱不用，以胸憋气短，咯吐浊唾涎沫为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00204.label: 肺痿
V010-N00204.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜内科疾病｜肺系疾病
V010-N00204.definition: 肺叶枯萎不荣或痿弱不用，以胸憋气短、咯吐浊唾涎沫为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00204.label: 肺痿
V010-N00204.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜肺病
V010-N00204.definition: 肺叶枯萎不荣或痿弱不用，以胸憋气短，咯吐浊唾涎沫为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00204.label: 肺痿
V010-N00204.englishNames: lung wilting; atrophic lung disease; lung atrophy; lung flaccidity; Atrophic Lung Disease; Lung withering disorder
V010-N00204.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病

V010-N00204.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00204.label: 肺痿
V010-N00204.englishNames: lung wilting; lund withering disease; atrophic lung disease; Atrophy of the lung lobes; lung atrophy; lung flaccidity; Atrophic Lung Disease; Lung withering disorder
V010-N00204.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00204.definition: Characterized by shortness of breath and cough with expectoration of turbid sputum. Often occurs when chronic cough damages lung qi, consumes fluids and results in withering or disuse of the lung lobes.

V010-N00204.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00204.label: 肺痿

V010-N00207.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00207.label: 肺瘅
V010-N00207.path: 脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病
V010-N00207.definition: 因邪热入肺，或脏腑癣热及肺，痰热壅肺，肺失清肃所致。临床以咳嗽，痰黄而稠，或痰中夹血，口渴，可伴见潮热、寒热，胸胁肋痛，大便秘结，小便黄等为特征的肺系病。

V010-N00207.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00207.label: 肺热病
V010-N00207.definition: 以骤起发热，咳嗽，烦渴，胸痛等为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00207.label: 肺热病
V010-N00207.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜肺病
V010-N00207.definition: 以骤起发热，咳嗽，烦渴，胸痛等为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00207.label: 肺瘅
V010-N00207.path: 中医疾病｜脏腑病及相关病类术语｜肺系病

V010-N00207.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00207.label: 肺瘅
V010-N00207.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00207.definition: Characterized by cough with sticky, yellow phlegm or blood-stained sputum and thirst. Associated symptoms may include tidal fever, chills, pain in the subcostal region, constipation and yellow urine. Often occurs when pathogenic heat, heat of zang–fu organs or phlegm heat affect the dispersing and descending of lung qi.

V010-N00211.definition: 因肺咳、哮病久治不愈，肺气壅滞，久胀不敛，肺叶充胸胀廓所致。临床以胸廓膨胀，憋闷喘息，咳嗽、痰多，动辄气促，面色晦暗，唇舌紫绀，甚或喘脱，咯血，神昏等为特征的慢性肺系病。

V010-N00020.definition: A group of disorders caused by external contraction of pathogenic warm/heat. It is initially characterized by typical heat-induced symptoms or heat transforming into dryness after entering the interior. In severe cases, heat may transmit to the pericardium, damage yin or stir up internal wind. They are known as endemic warm diseases when spreading through population within a geographic area.

V010-N00020.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00020.label: 温热病

V010-N00020.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准

V010-N00023.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00023.label: 暑温病
V010-N00023.aliases: 暑温； 小儿暑温； 暑瘟病； 暑瘟； 小儿暑瘟病
V010-N00023.path: 外感病类术语｜温疫类病
V010-N00023.definition: 因暑热疫毒随蚊子叮咬而进入人体，上犯清空，内陷心肝所致。临床以骤然高热，头痛、项强，呕吐，可迅速出现神昏、谵语，痉厥，角弓反张等为特征的温疫病。

V010-N00023.label: 暑温
V010-N00023.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜内科疾病｜热病
V010-N00023.definition: 感受暑热病邪引起的发病急骤的温病。

V010-N00023.label: 暑温病
V010-N00023.aliases: 暑温； 小儿暑温； 暑瘟病； 暑瘟； 小儿暑瘟病
V010-N00023.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病

V010-N00023.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00023.label: 暑温
V010-N00023.aliases: Summer Febrile Rreval Dis； warm disease in summer； 暑瘟； 暑温病； 暑瘟病； Summer heat febrile disorders； Summer heat pestilence disorders
V010-N00023.englishNames: warm disease in summer; summerheat-warmth; Summer-heat disorder; Summer Febrile Prevalent Diseases; Summer heat pestilence; summerheat warmth
V010-N00023.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00023.definition: A type of pestilence characterized by a sudden high-grade fever, headache, vomiting, and neck rigidity. In severe cases, unconsciousness and convulsions may be present. Often occurs when pathogenic summer heat or epidemic toxin enters the body through mosquito bites to disturb the mind or affect the heart and liver.

V010-N00023.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00023.label: 暑温

V010-N00033.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00033.label: 疟疾
V010-N00033.path: 外感病类术语｜温疫类病
V010-N00033.definition: 因疟蚊叮咬，感染疟邪，或瘴毒、疫毒入血，与卫气交争，伏藏于半表半里，甚或邪犯清空,蒙蔽心神所致。临床以往来寒热,休作有时，头痛,汗出而解，反复发作,甚或伴见神昏、谵语,胁下有痞块等为特征的温疫病。

V010-N00033.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00033.label: 瘴疟
V010-N00033.path: 外感病类术语｜温疫类病｜疟疾
V010-N00033.definition: 因南方气候湿热，疟蚊叮咬，疟邪侵袭气血，上犯清空，蒙蔽心神，或邪热内盛，胆汁外溢所致。临床以疟发无固定时日，或伴见神昏、谵语，黄疸，重度贫血等为特征的疟疾重症。

V010-N00033.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00033.label: 疟疾
V010-N00033.definition: 感染疟原虫、瘴毒或风寒暑湿之气，以往来寒热，休作有时，反复发作，日久胁下有痞块为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00033.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00033.label: 瘴疟
V010-N00033.path: 第1部分：内科学｜热病｜疟疾
V010-N00033.definition: 感受山岚瘴毒引起的疟疾。

V010-N00033.label: 疟疾
V010-N00033.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜内科疾病｜热病
V010-N00033.definition: 感染疟原虫引起的,以往来寒热，休作有时，反复发作，日久胁下有痞块为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00033.label: 瘴疟
V010-N00033.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜内科疾病｜热病
V010-N00033.definition: 感受山岚瘴毒引起的疟疾。

V010-N00033.label: 温疟
V010-N00033.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜热病
V010-N00033.definition: 又称“瘴疟”，“牡疟”。以但热甚而寒微，或但热而无寒，少气烦闷，手足热而欲呕，头痛，骨节烦痛，口渴引饮，舌红，苔黄，脉弦数等为常见症的疟疾。

V010-N00033.label: 疟疾
V010-N00033.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜热病
V010-N00033.definition: 感染疟原虫、瘴毒或风寒暑湿之气，以往来寒热，休作有时，反复发作，日久胁下有痞块为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00033.label: 瘴疟
V010-N00033.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜热病
V010-N00033.definition: 感受山岚瘴毒引起的疟疾。

V010-N00033.label: 疟疾
V010-N00033.englishNames: malaria; Malaria; Alternating fever and chills disorder
V010-N00033.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病

V010-N00033.label: 瘴疟
V010-N00033.englishNames: miasmic malaria; miasmatic malaria; malignant malaria
V010-N00033.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病｜疟疾

V010-N00033.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00033.label: 疟疾
V010-N00033.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜影响因素｜兼杂疾病因素

V010-N00033.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00033.label: 疟疾
V010-N00033.aliases: Alternating fever and chills disorder； 瘴疟
V010-N00033.englishNames: malaria; Malaria; Alternating fever and chills disorder
V010-N00033.pinyinNames: nue ji; nüè jí; nve ji
V010-N00033.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00033.definition: Characterized by paroxysms of sudden coldness followed by shivering and then fever and sweating. In severe cases, unconsciousness, delirium, and masses in the left subcostal region may be present. Often occurs when toxin of malarial parasites enters the bloodstream and struggles with the Wei-defensive qi between the exterior and interior. It may also occur when toxin of malaria parasites disturbs the heart mind.

V010-N00033.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00033.label: 瘴疟
V010-N00033.englishNames: Miasmic malaria; miasmic malaria; miasmatic malaria; malignant malaria
V010-N00033.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00033.definition: Characterized by sudden episodes occurring at irregular periods, unconsciousness, delirium, jaundice and severe anaemia. Often occurs when mosquito bites in damp heat environment enter the bloodstream to disturb the heart mind or causes the bile to overflow.

V010-N00033.label: 疟疾

V010-N00025.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00025.label: 湿温病
V010-N00025.aliases: 湿温； 湿瘟病； 湿瘟
V010-N00025.path: 外感病类术语｜温疫类病
V010-N00025.definition: 因湿热邪毒，经口鼻而入，蕴结中焦，阻滞气机，湿热熏蒸弥漫所致。临床以身热不扬，脘痞、腹胀，神情淡漠，舌苔腻，脉缓，玫瑰疹或白瘩，左胁下痞块，白细胞减少等为特征的温疫病。

V010-N00025.label: 湿温
V010-N00025.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜内科疾病｜热病
V010-N00025.definition: 感受湿热病邪引起的温病。因湿邪引起的以纳呆、皖闷、腹胀、头重、倦怠为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00025.label: 湿温病
V010-N00025.aliases: 湿温； 湿瘟病； 湿瘟
V010-N00025.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病

V010-N00025.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00025.label: 湿温
V010-N00025.aliases: 湿瘟； 湿温病； 湿瘟病； Dampness febrile disorders； Dampness pestilence disorders； damp warm
V010-N00025.englishNames: damp warm; damp-warm disease; Dampness pestilence; Dampness Prevalent Diseases; Dampness and warmth disorder; dampness-warmth
V010-N00025.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00025.definition: A type of pestilence characterized by a persistent high-grade fever, gastric discomfort, abdominal distension, indifferent expression, a greasy tongue coating, a delayed pulse, pink or white skin rashes, masses in the left subcostal region, and low white blood cell count. Often occurs when damp heat enters the body through the mouth and nose to accumulate in the spleen and stomach and obstruct the qi activity.

V010-N00218.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00218.label: 痢疾
V010-N00218.path: 外感病类术语｜温疫类病
V010-N00218.definition: 因饮食不洁,感染湿热或寒湿疫毒，积滞肠间,阻遏气机,损伤肠络所致。临床以突发腹痛、腹泻，便下赤白脓血，里急后重，伴见发热，恶心、呕吐等为特征的温疫病。

V010-N00218.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00218.label: 痢疾
V010-N00218.definition: 以腹痛腹泻，里急后重，大便下赤白脓血为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00218.label: 痢疾
V010-N00218.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜热病
V010-N00218.definition: 以腹痛腹泻，里急后重，大便下赤白脓血为主要表现的疾病。

V010-N00218.label: 痢疾
V010-N00218.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病

V010-N00022.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00022.label: 春温病
V010-N00022.aliases: 春温； 春瘟病； 春瘟
V010-N00022.path: 外感病类术语｜温疫类病
V010-N00022.definition: 因温热或疫毒经口鼻而人，侵及营血，上犯于脑，扰乱神明所致。临床以骤然高热，身体灼热，烦躁，口渴,头痛,呕吐,斑疹隐隐,或潮热、谵语,甚则神昏、痉厥等为特征的温疫病。

V010-N00022.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00022.label: 春温
V010-N00022.definition: 春季感受温热病邪，以初起即见里热证，易发生神昏、痉、出血等为特征的危重温病。

V010-N00022.label: 春温
V010-N00022.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜内科疾病｜热病

V010-N00022.label: 春温
V010-N00022.path: 中医药学名词：内妇儿科学（2011）｜内科学｜热病
V010-N00022.definition: 发生于春季的一类温病。

V010-N00022.label: 春温病
V010-N00022.aliases: 春瘟； 春瘟病； 春温
V010-N00022.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病

V010-N00022.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00022.label: 春温
V010-N00022.aliases: spring warm disorder； 春温病； 春瘟病； Spring febrile disorder； Spring pestilence disease
V010-N00022.englishNames: spring warm disorder; Spring warmth disorder; Spring Warm Syndrome; spring warmth; Spring pestilence
V010-N00022.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00022.definition: A type of pestilence characterized by a sudden high-grade fever, headache, neck rigidity, vomiting, macular eruption, restlessness, followed by unconsciousness and convulsions. Often occurs when pathogenic warm heat or epidemic toxin enters the body through the mouth or nose to affect the Ying nutrients, blood and brain.

V010-N00022.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00022.label: 春温

V010-N00026.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00026.label: 流痰
V010-N00026.path: 外感病类术语｜温疫类病｜痨病
V010-N00026.definition: 因先天不足,肾亏骨弱，或扭伤挫伤,复感痨虫,邪毒与痰浊凝聚,流注或蚀伤骨与关节所致。临床以初起患处隐隐酸楚，动则疼痛，继而局部肿胀，疼痛加重，或溃破流脓清稀如痰，夹败絮样物，不易愈合，损伤筋骨，形成窦道，或侵犯脊椎,可出现四肢强直、不遂或瘫痪等为特征的痨病。

V010-N00026.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00026.label: 流痰
V010-N00026.englishNames: flowing phlegm;tuberculosis of bone and joint
V010-N00026.path: 第2部分：外科学｜疮疡类疾病｜痨病［外科学］
V010-N00026.definition: 发生于骨和关节间的慢性化脓性疾病。

V010-N00026.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00026.label: 骨关节结核
V010-N00026.definition: 结核杆菌侵入骨和/或关节而引起的慢性感染性疾病。

V010-N00026.label: 流痰
V010-N00026.englishNames: chronic suppurative abscess of bones and joints
V010-N00026.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜外科疾病｜疮疡疾病
V010-N00026.definition: 发生在骨与关节间的慢性化脓性疾病。

V010-N00026.label: 流痰
V010-N00026.englishNames: flowing phlegm; tuberculosis of bone and joint
V010-N00026.path: 中医药学名词：外科学等（2013）｜外科学｜疾病
V010-N00026.definition: 发生于骨和关节间的慢性化脓性疾病。相当于骨与关节结核。liu tan yäng xu tan ning zheng

V010-N00026.label: 骨关节结核
V010-N00026.path: 中医药学名词：外科学等（2013）｜骨伤科学｜疾病
V010-N00026.definition: 又称“骨痨”。结核杆菌侵入骨或关节而引起的慢性感染性疾病。

V010-N00026.label: 流痰
V010-N00026.aliases: Osteoarticular Tuberculosis； Pyogenous Chronic Arthrosis； 穿骨流注； 骨痨
V010-N00026.englishNames: flowing phlegm; tuberculosis of bone and joint; Chronic Suppurative Abscess of Bones and Joints; flowing  phlegm(tuberculosis of bone and joint); Flowing phlegm disorder; chronic suppurative abscess of bones and joints
V010-N00026.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜温疫类病｜痨病

V010-N00026.vocabName: T/CIATCM 020-2025 中医临床基本症状信息分类与代码
V010-N00026.label: 流痰
V010-N00026.path: 分类与代码表｜附加信息（症状情况）｜临床专科情况｜皮肤科类

V010-N00026.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00026.label: 流痰
V010-N00026.aliases: Osteoarticular Tuberculosis； Pyogenous Chronic Arthrosis； 穿骨流注； 骨痨； Flowing phlegm disorder； Bone and joint tuberculosis disorder； Bone tuberculosis
V010-N00026.englishNames: flowing phlegm; tuberculosis of bone and joint; Chronic Suppurative Abscess of Bones and Joints; tuberculosis of bone andjoint; flowing  phlegm(tuberculosis of bone and joint); Flowing phlegm disorder; Flowing phlegm; chronic suppurative abscess of bones and joints
V010-N00026.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00026.definition: A condition initially characterized by dull soreness and pain upon physical exertion, followed by local swelling, pain and discharge of thin, clear pus or pus that resembles rotten cotton threads, delayed healing, and formation of a sinus tract. If the spine is affected, limb rigidity, impaired movement or paralysis may be present. This condition is known as osteoarticular tuberculosis in modern medicine. Often occurs when Mycobacterium tuberculosis and turbid phlegm flow into bones and joints due to congenital kidney deficiency coupled with contraction of Mycobacterium tuberculosis.

V010-N00026.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00026.label: 流痰
V010-N00026.aliases: BWC170； 骨痨； Osteoarticular Tuberculosis； Pyogenous Chronic Arthrosis
V010-N00026.englishNames: flowing phlegm; Chronic Suppurative Abscess of Bones and Joints; flowing  phlegm(tuberculosis of bone and joint); chronic suppurative abscess of bones and joints

V010-N00026.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00026.label: 流痰
V010-N00026.aliases: BWC170； 骨痨； Osteoarticular Tuberculosis； Pyogenous Chronic Arthrosis
V010-N00026.englishNames: flowing phlegm; Chronic Suppurative Abscess of Bones and Joints; flowing  phlegm(tuberculosis of bone and joint); chronic suppurative abscess of bones and joints
V010-N00026.definition: chronic pyogenic infection, especially tuberculosis, of bone and joint, also known as osteoarticular tuberculosis

V010-N00202.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00202.label: 感冒
V010-N00202.path: 外感病类术语｜外感时令类病
V010-N00202.definition: 因时令外邪侵袭肺表所致。临床以发热、恶寒，头身疼痛，鼻塞、喷嚏,咽喉痛痒，咳嗽等为特征的外感时病。

V010-N00202.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00202.label: 伤风
V010-N00202.path: 外感病类术语｜外感时令类病｜感冒
V010-N00202.definition: 因风邪或兼夹寒、暑等外邪侵袭肺卫所致。临床以鼻塞、流涕，喉痒、咳嗽，或伴见发热、恶寒,或微恶风寒等为特征的感冒轻症。

V010-N00202.vocabName: GBT42467系列标准-中医临床名词术语
V010-N00202.label: 伤风
V010-N00202.definition: 感受风邪，以发热恶寒，鼻塞流涕，喉痒咳嗽等为主要表现的感冒轻证。

V010-N00202.definition: Characterized by fever, chills, headache, body ache, nasal obstruction, sneezing, sore/scratchy throat and cough. In mild cases, common cold is known as wind injury (shang feng). An epidemic common cold, or influenza, often occurs when exogenous pathogenic factors affect the lung exterior.

V010-N00031.vocabName: GBT16751.1-2023-中医临床诊疗术语 第1部分：疾病
V010-N00031.label: 时行感冒
V010-N00031.path: 外感病类术语｜外感时令类病｜感冒
V010-N00031.definition: 因时行邪毒侵袭肺卫所致。临床以骤然发热，可伴见恶寒，或微恶风寒，咽喉充血肿痛，头痛，全身肌肉或骨节酸痛等为特征，流行于四时而以冬春更为常见的感冒。

V010-N00031.label: 时行感冒
V010-N00031.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜内科疾病｜热病
V010-N00031.definition: 由流感病毒引起的急性呼吸道传染病，即流行性感冒。

V010-N00031.label: 时行感冒
V010-N00031.path: 中医疾病｜外感病类术语｜外感时令类病｜感冒

V010-N00031.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00031.label: 时行感冒
V010-N00031.aliases: 时邪感冒； Seasonal cold disorder
V010-N00031.englishNames: influenza; Seasonal common cold; Seasonal cold disorder
V010-N00031.pinyinNames: shi xing gan mao; shí xíng gǎn mào
V010-N00031.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00031.definition: A condition characterized by sudden fever, chills or mild aversion to wind or cold, sore, swollen and congested throat, headache, and muscle/joint soreness and pain. Often occurs when pathogenic toxins attack the Wei-defence, and is more common in spring and winter.

V010-N00031.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00031.label: 时行感冒

V010-N00055.definition: 因脏腑失调,气血癡滞，或邪毒壅盛，上犯耳窍所致。临床以单耳或双耳听力骤然减退，或伴眩晕、耳鸣等为特征的耳病。

V010-N00055.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜疾病
V010-N00055.definition: Characterized by sudden onset of hearing impairment in one or both ears. Individuals may also experience vertigo and tinnitus. Often results from stagnation of qi and blood due to dysfunctions of the zang–fu organs, or pathogenic factors affecting the ear.

V010-N00420.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00420.label: 实证
V010-N00420.definition: 与虚证相对。泛指外邪侵袭人体，或因情志、食积、痰饮、水湿、瘀血等引起气血、阴阳、脏腑、经络功能亢进，邪气壅滞或炽盛等相应征象为特征的一类证候。

V010-N00420.label: 实证
V010-N00420.englishNames: excess pattern/ syndrome; Excess pattern; excess syndrome/pattern; Sthenic Syndrome

V010-N00420.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00420.label: 实证
V010-N00420.englishNames: excess pattern/ syndrome; Excess pattern; excess syndrome/pattern; Sthenic Syndrome
V010-N00420.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00420.definition: Characterized by high fever, thirst, chest tightness, panting, rapid breathing, phlegm sounds in the throat, restlessness, delirium, abdominal distension/pain/tenderness, and scanty, dark-yellow urine or hesitant, painful urination. The tongue is rough with a dry, yellow coating. The pulse is replete and forceful. Contributing factors may include six pathogenic factors, parasites or dysfunctions of the zang–fu organs (subsequent food stagnation, retention of phlegm/fluid/water/dampness and blood stasis).

V010-N00420.label: 实证

V010-N00420.label: 实证

V010-N00417.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00417.label: 寒证
V010-N00417.definition: 与热证相对。泛指外感寒邪，或因阳气不足，阴气过盛等而引起寒凝肌表、经络、骨节，或脏腑虚寒、寒实等相应征象为特征的一类证候。

V010-N00417.label: 寒证
V010-N00417.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00417.definition: 寒邪侵袭,或阳虚阴盛,以恶寒,或畏寒，肢冷喜暖,口淡不渴，面白路卧,分泌物、排泄物清稀,舌淡苔白，脉紧或迟等为常见症的寒性证候。

V010-N00417.label: 寒证
V010-N00417.englishNames: cold pattern/ syndrome; cold syndrome/pattern; Cold pattern; Cold Syndrome

V010-N00417.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00417.label: 寒证
V010-N00417.englishNames: cold pattern/ syndrome; cold syndrome/pattern; Cold pattern; Cold Syndrome
V010-N00417.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00417.definition: Characterized by aversion to cold, cold intolerance, cold pain with preference for warmth, absence of thirst, thin, clear phlegm and nasal discharge, clear, profuse urine, loose stools and a pale complexion. The tongue is purple with a white coating. The pulse is tight or slow. Often results from excess of yin qi or cold attacking the interior.

V010-N00352.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00352.label: 表寒肺热证
V010-N00352.aliases: 外寒肺热证； 肺热表寒证
V010-N00352.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of exterior cold with lung heat
V010-N00352.path: 八纲证候类术语｜寒热错杂证｜表寒里热证
V010-N00352.definition: 因寒邪外束，肺热内郁所致。临床以咳嗽或喘，咯痰黄白，胸闷，烦躁，舌苔白或微黄，脉浮数，伴见恶寒、发热，无汗，头身疼痛等为特征的证候。

V010-N00352.label: 表寒肺热证
V010-N00352.aliases: 外寒肺热证； 肺热表寒证
V010-N00352.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of exterior cold with lung heat; Exterior cold with lung heat pattern
V010-N00352.path: 证候｜八纲证候类术语｜寒热错杂证｜表寒里热证

V010-N00352.label: 表寒肺热证
V010-N00352.aliases: 外寒肺热证； 肺热表寒证； Exterior cold with lung heat pattern
V010-N00352.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of exterior cold with lung heat; Exterior cold with lung heat pattern
V010-N00352.pinyinNames: biao han fei re zheng; biǎo hán fèi rè zhèng
V010-N00352.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00352.definition: Characterized by aversion to cold, fever, thirst, absence of sweating, restlessness, cough, panting and chest tightness. The tongue coating is yellow mixed with white. The pulse is superficial and rapid. This pattern often occurs when cold binds the Wei-defence and causes internal lung heat.

V010-N00411.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00411.label: 表证
V010-N00411.definition: 与里证相对。泛指外感病邪侵袭肌肤、肌肉、骨节、官窍等体表组织而引起营卫不和、经气不利等相应征象为特征的一类证候。

V010-N00411.label: 表证
V010-N00411.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00411.definition: 外感病的初期,起病较急,病位较浅,病情较轻,病程较短，以发热恶寒或恶风、头身痛、舌苔薄白、脉浮为常见症的证候。

V010-N00411.label: 表证
V010-N00411.englishNames: external syndrome/pattern; Exterior Syndrome; exterior pattern/ syndrome; Exterior pattern

V010-N00411.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00411.label: 表证
V010-N00411.englishNames: external syndrome/pattern; Exterior pattern; Exterior Syndrome; exterior pattern/ syndrome
V010-N00411.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00411.definition: Characterized by aversion to wind/cold, fever, headache, and body aches. The tongue coating is thin. The pulse is floating. These signs and symptoms are often seen in the early stage of externally contracted conditions that have a sudden onset, superficial location and a short duration. Often occurs when exogenous pathogenic factors affect the interstices, joints and head.

V010-N00414.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00414.label: 虚证
V010-N00414.definition: 与实证相对。泛指因正气不足，人体气血津精阴阳虚损而引起气血、阴阳、脏腑、经络功能衰退等相应征象为特征的一类证候。

V010-N00414.label: 虚证
V010-N00414.englishNames: deficiency pattern/ syndrome; deficiency syndrome/pattern; Deficiency Symptom Complex; Deficiency pattern

V010-N00414.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00414.label: 虚证
V010-N00414.englishNames: deficiency pattern/ syndrome; deficiency syndrome/pattern; Deficiency Symptom Complex; Deficiency pattern
V010-N00414.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00414.definition: Characterized by general weakness, a weak pulse and abdominal softness. Often results from insufficiency of qi, yin, yang or blood.

V010-N00414.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00414.label: 虚证

V010-N00414.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准

V010-N00418.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00418.label: 里证
V010-N00418.definition: 与表证相对。泛指外邪由表入里，或因饮食不节、劳倦过度、七情内伤、痰瘀凝滞等而引起气血、阴阳、脏腑经络功能失调等相应征象为特征的一类证候。

V010-N00418.label: 里证
V010-N00418.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00418.definition: 病邪深入于脏腑、气血、骨髓所致，病位深，病情重，病程长的证候。

V010-N00418.label: 里证
V010-N00418.englishNames: interior pattern/ syndrome; internal syndrome/pattern; Interior Syndrome; Interior pattern

V010-N00418.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00418.label: 里证
V010-N00418.englishNames: interior pattern/ syndrome; internal syndrome/pattern; Interior pattern; Interior Syndrome
V010-N00418.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00418.definition: A group of patterns caused by entering of external pathogens into the interior, improper diet, over exhaustion, emotional disturbance or phlegm stasis, resulting in disorders and dysfunctions in qi, blood, yin, yang, zang–fu organs and meridian systems.

V010-N00418.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00418.label: 里证

V010-N00418.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00418.label: 里证
V010-N00418.englishNames: interior pattern/ syndrome; Interior Syndrome; interior syndrome
V010-N00418.definition: a general term for patterns/syndromes that indicate the existence of disease in the interior of the body such as bowels and viscera, qi and blood, or bone marrow

V010-N00413.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00413.label: 热证
V010-N00413.definition: 与寒证相对。泛指外感热邪，或诸邪入里化热，或因阴虚阳亢等而引起邪热袭表、经气痹阻，或邪入脏腑经络，阳气亢盛、阴津亏损等相应征象为特征的一类证候。

V010-N00413.label: 热证
V010-N00413.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00413.definition: 热邪侵袭,或阳气亢盛,以身热烦躁,面目红赤,唇红而干,咽燥口渴，喜冷饮,大便秘结，小便短赤，舌红苔黄，脉数等为常见症的热性证候。

V010-N00413.aliases: 热毒蕴结肌肤； 热扰胸膈； 热盛动风； 热盛动血； 热盛酿脓； 热盛气滞； 热实结胸； 热重于风； 热重于湿； 少腹热滞
V010-N00413.englishNames: Heat Syndrome; heat syndrome/pattern; heat pattern/ syndrome; Heat pattern
V010-N00413.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00413.definition: Characterized by fever, a red face, thirst, constipation and yellow or red urine. Alternatively, malar flush, night sweats, feverish sensations in the palms, soles and chest, a dry, red tongue and a thready, rapid pulse may be present. It is sub-categorized into patterns of exterior heat, interior heat, deficiency heat and excess heat. Often results from contracting pathogenic heat or hyperactivity of yang due to yin deficiency.

V010-N00413.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00413.label: 热盛动风

V010-N00413.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00413.label: 热证

V010-N00413.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00413.label: 热证
V010-N00413.definition: a general term for patterns/syndromes resulting either from attack of external heat or from prevalence of yang qi, usually manifested by fever, aversion to heat and liking for cold, thirst, flushed face, irritability and vexation, thick yellow sputum

V010-N00421.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00421.label: 阳证
V010-N00421.definition: 与阴证相对。泛指具有兴奋、趋外、上升、机能亢进或色泽明亮等病机特征，具有统领表证、热证、实证辨证意义的一类证候。

V010-N00421.label: 阳证
V010-N00421.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00421.definition: 符合阳的兴奋、躁动、亢进、快速等属性的证候,是对表证、实证、热证的概括。

V010-N00421.label: 阳证
V010-N00421.englishNames: Yang Syndrome; yang syndrome/pattern; Yang pattern; yang pattern/ syndrome

V010-N00421.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00421.label: 阳证
V010-N00421.englishNames: Yang Syndrome; yang syndrome/pattern; Yang pattern; yang pattern/ syndrome
V010-N00421.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00421.definition: Causes outward, upward symptoms and manifests as conditions characterized by excitability, hyperactivity, restlessness, and brightness. It encompasses exterior pattern, heat pattern and excess pattern.

V010-N00421.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00421.label: 阳证

V010-N00421.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00421.label: 阳证
V010-N00421.definition: a collective term for exterior, heat and excess patterns/ syndromes with excitatory, hyperfunctional, restless or bright manifestations, or outward and upward symptoms, as well as morbid conditions caused by pathogenic factors of yang nature

V010-N00409.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00409.label: 阴证
V010-N00409.definition: 与阳证相对。泛指具有抑制、内敛、萎靡、机能衰退或色泽晦暗等病机特征，具有统领里证、寒证、虚证辨证意义的一类证候。

V010-N00409.label: 阴证
V010-N00409.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00409.definition: 符合阴的抑制、衰退、沉静、缓慢等属性的证候,是对里证、虚证、寒证的概括。

V010-N00409.label: 阴证
V010-N00409.englishNames: Yin Syndrome; yin pattern/syndrome; Yin pattern; yin syndrome/pattern

V010-N00409.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00409.label: 阴证
V010-N00409.englishNames: Yin Syndrome; yin pattern/syndrome; Yin pattern; yin syndrome/pattern
V010-N00409.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00409.definition: Causes inward, downward symptoms and manifests as conditions characterized by inhibition, listlessness, tranquillity and gloominess. It encompasses interior pattern, cold pattern and deficiency pattern.

V010-N00409.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00409.label: 阴证

V010-N00409.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00409.label: 阴证
V010-N00409.definition: a collective term for interior, cold and deficiency patterns/syndromes with inhibitory, hypofunctional, quiescent or dimmed manifestations, or inward and downward symptoms, as well as morbid conditions caused by pathogenic factors of yin nature

V010-N00343.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00343.label: 风寒犯肺证
V010-N00343.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of wind and cold invading the lung
V010-N00343.path: 病因证候类术语｜风证类｜风寒证
V010-N00343.definition: 因风寒外袭，肺气失宣或上逆所致。临床以咳嗽或喘，痰白清稀，喷嚏、鼻塞，遇寒凉则发作或加重，舌苔白，脉浮或浮紧，可伴见恶寒，发热，无汗，头身疼痛等为特征的证候。

V010-N00343.label: 风寒犯肺证
V010-N00343.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of wind and cold invading the lung
V010-N00343.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜风证类｜风寒证

V010-N00343.aliases: 风寒束肺证； Wind cold fettering the lung pattern； Wind cold binding the lung
V010-N00343.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of wind and cold attacking the lung; Wind cold attacking the lung pattern; pattern/syndrome of wind-cold assailing the lung
V010-N00343.pinyinNames: feng han xi fei zheng; fēng hán xí fèi zhèng
V010-N00343.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00343.definition: Characterized by aversion to cold, fever, absence of sweating, cough, chest tightness, panting and expectoration of white phlegm. The tongue coating is thin and white. The pulse is superficial and tense. This pattern often occurs when wind cold affects the dispersing of lung qi.

V010-N00386.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00386.label: 风痰证
V010-N00386.path: 病因证候类术语｜风证类
V010-N00386.definition: 泛指因风邪引动伏痰，或肝风夹痰，横窜入络，上攻清窍，蒙蔽心神等引起的一类证候。

V010-N00386.label: 风痰证
V010-N00386.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00386.definition: 外风挟痰为患,或肝风痰浊内扰，以咳吐泡沫痰涎,胸闷,眩晕，头目胀痛;或喉中痰鸣，肢体麻木，口眼蜗斜，苔白腻,脉弦滑等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00386.label: 风痰证
V010-N00386.englishNames: Wind-phlegm pattern; syndrome/pattern of wind and phlegm; wind-phlegm pattern/ syndrome

V010-N00386.englishNames: Wind-phlegm pattern; syndrome/pattern of wind and phlegm; wind-phlegm pattern/ syndrome; Wind phlegm pattern
V010-N00386.pinyinNames: feng tan zheng; fēng tán zhèng
V010-N00386.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00386.definition: Characterized by vomiting of foamy phlegm, chest tightness, dizziness, headache, eye distension/pain, sound of phlegm in the throat, and deviation of the eyes and mouth border. The tongue coating is white and greasy. The pulse is wiry and slippery. Often occurs when external wind that carries turbid phlegm attacks the body or liver wind that carries turbid phlegm affects the body.

V010-N00441.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00441.label: 卫分证
V010-N00441.path: 卫气营血证候类术语｜卫分证类
V010-N00441.definition: 因温热疫毒等邪由口鼻而入，侵袭肺卫，肺失宣降所致。临床以发热，微恶风寒，咳嗽，咯痰黄白，咽赤肿痛，口渴，鼻流浊涕，舌边尖红，舌苔白或微黄，脉浮数或弦数等为特征的证候。

V010-N00441.label: 卫分证
V010-N00441.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00441.definition: 一般为温病初起，邪犯卫分，肺气失宣，以头痛发热，微恶风寒，口微渴,少汗，咳嗽，咽痛，苔薄白，脉浮数为常见症的证候。

V010-N00441.label: 卫分证

V010-N00441.englishNames: Wei Fen Symptom Complex; Wei-defence phase pattern; defense aspect pattern/syndrome; syndrome/pattern of defense phase; Defense phase patterns

V010-N00441.definition: Characterized by fever and mild aversion to wind cold. The pulse is superficial and rapid. This pattern often occurs when pathogenic warm heat affects the normal functioning of Wei-defensive qi and disturbs the dispersing and descending of lung qi.

V010-N00441.englishNames: defense aspect pattern/syndrome; Wei Fen Symptom Complex; weifen syndrome

V010-N00441.definition: the initial stage of an epidemic febrile disease when only the superficial part of the defense qi is involved, marked by fever, slightly aversion to wind and cold, headache, reddened tongue tip and rapid floating pulse

V010-N00335.label: 风热犯肺证
V010-N00335.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of wind and heat invading the lung
V010-N00335.path: 病因证候类术语｜风证类｜风热证
V010-N00335.definition: 因风热侵袭肺卫，肺失清肃所致。临床以咳嗽，气促，咳声重浊或音哑，咯痰不爽，痰黏或黄，咽痛，口渴，鼻流浊涕，舌质红，舌苔薄黄，脉浮数或浮滑，伴见发热、恶风，头痛等为特征的证候。

V010-N00335.label: 风热犯肺证
V010-N00335.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00335.definition: 风热侵袭肺卫,以发热，微恶风寒,或身痛，咽痛，咳嗽,气喘，舌尖红，苔薄黄，脉浮数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00335.label: 风热犯肺证
V010-N00335.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of wind and heat invading the lung; pattern/syndrome of wind-heat invading the lung; Wind-heat invading the lung pattern
V010-N00335.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜风证类｜风热证

V010-N00335.pinyinNames: feng re fan fei zheng; fēng rè fàn fèi zhèng

V010-N00335.definition: Characterized by cough, panting, fever, mild aversion to wind cold, and body ache or sore throat. The tongue tip is red with a thin, yellow coating. The pulse is superficial and rapid. This pattern often occurs when wind heat invades the lung defence and affects the dispersing and descending of lung qi.

V010-N00379.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00379.label: 水毒证
V010-N00379.path: 病因证候类术语｜毒证类
V010-N00379.definition: 泛指因水湿秽毒蕴积，湿毒郁闭三焦，或上凌心肺等引起的一类证候。

V010-N00379.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of water toxin; Fluid disturbance pattern

V010-N00435.label: 火毒入营血证

V010-N00435.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of fire toxin in the nutrient and blood
V010-N00435.path: 病因证候类术语｜毒证类｜火毒证｜火毒内攻证
V010-N00435.definition: 因火毒炽盛，热入营血所致。临床以壮热、烦渴，目赤肿痛，神昏、谵语，或衄血，血色暗红，或全身泛发红斑、疱疹、糜烂、溃脓、结痂，或口腔、阴部等局部溃疡、糜烂，舌质红绛，舌苔黄，脉滑数，可伴见恶心、呕吐，关节疼痛，大便秘结，小便黄赤等为特征的证候。

V010-N00435.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00435.label: 热入营血证
V010-N00435.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of heat entering the nutrient and blood phases
V010-N00435.path: 病因证候类术语｜火证类｜火热证｜热在营血证

V010-N00435.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of fire toxin in the nutrient and blood
V010-N00435.pinyinNames: huo dong ru ying xue zheng
V010-N00435.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜毒证类｜火毒证｜火毒内攻证

V010-N00435.definition: Characterized by fever that aggravates at night, restlessness and insomnia. Alternatively, unconsciousness, thirst with little water intake, maculae, bleeding, constipation and yellow urine may be present. The tongue is deep red. The pulse is thready and rapid. This pattern often occurs when pathogenic warm/heat consumes yin blood and disturbs the heart mind.

V010-N00435.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by fever higher at night, vexing insomnia or impaired consciousness, barely visible skin rashes or bleeding, constipation, crimson tongue and rapid fine pulse

V010-N00438.label: 热入血分证
V010-N00438.aliases: 热炽血分证； 热在血分证

V010-N00438.definition: 因温热邪毒深入血分，迫血妄行所致。临床以温热外感病过程中出现咳血或吐血、衄血、尿血、便血，斑疹密布，色紫或黑，舌质深绛或起刺，脉数，伴见身热、口渴，心烦、不寐等为特征的证候。

V010-N00438.label: 血分证
V010-N00438.aliases: 血热内扰证； 热炽血分证； 血热证； 热炽血分； 血热内扰； 温邪侵袭血分证

V010-N00438.label: 热入血分证
V010-N00438.aliases: 热炽血分证； 热在血分证； Excess heat in the blood aspect pattern； Blood and heat pattern
V010-N00438.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of heat entering the blood aspect; Heat entering the blood phase pattern; syndrome/pattern of heat entering the blood phase

V010-N00438.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00438.definition: Characterized by haemorrhagic symptoms such as haemoptysis, nosebleed, bloody urine and bloody stools. Alternatively, a high-grade fever, unconsciousness and twitching of hands/feet may be present. The tongue is dark purple. This pattern often occurs when fire/heat consumes Ying nutrients and blood.

V010-N00438.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00438.label: 血分证
V010-N00438.aliases: 血热内扰证； 热炽血分证； 血热证； 热炽血分； 血热内扰； 温邪侵袭血分证
V010-N00438.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of blood phase; Xuefen Syndrome; blood aspect pattern/ syndrome; Blood phase patterns; Blood phase pattern
V010-N00438.pinyinNames: xue fen zheng; xuè fèn zhèng
V010-N00438.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00438.definition: Characterized by fever that aggravates at night, restlessness, insomnia, unconsciousness, delirium, a dark purple tongue and a wiry, rapid pulse. Alternatively, dark purple maculae, haematemesis, nosebleed, bloody stools, bloody urine, a dry tongue with a scanty coating and a thready, deficient pulse may be present. This pattern often occurs when heat in febrile conditions moves blood, stirs wind and consumes yin.

V010-N00438.label: 热入血分证

V010-N00438.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by fever, impaired consciousness, bleeding and deep crimson tongue

V010-N00436.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00436.label: 血分证
V010-N00436.path: 卫气营血证候类术语｜血分证类
V010-N00436.definition: 因温热疫毒等邪深入血分，耗血伤阴，动血生风所致。临床以壮热或夜热早凉，手足抽搐或蠕动，神昏、谵语，斑疹紫黑，舌质深绛，舌苔少或无，脉弦数，指纹紫黑，伴见吐血或衄血、尿血、便血等为特征的证候。

V010-N00436.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00436.label: 血热证
V010-N00436.path: 气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类
V010-N00436.definition: 泛指因血热内蕴，或热入血分，壅滞肌腠，灼伤血络，迫血妄行，内扰脏腑，化燥伤阴、夹湿动风等所引起的一类证候。

V010-N00436.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00436.label: 血热妄行证
V010-N00436.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of frenetic movement of blood due to heat
V010-N00436.path: 气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血热证｜血热内盛证
V010-N00436.definition: 因邪入血分，迫血妄行，或血热内盛，灼伤血络所致。临床以突然大咳血或呕血、衄血、便血、尿血、产后血崩等，势急量多，血色鲜红或紫暗，或斑疹密布，颜色紫赤，舌质红，舌苔黄，脉弦数，可伴见身热、神昏，狂躁不安，头胀，眩晕，胸胁脘腹疼痛等为特征的证候。

V010-N00436.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00436.label: 热入血分证
V010-N00436.aliases: 热炽血分证； 热在血分证
V010-N00436.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of heat entering the blood phase
V010-N00436.path: 病因证候类术语｜火证类｜火热证｜热在营血证
V010-N00436.definition: 因温热邪毒深入血分，迫血妄行所致。临床以温热外感病过程中出现咳血或吐血、衄血、尿血、便血，斑疹密布，色紫或黑，舌质深绛或起刺，脉数，伴见身热、口渴，心烦、不寐等为特征的证候。

V010-N00436.label: 血分证
V010-N00436.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00436.definition: 一般为温热病的第四个阶段，邪热深入血分，耗血伤阴，动血生风，以壮热或低热，手足抽搐或蠕动，神昏谵语,瘫疹紫黑，吐血、蛆血、尿血、便血等，舌质深绛，脉弦数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00436.definition: Characterized by haemoptysis, haematemesis, nosebleed, bloody urine, bloody stools with a bright red, sticky colour, and earlier period with heavy menstruation. Alternatively, red, swollen and painful sores/boils, restlessness, thirst, and fever may be present. The tongue is deep red. The pulse is slippery and rapid. Often occurs when exuberant fire heat in the zang–fu organs causes the blood to flow recklessly.

V010-N00434.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00434.label: 热入营分证
V010-N00434.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of heat entering the nutrient phase
V010-N00434.path: 病因证候类术语｜火证类｜火热证｜热在营血证
V010-N00434.definition: 因温热邪毒入营，或热动心神所致。临床以身体灼热，发热夜甚，心烦、不寐，斑疹隐隐，或时作谵语、躁妄，或目赤肿痛，舌质红绛，中有裂纹，舌苔薄黄或无苔，脉细数，指纹紫红或紫滞等为特征的证候。

V010-N00434.label: 热入营分证
V010-N00434.englishNames: Heat in the nutrient phase pattern; syndrome/pattern of heat entering the nutrient phase
V010-N00434.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜火证类｜火热证｜热在营血证

V010-N00434.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00434.label: 热入营分证
V010-N00434.aliases: Heat in the nutrient phase pattern
V010-N00434.englishNames: Heat in the nutrient phase pattern; Heat entering the Ying nutrients phase pattern; syndrome/pattern of heat entering the nutrient phase
V010-N00434.pinyinNames: rè rù yíng fèn zhèng; re ru ying fen zheng
V010-N00434.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00434.definition: Characterized by fever that aggravates at night, restlessness, insomnia, unconsciousness, delirium and maculae. The tongue is deep red. This pattern often occurs when toxic fire/heat enters the Ying nutrients phase and disturbs the heart mind.

V010-N00427.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00427.label: 热炽气分证
V010-N00427.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of intense heat in the qi phase
V010-N00427.path: 病因证候类术语｜火证类｜火热证｜热在气分证
V010-N00427.definition: 因感受温热邪毒，或邪由卫分传入，邪正交争于气分所致。临床以壮热、恶热，大汗出，烦渴引饮，颜面红赤，胸闷，小便黄，舌质红，舌苔黄燥，脉洪数，指纹紫红等为特征的证候。

V010-N00427.label: 热炽气分证
V010-N00427.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of intense heat in the qi phase
V010-N00427.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜火证类｜火热证｜热在气分证

V010-N00427.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00427.label: 热入气分证
V010-N00427.aliases: Heat entering the qi phase pattern
V010-N00427.englishNames: Heat entering the qi phase pattern; Heat entering the qi phase
V010-N00427.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00427.definition: Characterized by fever, thirst, dark yellow urine, and constipation. The tongue is red with a yellow coating. The pulse is slippery and rapid. This pattern often occurs when toxic fire/heat struggles with anti-pathogenic qi in the qi phase.

V010-N00344.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00344.label: 热邪壅肺证
V010-N00344.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of pathogenic heat obstructing the lung
V010-N00344.path: 病因证候类术语｜火证类｜火热证｜热在气分证
V010-N00344.definition: 因温热之邪侵袭，或外邪入里化热，壅滞于肺，宣降失常所致。临床以咳喘气粗，痰稠色黄，鼻翼煽动，胸胁胀满，甚则咳吐脓血，痰稠腥臭，胸肋疼痛，舌质红，舌苔黄或腻，脉数，指纹紫红，伴见发热、汗出，口渴，烦躁等为特征的证候。

V010-N00344.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00344.label: 肺热炽盛证
V010-N00344.aliases: 肺实热证； 肺热亢盛证； 肺热壅盛证； 肺火证
V010-N00344.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of intense exuberance of lung heat
V010-N00344.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肺系证类｜肺证类｜肺热证
V010-N00344.definition: 因邪热壅盛或化火，壅积于肺所致。临床以壮热、恶热，汗出不解，烦渴欲饮，大便秘结，咳喘气粗，咳痰黄稠，甚则咯血，胸膺胀痛或灼痛，鼻翼煽张，舌质红，舌苔黄燥或焦黄，脉滑数或洪数有力等为特征的证候。

V010-N00344.label: 肺热炽盛证
V010-N00344.englishNames: syndrome of exuberance of lung heat
V010-N00344.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00344.definition: 火热炽盛,壅结于肺，以发热口渴,咳嗽，气粗而喘,或有胸痛、咽痛，鼻煽气灼,便秘尿黄，舌红苔黄,脉数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00344.label: 热邪壅肺证
V010-N00344.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of pathogenic heat obstructing the lung
V010-N00344.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜火证类｜火热证｜热在气分证

V010-N00344.label: 肺热炽盛证
V010-N00344.aliases: 肺火证； 肺热亢盛证； 肺热壅盛证； 肺实热证； 邪热壅肺证
V010-N00344.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of intense  exuberance of lung heat; intense lung heat pattern/syndrome; Intense congestion of lung heat pattern; syndrome/pattenn of intense exuberance of lung heat
V010-N00344.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肺系证类｜肺证类｜肺热证

V010-N00344.label: 肺实热证

V010-N00344.englishNames: Excess heat in the lung pattern
V010-N00344.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00344.definition: Characterized by fever, thirst, cough, rapid breathing and panting. Chest pain, sore throat, nasal flaring, constipation and yellow urine may also be present. The tongue is red with a yellow coating. The pulse is rapid. This pattern often occurs when pathogenic heat affects the lung.

V010-N00344.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00344.label: 肺热炽盛证

V010-N00344.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by fever, thirst, cough, dyspnea or chest pain, constipation, dark urine, reddened tongue with yellow coating

V010-N00366.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00366.label: 惊恐伤肾证
V010-N00366.aliases: 恐惧伤肾证； 恐伤肾气证
V010-N00366.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of sudden fright and terror damaging the kidney
V010-N00366.path: 病因证候类术语｜情志证类｜惊恐证
V010-N00366.definition: 因秉质怯弱，遭受惊吓，气泄于下，肾气不固所致。临床以骤然惊吓，二便失禁，惊惶不定，易惊、多疑，胆怯，时作恶梦，面色苍白，舌质淡红，脉沉伏或疾数，指纹青紫，可伴见阳痿、滑精等为特征的证候。

V010-N00366.label: 惊恐伤肾证
V010-N00366.aliases: 恐惧伤肾证； 恐伤肾气证
V010-N00366.englishNames: Fear damaging the kidney system pattern; syndrome/pattern of sudden fright and terror damaging the kidney
V010-N00366.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜情志证类｜惊恐证

V010-N00366.label: 惊恐伤肾证
