V010-N00366.englishNames: Fear damaging the kidney system pattern; syndrome/pattern of sudden fright and terror damaging the kidney; Fear/fright damaging the kidney pattern
V010-N00366.pinyinNames: jing kong shang shen zheng; jīng kǒng shāng shèn zhèng
V010-N00366.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00366.definition: Characterized by panic, impotence, nocturnal emissions, timidity, paranoia, and bladder/bowel incontinence. Often occurs when severe fear or fright damages kidney qi.

V010-N00328.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00328.label: 思虑伤脾证
V010-N00328.englishNames: syndrome/patrn of excessive contemplation damaging the spleen
V010-N00328.path: 病因证候类术语｜情志证类｜忧思气郁证
V010-N00328.definition: 因劳神过度，或思虑难解，脾郁失运所致。临床以多思、善疑，头晕、神疲，难以恢复，少食、纳呆，甚或厌食，腹胀、便溏，舌质淡，舌苔薄白，脉细缓无力，或伴见惊悸，失眠，健忘等为特征的证候。

V010-N00328.label: 思虑伤脾证
V010-N00328.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of excessive contemplation damaging the spleen
V010-N00328.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜情志证类｜忧思气郁证

V010-N00328.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00328.label: 思虑伤脾证
V010-N00328.aliases: 思伤心脾证； 思伤脾气证； Anxiety damaging the spleen system pattern； Overthinking damaging spleen qi
V010-N00328.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of excessive contemplation damaging the spleen; Worry damaging the spleen pattern
V010-N00328.pinyinNames: si lv shang pi zheng; sī lǜ shāng pí zhèng
V010-N00328.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00328.definition: Characterized by worries, suspiciousness, dizziness, lassitude, palpitations, timidity, insomnia, forgetfulness, a poor appetite, and a lustreless complexion. The tongue is pale with a thin, white coating. The pulse is thready. This pattern often results from qi stagnation due to thinking too much, mental over-exertion or emotional disturbance.

V010-N00305.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00305.label: 忧郁伤神证
V010-N00305.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of excessive anxiety and depression damaging spirit
V010-N00305.path: 病因证候类术语｜情志证类｜忧思气郁证
V010-N00305.definition: 因过度忧郁，损伤神气，或神不守舍所致。临床以情绪低落，神志恍惚，呵欠频作，独处不语，悲忧善哭，心悸，失眠，多梦、易醒，甚则彻夜不寐，哭笑无常，神情淡漠，疲乏、无力，舌质红，舌苔薄，脉弦细，可伴见心胸烦闷，注意力下降，甚或出现幻视、幻听，梦游、夜游等为特征的证候。

V010-N00305.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00305.label: 忧伤神气证
V010-N00305.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类｜心神不宁证
V010-N00305.definition: 因忧虑过度，损伤神气所致。临床以情志抑郁，表情淡漠，不欲饮食，舌质淡暗，舌苔白，脉弦，伴见失眠、多梦，头晕，神疲等为特征的证候。

V010-N00305.label: 忧郁伤神证
V010-N00305.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of excessive anxiety and depression damaging spirit
V010-N00305.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜情志证类｜忧思气郁证

V010-N00305.label: 忧伤神气证
V010-N00305.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of anxiety damaging spirit; Anxiety damaging the spirit pattern
V010-N00305.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类｜心神不宁证

V010-N00305.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00305.label: 情志郁结证
V010-N00305.aliases: 忧伤神气证； Excessive worry damaging spirit qi pattern
V010-N00305.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of emotional stagnation; Emotional stagnation pattern
V010-N00305.pinyinNames: qing zhi yu jie zheng; qíng zhì yù jié zhèng
V010-N00305.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00305.definition: Characterized by depression, apathetic facial expression, insomnia, dream-disturbed sleep, dizziness, lassitude, and a poor appetite. The pulse is wiry. Often occurs when excessive worry damages the mind.

V010-N00329.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00329.label: 湿热困脾证
V010-N00329.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of damp-heat encumbering the spleen
V010-N00329.path: 病因证候类术语｜湿证类｜湿热证｜湿热内侵证｜湿热中阻证
V010-N00329.definition: 因湿热内蕴，困滞中气，脾失健运所致。临床以脘腹痞胀，食后加重，纳呆、食少，口中黏腻，大便黏滞或溏，肢体困重或浮肿，或面目发黄，带下量多、色黄，气味腥臭，舌质偏红，舌苔黄腻，脉滑数等为特征的证候。

V010-N00329.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00329.label: 脾经湿热证
V010-N00329.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of dampness and heat in the spleen meridian
V010-N00329.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜脾证类｜脾经证
V010-N00329.definition: 因湿热时邪或疫毒蕴结脾经所致。临床以身热不扬，汗出不彻，胸腹等处白显现，或脘腹痞满，恶心、呕吐，肢体困重，大便溏泄，尿少色黄，或面目肌肤黄染，皮肤瘙痒，舌质红，舌苔黄腻，脉濡数等为特征的证候。

V010-N00329.label: 湿热蕴脾证
V010-N00329.englishNames: syndrome of dampnessheat stagnating in spleen
V010-N00329.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00329.definition: 湿热内蕴，脾失健运，以腹胀纳呆，便溏不爽,肢体困重，或面目发黄，或身热不扬，汗出热不解,渴不多饮,或妇女带下量多色黄，舌红苔黄腻，脉滑数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00329.label: 湿热困脾证
V010-N00329.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of damp-heat encumbering the  spleen; syndrome/pattern of damp-heat encumbering the spleen
V010-N00329.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜湿证类｜湿热证｜湿热内侵证｜湿热中阻证

V010-N00329.label: 脾经湿热证
V010-N00329.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of dampness and heat in the spleen meridian
V010-N00329.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜脾证类｜脾经证

V010-N00329.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00329.label: 湿热困脾证
V010-N00329.aliases: 湿热蕴脾证； Damp heat accumulating in the spleen pattern
V010-N00329.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of damp-heat encumbering the  spleen; Damp heat affecting the spleen pattern; syndrome/pattern of damp-heat encumbering the spleen
V010-N00329.pinyinNames: shi re kun pi zheng; shī rè kùn pí zhèng
V010-N00329.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00329.definition: Characterized by abdominal fullness/upset, a poor appetite, nausea, vomiting, loose stools with a sensation of incomplete evacuation, body heaviness, thirst but drink a small amount of water, feverish sensation (but no fever) that cannot be resolved after sweating. The tongue is red with a yellow, greasy coating. The pulse is soft and rapid. This pattern often occurs when internal damp heat affects the functioning of the spleen and stomach.

V010-N00329.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00329.label: 湿热蕴脾证
V010-N00329.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of dampness-heat accumulation in spleen

V010-N00329.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00329.label: 湿热蕴脾证
V010-N00329.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of dampness-heat in the spleen
V010-N00329.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by abdominal distention, nausea, vomiting, anorexia, heaviness sensation in the limbs, or jaundice, reddened tongue with yellow slimy coating and rapid soggy pulse

V010-N00368.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00368.label: 湿热蕴胞证
V010-N00368.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of dampness and heat accumulation in the uterus
V010-N00368.path: 病因证候类术语｜湿证类｜湿热证｜湿热内侵证｜湿热下注证
V010-N00368.definition: 因湿热下注，蕴结胞宫所致。临床以白带色黄、腥臭、量多，或阴部瘙痒、糜烂，舌质红，舌苔黄腻，脉滑数，可伴见少腹隐痛，月经先期等为特征的证候。

V010-N00368.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00368.label: 胞宫湿热证
V010-N00368.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of uterine dampness and heat
V010-N00368.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜胞宫证类
V010-N00368.definition: 因湿热侵袭，蕴结胞宫所致。临床以带下量多、色黄、黏稠、秽臭，阴部瘙痒、糜烂，舌质红，舌苔黄腻，脉滑数等为特征的证候。

V010-N00368.label: 胞宫湿热证
V010-N00368.englishNames: syndrome of dampnessheat in uterus;syndrome of dampnessheat in womb
V010-N00368.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00368.definition: 湿热侵袭,蕴结胞宫，以带下量多、色黄,黏稠秽臭，阴部瘙痒、糜烂，舌红苔黄腻，脉滑数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00368.label: 湿热蕴胞证
V010-N00368.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of dampness and heat accumulation in the uterus
V010-N00368.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜湿证类｜湿热证｜湿热内侵证｜湿热下注证

V010-N00368.label: 胞宫湿热证
V010-N00368.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of uterine dampness and heat; Dampness-heat in the uterus pattern
V010-N00368.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜胞宫证类

V010-N00368.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00368.label: 胞宫湿热证
V010-N00368.aliases: Dampness heat in the uterus pattern； 湿热蕴胞证
V010-N00368.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of uterine dampness and heat; Damp heat in the uterus pattern; Dampness-heat in the uterus pattern
V010-N00368.pinyinNames: bao gong shi re zheng; bāo gōng shī rè zhèng
V010-N00368.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00368.definition: Characterized by profuse, yellow, sticky and smelly vaginal discharge, and itching and ulceration of the vulva. The tongue is red with a yellow, greasy coating. The pulse is slippery and rapid. This pattern often occurs when damp heat remains in the uterus.

V010-N00368.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00368.label: 胞宫湿热证
V010-N00368.englishNames: uterine dampnessheat pattern/ syndrome; uterus dampness-heat syndrome/pattern

V010-N00368.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00368.label: 胞宫湿热证
V010-N00368.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by large amount of yellowish leukorrhea, thick, fetid, associated with pudental itching and erosion, reddened tongue with yellow slimy coating and rapid slippery pulse

V010-N00304.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00304.label: 水气凌心证
V010-N00304.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of water qi intimidating the heart
V010-N00304.path: 病因证候类术语｜湿证类｜水气证｜水气上凌证
V010-N00304.definition: 因水湿凝聚，上凌冲心所致。临床以心悸、怔忡，胸膺憋闷，不得平卧，肢体浮肿，按之没指，小便短少，舌质淡胖，舌苔白滑，脉沉迟或细促结代，可伴见唇甲青紫，畏冷、肢凉，乏力等为特征的证候。

V010-N00304.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00304.label: 肾水凌心证
V010-N00304.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of kidney water attacking the heart
V010-N00304.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜肾脏兼证类
V010-N00304.definition: 因肾阳虚，阳不制阴，水气上凌，心阳被遏所致。临床以心悸、怔忡，气上撞心，或欲作奔豚状，胸闷、气短，下肢浮肿，小便短少，舌质淡胖，或舌质暗、青紫，舌苔白滑，脉细数无力，或沉弦，可伴见咳唾痰白，或血色泡沫痰，不得平卧，畏冷、肢凉等为特征的证候。

V010-N00304.label: 水气凌心证
V010-N00304.englishNames: syndrome of water pathogen attacking heart
V010-N00304.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00304.definition: 阳虚水气不化，水液泛滥，上凌于心，以心悸征忡,畏寒肢冷，肢体浮肿，下肢尤甚，气喘不能平卧，咳嗽吐稀白痰,舌淡胖，苔白滑，脉沉弱等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00304.label: 水气凌心证
V010-N00304.aliases: 肾水凌心证； 心肾阳虚水泛证
V010-N00304.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of water qi intimidating the heart; pattern/syndrome of water qi intimidating the heart; Water qi intimidating the heart system pattern
V010-N00304.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜湿证类｜水气证｜水气上凌证

V010-N00304.label: 肾水凌心证
V010-N00304.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of kidney water attacking the heart
V010-N00304.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜肾脏兼证类

V010-N00304.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00304.label: 水气凌心证
V010-N00304.aliases: 肾水凌心证； 心肾阳虚水泛证
V010-N00304.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of water qi intimidating the heart; pattern/syndrome of water qi intimidating the heart; Water retention affecting the heart pattern; Water qi intimidating the heart system pattern
V010-N00304.pinyinNames: shui qi ling xin zheng; shuǐ qì líng xīn zhèng
V010-N00304.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00304.definition: Characterized by cold intolerance, cold limbs, leg oedema, palpitations, an inability to lie flat, and cough with thin, white sputum. The tongue is pale and enlarged with a white, slippery coating. The pulse is weak. This pattern often occurs when water retention (due to yang qi deficiency of the heart and kidney) affects the heart.

V010-N00304.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00304.label: 水气凌心证
V010-N00304.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of water pathogen attacking heart

V010-N00304.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00304.label: 水气凌心证
V010-N00304.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of water qi intimidating the heart
V010-N00304.definition: a pattern/syndrome arising when deficiency of yang qi of the heart and the kidney results in water flooding, marked by palpitations and shortness of breath associated with general edema, especially in the legs, short voidings of scanty clear urine, as

V010-N00428.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00428.label: 湿阻气分证
V010-N00428.aliases: 湿阻证； 湿邪阻滞证
V010-N00428.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of dampness obstruction in qi phase
V010-N00428.path: 病因证候类术语｜湿证类｜湿邪证｜湿邪外感证
V010-N00428.definition: 因湿邪困阻气分所致。临床以身热，汗出不减，胸脘痞闷，恶心欲呕，大便黏滞不爽，口渴、不欲多饮，舌质或红，舌苔微黄而腻，脉濡数，可伴见腹泻，身重、体倦，白隐现等为特征的证候。

V010-N00428.label: 湿阻证
V010-N00428.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00428.definition: 湿浊之邪困阻气机,以头重肢困,关节、肌肉酸痛沉重，胸闷皖痞，纳呆腹胀，大便溏泻， 苔滑腻,脉濡缓等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00428.label: 湿浊困阻证
V010-N00428.aliases: 阳虚浊聚证； 湿邪阻滞证； 湿阻证
V010-N00428.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of dampness-turbidity encumbrance and obstruction
V010-N00428.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜湿证类｜湿浊证

V010-N00428.label: 湿阻气分证
V010-N00428.aliases: 湿阻证； 湿邪阻滞证
V010-N00428.englishNames: Dampness obstructing the qi phase pattern; syndrome/pattern of dampness obstruction in qi phase
V010-N00428.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜湿证类｜湿邪证｜湿邪外感证

V010-N00428.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00428.label: 湿阻气分证
V010-N00428.aliases: 湿阻证； 湿邪阻滞证； Dampness obstructing the qi phase pattern
V010-N00428.englishNames: Dampness obstructing the qi phase pattern; syndrome/pattern of dampness obstruction in qi phase; Dampness obstructing the qi phase
V010-N00428.pinyinNames: shi zu qi fen zheng; shī zǔ qì fèn zhèng
V010-N00428.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00428.definition: Characterized by fever that cannot be resolved by sweating, thirst with no desire to drink water, chest or gastric discomfort, nausea, vomiting, and a sensation of incomplete evacuation after bowel movements. Associated symptoms may include diarrhoea, body heaviness and fatigue. The tongue is red with a slightly yellow, slippery and greasy coating. The pulse is soft and rapid. This pattern often occurs when dampness affects the qi phase.

V010-N00308.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00308.label: 寒湿困脾证
V010-N00308.aliases: 寒湿蕴脾证； 寒湿偏胜，中阳被困证
V010-N00308.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of cold and dampness encumbering the spleen
V010-N00308.path: 病因证候类术语｜寒证类｜寒湿证｜寒湿内侵证
V010-N00308.definition: 因寒湿或阴寒内蕴，困阻脾阳所致。临床以脘闷、腹胀，口腻、不渴，食少、纳呆，肠鸣作泻，或肢体浮肿，或身目发黄而晦暗，或白带量多，舌质淡胖，舌苔白腻，脉濡缓等为特征的证候。

V010-N00308.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00308.label: 湿困脾阳证
V010-N00308.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of dampness encumbering spleen yang
V010-N00308.path: 病因证候类术语｜湿证类｜湿邪证｜湿邪内蕴证
V010-N00308.definition: 因水湿内蕴，困阻脾阳，或久病脾虚，寒湿困阻所致。临床以全身浮肿，面色㿠白，甚则腹大如鼓，按之如囊裹水，或大便水泻，肠鸣、腹痛，或白带清稀、量多，舌质胖嫩，边有齿痕，舌苔白滑，脉濡缓或沉细无力，可伴见脘闷、腹胀，口腻，口淡乏味等为特征的证候。

V010-N00308.label: 寒湿困脾证
V010-N00308.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00308.definition: 寒湿内盛，困阻脾阳，以皖腹胀闷，纳呆呕恶，口淡不渴，腹痛便溏，头身困重，身目发黄而晦暗，或妇女白带量多，舌淡胖，苔白腻，脉濡缓等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00308.label: 寒湿困脾证
V010-N00308.aliases: 湿困脾阳证； 寒湿偏胜，中阳被困证； 寒湿蕴脾证
V010-N00308.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of cold-dampness encumbering the spleen; syndrome/pattern of cold and dampness encumbering the spleen; Cold-dampness encumbering the spleen system pattern
V010-N00308.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜寒证类｜寒湿证｜寒湿内侵证

V010-N00308.label: 湿困脾阳证
V010-N00308.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of dampness encumbering spleen yang
V010-N00308.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜湿证类｜湿邪证｜湿邪内蕴证

V010-N00308.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00308.label: 寒湿困脾证
V010-N00308.aliases: 湿困脾阳证； 寒湿偏胜，中阳被困证； 寒湿蕴脾证； Cold dampness encumbering the spleen system pattern； Cold dampness accumulating in the spleen pattern
V010-N00308.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of cold-dampness encumbering the spleen; syndrome/pattern of cold and dampness encumbering the spleen; Cold dampness affecting the spleen pattern; Cold-dampness encumbering the spleen system pattern
V010-N00308.pinyinNames: han shi kun pi zheng; hán shī kùn pí zhèng
V010-N00308.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00308.definition: Characterized by abdominal distension/tightness, a greasy taste, a poor appetite, nausea, vomiting, tastelessness, abdominal pain, loose stools, and heaviness of the head and body. Dark yellow eyes/skin, profuse leucorrhoea, and obesity may also be present. The tongue is pale and enlarged with a white, greasy coating. The pulse is soft and delayed. This pattern often occurs when internal cold dampness obstructs spleen yang.

V010-N00308.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00308.label: 寒湿困脾证

V010-N00308.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00308.label: 寒湿困脾证
V010-N00308.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of cold-dampness encumbering the spleen; syndrome of colddampness disturbing spleen
V010-N00308.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by epigastric and abdominal distention, stickiness and tastelessness in the mouth, nausea, loose bowels, heaviness sensation of the head and body, or jaundice with dull yellow discoloration, pale plump tongue with white slimy

V010-N00320.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00320.label: 湿阻肠道证
V010-N00320.aliases: 湿滞肠道证； 湿蕴肠道证
V010-N00320.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of dampness obstructing the intestines
V010-N00320.path: 病因证候类术语｜湿证类｜湿邪证｜湿邪内蕴证
V010-N00320.definition: 因湿邪内蕴，肠道传化失常所致。临床以腹胀，隐痛，大便濡泻清稀，或便质黏垢而腥臭，舌苔白滑，脉濡缓等为特征的证候。

V010-N00320.label: 湿阻肠道证
V010-N00320.aliases: 湿滞肠道证； 湿蕴肠道证
V010-N00320.englishNames: Dampness in the intestines pattern; syndrome/pattern of dampness obstructing the intestines
V010-N00320.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜湿证类｜湿邪证｜湿邪内蕴证

V010-N00320.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00320.label: 湿阻肠道证
V010-N00320.aliases: 湿滞肠道证； 湿蕴肠道证
V010-N00320.englishNames: Dampness in the intestines pattern; Dampness obstructing the large intestine pattern; syndrome/pattern of dampness obstructing the intestines
V010-N00320.pinyinNames: shī zǔ cháng dào zhèng; shi zu chang dao zheng
V010-N00320.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00320.definition: Characterized by abdominal distension/dull pain, and thin, clear and loose stools or sticky, strong-odoured stools. The tongue coating is white and slippery. The pulse is soft and slack. This pattern often occurs when dampness affects the conduction of the large intestine.

V010-N00349.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00349.label: 燥邪犯肺证
V010-N00349.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of pathogenic dryness invading the lung
V010-N00349.path: 病因证候类术语｜燥证类｜燥邪证
V010-N00349.definition: 因外感燥邪，或感受风热，化燥伤阴，肺失清肃所致。临床以干咳、少痰或无痰，痰黏不易咳出，唇鼻咽喉干燥，声音嘶哑，口渴，咳甚则胸痛，或痰中血丝，舌尖红，舌苔薄黄、少津，脉细或数，初起或伴见发热、恶寒，头痛等为特征的证候。

V010-N00349.label: 燥邪犯肺证
V010-N00349.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00349.definition: 燥邪侵袭，肺失清肃，以微有寒热，干咳无痰,或痰中带血丝，胸痛，唇鼻咽喉干燥，口渴，舌燥少津，脉浮等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00349.label: 燥邪犯肺证
V010-N00349.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of pathogenic dryness invading the lung; Dryness invading the lung pattern; pattern/syndrome of dryness invading the lung
V010-N00349.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜燥证类｜燥邪证

V010-N00349.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00349.label: 风燥伤肺证
V010-N00349.aliases: 风燥犯肺证； 燥邪伤肺证； 燥邪犯肺证； Dryness invading the lung pattern； Dryness damaging/attacking the lung
V010-N00349.englishNames: Wind dryness damaging the lung pattern; syndrome/pattern of wind and dryness damaging the lung
V010-N00349.pinyinNames: feng zao shang fei zheng; fēng zào shāng fèi zhèng
V010-N00349.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00349.definition: Characterized by unproductive coughs or cough with scanty, sticky or blood-stained phlegm, dry nose and throat, and a dry mouth. The tongue tip is red with a dry, thin and yellow coating. The pulse is thready and rapid. This pattern often occurs when wind dryness consumes body fluids and affects the dispersing and descending of lung qi.

V010-N00349.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00349.label: 燥邪犯肺证

V010-N00349.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00349.label: 燥邪犯肺证
V010-N00349.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of dryness invading the lung
V010-N00349.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by dry cough without sputum or with scanty sticky sputum difficult to expectorate, chest pain, mild chills and fever, thirst, dry lips, mouth, throat and nose, and floating pulse

V010-N00350.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00350.label: 痰浊阻肺证
V010-N00350.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of turbid phlegm obstructing the lung
V010-N00350.path: 病因证候类术语｜痰饮证类｜痰浊证｜痰浊壅塞证｜痰浊上扰证
V010-N00350.definition: 因痰浊壅塞，痹阻肺气所致。临床以胸闷、气促，咳喘、痰鸣，咯痰白黏、量多，不易咳出，或不得平卧，舌苔白滑或厚腻，脉弦滑等为特征的证候。

V010-N00350.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00350.label: 痰浊壅肺证
V010-N00350.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of turbid phlegm congesting the lung
V010-N00350.path: 病因证候类术语｜痰饮证类｜痰浊证｜痰浊壅塞证｜痰浊上扰证｜痰浊阻肺证
V010-N00350.definition: 因痰浊内伏或壅塞，阻遏气道，肺失清肃所致。临床以咳喘阵作，胸满闷窒，不得平卧，痰鸣、声高，痰白黏稠，或夹脓痰、血痰，舌质淡，舌苔垢腻或厚，脉沉滑或濡等为特征的证候。

V010-N00350.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00350.label: 痰湿蕴肺证
V010-N00350.englishNames: syndrome/pattrn of phlegm and dampness accumulating in the lung
V010-N00350.path: 病因证候类术语｜痰饮证类｜痰湿证｜痰湿阻结证｜痰湿上阻证｜痰湿犯肺证
V010-N00350.definition: 因脾湿生痰，内蕴于肺，肺失宣降所致。临床以久咳不已，咳声重浊，痰多色白，痰呈泡沫、黏稠，夹有脓痰、血痰，体位改变咯痰尤甚，痰出咳缓，舌质淡，舌苔白腻，脉濡滑，伴见胸闷，脘腹胀满，纳差等为特征的证候。

V010-N00350.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00350.label: 痰湿阻肺证
V010-N00350.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of phlegm and dampness obstructing the lung
V010-N00350.path: 病因证候类术语｜痰饮证类｜痰湿证｜痰湿阻结证｜痰湿上阻证｜痰湿犯肺证
V010-N00350.definition: 因痰湿壅阻于肺，肺气不得宣降所致。临床以咳嗽、痰多，痰白清稀或稠，容易咯出，胸膈满闷，体位变动则咯痰增多，甚则喘促、痰鸣，舌质淡，舌苔白腻或滑，脉濡缓等为特征的证候。

V010-N00350.label: 痰浊阻肺证
V010-N00350.englishNames: syndrome of turbid phlegm obstructing lung
V010-N00350.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00350.definition: 痰浊蕴结，肺气阻滞，以胸闷，咳嗽气喘，吐白痰量多，苔白滑腻，脉滑等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00350.label: 痰浊阻肺证
V010-N00350.aliases: 痰浊蕴肺证； 痰湿阻肺证； 痰湿蕴肺证
V010-N00350.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of turbid phlegm obstructing the lung; pattern/syndrome of phlegm turbidity obstructing the lung; Turbid phlegm accumulation in the lung pattern
V010-N00350.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜痰饮证类｜痰浊证｜痰浊壅塞证｜痰浊上扰证

V010-N00350.label: 痰浊壅肺证
V010-N00350.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of turbid phlegm congesting the lung
V010-N00350.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜痰饮证类｜痰浊证｜痰浊壅塞证｜痰浊上扰证｜痰浊阻肺证

V010-N00350.label: 痰湿蕴肺证
V010-N00350.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of phlegm and dampness accumulating in the lung 痰湿壅肺证; syndrome/pattern of phlegm and dampness accumulating in the lung
V010-N00350.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜痰饮证类｜痰湿证｜痰湿阻结证｜痰湿上阻证｜痰湿犯肺证

V010-N00350.label: 痰湿阻肺证
V010-N00350.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of phlegm and dampness obstructing the lung
V010-N00350.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜痰饮证类｜痰湿证｜痰湿阻结证｜痰湿上阻证｜痰湿犯肺证

V010-N00350.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00350.label: 痰湿蕴肺证
V010-N00350.aliases: 痰湿壅肺证； 痰湿阻肺证； 痰浊蕴肺证； 痰浊阻肺证； Turbid phlegm accumulation in the lung pattern； Phlegm-dampness obstructing the lung； phlegm dampness accumulating in the lung
V010-N00350.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of phlegm and dampness accumulating in the lung 痰湿壅肺证; syndrome/pattern of phlegm and dampness accumulating in the lung; Phlegm dampness accumulating in the lung pattern
V010-N00350.pinyinNames: tan shi yun fei zheng; tán shī yùn fèi zhèng
V010-N00350.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00350.definition: Characterized by cough with profuse phlegm (white and sticky/thick/thin and clear, especially in the morning, cough alleviates upon expectoration of phlegm), heavy, turbid coughing sounds, chest tightness, abdominal fullness/distension, and a poor appetite. The tongue coating is white and greasy. The pulse is soft and slippery. This pattern often occurs when phlegm-dampness affects the dispersing and descending of lung qi.

V010-N00350.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00350.label: 痰浊阻肺证
V010-N00350.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of phlegm turbidity obstructing the lung
V010-N00350.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by cough with expectoration of copious whitish sputum, feeling of stuffiness in the chest, whitish slimy coating of the tongue and soggy pulse

V010-N00384.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00384.label: 痰火扰神证
V010-N00384.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of phlegm and fire harassing the spirit
V010-N00384.path: 病因证候类术语｜痰饮证类｜痰火证｜痰火壅结证｜痰火内扰证
V010-N00384.definition: 因痰火内盛，或痰因火动，上扰心神所致。临床以头痛，烦躁，多动、多语，少寐或不眠，注意力不集中，冲动任性，易激动、愤怒、嚎叫哭闹，难于约束，甚则哭笑无常，打人毁物，或表情肌、颈肌、四肢等肌肉迅速、反复、不规则的运动性抽动，口出秽语、恶声，舌质红绛，舌苔黄腻，脉弦滑数，指纹紫滞，可伴见颜面红赤，喜食肥甘，喉间痰鸣，大便秘结，小便短赤等为特征的证候。

V010-N00384.label: 痰火扰神证
V010-N00384.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00384.definition: 火热与痰浊交结,闭扰心神,以发热口渴，面赤气粗,吐痰色黄,便秘尿黄,喉中痰鸣，胸闷心悸,烦躁不寐，甚则神昏谵语，或哭笑无常，打人毁物，舌红苔黄腻，脉滑数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00384.label: 痰火扰神证
V010-N00384.aliases: 痰火闭窍证； 痰火扰心证； 痰热扰神证； 痰热扰心证
V010-N00384.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of phlegm and fire harassing the spirit
V010-N00384.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜痰饮证类｜痰火证｜痰火壅结证｜痰火内扰证

V010-N00384.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00384.label: 痰火扰心证
V010-N00384.aliases: 痰火扰神证； 痰热扰神证； 痰热扰心证； Phlegm-fire harassing the heart system pattern； Phlegm fire/heat disturbing the mind； phlegm heat disturbing the heart
V010-N00384.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of phlegm-fire harassing the heart; Phlegm fire disturbing the heart pattern; Phlegm-fire harassing the heart system pattern
V010-N00384.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00384.definition: Characterized by hyperactivity, talkativeness, restlessness, impulsiveness, uncontrollable behaviour, inattention, feverish sensation in the chest, vexation, a poor appetite, a bitter mouth, constipation, and dark-yellow urine. The tongue is red with a yellow, greasy coating. The pulse is slippery and rapid. This pattern often occurs as a result of an internal build-up of phlegm fire.

V010-N00384.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00384.label: 痰火扰神证

V010-N00384.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00384.label: 痰火扰心证
V010-N00384.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of phlegm-fire harassing the heart
V010-N00384.definition: a pattern/syndrome caused by phlegm-fire which harasses the heart spirit, marked by restlessness, insomnia or even raving madness, reddened tongue tip, yellow dense and slimy tongue coating, and rapid slippery pulse

V010-N00385.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00385.label: 痰湿证
V010-N00385.path: 病因证候类术语｜痰饮证类
V010-N00385.definition: 泛指肺脾等脏因外感邪客，或恣食肥甘，脏腑气机失调，凝津聚液化痰，内蕴或阻滞于人体肌腠、经络、脏腑、官窍等部位所引起的一类证候。

V010-N00385.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00385.label: 痰湿阻结证
V010-N00385.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of binding obstruction due to phlegm and dampness
V010-N00385.path: 病因证候类术语｜痰饮证类｜痰湿证
V010-N00385.definition: 泛指因痰湿偏盛，痹阻或凝结气血，滞留于肌腠、经络、脏腑、官窍等所引起的一类证候。

V010-N00385.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00385.label: 痰湿阻滞证
V010-N00385.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of stagnation due to phlegm and dampness
V010-N00385.path: 病因证候类术语｜痰饮证类｜痰湿证｜痰湿阻结证
V010-N00385.definition: 因痰湿壅盛，痹阻或凝结气血所致。临床以眩晕，胸闷，咯吐痰多，痰易咯吐，犯困、嗜睡，形体丰满或肥胖，肢体麻木，舌质淡胖，舌苔白腻，脉濡缓或滑，可伴见头重、昏蒙，呕恶，口淡或腻，纳滞、食少，或体表触及质地柔软、圆滑、无痛性肿块，乳房胀痛，月经不调，白带增多，不孕，恶阻等为特征的证候。

V010-N00385.label: 湿痰证
V010-N00385.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00385.definition: 痰湿内阻，以咳吐多量黏稠痰,痰滑易咯，肢体困重，胸痞闷，食少口腻，苔白腻，脉濡缓或滑等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00385.label: 痰湿证
V010-N00385.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of phlegm and dampness; phlegm-dampness pattern/syndrome
V010-N00385.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜痰饮证类

V010-N00385.label: 痰湿阻结证
V010-N00385.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of binding obstruction due to phlegm and dampness
V010-N00385.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜痰饮证类｜痰湿证

V010-N00385.label: 痰湿阻滞证
V010-N00385.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of stagnation due to phlegm and dampness
V010-N00385.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜痰饮证类｜痰湿证｜痰湿阻结证

V010-N00385.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00385.label: 湿痰证
V010-N00385.aliases: 痰湿证； 痰湿阻滞内阻证； 痰湿阻滞证； 痰湿内阻证
V010-N00385.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00385.definition: Characterized by cough with easy expectoration of profuse, sticky phlegm, limb heaviness, dizziness, tinnitus, chest stuffiness, and tightness, a low food intake, a greasy taste and a foreign body sensation in the throat. The tongue coating is white and greasy. The pulse is soft and slippery. Often results from the internal build up of phlegm dampness.

V010-N00385.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00385.label: 湿痰证

V010-N00385.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00385.label: 湿痰证
V010-N00385.definition: a pattern/syndrome due to accumulation of dampness phlegm in the lung, marked by cough with profuse expectoration, heaviness sensation of the limbs, feeling of stuffiness in the chest, reduced food intake, stickiness of the mouth, white slimy tongue c

V010-N00385.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00385.label: 痰湿证
V010-N00385.definition: a pattern/syndrome that arises when dampness gathers to form phlegm, with different manifestations according to location: cough with profuse whitish expectoration and oppression in chest if phlegm obstructs the lung, and epigastric stuffiness, reduced

V010-N00337.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00337.label: 痰热壅肺证
V010-N00337.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of phlegm and heat congesting in the lung
V010-N00337.path: 病因证候类术语｜痰饮证类｜痰热证｜痰热搏结证｜痰热阻肺证
V010-N00337.definition: 因痰热交结，壅积于肺所致。临床以发热、咳喘，呼吸迫促，胸膈满闷，张口抬肩，喉中有水鸡声，痰黄黏稠，舌质红，舌苔黄腻，脉滑数，指纹紫等为特征的证候。

V010-N00337.label: 痰热壅肺证
V010-N00337.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00337.definition: 痰热互结，壅闭于肺，以发热口渴，咳嗽气喘,吐痰黄稠，胸闷胸痛，或咳吐脓血腥臭痰，舌红苔黄腻，脉滑数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00337.label: 痰热壅肺证
V010-N00337.aliases: 痰热蕴肺证； 痰火壅肺证； 痰火蕴肺证
V010-N00337.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of phlegm and heat congesting in the lung; Phlegm heat obstructing the lung pattern
V010-N00337.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜痰饮证类｜痰热证｜痰热搏结证｜痰热阻肺证

V010-N00337.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00337.label: 痰热壅肺证
V010-N00337.aliases: 痰热蕴肺证； 痰火壅肺证； 痰火蕴肺证； 痰热闭肺证； Phlegm heat obstructing the lung pattern； Phlegm fire/heat accumulating in the lung； phlegm heat obstructing the lung
V010-N00337.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of phlegm and heat congesting in the lung; Phlegm heat obstructing the lung pattern; Phlegm heat accumulating in the lung pattern
V010-N00337.pinyinNames: tan re yong fei zheng; tán rè yōng fèi zhèng
V010-N00337.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00337.definition: Characterized by fever, thirst, cough, panting, expectoration of yellow, sticky phlegm, and chest tightness. The tongue is red with a yellow, greasy coating. The pulse is slippery and rapid. This pattern often occurs when phlegm heat accumulates in the lung.

V010-N00337.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00337.label: 痰热壅肺证

V010-N00339.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00339.label: 寒痰阻肺证
V010-N00339.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of cold phlegm obstructing the lung
V010-N00339.path: 病因证候类术语｜寒证类｜寒痰证
V010-N00339.definition: 因宿痰内伏，复感寒邪，寒痰交并，壅阻气道，肺失肃降所致。临床以咳喘经年，胸膈胀满，喉间痰鸣，痰白而黏，动辄气急，发则喘促，不得平卧，舌质淡暗或青紫，舌苔白滑或腻，脉弦滑或紧，指纹淡红，伴见形寒、畏冷，四肢欠温等为特征的证候。

V010-N00339.label: 寒痰阻肺证
V010-N00339.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00339.definition: 寒痰壅阻于肺，肺失宣降，以咳嗽痰多，色白易咯，胸闷，或见哮喘痰鸣，畏寒肢冷，苔白滑，脉弦紧等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00339.label: 寒痰阻肺证
V010-N00339.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of cold phlegm obstructing the lung; Cold phlegm obstructing the lung pattern; pattern/syndrome of cold- phlegm obstructing the lung
V010-N00339.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜寒证类｜寒痰证

V010-N00339.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00339.label: 寒痰阻肺证
V010-N00339.aliases: 寒痰停肺证； Cold phlegm obstructing the lung pattern； Retention of cold phlegm in the lung
V010-N00339.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of cold phlegm obstructing the lung; Cold phlegm obstructing the lung pattern; pattern/syndrome of cold- phlegm obstructing the lung
V010-N00339.pinyinNames: han tan zu fei zheng; hán tán zǔ fèi zhèng
V010-N00339.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00339.definition: Characterized by cough, panting, phlegm sounds in the throat, chest fullness/tightness, white, sticky or thin/clear phlegm, shortness of breath upon physical exertion, an inability to lie flat, cold limbs, and cold intolerance. Fever and aversion to cold may also be present. The tongue coating is white and greasy. The pulse is tense. This pattern often occurs when retained phlegm and external cold affect the descending of lung qi.

V010-N00339.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00339.label: 寒痰阻肺证

V010-N00339.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00339.label: 寒痰阻肺证
V010-N00339.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of cold- phlegm obstructing the lung
V010-N00339.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by cough with profuse phlegm easy to expectorate and a feeling of pressure in the chest, or phlegmatic wheezing, aversion to cold and cold limbs, pale tongue with white slimy or slippery coating, and string-like slippery puls

V010-N00373.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00373.label: 寒滞胞宫证
V010-N00373.aliases: 寒滞胞中证； 胞宫寒滞证
V010-N00373.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of cold stagnation in the uterus
V010-N00373.path: 病因证候类术语｜寒证类｜寒邪证｜寒邪直中证
V010-N00373.definition: 因寒邪偏盛，直中胞脉，或阴寒凝滞胞宫所致。临床以痛经，小腹冷痛，得温热痛减，或月经后期，经血紫暗，或带下清稀，色白量多，或不孕，舌苔白，脉沉紧，或伴见畏寒、肢冷等为特征的证候。

V010-N00373.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00373.label: 胞宫寒凝证
V010-N00373.aliases: 寒凝胞宫证； 寒凝胞中证； 寒凝胞中，寒湿凝滞证
V010-N00373.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of cold congealing in the uterus
V010-N00373.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜胞宫证类
V010-N00373.definition: 因阳气虚损，阴寒凝滞于胞宫所致。临床以痛经，喜温、喜按，或月经后期，经色紫暗，或久婚不孕，或带下清稀，色白量多，舌质淡或胖，舌苔白，脉沉紧或弦，伴见小腹冷痛、坠痛，畏寒、肢冷等为特征的证候。

V010-N00373.label: 寒凝胞宫证
V010-N00373.englishNames: syndrome of coagulated cold in uterus;syndrome of coagulated cold in womb
V010-N00373.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00373.definition: 寒邪凝滞胞宫，以小腹冷痛，喜温,或痛经，或月经后期，经色紫暗，或带下清稀，苔白，脉沉紧等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00373.label: 寒滞胞宫证
V010-N00373.aliases: 寒滞胞中证； 胞宫寒滞证
V010-N00373.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of cold stagnation in the uterus
V010-N00373.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜寒证类｜寒邪证｜寒邪直中证

V010-N00373.label: 胞宫寒凝证
V010-N00373.aliases: 寒凝胞宫证； 寒凝胞中证； 寒凝胞中，寒湿凝滞证
V010-N00373.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of cold congealing in the uterus
V010-N00373.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜胞宫证类

V010-N00373.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00373.label: 寒凝胞宫证
V010-N00373.aliases: 胞宫寒滞证； 寒滞胞宫证； Cold congealment in the uterus pattern； Cold stagnation in the uterus pattern
V010-N00373.englishNames: Cold stagnation in the uterus pattern; Cold retention in the uterus pattern
V010-N00373.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00373.definition: Characterized by lower abdominal pain with a cold sensation that alleviates upon warmth. Dysmenorrhoea, delayed period with dark purple colour, white, thin and clear vaginal discharge and infertility may also be present. The tongue coating is white. The pulse is deep and tight. This pattern often occurs when cold remains in the uterus.

V010-N00373.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00373.label: 寒凝胞宫证
V010-N00373.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of cold congealing in the uterus; syndrome/pattern of cold congealing in uterus

V010-N00373.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00373.label: 寒凝胞宫证
V010-N00373.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of cold congealing in the uterus
V010-N00373.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by cold and pain in the lower abdomen, dysmenorrhea or delayed periods with dark menstrual discharge, white tongue coating and sunken tight pulse

V010-N00316.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00316.label: 寒滞胃脘证
V010-N00316.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of cold stagnation in stomach
V010-N00316.path: 病因证候类术语｜寒证类｜寒邪证｜寒邪直中证
V010-N00316.definition: 因秉质阳虚，阴寒凝滞于胃所致。临床以胃痛经年，遇寒凉刺激则作，得温热稍缓，口泛清水，甚或恶心、呕吐，吐后痛减，消瘦，舌苔白润，脉弦紧，可伴见口淡，不渴，面白或青，肢冷不温等为特征的证候。

V010-N00316.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00316.label: 寒邪犯胃证
V010-N00316.aliases: 寒邪客胃证； 胃中寒冷证
V010-N00316.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of pathogenic cold invading the stomach
V010-N00316.path: 病因证候类术语｜寒证类｜寒邪证｜寒邪直中证
V010-N00316.definition: 因寒邪偏盛，直中胃经，或贪凉饮冷，胃系痉挛所致。临床以突发胃脘冷痛，甚或痉挛、绞痛，冷汗出，面色苍白，时作时止，遇寒加重，得温稍舒，舌苔白，脉弦紧或迟，可伴见泛恶，呕吐清水，形寒、肢冷等为特征的证候。

V010-N00316.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00316.label: 胃寒证
V010-N00316.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜胃证类
V010-N00316.definition: 因寒客胃脘，或饮食生冷，阴寒偏盛，胃失和降，或胃寒虫窜等所引起的一类证候。

V010-N00316.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00316.label: 胃实寒证
V010-N00316.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜胃证类｜胃寒证
V010-N00316.definition: 因寒邪客胃，或饮食生冷，阴寒凝胃，胃失和降所致。临床以胃脘冷痛，时作时止，甚则绞痛，呕吐清水，遇寒则甚，得热则舒，舌苔白，脉弦紧或迟缓等为特征的证候。

V010-N00316.label: 寒邪犯胃证
V010-N00316.englishNames: syndrome of cold pathogen attacking stomach
V010-N00316.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00316.definition: 寒邪侵袭胃皖，胃失和降,以胃皖冷痛,痛势急剧，喜温,呕吐清水，恶寒肢冷，苔白，脉弦紧等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00316.label: 寒滞胃脘证
V010-N00316.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of cold stagnation in stomach
V010-N00316.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜寒证类｜寒邪证｜寒邪直中证

V010-N00316.label: 寒邪犯胃证
V010-N00316.aliases: 寒邪客胃证； 胃中寒冷证； 寒滞胃脘证； 胃实寒证； 胃寒证
V010-N00316.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of pathogenic cold invading the stomach; Cold invading the stomach system pattern
V010-N00316.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜寒证类｜寒邪证｜寒邪直中证

V010-N00316.label: 胃寒证
V010-N00316.englishNames: stomach cold pattern/ syndrome; syndrome/pattern of stomach cold
V010-N00316.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜胃证类

V010-N00316.label: 胃实寒证
V010-N00316.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of stomach excess-cold; stomach excess cold pattern/syndrome
V010-N00316.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜胃证类｜胃寒证

V010-N00316.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00316.label: 寒邪犯胃证
V010-N00316.aliases: 寒邪客胃证； 胃中寒冷证； 寒滞胃脘证； 胃实寒证； 胃寒证
V010-N00316.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of pathogenic cold invading the stomach; Cold invading the stomach system pattern; Cold attacking the stomach pattern
V010-N00316.pinyinNames: han xie fan wei zheng; hán xié fàn wèi zhèng
V010-N00316.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00316.definition: Characterized by cold, intense stomach ache that alleviates upon warmth, vomiting of clear saliva, aversion to cold, and cold limbs. The tongue coating is white. The pulse is wiry. This pattern often occurs when cold affects the descending of stomach qi.

V010-N00316.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00316.label: 胃实寒证
V010-N00316.definition: a pattern/syndrome arising when the stomach is attacked by pathogenic cold, usually manifested by acute severe epigastric pain with cold sensation, vomiting of watery fluid, aversion to cold with cold limbs and white tongue coating

V010-N00316.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00316.label: 胃寒证
V010-N00316.definition: a pattern/syndrome of stomach cold, either of excess type or of deficiency type

V010-N00268.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00268.label: 寒滞肝脉证
V010-N00268.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of cold stagnation in the liver meridian
V010-N00268.path: 病因证候类术语｜寒证类｜寒邪证｜寒邪直中证
V010-N00268.definition: 因寒邪偏盛，直中厥阴，或阴寒凝滞肝脉所致。临床以胸胁冷痛如刺，或少腹冷痛，阴器内缩引痛，或巅顶冷痛，或肢端发白，遇寒痛增，得温痛缓，舌苔白，脉弦紧，可伴见呕吐清涎，恶寒，肢冷等为特征的证候。

V010-N00268.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00268.label: 肝寒证
V010-N00268.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肝系证类｜肝证类
V010-N00268.definition: 泛指因寒邪直中肝经，或肝气、肝阳虚损等所引起的一类证候。

V010-N00268.label: 寒滞肝脉证
V010-N00268.englishNames: syndrome of cold accumulated in liver channel
V010-N00268.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00268.definition: 寒邪侵袭,凝滞肝脉，以少腹冷痛，或阴器收缩作痛,或颠顶冷痛,得温痛缓,遇寒痛增，畏寒肢冷，呕吐清涎,舌苔白，脉弦紧等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00268.label: 寒滞肝脉证
V010-N00268.aliases: 寒滞肝经证； 肝经实寒证； 肝寒证
V010-N00268.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of cold stagnation in the liver meridian; Liver meridian cold stagnation pattern; pattern/syndrome of cold stagnating in the liver meridian
V010-N00268.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜寒证类｜寒邪证｜寒邪直中证

V010-N00268.label: 肝寒证
V010-N00268.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肝系证类｜肝证类

V010-N00268.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00268.label: 寒滞肝脉证
V010-N00268.aliases: 寒滞肝经证； Cold stagnation in liver meridian pattern； Liver cold pattern； Liver meridian cold stagnation pattern； Liver meridian excess cold pattern； 肝经实寒证； 肝寒证
V010-N00268.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of cold stagnation in the liver meridian; Liver meridian cold stagnation pattern; Cold retention in the liver meridian pattern; pattern/syndrome of cold stagnating in the liver meridian
V010-N00268.pinyinNames: han zhi gan mai zheng; hán zhì gān mài zhèng
V010-N00268.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00268.definition: Characterized by pain in the lateral lower abdomen with a cold sensation, aversion to cold and cold limbs. Alternatively, genital pain with contraction or parietal headache may be present, which aggravates with cold and alleviates with warmth. The tongue coating is white. The pulse is wiry and tight. This pattern often occurs when cold remains in the liver meridian.

V010-N00268.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00268.label: 寒滞肝脉证

V010-N00268.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00268.label: 寒滞肝脉证
V010-N00268.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of cold stagnating in the liver meridian
V010-N00268.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by spasmodic symptoms in the area related to the liver meridian, such as stretching pain with cold sensation in the lower abdomen and testicles

V010-N00330.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00330.label: 寒滞肠道证
V010-N00330.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of cold stagnation in intestines
V010-N00330.path: 病因证候类术语｜寒证类｜寒邪证｜寒邪直中证
V010-N00330.definition: 因寒邪偏盛，或阴寒凝聚于肠道所致。临床以大便硬结，排出困难，或夹白冻黏液，腹中冷痛，小便清长，四肢不温，舌质淡，舌苔白，脉沉迟等为特征的证候。

V010-N00330.label: 寒滞肠道证
V010-N00330.englishNames: Intestine cold stagnation pattern; syndrome/pattern of cold stagnation in intestines
V010-N00330.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜寒证类｜寒邪证｜寒邪直中证

V010-N00401.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00401.label: 血瘀证
V010-N00401.path: 气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类
V010-N00401.definition: 泛指因瘀血内结，阻滞气血，或血瘀化热，败血、动血，兼夹风痰水湿等邪实所引起的一类证候。

V010-N00401.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00401.label: 瘀血内结证
V010-N00401.aliases: 瘀血内阻证； 瘀结证
V010-N00401.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of internal binding of blood stasis
V010-N00401.path: 气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血瘀证
V010-N00401.definition: 泛指因瘀血凝积，阻滞气血，导致相关组织及脏腑器官功能障碍所引起的一类证候。

V010-N00401.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00401.label: 瘀血阻滞证
V010-N00401.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of blood stasis obstruction and stagnation
V010-N00401.path: 病因证候类术语｜瘀血证类
V010-N00401.definition: 泛指因气血痹阻或停滞，致使肌腠、筋骨、经络、脏腑官窍等功能失常所引起的一类证候。

V010-N00401.label: 血瘀证
V010-N00401.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00401.definition: 瘀血内阻，血行不畅，以局部出现青紫肿块、疼痛拒按，或心、肝、脑等主要脏器瘀血阻络，功能障碍;或腹内肿块、刺痛不移、拒按;或出血紫暗成块，舌紫暗，脉弦涩等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00401.label: 血瘀证
V010-N00401.aliases: 瘀血内阻证； 瘀血阻滞证
V010-N00401.englishNames: Blood stasis pattern; syndrome/pattern of blood stasis; blood stasis pattern/ syndrome
V010-N00401.path: 证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类

V010-N00401.label: 瘀血内结证
V010-N00401.aliases: 瘀结证； 瘀血内阻证
V010-N00401.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of internal binding of blood stasis
V010-N00401.path: 证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血瘀证

V010-N00401.label: 瘀血阻滞证
V010-N00401.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of blood stasis obstruction and stagnation
V010-N00401.path: 证候｜病因证候类术语｜瘀血证类

V010-N00401.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00401.label: 血瘀证
V010-N00401.aliases: 瘀血内阻证； 瘀血阻滞证
V010-N00401.englishNames: Blood stasis pattern; syndrome/pattern of blood stasis; blood stasis pattern/ syndrome
V010-N00401.pinyinNames: xue yu zheng; xuè yū zhèng
V010-N00401.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00401.definition: Characterized by local bluish lumps with tenderness. Alternatively, abdominal masses with stabbing pain in a fixed location or dark purple haemorrhagic spots may be present. The tongue is purple or with ecchymosis. The pulse is wiry and hesitant. Often occurs when stagnant blood obstructs the circulation of blood.

V010-N00401.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00401.label: 血瘀证

V010-N00401.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00401.label: 血瘀证
V010-N00401.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by formation of visible painful and tender purple mass, or abdominal mass with stabbing pain and tenderness, or bleeding of dark purple blood with clots, dark purple tongue, and fine choppy or irregular pulse

V010-N00291.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00291.label: 心肺气虚证
V010-N00291.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of heart and lung qi deficiency
V010-N00291.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜心脏兼证类｜心肺兼证｜心肺两虚证
V010-N00291.definition: 因心肺两脏气虚所致。临床以心悸，久咳不止，动辄气促或喘，胸中憋闷，神疲、乏力，舌质淡，脉弱等为特征的证候。

V010-N00291.label: 心肺气虚证
V010-N00291.englishNames: syndrome of qi deficiency of heart and lung
V010-N00291.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00291.definition: 心肺两脏气虚，以心悸咳嗽，气短而喘，动则尤甚,胸闷，神疲乏力，语声低怯，自汗,舌淡，脉弱等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00291.label: 心肺气虚证
V010-N00291.englishNames: Heart and lung qi deficiency pattern; heart-lung qi deficiency pattern/ syndrome; syndrome/pattern of heart and lung qi deficiency
V010-N00291.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜心脏兼证类｜心肺兼证｜心肺两虚证

V010-N00291.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00291.label: 心肺气虚证
V010-N00291.aliases: Heart and lung qi deficiency pattern
V010-N00291.englishNames: Heart and lung qi deficiency pattern; heart-lung qi deficiency pattern/ syndrome; Qi deficiency of the heart and lung pattern; syndrome/pattern of heart and lung qi deficiency
V010-N00291.pinyinNames: xin fei qi xu zheng; xīn fèi qì xū zhèng
V010-N00291.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00291.definition: Characterized by palpitations, cough, shortness of breath, panting, chest tightness and lassitude. The tongue is pale. The pulse is weak. This pattern often results from qi deficiency of the heart and lung.

V010-N00291.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00291.label: 心肺气虚证

V010-N00291.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00291.label: 心肺气虚证
V010-N00291.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by palpitations, a feeling of pressure in the chest, cough, dyspnea and shortness of breath aggravated on exertion, thin expectoration, dizziness, listlessness and lack of strength, feeble voice, spontaneous sweating, pale to

V010-N00285.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00285.label: 心肝血虚证
V010-N00285.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of heart and liver blood deficiency
V010-N00285.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜心脏兼证类｜心肝兼证｜心肝两虚证
V010-N00285.definition: 因血虚亏损，心肝失养所致。临床以头晕、眼花，面色苍白，爪甲不荣，心慌、惊悸，手足麻木，少寐、多梦，或两胁不舒，月经量少、色淡，舌质淡，舌苔薄白，脉细等为特征的证候。

V010-N00285.label: 心肝血虚证
V010-N00285.englishNames: heart-liver blood deficiency pattern/ syndrome; Heart and liver blood deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of heart and liver blood deficiency
V010-N00285.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜心脏兼证类｜心肝兼证｜心肝两虚证

V010-N00285.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00285.label: 心肝血虚证
V010-N00285.aliases: Heart and liver blood deficiency pattern
V010-N00285.englishNames: heart-liver blood deficiency pattern/ syndrome; Heart and liver blood deficiency pattern; Blood deficiency of the heart and liver pattern; syndrome/pattern of heart and liver blood deficiency
V010-N00285.pinyinNames: xin gan xue xu zheng; xīn gān xuè xū zhèng
V010-N00285.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00285.definition: Characterized by palpitations, dream-disturbed sleep, poor memory, dizziness, blurred vision, dull pain in the subcostal region, scanty menstrual volume and pale face/tongue/fingernails. The pulse is thready. This pattern often occurs when blood fails to nourish the heart and liver.

V010-N00285.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00285.label: 心肝血虚证

V010-N00285.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00285.label: 心肝血虚证
V010-N00285.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by palpitations, forgetfulness, insomnia, dream-disturbed sleep, dizziness, blurred vision, pale complexion, numbness of the limbs, lusterless nails, scanty volume of pale menstrual flow or even amenorrhea in women, pale ton

V010-N00296.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00296.label: 心胆气虚证
V010-N00296.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of qi deficiency in heart and gallbladder
V010-N00296.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜心脏兼证类｜心肝兼证｜心肝两虚证
V010-N00296.definition: 因禀赋不足，心气亏虚，胆气不宁，神魂不安所致。临床以触事易惊，虚烦不寐，多梦易醒，甚则终日惶恐，心惕不安，舌质淡，脉弦细或缓促不定，伴见头晕，胸闷，气短、自汗，倦怠、乏力，小便清长等为特征的证候。

V010-N00296.label: 心胆气虚证
V010-N00296.englishNames: Heart and gallbladder qi deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of qi deficiency in heart and gallbladder
V010-N00296.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜心脏兼证类｜心肝兼证｜心肝两虚证

V010-N00296.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00296.label: 心胆气虚证
V010-N00296.aliases: Heart and gallbladder qi deficiency pattern
V010-N00296.englishNames: Heart and gallbladder qi deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of qi deficiency in heart and gallbladder; Qi deficiency of the heart and gallbladder pattern
V010-N00296.pinyinNames: xin dan qi xu zheng; xīn dǎn qì xū zhèng
V010-N00296.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00296.definition: Characterized by palpitations, insomnia, timidity, jumpiness or easily startled, dizziness and chest tightness. The pale is tongue. This pattern often occurs as a result of heart qi deficiency and gallbladder qi uneasiness.

V010-N00287.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00287.label: 心肾阳虚证
V010-N00287.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of yang deficiency in heart and kidney
V010-N00287.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜心脏兼证类｜心肾兼证｜心肾两虚证
V010-N00287.definition: 因秉质阳虚，或久病损伤心肾，温煦气化失司所致。临床以心悸、怔忡，肢体浮肿，小便不利，腰膝酸冷，形寒，畏冷，面色㿠白，甚则四肢厥逆，爪甲青紫，舌质淡或暗，舌苔白滑，脉沉迟而弱等为特征的证候。

V010-N00287.label: 心肾阳虚证
V010-N00287.englishNames: syndrome of yang deficiency of heart and kidney
V010-N00287.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00287.definition: 心肾阳气亏虚，温运无力，以畏寒肢冷，心悸证忡，肢体浮肿，小便不利，腰膝酸冷，舌淡紫，苔白滑，脉沉弱为常见症的证候。

V010-N00287.label: 心肾阳虚证
V010-N00287.englishNames: heart-kidney yang deficiency pattern/ syndrome; Heart and kidney yang deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of yang deficiency in heart and kidney
V010-N00287.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜心脏兼证类｜心肾兼证｜心肾两虚证

V010-N00287.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00287.label: 心肾阳虚证
V010-N00287.aliases: 心肾虚寒证； Heart and kidney yang deficiency pattern； Deficiency cold of the heart and kidney
V010-N00287.englishNames: heart-kidney yang deficiency pattern/ syndrome; Heart and kidney yang deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of yang deficiency in heart and kidney; Yang deficiency of the heart and kidney pattern
V010-N00287.pinyinNames: xin shen yang xu zheng; xīn shèn yáng xū zhèng
V010-N00287.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00287.definition: Characterized by cold intolerance, cold limbs, mild to severe palpitations, dysuria, leg oedema and low back/knee soreness and coldness. The tongue is pale purple with a white, slippery coating. The pulse is weak. This pattern often occurs when yang qi of the heart and kidney fails to warm the body.

V010-N00287.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00287.label: 心肾阳虚证

V010-N00287.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00287.label: 心肾阳虚证
V010-N00287.englishNames: heart-kidney yang deficiency pattern/ syndrome; syndrome of yang deficiency of heart and kidney
V010-N00287.definition: a pattern/syndrome arising when insufficient yang qi fails to warm and activate both the heart and the kidney, marked by palpitations, aversion to cold, lack of warmth in the extremities, inhibited urination, edema of the legs, aching and cold lumbus

V010-N00282.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00282.label: 心肾不交证
V010-N00282.aliases: 心肾阴虚阳亢证； 心肾阴虚火旺证
V010-N00282.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of heart and kidney failure in interaction
V010-N00282.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜心脏兼证类｜心肾兼证
V010-N00282.definition: 因肾水亏虚，不能上济于心，心火炽盛，不能下交于肾所致。临床以心烦、失眠，惊悸、多梦，头晕、耳鸣，腰膝酸软，梦遗，口燥、咽干，五心烦热，甚则潮热、盗汗，舌质红，舌苔少，脉细数等为特征的证候。

V010-N00282.label: 心肾不交证
V010-N00282.englishNames: syndrome of disharmony between heart and kidney
V010-N00282.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00282.definition: 心肾阴液亏虚，阳气偏亢，既济失调，以心悸,心烦失眠，头晕耳鸣，腰膝酸软，梦遗，潮热盗汗,舌红少苔，脉细数为常见症的证候。

V010-N00282.label: 心肾不交证
V010-N00282.aliases: 心肾阴虚阳亢证； 心肾阴虚火旺证
V010-N00282.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of heart and kidney failure in interaction; heart-kidney noninteraction pattern/ syndrome; Heart and kidney systems disharmony pattern
V010-N00282.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜心脏兼证类｜心肾兼证

V010-N00282.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00282.label: 心肾不交证
V010-N00282.aliases: 心肾阴虚阳亢证； 心肾阴虚火旺证； 心肾阴虚证； Heart and kidney systems disharmony pattern； Yin deficiency of the heart and kidney
V010-N00282.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of heart and kidney failure in interaction; heart-kidney noninteraction pattern/ syndrome; Disharmony between the heart and kidney pattern; Heart and kidney systems disharmony pattern
V010-N00282.pinyinNames: xin shen bu jiao zheng; xīn shèn bù jiāo zhèng
V010-N00282.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00282.definition: Characterized by palpitations, restlessness, insomnia, tinnitus, low back/knee and soreness and weakness. The tongue is red with a scanty coating. The pulse is thready, rapid and weak. This pattern often results from lack of coordination between heart fire and kidney water.

V010-N00282.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00282.label: 心肾不交证

V010-N00282.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00282.label: 心肾不交证
V010-N00282.definition: a pattern/syndrome attributed to deficiency of yin fluid of the heart and the kidney with relative preponderance of yang, marked by restlessness, insomnia, palpitation, dizziness, tinnitus, aching of the lower back and knees, seminal emission, vexing

V010-N00301.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00301.label: 心脾两虚证
V010-N00301.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of dual deficiency of the heart and spleen
V010-N00301.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜心脏兼证类｜心脾兼证
V010-N00301.definition: 因体虚或久病虚损，心脾气血阴阳亏虚所致。临床以心悸、怔忡，神疲、眩晕，少寐、多梦，呵欠频作，健忘，食少，腹胀，便溏，面色淡白，烦劳则甚，舌质淡或嫩，脉弱或细，可伴见产后焦虑、忧郁，悲伤欲哭，月经量少、色淡，淋漓不断，或梦交、遗精，阳痿、早泄，眼睑振跳，或痫病反复发作等为特征的证候。

V010-N00301.label: 心脾两虚证
V010-N00301.englishNames: syndrome of deficiency of both heart and spleen
V010-N00301.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00301.definition: 心血不足，脾气虚弱，以心悸，神疲，食少，腹胀，便溏，舌淡嫩，脉细弱等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00301.label: 心脾两虚证
V010-N00301.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of dual deficiency of the heart and spleen; pattern/syndrome of dual deficiency of the heart and spleen; Heart and spleen systems deficiency pattern
V010-N00301.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜心脏兼证类｜心脾兼证
