V010-N00301.label: 心脾两虚证
V010-N00301.aliases: 心脾亏虚证； Heart and spleen systems deficiency pattern
V010-N00301.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of dual deficiency of the heart and spleen; Deficiency of the heart and spleen pattern; pattern/syndrome of dual deficiency of the heart and spleen; Heart and spleen systems deficiency pattern
V010-N00301.pinyinNames: xin pi liang xu zheng; xīn pí liǎng xū zhèng
V010-N00301.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00301.definition: Characterized by palpitations, lassitude, low food intake, abdominal distension and loose stools. The tongue is pale. The pulse is weak. This pattern often occurs when heart blood and spleen (yang) qi become deficient.

V010-N00301.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00301.label: 心脾两虚证
V010-N00301.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of deficiency of both heart and spleen

V010-N00301.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00301.label: 心脾两虚证
V010-N00301.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of dual deficiency of the heart and spleen; syndrome of deficiency of both heart and spleen
V010-N00301.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by palpitation, amnesia, insomnia or dream-disturbed sleep, loss of appetite, abdominal distention, loose bowels, lassitude, sallow face, pale tender-soft tongue and fine weak pulse

V010-N00276.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00276.label: 肝肾阴虚证
V010-N00276.aliases: 肝肾阴亏证； 肝肾虚火证
V010-N00276.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of yin deficiency in liver and kidney
V010-N00276.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜肝脏兼证类｜肝肾兼证｜肝肾两虚证
V010-N00276.definition: 因肝肾阴分亏虚，虚热内扰所致。临床以眩晕，耳鸣，五心烦热，低热，颧红，腰膝酸软，视物不清，甚则视歧，舌质红，舌苔少，脉细数，或伴见胸胁疼痛等为特征的证候。

V010-N00276.label: 肝肾阴虚证
V010-N00276.englishNames: syndrome of yin deficiency of liverand kidney
V010-N00276.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00276.definition: 肝肾阴液亏虚，虚热内扰，以晕眩耳鸣，五心烦热，低热颧红，头胀胁痛，视力减退，腰膝酸软，舌红少苔，脉弦细数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00276.label: 肝肾阴虚证
V010-N00276.aliases: 肝肾虚火证； 肝肾阴亏证
V010-N00276.englishNames: Liver and kidney yin deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of yin deficiency in liver and kidney; liver-kidney yin deficiency pattern/ syndrome
V010-N00276.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜肝脏兼证类｜肝肾兼证｜肝肾两虚证

V010-N00276.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00276.label: 肝肾阴虚证
V010-N00276.aliases: 肝肾虚火证； 肝肾阴亏证； Liver and kidney yin deficiency pattern； Deficiency fire of the liver and kidney
V010-N00276.englishNames: Liver and kidney yin deficiency pattern; Yin deficiency of the liver and kidney pattern; syndrome/pattern of yin deficiency in liver and kidney; liver-kidney yin deficiency pattern/ syndrome
V010-N00276.pinyinNames: gan shen yin xu zheng; gān shèn yīn xū zhèng
V010-N00276.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00276.definition: Characterized by dizziness, tinnitus, feverish sensations in the palms, soles and chest, a low-grade fever, flushed cheeks, pain in the subcostal region, and low back/knee soreness and weakness. The tongue is red with a scanty coating. The pulse is thready and rapid. This pattern often occurs when yin deficiency of the liver and kidney causes deficiency heat.

V010-N00276.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00276.label: 肝肾阴虚证

V010-N00276.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00276.label: 肝肾阴虚证
V010-N00276.definition: a pattern/syndrome attributed to insufficiency of yin fluid of the liver and the kidney with harassment of endogenous heat, marked by dizziness, blurred vision, tinnitus, forgetfulness, insomnia and dream-disturbed sleep, hypochondriac pain, aching lu

V010-N00271.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00271.label: 肝胆湿热证
V010-N00271.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of dampness and heat in the liver and gallbladder
V010-N00271.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜肝脏兼证类｜肝胆兼证｜肝胆实热证
V010-N00271.definition: 因湿热内蕴，肝胆疏泄失常所致。临床以身目发黄，发热，口苦，胁肋胀痛，或胁下有痞块，纳呆，呕恶，厌油腻，尿黄，舌质红，舌苔黄腻，脉滑或濡数等为特征的证候。

V010-N00271.label: 肝胆湿热证
V010-N00271.englishNames: syndrome of dampnessheatof liver and gallbladder
V010-N00271.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00271.definition: 湿热内蕴，肝胆疏泄失常,以身目发黄，发热,口苦，胁肋胀痛，或胁下有痞块，纳呆厌油，恶心呕吐，尿黄,舌红苔黄腻,脉滑数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00271.label: 肝胆湿热证
V010-N00271.englishNames: liver-gallbladder dampness-heat pattern/syndrome; Liver-gallbladder dampness-heat pattern; syndrome/pattern of dampness and heat in the liver and gallbladder
V010-N00271.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜肝脏兼证类｜肝胆兼证｜肝胆实热证

V010-N00271.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00271.label: 肝胆湿热证
V010-N00271.englishNames: liver-gallbladder dampness-heat pattern/syndrome; Damp heat in the liver and gallbladder pattern; Liver-gallbladder dampness-heat pattern; syndrome/pattern of dampness and heat in the liver and gallbladder
V010-N00271.pinyinNames: gan dan shi re zheng; gān dǎn shī rè zhèng
V010-N00271.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00271.definition: Characterized by yellowish skin and eyes, fever, a bitter mouth, distending pain or masses in the subcostal region, poor appetite, nausea, vomiting, aversion to oily food, and yellowish urine. The tongue is red with a yellow, greasy coating. The pulse is slippery and rapid. This pattern often occurs when internal damp heat affects the qi flow of the liver and gallbladder.

V010-N00271.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00271.label: 肝胆湿热证

V010-N00271.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00271.label: 肝胆湿热证
V010-N00271.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by fever and chills, jaundice, hypochondriac and abdominal pain, bitter taste in the mouth, nausea and rapid slippery pulse

V010-N00264.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00264.label: 肝胃不和证
V010-N00264.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of disharmony of liver and stomach
V010-N00264.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜肝脏兼证类｜肝胃兼证
V010-N00264.definition: 泛指因肝失疏泄，肝气郁滞，或肝郁化火，横逆犯胃，胃失和降等肝胃功能失调引起的一类证候。

V010-N00264.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00264.label: 肝气犯胃证
V010-N00264.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of liver qi invading the stomach
V010-N00264.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜肝脏兼证类｜肝胃兼证｜肝胃不和证｜肝胃气滞证
V010-N00264.definition: 因肝失疏泄，横逆犯胃所致。临床以胃脘痞闷，胸胁胀满，喜太息，呃逆、嗳气，呕吐，病情随情志变化而增减，舌苔薄白，脉弦等为特征的证候。

V010-N00264.label: 肝胃不和证
V010-N00264.englishNames: syndrome of incoordination between liver and stomach
V010-N00264.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00264.definition: 肝气郁结，横逆犯胃，胃失和降，以胃皖、胁肋胀满疼痛，暖气,呃逆，吞酸，精神抑郁，纳呆,苔薄黄，脉弦等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00264.label: 肝胃不和证
V010-N00264.aliases: 肝气犯胃证； 肝胃不调证
V010-N00264.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of disharmony of liver and stomach; Disharmony of liver and stomach systems pattern
V010-N00264.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜肝脏兼证类｜肝胃兼证

V010-N00264.label: 肝气犯胃证
V010-N00264.aliases: 肝胃不和证； 肝木犯胃证
V010-N00264.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of liver qi invading the stomach; syndrome/pattern of liver qi invading the stomach
V010-N00264.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜肝脏兼证类｜肝胃兼证｜肝胃不和证｜肝胃气滞证

V010-N00264.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00264.label: 肝气犯胃证
V010-N00264.aliases: 肝胃气滞证； Qi stagnation of the liver and stomach pattern； 肝胃不和证； 肝木犯胃证
V010-N00264.englishNames: Liver qi affecting the stomach pattern; pattern/syndrome of liver qi invading the stomach; syndrome/pattern of liver qi invading the stomach
V010-N00264.pinyinNames: gān qì fàn wèi zhèng; gan qi fan wei zheng
V010-N00264.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00264.definition: Characterized by vomiting, acid reflux, repeated belching, gastric discomfort, and distending pain in the chest and subcostal region that aggravate upon emotional disturbance. The tongue coating is thin and white. The pulse is wiry. This pattern often occurs when liver qi stagnation affects the stomach.

V010-N00264.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00264.label: 肝胃不和证
V010-N00264.aliases: 肝气犯胃证； 肝胃不调证； Disharmony of liver and stomach systems pattern； Liver qi invading the stomach pattern； Liver–stomach disharmony pattern； Incoordination between the liver and stomach
V010-N00264.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of disharmony of liver and stomach; Disharmony of liver and stomach systems pattern; Disharmony between the liver and stomach pattern
V010-N00264.pinyinNames: gan wei bu he zheng; gān wèi bù hé zhèng
V010-N00264.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00264.definition: Characterized by gastric distension, fullness and pain, a poor appetite, belching, nausea, vomiting, dizziness, pain in the subcostal region, and restlessness. The pulse is wiry. This pattern often occurs when liver qi stagnation affects the descending of stomach qi.

V010-N00264.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00264.label: 肝胃不和证

V010-N00264.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00264.label: 肝气犯胃证
V010-N00264.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of liver qi invading the stomach
V010-N00264.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by dizziness, hypochondriac pain, irritability, epigastric distension and pain, anorexia, belching, nausea, vomiting and string-like pulse, also known as the liver-stomach disharmony pattern/syndrome

V010-N00263.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00263.label: 肝火犯胃证
V010-N00263.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of liver fire invading the stomach
V010-N00263.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜肝脏兼证类｜肝胃兼证｜肝胃不和证｜肝胃郁热证
V010-N00263.definition: 因肝火炽盛犯胃，胃失和降所致。临床以胁肋、胃脘灼热、作痛，口苦，口干，呕吐苦水，大便秘结，小便黄，舌质红，舌苔黄，脉弦数等为特征的证候。

V010-N00263.label: 肝火犯胃证
V010-N00263.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of liver fire invading the stomach; Liver fire invading the stomach system pattern
V010-N00263.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜肝脏兼证类｜肝胃兼证｜肝胃郁热证

V010-N00263.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00263.label: 肝火犯胃证
V010-N00263.aliases: Liver fire invading the stomach system pattern
V010-N00263.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of liver fire invading the stomach; Liver fire invading the stomach system pattern; Liver fire affecting the stomach pattern
V010-N00263.pinyinNames: gan huo fan wei zheng; gān huǒ fàn wèi zhèng
V010-N00263.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00263.definition: Characterized by a burning pain in the stomach and subcostal region, a dry, bitter mouth, constipation and yellow urine. The tongue is red with a yellow coating. The pulse is wiry and rapid. This pattern often occurs when liver fire affects the descending of stomach qi.

V010-N00269.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00269.label: 肝火犯肺证
V010-N00269.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of liver fire invading the lung
V010-N00269.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜肝脏兼证类｜肝肺兼证
V010-N00269.definition: 因肝火炽盛，上逆犯肺，肺失肃降所致。临床以咳嗽阵作，呛咳或挛咳不已，胸胁灼痛，急躁、易怒，口苦，咽干作痒，甚则咳血，舌质红、舌苔薄黄，脉弦数等为特征的证候。

V010-N00269.label: 肝火犯肺证
V010-N00269.englishNames: syndrome of liver fire invading lung
V010-N00269.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00269.definition: 肝火炽盛，上逆犯肺，肺失清肃，以胸胁灼痛,咳嗽阵作,甚则咳血，急躁易怒,头胀头晕，口苦口渴，舌红苔黄腻，脉滑数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00269.label: 肝火犯肺证
V010-N00269.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of liver fire invading the lung; Liver fire invading the lung system pattern; syndrome/pattern of liver fire invading the lung
V010-N00269.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜肝脏兼证类｜肝肺兼证

V010-N00269.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00269.label: 肝火犯肺证
V010-N00269.aliases: 木火刑金证； Liver fire invading the lung system pattern； Wood fire tormenting metal pattern
V010-N00269.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of liver fire invading the lung; Liver fire invading the lung system pattern; syndrome/pattern of liver fire invading the lung; Liver fire affecting the lung pattern
V010-N00269.pinyinNames: gan huo fan fei zheng; gān huǒ fàn fèi zhèng
V010-N00269.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00269.definition: Characterized by a burning pain in the chest and subcostal region, restlessness, irritability, a dry, bitter mouth and paroxysmal coughs. In severe cases, haemoptysis may be present. The tongue is red with a thin, yellow coating. The pulse is wiry and rapid. This pattern often occurs when exuberant liver fire affects the descending of lung qi.

V010-N00269.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00269.label: 肝火犯肺证
V010-N00269.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of liver fire invading the lung
V010-N00269.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by bitter taste in the mouth, dizziness and red eyes, irritability, irascibility, moving pain in the chest and hypochondriac region, cough with thick expectoration or even hemoptysis, reddened tongue and rapid tight string-li

V010-N00312.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00312.label: 脾肾阳虚证
V010-N00312.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of yang deficiency in spleen and kidney
V010-N00312.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜脾脏兼证类｜脾肾兼证｜脾肾两虚证
V010-N00312.definition: 因脾肾阳气亏虚，虚寒内生所致。临床以腰酸无力，脐腹冷痛，得温稍缓，久泄不止，或五更即泻，完谷不化，或久痢赤白，或浮肿、少尿，舌质淡胖，舌苔白滑，脉迟缓，尺部无力，伴见畏冷、肢凉，面色白等为特征的证候。

V010-N00312.label: 脾肾阳虚证
V010-N00312.englishNames: syndrome of yang deficiency of spleen and kidney
V010-N00312.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00312.definition: 脾肾阳虚，温化无权，虚寒内生，以畏寒肢冷,面色胱白，腰酸，腹部冷痛,久泻久痢，或完谷不化，或浮肿尿少，舌淡胖，苔白滑，脉沉迟无力为常见症的证候。

V010-N00312.label: 脾肾阳虚证
V010-N00312.englishNames: Spleen and kidney yang deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of yang deficiency in spleen and kidney; spleen-kidney yang deficiency pattern/ syndrome
V010-N00312.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜脾脏兼证类｜脾肾兼证｜脾肾两虚证

V010-N00312.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00312.label: 脾肾阳虚证
V010-N00312.aliases: 脾肾虚寒证； Spleen and kidney yang deficiency pattern； Deficiency cold of the spleen and kidney
V010-N00312.englishNames: Spleen and kidney yang deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of yang deficiency in spleen and kidney; Yang deficiency of the spleen and kidney pattern; spleen-kidney yang deficiency pattern/ syndrome
V010-N00312.pinyinNames: pi shen yang xu zheng; pí shèn yáng xū zhèng
V010-N00312.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00312.definition: Characterized by cold intolerance, cold limbs, a bright, pale complexion, low back soreness, abdominal pain with a cold sensation, chronic diarrhoea with stools that contain undigested food. Alternatively, oedema and scanty urine may be present. The tongue is pale and enlarged with a white, slippery coating. The pulse is deep, slow and weak. This pattern often occurs when yang qi deficiency of the spleen and kidney causes internal deficiency cold.

V010-N00312.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00312.label: 脾肾阳虚证

V010-N00312.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00312.label: 脾肾阳虚证
V010-N00312.englishNames: spleen-kidney yang deficiency pattern/ syndrome; syndrome of yang deficiency of spleen and kidney
V010-N00312.definition: a pattern/syndrome attributed to insufficient yang qi of the spleen and the kidney with endogenous cold, marked by bright pale complexion, aversion to cold with cold limbs, coldness and pain in the loins and lower abdomen, chronic diarrhea, or edema w

V010-N00334.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00334.label: 肺燥肠闭证
V010-N00334.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of lung dryness and intestinal block
V010-N00334.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜肺脏兼证类｜肺大肠兼证
V010-N00334.definition: 因肺燥津亏，腑气闭塞所致。临床以咳嗽或喘，烦渴，腹胀，时作绞痛，大便秘结，数日不通，或可触及肿物，舌质红，舌苔黄燥或焦黄，脉沉实等为特征的证候。

V010-N00334.label: 肺燥肠闭证
V010-N00334.englishNames: Lung dryness with intestinal obstruction pattern; pattern/syndrome of lung dryness with intestinal obstruction; syndrome/pattern of lung dryness and intestinal block
V010-N00334.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜肺脏兼证类｜肺大肠兼证

V010-N00334.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00334.label: 肺燥肠闭证
V010-N00334.aliases: Lung dryness with intestinal obstruction pattern
V010-N00334.englishNames: Lung dryness with intestinal obstruction pattern; pattern/syndrome of lung dryness with intestinal obstruction; syndrome/pattern of lung dryness and intestinal block; Lung dryness affecting the large intestine pattern
V010-N00334.pinyinNames: fei zao chang bi zheng; fèi zào cháng bì zhèng
V010-N00334.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00334.definition: Characterized by cough, thirst, panting, constipation, and abdominal fullness/distension/pain. The tongue coating is yellow and dry. The pulse is deep and excessive. This pattern often occurs when lung dryness consumes body fluids and blocks intestinal qi.

V010-N00334.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00334.label: 肺燥肠闭证
V010-N00334.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of lung dryness and constipation

V010-N00334.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00334.label: 肺燥肠闭证
V010-N00334.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of lung dryness with intestinal obstruction
V010-N00334.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by cough, dyspnea, thirst, constipation, abdominal distension, yellow dry coating of the tongue and sunken replete pulse

V010-N00338.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00338.label: 肺热移肠证
V010-N00338.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of lung heat transmitted to the intestine
V010-N00338.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜肺脏兼证类｜肺大肠兼证
V010-N00338.definition: 因肺热炽盛，下移大肠，传导失司所致。临床以发热，咳嗽或喘，腹胀，大便秘结，口渴，舌质红，舌苔黄，脉滑数或实等为特征的证候。

V010-N00338.label: 肺热移肠证
V010-N00338.englishNames: Lung heat transmitting into the intestine pattern; syndrome/pattern of lung heat transmitted to the intestine
V010-N00338.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜肺脏兼证类｜肺大肠兼证

V010-N00338.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00338.label: 肺热移肠证
V010-N00338.englishNames: Lung heat transmitting into the intestine pattern; syndrome/pattern of lung heat transmitted to the intestine; Lung heat transmitting to the large intestine pattern
V010-N00338.pinyinNames: fei re yi chang zheng; fèi rè yí cháng zhèng
V010-N00338.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00338.definition: Characterized by fever, thirst, cough, panting, abdominal bloating and constipation. The tongue is red with a yellow coating. The pulse is rapid or replenish. This pattern often occurs when exuberant lung heat transmits downward to the large intestine.

V010-N00370.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00370.label: 肾不纳气证
V010-N00370.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of kidney failing to receive qi
V010-N00370.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肾系证类｜肾证类｜肾虚证｜肾气虚证｜肾虚不固证
V010-N00370.definition: 因先天不足，或年老体弱，久病虚损，肾失摄纳所致。临床以喘促日久，动辄气促，呼多吸少，气不得续，形体消瘦，神疲、乏力，或尿随咳出，甚则汗出、肢冷，面青、唇紫，舌质淡或紫暗，舌苔白或黑润，脉虚细，尺部沉弱等为特征的证候。

V010-N00370.label: 肾不纳气证
V010-N00370.englishNames: Kidney failing to receive qi pattern; syndrome/pattern of kidney failing to receive qi; pattern/syndrome of kidney failing to receive qi
V010-N00370.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肾系证类｜肾证类｜肾虚证｜肾气虚证｜肾虚不固证

V010-N00370.label: 肺肾气虚证
V010-N00370.aliases: 肾不纳气证； 肾失摄纳证
V010-N00370.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of qi deficiency in the lung and kidney; lung-kidney qi deficiency pattern/ syndrome
V010-N00370.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜肺脏兼证类｜肺肾兼证｜肺肾两虚证

V010-N00370.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00370.label: 肺肾气虚证
V010-N00370.aliases: Insufficient qi of the lung and kidney pattern； Kidney failing to receive qi pattern； Lung–kidney deficiency pattern； 肾不纳气证； 肾失摄纳证
V010-N00370.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of qi deficiency in the lung and kidney; Qi deficiency of the lung and kidney pattern; lung-kidney qi deficiency pattern/ syndrome
V010-N00370.pinyinNames: fei shen qi xu zheng; fèi shèn qì xū zhèng
V010-N00370.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00370.definition: Characterized by more exhalation than inhalation, weak coughs that aggravate upon physical exertion, expectoration of thin, clear sputum, a low voice and spontaneous sweating. Cough-induced urine leaking may also be present. The tongue is pale purple. The pulse is weak. This pattern often results from qi deficiency of the lung and kidney.

V010-N00370.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00370.label: 肾不纳气证
V010-N00370.aliases: Kidney failing to receive qi pattern； 肾气失纳证
V010-N00370.englishNames: Kidney failing to receive qi pattern; Kidney failing to absorb qi pattern; syndrome/pattern of kidney failing to receive qi; pattern/syndrome of kidney failing to receive qi
V010-N00370.pinyinNames: shèn bú nà qì zhèng; shen bu na qi zheng
V010-N00370.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00370.definition: Characterized by shortness of breath, dyspnoea, panting or sweating upon physical exertion, and more exhalation than inhalation. In severe cases, facial puffiness and leg oedema may be present. The pulse is thready or deficient, floating and rootless. This pattern often occurs when kidney qi fails to absorb lung qi.

V010-N00370.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00370.label: 肺肾气虚证
V010-N00370.aliases: ZZFS20； 肾不纳气证； 肾失摄纳证
V010-N00370.englishNames: lung-kidney qi deficiency pattern/ syndrome; syndrome of qi deficiency of lung and kidney
V010-N00370.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by dyspnea with prolonged exhalation, spontaneous sweating, lack of strength, aching lumbus and limp legs, and cough with thin sputum

V010-N00370.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00370.label: 肾不纳气证
V010-N00370.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of kidney failing to receive qi
V010-N00370.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by dyspnea with prolonged exhalation, asthenic cough and feeble voice

V010-N00346.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00346.label: 肺肾阴虚证
V010-N00346.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of yin deficiency in the lung and kidney
V010-N00346.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜肺脏兼证类｜肺肾兼证｜肺肾两虚证
V010-N00346.definition: 因肺肾阴液亏损，虚热内扰所致。临床以干咳、痰少，痰中带血，咽干、声嘶，或鼻燥、少涕，时或鼻衄，不闻香臭，舌质红，舌苔少，或光润无苔，脉沉细或数，可伴见骨蒸潮热，盗汗，颧红，腰膝酸软，形体消瘦等为特征的证候。

V010-N00346.label: 肺肾阴虚证
V010-N00346.englishNames: syndrome of yin deficiency of lung and kidney
V010-N00346.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00346.definition: 肺肾阴液亏虚，虚热内扰，以咳嗽痰少，或痰中带血，或干咳短气，咽干或声嘶，腰膝酸软,骨蒸潮热，盗汗消瘦，红，舌红少苔，脉细数为常见症的证候。

V010-N00346.label: 肺肾阴虚证
V010-N00346.englishNames: lung-kidney yin deficiency pattern/ syndrome; Lung and kidney yin deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of yin deficiency in the lung and kidney
V010-N00346.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜肺脏兼证类｜肺肾兼证｜肺肾两虚证

V010-N00346.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00346.label: 肺肾阴虚证
V010-N00346.aliases: Lung and kidney yin deficiency pattern
V010-N00346.englishNames: lung-kidney yin deficiency pattern/ syndrome; Lung and kidney yin deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of yin deficiency in the lung and kidney; Yin deficiency of the lung and kidney pattern
V010-N00346.pinyinNames: fei shen yin xu zheng; fèi shèn yīn xū zhèng
V010-N00346.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00346.definition: Characterized by cough with scanty phlegm or blood-stained sputum, a dry throat or hoarseness, low back/knee soreness and weakness, weight loss, bone-steaming tidal fever, night sweats and flushed cheeks. The tongue is red with a scanty coating. The pulse is thready and rapid. This pattern often occurs when yin fluids deficiency of the lung and kidney causes deficiency heat.

V010-N00346.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00346.label: 肺肾阴虚证

V010-N00346.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00346.label: 肺肾阴虚证
V010-N00346.definition: a pattern/syndrome attributed to deficiency of yin fluid of the lung and the kidney with harassment of endogenous heat, marked by cough with scanty expectoration, dryness of the mouth and throat or hoarseness of voice, aching lumbus and limp legs, bo

V010-N00322.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00322.label: 肺脾两虚证
V010-N00322.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of dual deficiency in the lung and spleen
V010-N00322.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜肺脏兼证类｜肺脾兼证
V010-N00322.definition: 因肺虚及脾，或久病虚损，肺脾两脏亏虚所致。临床以久咳不已，动辄气短、喘促，咯痰清稀，食少、纳呆，腹胀、便溏，舌质淡胖，边有齿痕，舌苔白或滑，脉濡或弱，伴见倦怠乏力，言语声低，自汗，畏风，容易感冒，每因气候变化、饮食不当而诱发或加重等为特征的证候。

V010-N00322.label: 肺脾两虚证
V010-N00322.englishNames: Lung and spleen deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of dual deficiency in the lung and spleen
V010-N00322.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脏腑相兼证类｜肺脏兼证类｜肺脾兼证

V010-N00375.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00375.label: 胞宫虚寒证
V010-N00375.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜胞宫证类
V010-N00375.definition: 因阳气亏虚，胞宫失却温煦所致。临床以小腹冷痛，喜温、喜按，畏寒、肢凉，面色苍白，或月经色淡、质稀，带下清稀，或不孕，流产，舌质淡，舌苔白，脉沉弱等为特征的证候。

V010-N00375.label: 胞宫虚寒证
V010-N00375.englishNames: syndrome of deficient cold in uterus;syndrome of deficient cold in womb
V010-N00375.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00375.definition: 肾阳亏虚，胞宫失却温煦，以畏冷肢凉，小腹隐痛，喜温喜按，月经色淡质稀,或带下清稀,或不孕，或流产，腰膝酸冷，面白，舌淡苔白，脉沉弱等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00375.label: 胞宫虚寒证
V010-N00375.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of uterine deficiency-cold; Uterine deficiency cold pattern
V010-N00375.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜胞宫证类

V010-N00375.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00375.label: 胞宫虚寒证
V010-N00375.aliases: 胞宫阳虚证； Uterine deficiency cold pattern； Uterine yang deficiency pattern； Yang deficiency of the uterus
V010-N00375.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of uterine deficiency-cold; Deficiency cold in the uterus pattern; Uterine deficiency cold pattern
V010-N00375.pinyinNames: bao gong xu han zheng; bāo gōng xū hán zhèng
V010-N00375.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00375.definition: Characterized by cold intolerance, cold limbs, lower abdominal pain with a cold sensation that alleviates upon warmth and pressure and a pale menstrual colour and thin quality of menses. Alternatively, thin, clear vaginal discharge, infertility, miscarriage and a pale complexion may be present. The tongue is pale with a white coating. The pulse is deep and weak. This pattern often occurs when yang qi fails to warm the uterus.

V010-N00375.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00375.label: 胞宫虚寒证
V010-N00375.englishNames: uterine deficiency cold pattern/syndrome; syndrome/pattern of deficiency-cold of uterus

V010-N00375.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00375.label: 胞宫虚寒证
V010-N00375.definition: a pattern/syndrome attributed to deficiency of kidney yang that fails to warm the uterus, and manifested by aversion to cold with cold limbs, aching and coldness of the lumbus and knees, dull pain in the lower abdomen which is alleviated by warmth and

V010-N00358.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00358.label: 胞宫痰湿阻滞证
V010-N00358.aliases: 痰凝胞宫证； 痰阻胞宫证
V010-N00358.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of phlegm-dampness obstruction in the uterus
V010-N00358.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜胞宫证类
V010-N00358.definition: 因痰湿偏盛，阻滞脉络，蕴积胞宫所致。临床以带下量多，色白、清稀或秽浊，体形肥胖，困倦乏力，舌质淡，舌苔白腻，脉滑或濡缓，可伴见闭经，不孕等为特征的证候。

V010-N00358.label: 痰凝胞宫证
V010-N00358.englishNames: syndrome of coagulated phlegm in uterus;syndrome of coagulated phlegm in womb
V010-N00358.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00358.definition: 痰湿阻滞胞宫，以带下色白量多,或闭经，或不孕，肥胖乏力，舌淡，苔白腻，脉滑或濡缓等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00358.label: 胞宫痰湿阻滞证
V010-N00358.aliases: 痰凝胞宫证； 痰阻胞宫证
V010-N00358.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of phlegm-dampness obstruction in the uterus
V010-N00358.pinyinNames: bao gong tan shi zu zhi zheng
V010-N00358.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜胞宫证类

V010-N00358.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00358.label: 痰凝胞宫证
V010-N00358.aliases: 痰湿凝结胞宫证； 痰阻胞宫证； Phlegm obstructing the uterus pattern； Phlegm-dampness obstructing the uterus pattern； Phlegm congealment in the uterus pattern； Phlegm obstructing the uterus
V010-N00358.englishNames: Phlegm retention in the uterus pattern; Phlegm obstructing the uterus pattern
V010-N00358.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00358.definition: Characterized by profuse, white vaginal discharge or amenorrhoea/infertility, obesity and fatigue. The tongue is pale with a white, greasy coating. The pulse is slippery or soft and delayed. This pattern often occurs when phlegm-dampness obstructs the uterus.

V010-N00357.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00357.label: 胞宫血热证
V010-N00357.aliases: 胞宫郁热证； 胞宫积热证
V010-N00357.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of blood-heat in the uterus
V010-N00357.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜胞宫证类
V010-N00357.definition: 因热邪蕴积胞宫所致。临床以小腹灼热、疼痛，月经提前、量多、色鲜红，甚则血崩不止，或带下血色，黄稠黏滞，气味臭秽，舌质红，舌苔黄，脉数等为特征的证候。

V010-N00357.label: 胞宫血热证
V010-N00357.aliases: 胞宫郁热证； 胞宫积热证
V010-N00357.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of blood-heat in the uterus; Blood and heat accumulation in the uterus pattern
V010-N00357.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜胞宫证类

V010-N00357.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00357.label: 胞宫血热证
V010-N00357.aliases: 胞宫郁热证； 胞宫积热证； Blood and heat accumulation in the uterus pattern； Blood heat build up in the uterus pattern； Heat accumulating in the uterus
V010-N00357.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of blood-heat in the uterus; Blood heat in the uterus pattern; Blood and heat accumulation in the uterus pattern
V010-N00357.pinyinNames: bao gong xue re zheng; bāo gōng xuè rè zhèng
V010-N00357.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00357.definition: Characterized by a burning pain in the lower abdomen, and earlier period with profuse volume and bright red colour. Yellow, sticky and smelly vagina discharge may also be present. The tongue is red with a yellow coating. The pulse is rapid. This pattern often occurs when heat accumulates in the uterus.

V010-N00357.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00357.label: 胞宫积热证
V010-N00357.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of accumulated heat in the uterus; syndrome/pattern of accumulated heat in uterus

V010-N00357.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00357.label: 胞宫积热证
V010-N00357.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of accumulated heat in the uterus
V010-N00357.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by scorching pain in the lower abdomen, early periods and large amount of bright red menstrual discharge, or yellowish thick and fetid leukorrhea, reddened tongue with yellow coating and rapid pulse

V010-N00256.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00256.label: 肝系证类
V010-N00256.definition: 泛指由外邪侵袭，或七情、劳损、水饮、瘀血等引起肝及其络属腑脏、经络病变的一类证候。

V010-N00256.label: 肝系证类
V010-N00256.englishNames: category of liver system syndromes/patterns; Liver system patterns
V010-N00256.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语

V010-N00256.englishNames: category of liver system syndromes/patterns; Patterns of the liver system; Liver system patterns
V010-N00256.pinyinNames: gan xi zheng lei; gān xì zhèng lèi
V010-N00256.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候

V010-N00258.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00258.label: 胆郁痰扰证
V010-N00258.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of gallbladder depression and phlegm harassment
V010-N00258.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肝系证类｜胆证类｜胆实证
V010-N00258.definition: 因痰浊内扰，胆郁失疏所致。临床以胸胁胀闷，眩晕、泛恶，呕吐痰涎、苦汁，善太息，舌苔白腻或厚，脉弦缓，伴见胆怯，易惊恐，少寐、多梦等为特征的证候。

V010-N00258.label: 胆郁痰扰证
V010-N00258.englishNames: syndrome of stagnated galibladder qi with disturbing phlegm
V010-N00258.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00258.definition: 痰浊内扰，胆郁失疏，以烦躁不宁，胆怯易惊,失眠多梦，胸胁闷胀，善太息，晕眩，恶心呕吐，吐痰涎，苔白腻，脉弦缓等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00258.label: 胆郁痰扰证
V010-N00258.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肝系证类｜胆证类｜胆实证

V010-N00258.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00258.label: 胆郁痰扰证
V010-N00258.englishNames: Gallbladder depression with phlegm harassment pattern; syndrome/pattern of gallbladder depression and phlegm harassment; Gallbladder stagnation with phlegm disturbance pattern; pattern/syndrome of depressed gallbladder with harassing phlegm
V010-N00258.pinyinNames: dan yu tan rao zheng; dǎn yù tán rǎo zhèng
V010-N00258.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00258.definition: Characterized by restlessness, timidity, jumpiness or easily startled, insomnia, dream-disturbed sleep, distension and fullness in the subcostal region, repeated sighing, vertigo, nausea, vomiting and vomiting of phlegm and salivation. The tongue coating is white and greasy. The pulse is wiry and delayed. This pattern often occurs when internal turbid phlegm disturbs the dispersal of gallbladder qi.

V010-N00258.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00258.label: 胆郁痰扰证
V010-N00258.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of depressed gallbladder with harassing phlegm; syndrome of stagnated gallbladder qi with disturbing phlegm
V010-N00258.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by timidity, susceptibility to fright, insomnia and dreamful sleep, vexation, oppression and distension in the chest and hypochondriac region, frequent sighing, dizziness, bitter taste in the mouth, nausea, vomiting, white sl

V010-N00261.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00261.label: 胆气虚证
V010-N00261.aliases: 胆气亏虚证； 胆虚气怯证
V010-N00261.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肝系证类｜胆证类｜胆虚证
V010-N00261.definition: 因先天不足，素体胆虚，或病后脏腑失调，胆气亏虚所致。临床以临事胆怯、易惊，焦虑、多疑，悲伤欲哭，善太息，时常心慌、惊悸，梦魇、惊惕，舌质淡，脉弱等为特征的证候。

V010-N00261.label: 胆气虚证
V010-N00261.aliases: 胆气亏虚证； 胆虚气怯证
V010-N00261.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of gallbladder qi deficiency; gallbladder qi deficiency pattern/ syndrome; Gallbladder qi deficiency pattern
V010-N00261.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肝系证类｜胆证类｜胆虚证

V010-N00261.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00261.label: 胆气虚证
V010-N00261.aliases: 胆气亏虚证； 胆虚气怯证
V010-N00261.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of gallbladder qi deficiency; gallbladder qi deficiency pattern/ syndrome; Gallbladder qi deficiency pattern
V010-N00261.pinyinNames: dan qi xu zheng; dǎn qì xū zhèng
V010-N00261.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00261.definition: Characterized by jumpiness or easily startled, palpitations, insomnia, nightmares, shortness of breath, spontaneous sweating, tinnitus, blurred vision, limb oedema, loss of taste during eating, and restlessness. The tongue is pale with a greasy coating. The pulse is deep and delayed. This pattern often results from gallbladder qi deficiency and dysfunctions of the zang–fu organs.

V010-N00261.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00261.label: 胆气虚证
V010-N00261.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by panic, suspicion, sighing, nervousness, irritability, lassitude, dizziness and insomnia

V010-N00270.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00270.label: 胆热证
V010-N00270.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肝系证类｜胆证类
V010-N00270.definition: 泛指因邪热蕴胆，或五志怫郁，气火上逆，或痰热内扰等所引起的一类证候。

V010-N00270.label: 胆热证
V010-N00270.englishNames: Gallbladder heat pattern; syndrome/pattern of gallbladder heat; gallbladder heat pattern/syndrome
V010-N00270.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肝系证类｜胆证类

V010-N00270.label: 胆经郁热证
V010-N00270.aliases: 胆经实热证； 胆火证； 胆热证
V010-N00270.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of stagnated heat in the gallbladder meridian
V010-N00270.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肝系证类｜胆证类｜胆热证

V010-N00270.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00270.label: 胆经郁热证
V010-N00270.aliases: 胆经实热证； 胆火证； 胆热证
V010-N00270.englishNames: Stagnant heat in the gallbladder meridian pattern; syndrome/pattern of stagnated heat in the gallbladder meridian
V010-N00270.pinyinNames: dǎn jīng yù rè zhèng; dan jing yu re zheng
V010-N00270.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00270.definition: Characterized by restlessness, irritability, distension in the subcostal region, a bitter mouth, ear distension/pain, tinnitus, headache on one side, insomnia and dream-disturbed sleep. The tongue is red with a yellow coating. The pulse is wiry and rapid. This pattern often occurs when internal fire/heat remains in the gallbladder meridian.

V010-N00270.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00270.label: 胆热证
V010-N00270.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by irritability, irascibility, hypochondriac distension, bitterness in the mouth, or ear pain, tinnitus, insomnia, reddened tongue with yellow coating

V010-N00274.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00274.label: 肝火上炎证
V010-N00274.aliases: 肝火上扰证； 肝热上扰证； 肝火上扰清窍证
V010-N00274.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of liver fire flaming up
V010-N00274.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肝系证类｜肝证类｜肝热证｜肝火证
V010-N00274.definition: 因肝火炽盛，气火上犯清窍，壅滞脉络所致。临床以发热，口渴、口苦，烦躁，失眠，头痛，面赤，或目赤、肿痛，或耳暴鸣、暴聋，或吐血、衄血，舌质红，舌苔黄，脉弦数等为特征的证候。

V010-N00274.label: 肝火上炎证
V010-N00274.englishNames: syndrome of liver fire flaring up
V010-N00274.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00274.definition: 肝火炽盛而上炎,以发热口渴,烦躁失眠，头痛，或目赤肿痛,或耳暴鸣暴聋,或吐血、血，面赤,舌红苔黄，脉弦数为常见症的证候。

V010-N00274.label: 肝火上炎证
V010-N00274.aliases: 肝火上扰清窍证； 肝火上扰证； 肝热上扰证
V010-N00274.englishNames: Liver fire flaming upward pattern; pattern/syndrome of liver fire flaming upward; syndrome/pattern of liver fire flaming up
V010-N00274.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肝系证类｜肝证类｜肝热证｜肝火证

V010-N00274.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00274.label: 肝火上炎证
V010-N00274.aliases: 肝火上扰清窍证； 肝火上扰证； 肝热上扰证； Liver fire flaming upward pattern； Hyperactivity of liver fire pattern
V010-N00274.englishNames: Liver fire flaming upward pattern; pattern/syndrome of liver fire flaming upward; syndrome/pattern of liver fire flaming up; Upward flaming of liver fire pattern
V010-N00274.pinyinNames: gan huo shang yan zheng; gān huǒ shàng yán zhèng
V010-N00274.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00274.definition: Characterized by fever, thirst, restlessness, insomnia, and headache. Alternatively, eye redness, swelling and pain, sudden tinnitus/deafness, haematemesis, nosebleed and a red face may be present. The tongue is red with a yellow coating. The pulse is wiry and rapid. This pattern often occurs when exuberance liver fire flows upward.

V010-N00274.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00274.label: 肝火上炎证

V010-N00274.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00274.label: 肝火上炎证
V010-N00274.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of liver fire flaming upward; syndrome of liver fire flaring up
V010-N00274.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by headache, dizziness, tinnitus with buzzing in the ears, impairment of hearing, blood-shot eyes, mental irritability, bitter taste in the mouth, yellow coating of the tongue, rapid stringlike pulse, and hematuria, hemoptysi

V010-N00262.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00262.label: 肝郁化火证
V010-N00262.aliases: 肝气化火证； 气火郁结证
V010-N00262.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of stagnated liver qi transforming into fire
V010-N00262.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肝系证类｜肝证类｜肝实证｜肝郁证｜肝郁兼夹证
V010-N00262.definition: 因肝气郁滞，久郁化火，气火上冲所致。临床以两胁胀痛或灼痛，急躁、易怒，头痛、面赤，耳暴鸣或暴聋，目赤灼痛，口干、口苦，小便黄或短赤，舌质红，或边尖红刺，舌苔黄燥，脉弦数等为特征的证候。

V010-N00262.label: 肝郁化火证
V010-N00262.aliases: 肝气化火证； 气火郁结证； 肝经郁热证； 气郁化火证
V010-N00262.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of depressed liver qi transforming into fire; syndrome/pattern of stagnated liver qi transforming into fire
V010-N00262.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肝系证类｜肝证类｜肝实证｜肝郁证｜肝郁兼夹证

V010-N00262.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00262.label: 肝郁化火证
V010-N00262.aliases: 肝气化火证； 气火郁结证； 肝经郁热证； 气郁化火证； Qi stagnation transforming into fire pattern
V010-N00262.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of depressed liver qi transforming into fire; syndrome/pattern of stagnated liver qi transforming into fire; Liver qi stagnation transforming into fire pattern
V010-N00262.pinyinNames: gan yu hua huo zheng; gān yù huà huǒ zhèng
V010-N00262.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00262.definition: Characterized by distending pain in the subcostal region, restlessness, irritability, a dry, bitter mouth and dark yellow urine. The tongue is red with a yellow coating. The pulse is wiry and rapid. This pattern often occurs when prolonged liver qi stagnation transforms into heat/fire.

V010-N00280.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00280.label: 肝郁血瘀证
V010-N00280.aliases: 肝瘀气滞证； 肝血瘀滞证
V010-N00280.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of blood stasis due to liver depression
V010-N00280.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肝系证类｜肝证类｜肝实证｜肝郁证｜肝郁兼夹证
V010-N00280.definition: 因肝气郁结，血瘀于肝所致。临床以两胁胀痛或刺痛，可触及胁下或少腹肿块，面色黯，舌质暗淡，或有瘀点、瘀斑，脉弦涩，伴见情志抑郁、烦闷，大便不畅，或时溏时秘等为特征的证候。

V010-N00280.label: 肝郁血瘀证
V010-N00280.englishNames: syndrome of stagnation of liver qi and blood stasis
V010-N00280.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00280.definition: 肝气郁结,血瘀于肝,以两胁胀痛或刺痛,或胁下、少腹有肿块,情志抑郁，舌紫暗或有斑点，脉弦涩等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00280.label: 肝郁血瘀证
V010-N00280.aliases: 肝瘀气滞证； 肝血瘀滞证
V010-N00280.englishNames: Liver depression and blood stasis pattern; syndrome/pattern of blood stasis due to liver depression; pattern/syndrome of liver depression and blood stasis
V010-N00280.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肝系证类｜肝证类｜肝实证｜肝郁证｜肝郁兼夹证

V010-N00280.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00280.label: 肝血瘀滞证
V010-N00280.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00280.definition: Characterized by stabbing pain/masses with a fixed location in the subcostal region, and tenderness. The tongue is dark purple or with ecchymosis. The pulse is wiry and hesitant. This pattern often occurs when blood stasis obstructs the liver collaterals.

V010-N00280.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00280.label: 肝郁血瘀证
V010-N00280.aliases: 肝瘀气滞证； 肝血瘀滞证； Pattern of liver blood stasis and stagnation； Pattern of liver stasis with qi stagnation； Liver depression and blood stasis pattern
V010-N00280.englishNames: Liver depression and blood stasis pattern; syndrome/pattern of blood stasis due to liver depression; pattern/syndrome of liver depression and blood stasis; Liver qi stagnation with blood stasis pattern
V010-N00280.pinyinNames: gan yu xue yu zheng; gān yù xuè yū zhèng
V010-N00280.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00280.definition: Characterized by distending or stabbing pain in the rib area, subcostal or lower abdominal masses and emotional depression. The tongue is dark purple or with ecchymosis. The pulse is wiry and hesitant. This pattern often occurs when liver qi stagnation causes blood stasis.

V010-N00280.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00280.label: 肝郁血瘀证
V010-N00280.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of liver depression and blood stasis

V010-N00280.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00280.label: 肝郁血瘀证
V010-N00280.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of liver depression and blood stasis
V010-N00280.definition: a pattern/syndrome arising when stagnant liver qi causes blood stasis in the liver, marked by depressed mood, hypochondriac distending or stabbing pain, or formation of mass in the hypochondriac region or lesser abdomen, purple tongue or purple spots

V010-N00267.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00267.label: 肝阳上亢证
V010-N00267.aliases: 肝阳上扰证； 肝阳亢盛证
V010-N00267.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肝系证类｜肝证类｜肝实证｜肝阳实证
V010-N00267.definition: 因肝阴不足，阳亢上扰所致。临床以头目胀痛，眩晕、耳鸣，颜面潮红，口苦、咽干，急躁、易怒，烦劳郁怒则加重，甚则不寐，项强、足软，容易仆倒，舌质红，脉弦等为特征的证候。

V010-N00267.label: 肝阳上亢证
V010-N00267.englishNames: syndrome of upper hyperactivity of liver yang
V010-N00267.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00267.definition: 肝阳亢扰于上，以眩晕耳鸣，头目胀痛，头重脚轻，面红目赤，急躁易怒，失眠多梦，腰膝酸软，口苦，舌红脉弦为常见症的证候。

V010-N00267.label: 肝阳上亢证
V010-N00267.aliases: 肝阳上扰证； 肝阳亢盛证
V010-N00267.englishNames: Liver yang ascendant hyperactivity pattern; pattern/syndrome of ascendant hyperactivity of liver yang; syndrome/pattern of liver yang hyperactivity; syndrome/ pattern of liver yang hyperactivity
V010-N00267.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肝系证类｜肝证类｜肝实证｜肝阳实证

V010-N00267.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00267.label: 肝阳上亢证
V010-N00267.aliases: Liver yang ascendant hyperactivity pattern； Liver yang disturbing the mind； 肝阳上扰证； 肝阳亢盛证
V010-N00267.englishNames: Liver yang ascendant hyperactivity pattern; pattern/syndrome of ascendant hyperactivity of liver yang; Hyperactivity of liver yang pattern; syndrome/pattern of liver yang hyperactivity; syndrome/ pattern of liver yang hyperactivity
V010-N00267.pinyinNames: gān yáng shàng kàng zhèng; gan yang shang kang zheng
V010-N00267.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00267.definition: Characterized by dizziness, blurred vision, tinnitus, lower back pain, limb numbness, feverish sensations in the palms, soles and chest, flushed cheeks, restlessness, irritability, and a dry and bitter mouth. The tongue is red with a scanty coating. The pulse is thready and rapid. This pattern often occurs when liver yin fails to control liver yang.

V010-N00267.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00267.label: 肝阳上亢证
V010-N00267.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of ascendant hyperactivity of liver yang

V010-N00267.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00267.label: 肝阳上亢证
V010-N00267.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of ascendant hyperactivity of liver yang
V010-N00267.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by dizziness, headache, flushed face, blurred vision, tinnitus, bitter taste in the mouth and string-like pulse

V010-N00279.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00279.label: 肝风内动证
V010-N00279.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of liver wind stirring inside
V010-N00279.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肝系证类｜肝证类｜肝实证
V010-N00279.definition: 泛指因肝阳化风，或热极动风，或肝阳风痰上扰等所引起的一类证候。

V010-N00279.label: 肝风内动证
V010-N00279.englishNames: syndrome of liver wind stirring up internally
V010-N00279.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00279.definition: 泛指因风阳、邪热、阴血亏虚等所致肝阳升动无制，以抽搐、眩晕、震颤、痉挛为主症的证候。

V010-N00279.label: 肝风内动证
V010-N00279.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of liver wind stirring inside; Liver wind stirring the interior pattern; pattern/syndrome of internal stirring of liver wind
V010-N00279.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肝系证类｜肝证类｜肝实证

V010-N00279.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00279.label: 肝风内动证
V010-N00279.aliases: 肝风证； Internal stirring of liver wind； Liver wind stirring the interior pattern
V010-N00279.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of liver wind stirring inside; Liver wind stirring the interior pattern; Internal stirring of liver wind pattern; pattern/syndrome of internal stirring of liver wind
V010-N00279.pinyinNames: gan feng nei dong zheng; gān fēng nèi dòng zhèng
V010-N00279.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00279.definition: Characterized by convulsions of the four limbs, vertigo and tremor. This pattern often results from wind yang, fire heat and yin blood deficiency.

V010-N00279.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00279.label: 肝风内动证
V010-N00279.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of internal stirring of liver wind

V010-N00279.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00279.label: 肝风内动证
V010-N00279.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of internal stirring of liver wind
V010-N00279.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by convulsion, tremor or spasm, also known as the liver wind pattern/ syndrome

V010-N00272.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00272.label: 肝热动风证
V010-N00272.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of liver heat stirring wind
V010-N00272.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肝系证类｜肝证类｜肝实证｜肝风内动证
V010-N00272.definition: 因邪热炽盛，热极动风所致。临床以高热，口渴，神昏，谵语，四肢抽搐，角弓反张，舌质红、舌苔黄，脉弦数等为特征的证候。

V010-N00272.label: 肝热动风证
V010-N00272.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of liver heat stirring wind; Liver heat stirring wind pattern
V010-N00272.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肝系证类｜肝证类｜肝实证｜肝风内动证

V010-N00272.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00272.label: 肝热动风证
V010-N00272.aliases: 热动肝风证； Liver heat stirring wind pattern； Pattern of heat stirring liver wind
V010-N00272.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of liver heat stirring wind; Liver heat stirring wind pattern
V010-N00272.pinyinNames: gan re dong feng zheng; gān rè dòng fēng zhèng
V010-N00272.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00272.definition: Characterized by a high-grade fever, thirst, unconsciousness, delirium, convulsions of the limbs, and opisthotonos. The tongue is red with a yellow coating. The pulse is rapid. This pattern often occurs when exuberant heat generates wind.

V010-N00277.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00277.label: 肝经湿热证
V010-N00277.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of dampness and heat in the liver meridian
V010-N00277.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肝系证类｜肝证类｜肝经证
V010-N00277.definition: 因湿热邪毒蕴结于肝，循经下注所致。临床以阴部潮湿、瘙痒，或生疮、溃疡、溢脓，阴器肿痛，或带下量多，黄稠、秽臭，或黄白相兼，白如豆渣、凝乳，或如脓似血，舌质红、舌苔黄腻，脉滑数，或伴见胁肋胀痛，耳胀痛、溢脓等为特征的证候。

V010-N00277.label: 肝经湿热证
V010-N00277.englishNames: syndrome of dampnessheat of liver channel
V010-N00277.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00277.definition: 湿热蕴聚肝经，以胁肋胀痛，阴部潮湿、瘙痒,阴器肿胀疼痛,或耳胀痛流脓水,舌红苔黄腻，脉滑数为常见症的证候。

V010-N00277.label: 肝经湿热证
V010-N00277.englishNames: Liver meridian dampness-heat pattern; pattern/syndrome of dampness-heat in the liver meridian; syndrome/pattern of dampness and heat in the liver meridian
V010-N00277.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肝系证类｜肝证类｜肝经证

V010-N00277.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00277.label: 肝经湿热证
V010-N00277.aliases: Liver meridian damp heat pattern； 肝经湿毒证
V010-N00277.englishNames: Liver meridian dampness-heat pattern; pattern/syndrome of dampness-heat in the liver meridian; Damp heat affecting the liver meridian pattern; syndrome/pattern of dampness and heat in the liver meridian
V010-N00277.pinyinNames: gān jīng shī rè zhèng; gan jing shi re zheng
V010-N00277.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00277.definition: Characterized by distending pain in the subcostal region, itching, swelling and pain of the external genitalia or yellow, sticky vaginal discharge. Earache with discharge may also be present. The tongue is red with a yellow, greasy coating. The pulse is slippery and rapid. This pattern often occurs when damp heat affects the liver meridian.

V010-N00277.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00277.label: 肝经湿热证

V010-N00277.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00277.label: 肝经湿热证
V010-N00277.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of dampness-heat in the liver meridian; syndrome of dampnessheat of liver channel
V010-N00277.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by distending pain in the hypochondriac region, or itching and painful swollen genitalia, or ear pain with purulent discharge, reddened tongue with yellow slimy coating and rapid slippery pulse

V010-N00259.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00259.label: 肝阴虚证
V010-N00259.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肝系证类｜肝证类｜肝虚证
V010-N00259.definition: 因邪伤阴分，或脏腑虚损，阴液生成不足，肝失濡养，虚热内生所致。临床以眩晕，目涩，视物昏花，耳鸣如蝉，失眠、多梦，甚则时或晕仆，筋惕肉，胁肋隐痛，舌质红，舌苔少，脉弦细或数，伴见五!心烦热，两颧潮红，口苦、咽干等为特征的证候。

V010-N00259.label: 肝阴虚证
V010-N00259.englishNames: syndrome of deficiency of liver yin
V010-N00259.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00259.definition: 阴液亏虚，肝失濡润,以头晕眼花，两目干涩,视力减退,颧红,或胁肋灼痛，五心烦热，舌红少苔，脉弦细数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00259.label: 肝阴虚证
V010-N00259.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of liver yin deficiency; liver yin deficiency pattern/syndrome; Liver yin deficiency pattern
V010-N00259.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肝系证类｜肝证类｜肝虚证

V010-N00259.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00259.label: 肝阴虚证
V010-N00259.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of liver yin deficiency; liver yin deficiency pattern/syndrome; Liver yin deficiency pattern
V010-N00259.pinyinNames: gan yin xu zheng; gān yīn xū zhèng
V010-N00259.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00259.definition: Characterized by dizziness, blurred vision, dry eyes, poor eyesight, flushed cheeks, feverish sensations in the palms, soles and chest. A burning pain in the subcostal region may be present. The tongue is red with a scanty coating. The pulse is thready and rapid. This pattern often occurs when yin fluid fails to nourish the liver.

V010-N00259.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00259.label: 肝阴虚证

V010-N00259.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00259.label: 肝阴虚证
V010-N00259.definition: a pattern/syndrome attributed to insufficient yin fluid that fails to moisten and nourish the liver, marked by dizziness, headache, blurred vision, dryness of eyes, insomnia, thirst, dry throat, scanty tongue coating and fine pulse

V010-N00260.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00260.label: 肝阳虚证
V010-N00260.aliases: 肝虚寒证； 肝阳亏虚证
V010-N00260.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肝系证类｜肝证类｜肝虚证
V010-N00260.definition: 因秉质阳虚，或阴寒邪毒伤肝，阳气亏损，肝阳失敷，虚寒内生所致。临床以两胁胀闷，眩晕、头痛，脑鸣，神疲、乏力，形寒、畏冷，四肢冰凉，甚则厥冷，舌卷、囊缩，筋惕肉，或筋骨拘急，舌质淡，舌!苔白润，脉沉迟无力等为特征的证候。

V010-N00260.label: 肝阳虚证
V010-N00260.englishNames: syndrome of deficiency of liver yang
V010-N00260.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00260.definition: 阳气虚弱，肝失条达，以两胁胀闷，畏冷肢凉，头晕眼花，忧郁善恐，舌苔白润，脉沉迟无力等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00260.label: 肝阳虚证
V010-N00260.aliases: 肝虚寒证； 肝阳亏虚证
V010-N00260.englishNames: syndrome/ pattern of liver yang deficiency; syndrome/pattern of liver yang deficiency; liver yang deficiency pattern/syndrome; Liver yang deficiency pattern
V010-N00260.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肝系证类｜肝证类｜肝虚证

V010-N00260.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00260.label: 肝气虚证
V010-N00260.aliases: 肝阳亏虚证； Liver yang insufficiency pattern； 肝气亏虚证
V010-N00260.englishNames: Liver qi deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of liver qi deficiency
V010-N00260.pinyinNames: gān qì xū zhèng; gan qi xu zheng
V010-N00260.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00260.definition: Characterized by distension/tightness in the subcostal region, low mood, fatigue, shortness of breath, dizziness and blurred vision. The tongue is pale. The pulse is weak. This pattern often occurs when yang qi becomes deficient, and the liver fails to maintain the free flow of qi.

V010-N00260.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00260.label: 肝阳虚证

V010-N00260.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00260.label: 肝阳虚证
V010-N00260.definition: a pattern/syndrome due to weakened yang qi with diminished function of the liver, marked by depression and susceptibility to fright, distension and oppression in the hypochondriac regions, fear of cold with cold limbs, dizziness, blurred vision, pale

V010-N00265.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00265.label: 肝气虚证
V010-N00265.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肝系证类｜肝证类｜肝虚证
V010-N00265.definition: 因秉质气虚，或久病伤肝，肝气虚损，升发无力，疏泄不及所致。临床以胁肋痞闷或坠胀，精神忧郁，情绪低沉，畏惧、胆怯，如人将捕，眩晕，肌肤不仁，四肢麻木、痉挛甚或痿弱，或视物昏花，黑、视歧或幻视，舌质淡白，脉虚弦或弱，伴见懈怠、乏力，懒言、声低，面色青黄等为特征的证候。

V010-N00265.label: 肝气虚证
V010-N00265.englishNames: syndrome of deficiency of liver qi
V010-N00265.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00265.definition: 气虚肝失疏泄，以两胁胀闷，情绪低沉,疲乏气短，头晕眼花,舌淡，脉弱等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00265.label: 肝气虚证
V010-N00265.englishNames: Liver qi deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of liver qi deficiency
V010-N00265.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肝系证类｜肝证类｜肝虚证

V010-N00265.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00265.label: 肝气虚证
V010-N00265.aliases: 肝阳亏虚证； Liver yang insufficiency pattern； 肝气亏虚证
V010-N00265.englishNames: Liver qi deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of liver qi deficiency
V010-N00265.pinyinNames: gān qì xū zhèng; gan qi xu zheng
V010-N00265.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00265.definition: Characterized by distension/tightness in the subcostal region, low mood, fatigue, shortness of breath, dizziness and blurred vision. The tongue is pale. The pulse is weak. This pattern often occurs when yang qi becomes deficient, and the liver fails to maintain the free flow of qi.

V010-N00278.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00278.label: 肝血虚证
V010-N00278.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肝系证类｜肝证类｜肝虚证
V010-N00278.definition: 因秉质血虚，或肝藏血失职，血液亏虚，肝失濡养所致。临床以头晕、眼花，甚则动辄晕仆，夜寐不安，梦多纷扰，肢体麻木，或视力减退，夜盲，或月经后期，量少、色淡，经闭不行，舌质淡白，脉细无力，伴见面色苍白，睑内、爪甲色淡等为特征的证候。

V010-N00278.label: 肝血虚证
V010-N00278.englishNames: syndrome of deficiency of liver blood
V010-N00278.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00278.definition: 血液亏虚，肝失濡养，以头晕眼花,视力减退,或夜盲，或肢体麻木，妇女月经量少、色淡，闭经，面色、脸色无华,爪甲不荣，舌淡，脉细等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00278.label: 肝血虚证
V010-N00278.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of liver blood deficiency; Liver blood deficiency pattern; liver blood deficiency pattern/syndrome
V010-N00278.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肝系证类｜肝证类｜肝虚证

V010-N00278.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00278.label: 肝血虚证
V010-N00278.aliases: 肝血亏虚证； Liver blood deficiency pattern； Insufficiency of liver blood
V010-N00278.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of liver blood deficiency; Liver blood deficiency pattern; liver blood deficiency pattern/syndrome
V010-N00278.pinyinNames: gan xue xu zheng; gān xuè xū zhèng
V010-N00278.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00278.definition: Characterized by dizziness, dry eyes, poor eyesight, limb numbness, dry fingernails and toenails, insomnia, dream-disturbed sleep, scanty menstrual volume with a pale menstrual colour, a pale complexion and lips. In severe cases, amenorrhoea may be present. The tongue is pale. The pulse is thready. This pattern often occurs when blood fails to nourish the liver.

V010-N00278.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00278.label: 肝血虚证

V010-N00278.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00278.label: 肝血虚证
V010-N00278.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by sallow complexion, impaired vision, insomnia, deficient amount or absence of menstruation, pale tongue and lips

V010-N00367.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00367.label: 肾气虚水泛证
V010-N00367.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of kidney qi deficiency and water flooding
V010-N00367.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肾系证类｜肾证类｜肾虚证｜肾虚兼夹证｜肾虚水泛证
V010-N00367.definition: 因肾气亏虚，气化失职，水湿泛溢所致。临床以下肢水肿明显，尿少，腰膝酸软，面色淡白或暗滞，舌质淡胖，舌苔白滑，脉弱等为特征的证候。

V010-N00367.label: 肾气虚水泛证
V010-N00367.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of kidney qi deficiency and water flooding; Kidney qi deficiency with water retention pattern
V010-N00367.pinyinNames: shen qi xu shui fan zheng
V010-N00367.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肾系证类｜肾证类｜肾虚证｜肾虚兼夹证｜肾虚水泛证

V010-N00367.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00367.label: 肾气虚水泛证
V010-N00367.aliases: 肾气虚水停证； Kidney qi deficiency with water retention pattern； Kidney qi deficiency with water flooding pattern
V010-N00367.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of kidney qi deficiency and water flooding; Kidney qi deficiency with water retention pattern; Water retention due to kidney qi deficiency pattern
V010-N00367.pinyinNames: shen qi xu shui fan zheng; shèn qì xū shuǐ fàn zhèng
V010-N00367.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00367.definition: Characterized by leg oedema, scanty urine, and low back/knee soreness and weakness. The tongue is pale and enlarged with a white, slippery coating. The pulse is weak. This pattern often occurs when kidney qi fails to perform qi transformation, resulting in water retention.

V010-N00356.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00356.label: 肾阴虚证
V010-N00356.aliases: 阴虚肾亏证； 肾阴亏虚证； 肾阴虚热证； 肾阴虚损证
V010-N00356.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肾系证类｜肾证类｜肾虚证
V010-N00356.definition: 因先天禀赋不足，或房劳多产、久病大病损伤肾阴，或虚热内扰所致。临床以五心烦热，腰膝酸软或痛，眩晕，耳鸣，齿松，发脱，遗精，月经后期，量少红稠，甚则经闭，舌质红，舌苔少，脉细数，或伴见潮热，颧红，盗汗等为特征的证候。

V010-N00356.label: 肾阴虚证
V010-N00356.englishNames: syndrome of deficiency of kidney yin
V010-N00356.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00356.definition: 肾阴亏虚，虚热内生，以腰膝酸软而痛，眩晕耳鸣，齿松发脱，五心烦热，潮热颧红，男子遗精，女子经少或闭经，舌红少苔，脉细数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00356.label: 肾阴虚证
V010-N00356.aliases: 阴虚肾亏证； 肾阴亏虚证； 肾阴虚热证； 肾阴虚损证
V010-N00356.englishNames: Kidney yin deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of kidney yin deficiency; kidney yin deficiency pattern/syndrome; syndrome/ pattern of kidney yin deficiency
V010-N00356.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肾系证类｜肾证类｜肾虚证

V010-N00356.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00356.label: 肾阴虚证
V010-N00356.aliases: 阴虚肾亏证； 肾阴亏虚证； 肾阴虚热证； 肾阴虚损证； Genuine yin deficiency pattern； Kidney water depletion and deficiency pattern； Primordial yin deficiency pattern
V010-N00356.englishNames: Kidney yin deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of kidney yin deficiency; kidney yin deficiency pattern/syndrome; syndrome/ pattern of kidney yin deficiency
V010-N00356.pinyinNames: shen yin xu zheng; shèn yīn xū zhèng
V010-N00356.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00356.definition: Characterized by low back/knee soreness and weakness, lassitude, dizziness, blurred vision, deafness, tinnitus, nocturnal emissions, a dry mouth, sore throat, flushed cheeks, feverish sensations in the palms, soles and chest, and tidal fever in the afternoon. The tongue is red with no or scanty coating. The pulse is thready and rapid. Often results from kidney yin deficiency.

V010-N00356.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00356.label: 肾阴虚证

V010-N00356.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00356.label: 肾阴虚证
V010-N00356.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by lumbago, lassitude, dizziness, tinnitus, nocturnal emission in men and oligomenorrhea in women, emaciation, dry throat, thirst, flushed cheeks, hot sensation in the palms and soles, afternoon fever, night sweating, reddene

V010-N00355.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00355.label: 元阳亏虚证
V010-N00355.path: 气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜阳证类｜阳虚证｜阳气亏虚证
V010-N00355.definition: 因先天禀赋虚薄，或久病、重病伤损元阳所致。临床以遗精、早泄，或精少不育，闭经、不孕，或头眩、晕仆，动辄心悸、怔忡，或五更泄泻，完谷不化，小便频数、清长，舌质淡胖，舌苔白，脉沉迟，尺部弱，伴见精神萎靡，面色㿠白，形寒、畏冷，四肢不温，腰膝酸软，齿浮、齿摇等为特征的证候。

V010-N00355.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00355.label: 肾阳虚证
V010-N00355.aliases: 肾阳亏虚证； 肾阳虚损证； 肾虚寒证
V010-N00355.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肾系证类｜肾证类｜肾虚证
V010-N00355.definition: 因秉质阳虚，或外感、内伤致使肾阳亏虚，机体失却温煦所致。临床以神疲、欲寐，畏寒、肢冷，腰膝以下尤甚，面色白或黧黑，小便清长，夜尿频数，舌质淡或胖，舌苔白，脉沉弱，尺部无力，或伴见性欲衰减，阳痿、早泄，小便白浊，心悸、喘促，浮肿，五更泄泻，白带清稀量多，小腹或阴部有冷感，崩漏不止等为特征的证候。

V010-N00355.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00355.label: 命门火衰证
V010-N00355.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of life gate fire decline
V010-N00355.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肾系证类｜肾证类｜肾虚证｜肾阳虚证
V010-N00355.definition: 因禀赋虚薄，元阳虚衰，温煦推动失职所致。临床以形寒、畏冷，冷彻骨髓，神倦、蜷卧，小便清长，夜尿频多，舌质淡，舌苔白，脉沉弱或迟，尺部尤甚，或伴见五更泄泻，遗尿淋浊，阳痿不举，精液清冷或无精子，性欲淡漠，不孕、不育等为特征的证候。

V010-N00355.label: 命门火衰证
V010-N00355.englishNames: syndrome of decline of vital gate fire
V010-N00355.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00355.definition: 元阳虚衰，温煦推动失职，以畏寒蜷卧，四肢逆冷，小便清长，夜尿频多，或五更泄泻，男子阳痿、早泄，女子性欲减退、宫寒不孕，舌淡，苔白，脉沉弱尺部尤甚等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00355.label: 肾阳虚证
V010-N00355.englishNames: syndrome of deficiency of kidney yang
V010-N00355.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00355.definition: 肾阳亏虚，机体失却温煦，以畏寒肢冷，腰以下为甚，面色胱白或黧黑,神疲乏力，小便清长，夜尿多，舌淡苔白，脉弱等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00355.label: 元阳亏虚证
V010-N00355.path: 证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜阳证类｜阳虚证｜阳气亏虚证

V010-N00355.label: 肾阳虚证
V010-N00355.aliases: 肾阳亏虚证； 肾阳虚损证； 肾虚寒证； 元阳亏虚证； 元阳虚衰证； 命门火衰证
V010-N00355.englishNames: Kidney yang deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of kidney yang deficiency; kidney yang deficiency pattern/ syndrome

V010-N00355.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00355.label: 肾阳虚证
V010-N00355.aliases: Kidney yang deficiency with water flooding pattern； Kidney yang deficiency with water retention pattern； Life-gate fire depletion pattern； Primordial yang deficiency pattern； 肾阳亏虚证； 肾阳虚损证； 肾虚寒证； 元阳亏虚证； 元阳虚衰证； 命门火衰证
V010-N00355.englishNames: Kidney yang deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of kidney yang deficiency; kidney yang deficiency pattern/ syndrome
V010-N00355.pinyinNames: shèn yáng xū zhèng; shen yang xu zheng
V010-N00355.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00355.definition: Characterized by cold intolerance, cold limbs (especially below the lower back and knee joints), a bright, pale or dark complexion, profuse, clear urine and frequent urination at night. The tongue is pale. The pulse is weak. This pattern often occurs when kidney yang fails to warm the body.

V010-N00355.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00355.label: 肾阳虚证

V010-N00363.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00363.label: 肾气虚证
V010-N00363.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肾系证类｜肾证类｜肾虚证
V010-N00363.definition: 因先天不足，肾气未充，或年高肾虚，久病伤肾所致。临床以腰膝酸软，眩晕，耳鸣、耳背，健忘，动辄气促，神疲、乏力，面色淡白，四肢欠温，小便清长，夜尿增多，舌质淡或胖，舌苔白，脉细或弱，尺部无力，或伴见小便频数，余沥不尽，甚则遗尿，或性欲衰减，滑精、早泄，或月经淋漓，闭经，滑胎等为特征的证候。

V010-N00363.label: 肾气虚证
V010-N00363.englishNames: syndrome of deficiency of kidney qi
V010-N00363.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00363.definition: 肾气虚弱，以腰酸,耳鸣，性欲减退，头晕健忘，脉弱等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00363.label: 肾气虚证
V010-N00363.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of kidney qi deficiency; Kidney qi deficiency pattern; kidney qi deficiency pattern/syndrome

V010-N00363.englishNames: Kidney essence deficiency pattern; syndrome/ pattern of kidney essence depletion; syndrome/pattern of kidney essence depletion
V010-N00363.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肾系证类｜肾证类｜肾虚证

V010-N00363.aliases: 肾精不足证； 肾精亏损证； 肾虚精亏证； 肾精亏耗证； 肾气亏虚证
V010-N00363.englishNames: Kidney essence deficiency pattern; syndrome/ pattern of kidney essence depletion; syndrome/pattern of kidney essence depletion

V010-N00363.aliases: 肾气亏虚证； Kidney qi depletion pattern； Kidney qi insufficiency
V010-N00363.englishNames: Kidney qi deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of kidney qi deficiency; kidney qi deficiency pattern/syndrome
V010-N00363.pinyinNames: shèn qì xū zhèng; shen qi xu zheng
V010-N00363.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00363.definition: Characterized by low back soreness, tinnitus, low libido, dizziness, and poor memory. The pulse is weak. This pattern often results from kidney qi deficiency.

V010-N00363.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00363.label: 肾精亏虚证
V010-N00363.aliases: 肾精不足证； 肾精亏损证； 肾虚精亏证； 肾精亏耗证； 肾气亏虚证； Kidney qi/essence deficiency

V010-N00363.definition: Characterized by delayed growth in children, decreased reproductive function, premature ageing, tinnitus, hair loss, loose teeth, and poor memory. This pattern often results from kidney essence deficiency.

V010-N00371.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00371.label: 肾气虚证
V010-N00371.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肾系证类｜肾证类｜肾虚证
V010-N00371.definition: 因先天不足，肾气未充，或年高肾虚，久病伤肾所致。临床以腰膝酸软，眩晕，耳鸣、耳背，健忘，动辄气促，神疲、乏力，面色淡白，四肢欠温，小便清长，夜尿增多，舌质淡或胖，舌苔白，脉细或弱，尺部无力，或伴见小便频数，余沥不尽，甚则遗尿，或性欲衰减，滑精、早泄，或月经淋漓，闭经，滑胎等为特征的证候。

V010-N00371.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00371.label: 肾精亏虚证
V010-N00371.aliases: 肾精不足证； 肾精亏损证； 肾虚精亏证； 肾精亏耗证
V010-N00371.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肾系证类｜肾证类｜肾虚证
V010-N00371.definition: 因先天不足，精髓不充，或后天失养，肾虚精亏所致。临床以生长发育迟缓，腰酸、骨痿，动作迟缓，或骨折难以愈合，早衰，健忘，或愚笨、痴呆，舌质淡，脉细弱，尺部无力，伴见头晕、眼花，耳鸣、耳聋，毛发稀疏，齿浮松动等为特征的证候。

V010-N00371.label: 肾精亏虚证
V010-N00371.englishNames: syndrome of deficiency of kidney essence
V010-N00371.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00371.definition: 肾精亏虚，以小儿生长发育迟缓，成人生殖机能减退，早衰，健忘，耳鸣，发脱,牙齿松动，舌淡，脉细弱等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00371.label: 肾气虚证
V010-N00371.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of kidney qi deficiency; Kidney qi deficiency pattern; kidney qi deficiency pattern/syndrome
V010-N00371.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肾系证类｜肾证类｜肾虚证

V010-N00364.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00364.label: 肾阴阳两虚证
V010-N00364.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of dual deficiency of kidney yin and yang
V010-N00364.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肾系证类｜肾证类｜肾虚证
V010-N00364.definition: 因体虚久病，阴虚及阳，或阳损及阴，肾阴肾阳俱虚所致。临床以畏冷、肢凉，五心烦热，眩晕、耳鸣，腰膝酸软，遗精、早泄，梦交、滑泄，经少、难孕，舌质暗淡，舌苔光润，脉细或弱，尺部无力等为特征的证候。

V010-N00364.label: 肾阴阳两虚证
V010-N00364.englishNames: syndrome of deficiency of both yin and yang of kidney
V010-N00364.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00364.definition: 肾的阴阳俱虚，以畏冷肢凉，五心烦热，眩晕耳鸣,腰膝酸痛，男子遗精早泄，女子经少难孕，尺脉弱等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00364.label: 肾阴阳两虚证
V010-N00364.englishNames: syndrome/ pattern of dual deficiency of kidney yin and yang; syndrome/pattern of dual deficiency of kidney yin and yang; Kidney yin and yang deficiency pattern
V010-N00364.pinyinNames: shen yin yang liang xu zheng
V010-N00364.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肾系证类｜肾证类｜肾虚证

V010-N00364.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00364.label: 肾阴阳两虚证
V010-N00364.aliases: Kidney yin and yang deficiency pattern
V010-N00364.englishNames: syndrome/ pattern of dual deficiency of kidney yin and yang; syndrome/pattern of dual deficiency of kidney yin and yang; Deficiency of kidney yin and yang pattern; Kidney yin and yang deficiency pattern
V010-N00364.pinyinNames: shen yin yang liang xu zheng; shèn yīn yáng liǎng xū zhèng
V010-N00364.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00364.definition: Characterized by low back soreness, back pain, dizziness, insomnia, poor memory, hearing decline, low libido and decreased reproductive function. This pattern often results from congenital deficiency, over-exertion or chronic diseases.

V010-N00374.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00374.label: 肾虚髓亏证
V010-N00374.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of kidney deficiency and marrow depletion
V010-N00374.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肾系证类｜肾证类｜肾虚证｜肾精亏虚证
V010-N00374.definition: 因禀赋虚薄，或久病劳损，肾精不足，精髓亏减所致。临床以生长发育迟缓，腰脊酸软，眩晕，耳鸣，健忘，痴愚或痴呆，舌质淡，舌苔白，脉虚、尺弱等为特征的证候。

V010-N00374.label: 肾虚髓亏证
V010-N00374.englishNames: syndrome of marrow depletion due to kidney deficiency
V010-N00374.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00374.definition: 肾精亏虚，精髓不足，以生长发育迟缓，或骨折久不愈合，或腰酸骨痿，头晕耳鸣，健忘痴呆等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00374.label: 肾虚髓亏证
V010-N00374.englishNames: Kidney deficiency with marrow depletion pattern; syndrome/pattern of kidney deficiency and marrow depletion
V010-N00374.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肾系证类｜肾证类｜肾虚证｜肾精亏虚证

V010-N00374.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00374.label: 肾虚髓亏证
V010-N00374.aliases: 肾虚髓减证； Kidney deficiency with marrow depletion pattern
V010-N00374.englishNames: Kidney deficiency with marrow depletion pattern; Kidney marrow deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of kidney deficiency and marrow depletion
V010-N00374.pinyinNames: shen xu sui kui zheng; shèn xū suǐ kuī zhèng
V010-N00374.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00374.definition: Characterized by delayed growth and development, delayed healing of bone fracture, low back/knee soreness and weakness, dizziness, tinnitus, poor memory and dementia. This pattern often results from kidney essence/marrow deficiency.

V010-N00365.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00365.label: 膀胱蕴热证
V010-N00365.aliases: 膀胱实热证； 热迫膀胱证； 热结膀胱证； 热积膀胱证
V010-N00365.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of heat accumulation in the bladder
V010-N00365.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肾系证类｜膀胱证类｜膀胱实证
V010-N00365.definition: 因邪热入里，蕴结膀胱所致。临床以小腹硬满，拘急不舒，小便自利，或小便灼痛，舌质红，舌苔黄，脉数有力，伴见发热，口渴，或神志如狂等为特征的证候。

V010-N00365.label: 膀胱蕴热证
V010-N00365.aliases: 膀胱实热证； 热迫膀胱证； 热结膀胱证； 热积膀胱证； 膀胱积热证； 膀胱蓄热证
V010-N00365.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of heat accumulation in the baldder; Bladder heat accumulation pattern; syndrome/pattern of heat accumulation in the bladder
V010-N00365.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肾系证类｜膀胱证类｜膀胱实证

V010-N00365.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00365.label: 膀胱蕴热证
V010-N00365.aliases: 膀胱实热证； 膀胱积热证； 膀胱蓄热证； Bladder heat accumulation pattern； Bladder heat excess pattern； Bladder heat retention pattern； Excess heat in the urinary bladder； 热迫膀胱证； 热结膀胱证； 热积膀胱证
V010-N00365.englishNames: Heat accumulating in the urinary bladder pattern; syndrome/pattern of heat accumulation in the baldder; Bladder heat accumulation pattern; syndrome/pattern of heat accumulation in the bladder
V010-N00365.pinyinNames: páng guāng yùn rè zhèng; bang guang yun re zheng
V010-N00365.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00365.definition: Characterized by lower abdominal hardness, fullness and contracture, hot, painful urination, fever without aversion to cold, and mania. This pattern often occurs when heat enters the urinary bladder.

V010-N00365.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00365.label: 热积膀胱证
V010-N00365.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of heat accumulating in the bladder
V010-N00365.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by distension and fullness of the lower abdomen, strangury, frequent urination and fever without chills

V010-N00360.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00360.label: 膀胱蓄水证
V010-N00360.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of bladder amassment of water
V010-N00360.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肾系证类｜膀胱证类｜膀胱实证｜膀胱停水证
V010-N00360.definition: 因膀胱气化障碍，水蓄膀胱所致。临床以小腹膨大、胀满或急痛，小便不利，舌苔白滑，脉沉弦或紧等为特征的证候。

V010-N00360.label: 膀胱蓄水证
V010-N00360.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of bladder amassment of water; Bladder water accumulation pattern
V010-N00360.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肾系证类｜膀胱证类｜膀胱实证｜膀胱停水证

V010-N00360.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00360.label: 太阳蓄水证
V010-N00360.aliases: 太阳蓄水； 膀胱蓄水证； Bladder water accumulation pattern； Water amassment in the bladder pattern； Water retention in the urinary bladder
V010-N00360.englishNames: greater yang waterretention pattern/ syndrome; syndrome/pattern of taiyang amassment of water; Taiyang water retention pattern
V010-N00360.pinyinNames: tai yang xu shui zheng; tài yáng xù shuǐ zhèng
V010-N00360.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00360.definition: Characterized by lower abdominal bulging, distension and pain and inhibited urination. This pattern often occurs when the bladder fails to perform qi transformation, resulting in water retention.

V010-N00372.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00372.label: 膀胱蓄血证
V010-N00372.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of blood amassment in the bladder
V010-N00372.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肾系证类｜膀胱证类｜膀胱实证
V010-N00372.definition: 因腹部外伤，或邪热内侵，血蓄膀胱所致。临床以小腹憋胀，小便刺痛、不畅或中断，血尿或尿中血丝、血块，舌质紫或有瘀点，脉弦涩等为特征的证候。

V010-N00372.label: 膀胱蓄血证
V010-N00372.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of blood amassment in the bladder; Blood accumulation in the bladder pattern
V010-N00372.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肾系证类｜膀胱证类｜膀胱实证

V010-N00372.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00372.label: 太阳蓄血证
V010-N00372.aliases: 太阳蓄血； 膀胱蓄血证； Blood accumulation in the bladder pattern； Blood and heat build up in the bladder pattern； Blood retention in the urinary bladder
V010-N00372.englishNames: greater yang blood amassment pattern/ syndrome; syndrome/ pattern of taiyang amassment of blood; Taiyang disease with stagnated blood syndrome; syndrome/pattern of taiyang amassment of blood; Taiyang blood retention pattern
V010-N00372.pinyinNames: tai yang xu xue zheng; tài yáng xù xuè zhèng
V010-N00372.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00372.definition: Characterized by lower abdominal distension and stabbing pain with a fixed location, and normal urination. The tongue is purple with ecchymosis. The pulse is wiry and hesitant. This pattern often results from abdominal injury or occurs when heat affects the urinary bladder, causing blood accumulating in the urinary bladder.

V010-N00369.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00369.label: 膀胱湿热证
V010-N00369.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of dampness and heat in the bladder
V010-N00369.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肾系证类｜膀胱证类｜膀胱实证
V010-N00369.definition: 因湿热侵袭，蕴结膀胱所致。临床以小便急迫、频数、涩痛、灼痛，小便黄赤或浑浊，舌质红，舌苔黄腻，脉滑数，或伴见发热，口渴，尿血或砂石等为特征的证候。

V010-N00369.label: 膀胱湿热证
V010-N00369.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00369.definition: heat of bladder湿热侵袭，蕴结膀胱，以小便频数、急迫、灼热、涩痛，或尿液浑浊，或尿血，或尿中有砂石，发热口渴，小腹胀痛，舌红苔黄腻,脉滑数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00369.label: 膀胱湿热证
V010-N00369.englishNames: Bladder dampness-heat pattern; bladder dampnessheat pattern/ syndrome; syndrome/pattern of dampness and heat in the bladder
V010-N00369.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肾系证类｜膀胱证类｜膀胱实证

V010-N00369.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00369.label: 膀胱湿热证
V010-N00369.englishNames: Bladder dampness-heat pattern; Damp heat in the urinary bladder pattern; bladder dampnessheat pattern/ syndrome; syndrome/pattern of dampness and heat in the bladder
V010-N00369.pinyinNames: páng guāng shī rè zhèng; bang guang shi re zheng
V010-N00369.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00369.definition: Characterized by urgent, frequent and painful urination with a burning sensation, fever and thirst. Alternatively, the urine may be turbid or contain stones. The tongue is red with a yellow, greasy coating. The pulse is slippery and rapid. This pattern often occurs when damp heat accumulates in the urinary bladder.

V010-N00369.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00369.label: 膀胱湿热证

V010-N00369.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00369.label: 膀胱湿热证
V010-N00369.definition: a pattern/syndrome attributed to dampness-heat attacking on and accumulating in the bladder, marked by frequency and urgency of urination, strangury, turbid urine or hematuria, reddened tongue with yellow slimy coating and rapid pulse

V010-N00361.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00361.label: 膀胱虚寒证
V010-N00361.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肾系证类｜膀胱证类｜膀胱虚证
V010-N00361.definition: 因肾阳亏虚，膀胱气化失司所致。临床以小腹冷痛，小便失禁或不利，或夜尿多、尿清长，舌苔白滑，脉细弱，伴见畏冷，肢凉等为特征的证候。

V010-N00361.label: 膀胱虚寒证
V010-N00361.englishNames: syndrome of deficient cold of bladder
V010-N00361.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00361.definition: 肾阳亏虚，膀胱气化失司，以畏冷肢凉,小腹冷痛，小便失禁或不利,或夜尿多、尿清长，苔白滑等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00361.label: 膀胱虚寒证
V010-N00361.englishNames: bladder deficiency cold pattern/ syndrome; Bladder deficiency cold pattern; syndrome/pattern of deficiency-cold in bladder
V010-N00361.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肾系证类｜膀胱证类｜膀胱虚证

V010-N00361.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00361.label: 膀胱虚寒证
V010-N00361.aliases: 膀胱虚冷证； Bladder deficiency cold pattern
V010-N00361.englishNames: bladder deficiency cold pattern/ syndrome; Bladder deficiency cold pattern; syndrome/pattern of deficiency-cold in bladder; Deficiency cold of the urinary bladder pattern
V010-N00361.pinyinNames: bang guang xu han zheng; páng guāng xū hán zhèng
V010-N00361.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00361.definition: Characterized by cold intolerance, cold limbs, lower abdominal pain with a cold sensation, urinary incontinence, inhibited urination, frequent urination at night with clear, profuse urine. The tongue coating is white and slippery. This pattern often occurs when kidney yang fails to secure the qi transformation of the urinary bladder.

V010-N00361.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00361.label: 膀胱虚寒证

V010-N00361.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00361.label: 膀胱虚寒证
V010-N00361.englishNames: bladder deficiency cold pattern/ syndrome; syndrome of deficient cold of bladder
V010-N00361.definition: a pattern/syndrome arising when kidney yang deficiency causes impaired bladder qi transformation, marked by frequent urination, incontinence of urine or dribbling of urine, cold feeling in the lower abdomen, whitish moist tongue coating and weak pulse

V010-N00281.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00281.label: 心系证类
V010-N00281.definition: 泛指由外邪侵袭，或七情、劳损、水饮、瘀血等引起心及其络属腑脏、经络病变的一类证候。

V010-N00281.label: 心系证类
V010-N00281.englishNames: category of heart system syndromes/patterns; Heart system patterns
V010-N00281.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语

V010-N00281.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00281.label: 心系证类
V010-N00281.englishNames: category of heart system syndromes/patterns; Patterns of the heart system; Heart system patterns
V010-N00281.pinyinNames: xin xi zheng lei; xīn xì zhèng lèi
V010-N00281.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候

V010-N00286.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00286.label: 心血瘀阻证
V010-N00286.aliases: 心血瘀痹证； 心脉瘀阻证； 心脉痹阻证
V010-N00286.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of heart blood stasis obstruction
V010-N00286.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类｜心血瘀滞证
V010-N00286.definition: 因血行不畅，瘀血阻滞心脉所致。临床以心痹胸痛或刺痛，痛引胸背、臂内，舌质紫暗，或有瘀点、瘀斑，舌苔薄白，脉细涩或结代，伴见心悸、怔忡，心中辵辵大动等为特征的证候。

V010-N00286.label: 心脉痹阻证
V010-N00286.englishNames: syndrome of blockade of heart vessel
V010-N00286.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00286.definition: 又称“心血瘀阻证”。血行不畅，瘀血阻痹心脉，以心悸征忡，心胸憋闷，疼痛如刺，痛引肩背内臂，唇舌紫暗，脉细涩或结或代为常见症的证候。

V010-N00286.label: 心血瘀阻证
V010-N00286.aliases: 心脉痹阻证； 心脉瘀阻证； 心血瘀痹证； 心血瘀滞证
V010-N00286.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of heart blood stasis obstruction; heart blood stasis (obstruction) pattern/ syndrome
V010-N00286.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类｜心血瘀滞证

V010-N00286.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00286.label: 心脉瘀阻证
V010-N00286.aliases: 心血瘀滞证； 心脉痹阻证； Heart blood stagnation pattern； heart vessel obstruction pattern
V010-N00286.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00286.definition: Characterized by chest tightness, palpitations, and stabbing cardiac pain that radiates to the shoulder and back. The tongue is dark purple. The pulse is thready and hesitant or regularly/irregularly intermittent. This pattern often occurs when stagnant blood obstructs the heart vessels.

V010-N00286.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00286.label: 心脉痹阻证

V010-N00286.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00286.label: 心脉痹阻证
V010-N00286.englishNames: heart vessel obstruction pattern/ syndrome; syndrome of blockade of heart vessel
V010-N00286.definition: a pattern/syndrome arising when the heart vessels are impeded, marked by paroxysms of palpitations with fearful throbbing, pain and a feeling of pressure in the heart and chest referring to the shoulder or upper arm

V010-N00283.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00283.label: 心气虚证
V010-N00283.aliases: 心气亏虚证； 心气虚弱证
V010-N00283.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类｜心虚证
V010-N00283.definition: 因心气亏虚，心神失主，鼓动无力所致。临床以神思恍惚，心悸、惊惕，如人将捕之，自汗，甚则时出冷汗，舌质淡，脉虚弱或结代，伴见神疲、乏力，胸闷、气短，动辄尤甚等为特征的证候。

V010-N00283.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00283.label: 心气不足证
V010-N00283.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类｜心虚证｜心气虚证
V010-N00283.definition: 因心气偏弱，心神虚怯，鼓动乏力所致。临床以畏见生人，恶闻声响，容易惊惕，或动辄心悸，胸闷，短气，自汗，神疲、乏力，舌质偏淡，舌苔白，脉虚无力等心虚证轻者为特征的证候。

V010-N00283.label: 心气虚证
V010-N00283.englishNames: syndrome of deficiency of heart qi
V010-N00283.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00283.definition: 心气亏虚，无力鼓动，以心悸气短，神疲乏力，动则加重，自汗，面白舌淡，脉虚等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00283.label: 心气虚证
V010-N00283.aliases: 心气不足证； 心气亏虚证； 心气虚弱证
V010-N00283.englishNames: heart qi deficiency pattern/syndrome; syndrome/pattern of heart qi deficiency; Heart qi deficiency pattern
V010-N00283.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类｜心虚证

V010-N00283.label: 心气不足证
V010-N00283.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类｜心虚证｜心气虚证

V010-N00283.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00283.label: 心气虚证
V010-N00283.aliases: 心气不足证； 心气亏虚证； 心气虚弱证
V010-N00283.englishNames: heart qi deficiency pattern/syndrome; syndrome/pattern of heart qi deficiency; Heart qi deficiency pattern
V010-N00283.pinyinNames: xin qi xu zheng; xīn qì xū zhèng
V010-N00283.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00283.definition: Characterized by palpitations, shortness of breath and lassitude that aggravate upon physical exertion. Spontaneous sweating and a pale face may also be present. The tongue is pale. The pulse is deficient. This pattern often occusr when heart qi fails to help with the heart to pump blood.

V010-N00283.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00283.label: 心气虚证

V010-N00283.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00283.label: 心气虚证
V010-N00283.aliases: 心气不足证； 心气亏虚证
V010-N00283.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by palpitations, shortness of breath, listlessness, spontaneous sweating, pallor, pale tongue, and weak or irregular pulse

V010-N00299.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00299.label: 心气血两虚证
V010-N00299.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of dual deficiency of heart qi and blood
V010-N00299.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类｜心虚证｜心气虚证
