V010-N00299.definition: 因气血两虚，心与心神失养所致。临床以心悸、怔忡，眩晕、气短，倦怠、嗜卧，健忘，多梦，面色苍白，舌质淡，脉细弱，或伴见神思恍惚，神情呆滞，失认失算等为特征的证候。

V010-N00299.label: 心气血两虚证
V010-N00299.englishNames: syndrome of deficiency of both qi and blood of heart
V010-N00299.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00299.definition: 气血两虚，心脏与心神失养，以心悸，头晕，神疲乏力，健忘，多梦，面白舌淡，脉细弱等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00299.label: 心气血两虚证
V010-N00299.englishNames: Dual deficiency of heart qi and blood pattern; syndrome/pattern of dual deficiency of heart qi and blood; pattern/syndrome of dual deficiency of heart qi and blood
V010-N00299.pinyinNames: xin qi xue liang xu zheng
V010-N00299.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类｜心虚证｜心气虚证

V010-N00299.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00299.label: 心气血两虚证
V010-N00299.aliases: Dual deficiency of heart qi and blood pattern
V010-N00299.englishNames: Dual deficiency of heart qi and blood pattern; syndrome/pattern of dual deficiency of heart qi and blood; Deficiency of heart qi and blood pattern; pattern/syndrome of dual deficiency of heart qi and blood
V010-N00299.pinyinNames: xin qi xue liang xu zheng; xīn qì xuè liǎng xū zhèng
V010-N00299.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00299.definition: Characterized by palpitations, shortness of breath, lassitude, fatigue, dizziness, forgetfulness, dream-disturbed sleep and a pale face. The tongue is pale. The pulse is thready and weak. This pattern often occurs when qi and blood fail to nourish the heart and heart mind.

V010-N00299.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00299.label: 心气血两虚证
V010-N00299.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of both heart qi and heart blood deficiency
V010-N00299.pinyinNames: xin qi xue liang xu zheng

V010-N00299.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00299.label: 心气血两虚证
V010-N00299.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of dual deficiency of heart qi and blood
V010-N00299.definition: a pattern/syndrome arising when deficiency of both qi and blood deprives the heart and spirit of nourishment, usually manifested by palpitations, shortness of breath, listlessness, fatigue, dizziness, forgetfulness, dream-disturbed sleep, pale complex

V010-N00297.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00297.label: 心气阴两虚证
V010-N00297.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of dual deficiency of heart qi and yin
V010-N00297.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类｜心虚证｜心气虚证
V010-N00297.definition: 因气阴两虚，心与心神失养所致。临床以头晕、心悸，神疲、气短，多梦、易惊，颧红、口干，五心烦热，自汗、盗汗，舌质偏红，舌苔少，脉细弱或数等为特征的证候。

V010-N00297.label: 心气阴两虚证
V010-N00297.englishNames: syndrome of deficiency of both qi and yin of heart
V010-N00297.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00297.definition: 气阴两虚,心脏与心神失养，以心悸气短，神疲头晕，失眠多梦，颧红口干，舌红少苔，脉弱而数为常见症的证候。

V010-N00297.label: 心气阴两虚证
V010-N00297.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of dual deficiency of heart qi and yin; Deficiency of heart qi and yin pattern
V010-N00297.pinyinNames: xin qi yin liang xu zheng
V010-N00297.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类｜心虚证｜心气虚证

V010-N00297.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00297.label: 心气阴两虚证
V010-N00297.englishNames: Deficiency of heart qi and yin pattern; syndrome/pattern of dual deficiency of heart qi and yin
V010-N00297.pinyinNames: xin qi yin liang xu zheng; xīn qì yīn liǎng xū zhèng
V010-N00297.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00297.definition: Characterized by palpitations, shortness of breath, lassitude, dizziness, insomnia, dream-disturbed sleep and flushed cheeks. The tongue is red with a scanty coating. The pulse is rapid or weak. This pattern often occurs when qi and yin fail to nourish the heart and heart mind.

V010-N00300.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00300.label: 心阴虚证
V010-N00300.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类｜心虚证
V010-N00300.definition: 因阴液亏虚，心与心神失养所致。临床以心悸、怔忡，眩晕，心烦，失眠、多梦，善忘，口渴，舌质红，舌苔少，脉细数，伴见颧红，五心烦热，盗汗等为特征的证候。

V010-N00300.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00300.label: 心阴不足证
V010-N00300.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类｜心虚证｜心阴虚证
V010-N00300.definition: 因心阴不足，心失濡养所致。临床以容易激动，心烦、心慌，时作惊悸，少寐、梦多，舌质偏红，脉细或数等心阴虚证轻者为特征的证候。

V010-N00300.label: 心阴虚证
V010-N00300.englishNames: syndrome of deficiency of heart yin
V010-N00300.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00300.definition: 心阴亏损，心脏、心神失养,以心悸心烦,失眠多梦，头晕健忘,潮热,盗汗,舌红少苔，脉细数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00300.label: 心阴虚证
V010-N00300.aliases: 心阴亏虚证； 心阴不足证
V010-N00300.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of heart yin deficiency; heart yin deficiency pattern/syndrome; Heart yin deficiency pattern
V010-N00300.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类｜心虚证

V010-N00300.label: 心阴不足证
V010-N00300.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of heart yin insufficiency; syndrome/ pattern of heart yin insufficiency
V010-N00300.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类｜心虚证｜心阴虚证

V010-N00300.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00300.label: 心阴虚证
V010-N00300.aliases: 心阴亏虚证； 心阴不足证
V010-N00300.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of heart yin deficiency; heart yin deficiency pattern/syndrome; Heart yin deficiency pattern
V010-N00300.pinyinNames: xin yin xu zheng; xīn yīn xū zhèng
V010-N00300.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00300.definition: Characterized by palpitations, restlessness, insomnia, dream-disturbed sleep, dizziness, forgetfulness, hot flushes and night sweats. The tongue is red with a scanty coating. The pulse is thready and rapid. This pattern often occurs when heart yin fails to nourish the heart and heart spirit.

V010-N00300.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00300.label: 心阴虚证

V010-N00300.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00300.label: 心阴虚证
V010-N00300.aliases: 心阴不足证； 心阴亏虚证
V010-N00300.definition: a pattern/syndrome resulting from deficiency of yin fluid to nourish the heart spirit, manifested by mental irritability, palpitation, insomnia, low fever, night sweating, malar flush, thirst and rapid fine pulse

V010-N00303.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00303.label: 心血虚证
V010-N00303.aliases: 心血亏虚证； 心虚血少证
V010-N00303.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类｜心虚证
V010-N00303.definition: 因心血亏虚，心气与心神失养所致。临床以心悸、怔忡，甚则心中辵辵大动，失眠、多梦，健忘，眩晕，舌质淡，脉细或弱，伴见面色无华，口唇色淡等为特征的证候。

V010-N00303.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00303.label: 心血不足证
V010-N00303.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类｜心虚证｜心血虚证
V010-N00303.definition: 因失血或久病血虚，或脾失健运，血的生化之源不足，血不养心所致。临床以心悸、易惊，头晕，少寐、多梦，面色淡白或萎黄，舌质淡，脉细等心血虚证轻者为特征的证候。

V010-N00303.label: 心血虚证
V010-N00303.englishNames: syndrome of deficiency of heart blood
V010-N00303.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00303.definition: 心血亏虚,心脏、心神失养，以心悸，头晕，多梦，健忘，面色淡白或萎黄,唇舌色淡，脉细等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00303.label: 心血虚证
V010-N00303.aliases: 心血亏虚证； 心虚血少证； 心血不足证
V010-N00303.englishNames: heart blood deficiency pattern/syndrome; syndrome/pattern of heart blood deficiency; Heart blood deficiency pattern
V010-N00303.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类｜心虚证

V010-N00303.label: 心血不足证
V010-N00303.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类｜心虚证｜心血虚证

V010-N00303.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00303.label: 心血虚证
V010-N00303.aliases: 心血亏虚证； 心虚血少证； 心血不足证
V010-N00303.englishNames: Heart blood deficiency pattern; heart blood deficiency pattern/syndrome; syndrome/pattern of heart blood deficiency
V010-N00303.pinyinNames: xīn xuè xū zhèng; xin xue xu zheng
V010-N00303.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00303.definition: Characterized by palpitations, dizziness, dream-disturbed sleep, forgetfulness, a pale white or sallow complexion and pale lips. The tongue is pale. The pulse is thready. This pattern often occurs when heart blood fails to nourish the heart and heart spirit.

V010-N00303.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00303.label: 心血虚证

V010-N00303.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00303.label: 心血虚证
V010-N00303.aliases: 心血不足证； 心血亏虚证
V010-N00303.definition: a pattern/syndrome resulting from deficiency of blood to nourish the heart spirit, manifested by palpitations, dizziness, dream-disturbed sleep, forgetfulness, pale or sallow complexion, pale lips and tongue, and fine pulse

V010-N00293.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00293.label: 心阳虚证
V010-N00293.aliases: 心阳气虚证； 心阳亏虚证
V010-N00293.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类｜心虚证
V010-N00293.definition: 因心阳不振，温运失职所致。临床以心悸，甚则怔忡不已，心胸憋闷，形寒、肢冷，面色淡白，自汗，动辄尤甚，唇舌紫绀，舌质淡，舌苔白，脉弱或结代，可伴见气短，乏力，下肢浮肿等为特征的证候。

V010-N00293.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00293.label: 心阳不足证
V010-N00293.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类｜心虚证｜心阳虚证
V010-N00293.definition: 因久病或老年体虚，或误治伤及心阳，失于温运所致。临床以心悸、怔忡，胸闷，面白、肢冷，脉弱或结代等心阳虚证轻者为特征的证候。

V010-N00293.label: 心阳虚证
V010-N00293.englishNames: syndrome of deficiency of heart yang
V010-N00293.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00293.definition: 心阳虚衰，温运失职，以心悸忙忡，心胸憋闷而喘，畏冷肢凉，面色皖白，或见下肢浮肿，唇舌色暗，苔白滑，脉弱或结或代等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00293.label: 心阳虚证
V010-N00293.aliases: 心阳亏虚证； 心阳气虚证； 心阳不足证
V010-N00293.englishNames: syndrome/pattern heart yang deficiency; syndrome/ pattern heart yang deficiency; Heart yang deficiency pattern; heart yang deficiency pattern/syndrome
V010-N00293.pinyinNames: xin yang xu zheng; xin yin xu zheng
V010-N00293.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类｜心虚证

V010-N00293.label: 心阳不足证
V010-N00293.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of heart yang insufficiency; syndrome/ pattern of heart yang insufficiency
V010-N00293.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类｜心虚证｜心阳虚证

V010-N00293.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00293.label: 心阳虚证
V010-N00293.aliases: 心阳亏虚证； 心阳气虚证； 心阳不足证
V010-N00293.englishNames: syndrome/pattern heart yang deficiency; syndrome/ pattern heart yang deficiency; Heart yang deficiency pattern; heart yang deficiency pattern/syndrome
V010-N00293.pinyinNames: xin yang xu zheng; xin yin xu zheng; xīn yáng xū zhèng
V010-N00293.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00293.definition: Characterized by mild to severe palpitations, chest tightness, cold intolerance, cold limbs, a bright pale face, shortness of breath, and spontaneous sweating. Oedema in the leg and dark lips may also be present. The tongue is purple with a white, slippery coating. The pulse is weak or regularly/irregularly intermittent. This pattern can be a further progression of heart qi deficiency. It may also occur when heart yang fails to warm the body.

V010-N00293.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00293.label: 心阳虚证

V010-N00293.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00293.label: 心阳虚证
V010-N00293.aliases: 心阳不足证； 心阳亏虚证
V010-N00293.definition: a pattern/syndrome resulting from deficiency of yang qi to warm and activate the heart, usually manifested by palpitation, dyspnea, a feeling of pressure in the chest, aversion to cold with cold limbs, bright pale complexion, dark lips and tongue with

V010-N00295.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00295.label: 心阳暴脱证
V010-N00295.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of sudden collapse of heart yang
V010-N00295.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类｜心虚证｜心阳虚证
V010-N00295.definition: 因各种原因导致心阳衰败，阴不恋阳，阳气暴脱所致。临床以骤然面色苍白，冷汗淋漓，四肢厥冷，烦躁不安，呼吸微弱，怔忡不已，甚则昏迷，舌质暗淡，脉微欲绝，或如虾游等为特征的危重证候。

V010-N00295.label: 心阳暴脱证
V010-N00295.englishNames: syndrome of sudden collapse of heart yang
V010-N00295.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00295.definition: 心阳衰败而欲脱，以突然冷汗淋漓，四肢厥冷，呼吸微弱,心悸征忡，神志模糊、昏迷，面色苍白，脉微欲绝等为常见症的危重证候。

V010-N00295.label: 心阳暴脱证
V010-N00295.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of sudden collapse of heart yang; Heart yang collapse pattern
V010-N00295.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类｜心虚证｜心阳虚证

V010-N00295.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00295.label: 心阳暴脱证
V010-N00295.aliases: 心阳欲脱证； Heart yang collapse pattern
V010-N00295.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of sudden collapse of heart yang; Heart yang collapse pattern; Sudden collapse of heart yang pattern
V010-N00295.pinyinNames: xin yang bao tuo zheng; xīn yáng bào tuō zhèng
V010-N00295.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00295.definition: Characterized by cold sweats, cold limbs, faint breathing, mild to severe palpitations, a pale complexion and mental confusion or unconsciousness. The pulse is extremely weak. This pattern can be a further progression of heart yang deficiency. It may also occur as a result of sudden blockage or attack by excess pathogens.

V010-N00302.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00302.label: 心火上炎证
V010-N00302.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of heart fire flaming up
V010-N00302.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类｜心热证｜心火炽盛证
V010-N00302.definition: 因心经火旺，循经上炎于口舌所致。临床以口舌生疮，红灼痛，心烦，面赤，舌质红，脉弦数，或伴见发热，口渴、饮冷，大便秘结等为特征的证候。

V010-N00302.label: 心火上炎证
V010-N00302.englishNames: syndrome of flaring up of heart fire
V010-N00302.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00302.definition: 心经火旺，上炎口舌,以烦热口渴,口舌生疮，溃烂疼痛，面赤，舌尖红，脉数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00302.label: 心火上炎证
V010-N00302.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of heart fire flaming up; pattern/syndrome of heart fire flaming upward; Heart fire flaming upward pattern
V010-N00302.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类｜心热证｜心火炽盛证

V010-N00302.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00302.label: 心火上炎证
V010-N00302.aliases: 心火偏亢证； Heart fire flaming upward pattern
V010-N00302.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of heart fire flaming up; pattern/syndrome of heart fire flaming upward; Heart fire flaming upward pattern; Upward flaming of heart fire pattern
V010-N00302.pinyinNames: xin huo shang yan zheng; xīn huǒ shàng yán zhèng
V010-N00302.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00302.definition: Characterized by fever, thirst, restlessness, a red face and red and painful mouth/tongue ulcerations. The pulse is rapid. This pattern often occurs when hyperactive fire ascends to the mouth/tongue along the heart meridian.

V010-N00302.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00302.label: 心火上炎证

V010-N00302.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00302.label: 心火上炎证
V010-N00302.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of heart fire flaming upward; syndrome of flaring up ofheart fire
V010-N00302.definition: a pattern/syndrome of up-flaring fire from the heart, marked by oral ulceration, mental irritability, insomnia, and a red tip of the tongue

V010-N00290.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00290.label: 心神不宁证
V010-N00290.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类
V010-N00290.definition: 泛指因外感或内伤等各种原因扰动或劳伤心神，甚则蒙闭心神等所引起的一类证候。

V010-N00290.label: 心神不宁证
V010-N00290.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of heart spirit inquietude; Heart spirit restlessness pattern
V010-N00290.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类

V010-N00290.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00290.label: 心神不宁证
V010-N00290.aliases: 心神不安证； Heart spirit restlessness pattern
V010-N00290.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of heart spirit inquietude; Disquieted heart spirit pattern; Heart spirit restlessness pattern
V010-N00290.pinyinNames: xin shen bu ning zheng; xīn shén bù níng zhèng
V010-N00290.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00290.definition: Characterized by palpitations, panic, restlessness, insomnia, dream-disturbed sleep, and jumpy or easily startled. This pattern often results from emotional disturbance or medical conditions.

V010-N00292.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00292.label: 火扰心神证
V010-N00292.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of fire harassing heart spirit
V010-N00292.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类｜心神不宁证
V010-N00292.definition: 因五志化火，扰动心神所致。临床以心烦、易怒，躁扰不宁，失眠、多梦，颜面潮红，甚则惊惕肉，神志错乱，狂言狂语，舌质红绛，舌苔黄燥，脉洪数或疾促有力，可伴见口舌生疮，大便燥结，小便!短黄等为特征的证候。

V010-N00292.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00292.label: 热扰心神证
V010-N00292.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of heat disturbing the heart spirit
V010-N00292.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类｜心神不宁证
V010-N00292.definition: 因邪热炽盛，扰动心神所致。临床以壮热、口渴，面赤，心悸，失眠，躁扰不宁，甚或神昏、谵语，舌质红，舌苔黄，脉数等为特征的证候。

V010-N00292.label: 热扰心神证
V010-N00292.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00292.definition: 邪热炽盛,上扰心神,以高热,口渴，面赤，心悸失眠,躁扰不宁,甚或神昏谵语，舌红苔黄，脉数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00292.label: 火扰心神证
V010-N00292.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of fire harassing heart spirit
V010-N00292.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类｜心神不宁证

V010-N00292.label: 热扰心神证
V010-N00292.englishNames: Fire harassing heart spirit pattern; syndrome/pattern of heat disturbing the heart spirit; pattern/syndrome of heat harassing the heart spirit
V010-N00292.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜心证类｜心神不宁证

V010-N00292.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00292.label: 热扰心神证
V010-N00292.aliases: 火扰心神证； Fire harassing heart spirit pattern； Fire disturbing the heart mind
V010-N00292.englishNames: Fire harassing heart spirit pattern; Heat disturbing the heart spirit pattern; syndrome/pattern of heat disturbing the heart spirit; pattern/syndrome of heat harassing the heart spirit
V010-N00292.pinyinNames: re rao xin shen zheng; rè rǎo xīn shén zhèng
V010-N00292.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00292.definition: Characterized by palpitations, restlessness, insomnia and dream-disturbed sleep. Delirium, fever, thirst and a red face may also be present. The tongue is red with a yellow coating. The pulse is slippery and rapid. This pattern often occurs when exuberant excessive heat disturbs the heart spirit.

V010-N00292.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00292.label: 热扰心神证
V010-N00292.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of heat harassing heart spirit

V010-N00292.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00292.label: 热扰心神证
V010-N00292.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of heat harassing the heart spirit
V010-N00292.definition: a pattern/syndrome caused by exuberant heat which disturbs the heart spirit, and marked by fever, thirst, vexation, insomnia, or even manic or delirious speech, flushed face, constipation, deep-colored urine, reddened tongue tip, yellow tongue coating

V010-N00294.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00294.label: 小肠气滞证
V010-N00294.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of qi stagnation in the small intestine
V010-N00294.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜小肠证类
V010-N00294.definition: 因腹部受寒，或贪食生冷寒凉之品，或情志不畅，啼哭怒嚎，致使小肠气机阻滞所致。临床以小腹拘急、胀痛或窜痛，痛掣阴囊，睾丸坠痛，或腹部包块，时聚时散，舌质淡或暗，舌苔白，脉沉弦或紧等为特征的证候。

V010-N00294.label: 小肠气滞证
V010-N00294.englishNames: small intestinal qi stagnation pattern/ syndrome; syndrome/pattern of qi stagnation in the small intestine; Small intestine qi stagnation pattern
V010-N00294.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜小肠证类

V010-N00294.label: 肠道气滞证
V010-N00294.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of qi stagnation in the intestines
V010-N00294.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肺系证类｜大肠证类｜大肠实证

V010-N00294.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00294.label: 小肠气滞证
V010-N00294.aliases: 小肠气痛证； Small intestine qi stagnation pattern
V010-N00294.englishNames: small intestinal qi stagnation pattern/ syndrome; syndrome/pattern of qi stagnation in the small intestine; Small intestine qi stagnation pattern
V010-N00294.pinyinNames: xiao chang qi zhi zheng; xiǎo cháng qì zhì zhèng
V010-N00294.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00294.definition: Characterized by abdominal fullness/distension/pain that aggravates upon emotional disturbance and is alleviated upon belching or flatus. The pulse is wiry. This pattern often results from qi stagnation in the small intestine.

V010-N00294.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00294.label: 小肠气滞证
V010-N00294.englishNames: small intestinal qi stagnation pattern/ syndrome
V010-N00294.definition: a pattern/syndrome caused by qi stagnation in the small intestine, marked by abdominal pain with borborygmi

V010-N00288.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00288.label: 小肠实热证
V010-N00288.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of excess-heat in the small intestine
V010-N00288.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜小肠证类
V010-N00288.definition: 因心火下移小肠，或湿热等邪蕴蓄，小肠里热炽盛所致。临床以脐腹胀痛，小便频数，尿道涩痛或灼痛，甚则尿血，舌质红，舌苔黄，脉数，可伴见发热、口渴，口舌生疮，心烦、失眠等为特征的证候。

V010-N00288.label: 小肠实热证
V010-N00288.englishNames: syndrome of excessive heat of small intestine
V010-N00288.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00288.definition: 又称"心移热于小肠证”。心火亢盛，下移小肠，以发热口渴，心烦，口舌生疮、赤烂疼痛，面红，小便黄赤、淋沥涩痛，甚则尿血，舌尖红，苔黄，脉数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00288.label: 小肠实热证
V010-N00288.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of excess-heat in the small intestine; Small intestine excess heat pattern
V010-N00288.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜小肠证类

V010-N00288.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00288.label: 小肠实热证
V010-N00288.aliases: Small intestine excess heat pattern； 心移热膀胱证
V010-N00288.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of excess-heat in the small intestine; Excess heat in the small intestine pattern; Small intestine excess heat pattern
V010-N00288.pinyinNames: xiao chang shi re zheng; xiǎo cháng shí rè zhèng
V010-N00288.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00288.definition: Characterized by fever, thirst, restlessness, insomnia, mouth/tongue ulcerations, scanty, yellow urine and painful urination with a burning sensation. In severe cases, bloody urine may also be present. The tongue is red with a yellow coating. The pulse is rapid. This pattern often occurs when heart fire flows downward to the small intestine or when damp heat retains in the small intestine.

V010-N00284.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00284.label: 小肠虚寒证
V010-N00284.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of deficiency cold in the small intestine
V010-N00284.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜小肠证类
V010-N00284.definition: 因阳气不足，小肠化物、分清泌浊功能失司所致。临床以少腹隐痛或冷痛，喜温喜按，肠鸣、泄泻，面色萎黄，神疲、乏力，舌质淡，舌苔薄白，脉缓弱等为特征的证候。

V010-N00284.label: 小肠虚寒证
V010-N00284.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of deficiency cold in the small intestine; Small intestine deficiency cold pattern
V010-N00284.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜心系证类｜小肠证类

V010-N00284.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00284.label: 小肠虚寒证
V010-N00284.englishNames: Deficiency cold in the small intestine pattern; syndrome/pattern of deficiency cold in the small intestine; Small intestine deficiency cold pattern
V010-N00284.pinyinNames: xiao chang xu han zheng; xiǎo cháng xū hán zhèng
V010-N00284.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00284.definition: Characterized by undigested food in stools, dull abdominal pain that alleviates upon warmth, thirst with a desire to drink warm water, cold limbs, inhibited urination and loose stools. The tongue is pale with a white, slippery coating. The pulse is deep, weak and slack. This pattern often occurs when internal cold (due to yang qi deficiency) affects the functions of the small intestine in separating the clear from turbid.

V010-N00336.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00336.label: 肺气虚证
V010-N00336.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肺系证类｜肺证类｜肺虚证
V010-N00336.definition: 因秉质气虚，或久病虚损，肺功能减退所致。临床以咳嗽无力，气短而喘，动辄尤甚，咯痰清稀，语声低微，面白，自汗，舌质淡，舌苔白，脉弱，或伴见神疲、乏力，畏风、怯冷等为特征的证候。

V010-N00336.label: 肺气虚证
V010-N00336.englishNames: syndrome of deficiency of lung qi
V010-N00336.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00336.definition: 肺气虚弱，以咳嗽无力，气短而喘，动则尤甚,吐痰清稀,声音低弱，自汗,畏风，舌淡，脉弱等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00336.label: 肺气虚证
V010-N00336.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of lung qi deficiency; lung qi deficiency pattern/syndrome; Lung qi deficiency pattern
V010-N00336.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肺系证类｜肺证类｜肺虚证

V010-N00336.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00336.label: 肺气虚证
V010-N00336.aliases: 肺气亏虚证； 肺卫气虚不固证； 肺卫气虚证； Lung qi deficiency pattern； Defense qi deficiency pattern； Lung deficiency with exterior weakness pattern； Lung and defense qi insecurity pattern； Insecurity of lung Wei-defence
V010-N00336.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of lung qi deficiency; lung qi deficiency pattern/syndrome; Lung qi deficiency pattern
V010-N00336.pinyinNames: fei qi xu zheng; fèi qì xū zhèng
V010-N00336.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00336.definition: Characterized by weak coughing and panting, and shortness of breath that aggravate upon physical exertion, expectoration of thin clear phlegm, a low voice, spontaneous sweating, wind intolerance and susceptibility to common colds. The tongue is pale. The pulse is weak. This pattern often results from lung qi deficiency and decreased lung function.

V010-N00336.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00336.label: 肺气虚证

V010-N00336.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00336.label: 肺气虚证
V010-N00336.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by pale complexion, shortness of breath, feeble voice, intolerance of wind and spontaneous sweating

V010-N00342.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00342.label: 肺阴虚证
V010-N00342.aliases: 肺阴亏虚证； 肺虚热证
V010-N00342.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肺系证类｜肺证类｜肺虚证
V010-N00342.definition: 因痨虫蚀肺，耗损阴津，或虚劳内伤，肺阴亏虚所致。临床以干咳、痰少，痰不易咯出，或痰中带血，咽干、声嘶，舌质红，舌苔少津，脉细数，伴见低热、盗汗，五心烦热，颧红等为特征的证候。

V010-N00342.label: 肺阴虚证
V010-N00342.englishNames: syndrome of deficiency of lung yin
V010-N00342.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00342.definition: 肺阴不足，虚热内生，以干咳，或痰少而黏，或痰中带血，口燥咽干，或音哑，潮热颧红，或有盗汗，舌红少津，脉细数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00342.label: 肺阴虚证
V010-N00342.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肺系证类｜肺证类｜肺虚证

V010-N00342.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00342.label: 肺阴虚证
V010-N00342.aliases: 肺阴亏虚证； 肺虚热证； Lung yin deficiency pattern； Insufficiency of lung yin pattern
V010-N00342.englishNames: lung yin deficiency pattern/syndrome; Lung yin deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of lung yin deficiency; syndrome/ pattern of lung yin deficiency
V010-N00342.pinyinNames: fei yin xu zheng; fèi yīn xū zhèng
V010-N00342.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00342.definition: Characterized by unproductive coughs or coughing with scanty, sticky phlegm or blood-stained phlegm, a dry mouth and throat, a hoarse voice, hot flushes, flushed cheeks, and night sweats. The tongue is dry and red. The pulse is thready and rapid. This pattern often occurs when lung yin deficiency generates internal heat.

V010-N00342.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00342.label: 肺阴虚证

V010-N00342.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00342.label: 肺阴虚证
V010-N00342.definition: a pattern/syndrome attributed to yin deficiency of the lung with endogenous heat, manifested by unproductive cough, afternoon fever, night sweating, flushed cheeks, dry throat, red and dry tongue, and rapid fine pulse

V010-N00353.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00353.label: 肺阳虚证
V010-N00353.aliases: 肺阳亏虚证； 肺虚寒证
V010-N00353.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肺系证类｜肺证类｜肺虚证
V010-N00353.definition: 因秉质阳虚，或久病伤及阳气，肺阳亏虚所致。临床以咳嗽或喘，咳唾痰白、清稀，遇冷加重或反复，胸闷、背寒，神疲、气短、息微，或面目浮肿，小便不利，舌质淡胖，舌苔白滑，脉沉弱或弦缓，伴见畏冷、肢凉，面色㿠白，口不渴等为特征的证候。

V010-N00353.label: 肺阳虚证
V010-N00353.aliases: 肺虚寒证； 肺阳亏虚证
V010-N00353.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of lung yang deficiency; Lung yang deficiency pattern; lung yang deficiency pattern/syndrome
V010-N00353.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肺系证类｜肺证类｜肺虚证

V010-N00353.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00353.label: 肺阳虚证
V010-N00353.aliases: 肺虚寒证； 肺阳亏虚证； Lung yang deficiency pattern
V010-N00353.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of lung yang deficiency; Lung yang deficiency pattern; lung yang deficiency pattern/syndrome
V010-N00353.pinyinNames: fei yang xu zheng; fèi yáng xū zhèng
V010-N00353.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00353.definition: Characterized by panting, weak coughs with thin, white phlegm, chest tightness, a low voice, shallow breathing, shortness of breath, and cold limbs. The tongue is pale, purple, enlarged and tender with a white, slippery coating. The pulse is deep, slow and weak. This pattern often occurs when yang qi fails to warm the lung.

V010-N00353.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00353.label: 肺阳虚证

V010-N00353.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00353.label: 肺阳虚证
V010-N00353.definition: a pattern/syndrome resulting from deficiency of yang qi to warm the lung, usually manifested by cough, dyspnea and thin expectoration, fear of cold and cold extremities, spontaneous sweating, pale complexion, enlarged tongue with white slippery coatin

V010-N00345.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00345.label: 肺气阴两虚证
V010-N00345.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of dual deficiency of lung qi and yin
V010-N00345.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肺系证类｜肺证类｜肺虚证
V010-N00345.definition: 因肺气虚弱，阴液亏虚所致。临床以干咳无力，气短而喘，咽喉干燥，声音哑哑，五心烦热，舌质淡红，舌苔少津，脉细无力等为特征的证候。

V010-N00345.label: 肺气阴两虚证
V010-N00345.englishNames: syndrome of deficiency of both qi and yin of lung
V010-N00345.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00345.definition: 肺气虚弱，阴液亏虚，以干咳无力，气短而喘，声低或音哑，五心烦热，脉细无力等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00345.label: 肺气阴两虚证
V010-N00345.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of dual deficiency of lung qi and yin; Lung qi and yin deficiency pattern
V010-N00345.pinyinNames: fei qi yin liang xu zheng
V010-N00345.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肺系证类｜肺证类｜肺虚证

V010-N00345.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00345.label: 肺气阴两虚证
V010-N00345.aliases: Lung qi and yin deficiency pattern
V010-N00345.englishNames: Lung qi/yin deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of dual deficiency of lung qi and yin; Lung qi and yin deficiency pattern
V010-N00345.pinyinNames: fèi qì yīn liǎng xū zhèng; fei qi yin liang xu zheng
V010-N00345.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00345.definition: Characterized by weak, unproductive coughs, shortness of breath, panting, a low/hoarse voice and feverish sensations in the palms, soles and chest. The pulse is thready and weak. This pattern often results from a deficiency of lung qi and yin.

V010-N00347.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00347.label: 大肠津亏证
V010-N00347.aliases: 肠道津伤证； 肠道津亏证； 肠燥津伤证； 津伤肠燥证
V010-N00347.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of fluid depletion in the large intestine
V010-N00347.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肺系证类｜大肠证类｜大肠虚证
V010-N00347.definition: 因津液亏损，肠失濡润所致。临床以大便燥如羊屎，数日一行，舌质红而干，舌苔少，脉细数，可伴见心烦，口渴，腹胀等为特征的证候。

V010-N00347.label: 大肠津亏证
V010-N00347.aliases: 肠道津伤证； 肠道津亏证； 肠燥津亏证； 津伤肠燥证； 肠燥津伤证
V010-N00347.englishNames: large intestinal fluid deficiency pattern/ syndrome; syndrome/pattern of fluid depletion in the large intestine; Large intestine fluid deficiency pattern
V010-N00347.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肺系证类｜大肠证类｜大肠虚证

V010-N00347.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00347.label: 肠燥津亏证
V010-N00347.aliases: 大肠液亏证； 大肠津亏证； Large intestine fluid deficiency pattern； Fluid insufficiency in the large intestine； 肠燥津伤证
V010-N00347.englishNames: Intestinal dryness pattern; pattern/syndrome of intestinal dryness and fluid depletion
V010-N00347.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00347.definition: Characterized by extremely dry stools (like sheep droppings), one bowel movement in several days, abdominal distension/pain, palpable abdominal masses, and thirst. The tongue is dry. The pulse is wiry and hesitant. This pattern often occurs when body fluids fail to nourish the large intestine.

V010-N00347.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00347.label: 肠燥津亏证
V010-N00347.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of intestinal dryness and fluid consumption

V010-N00347.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00347.label: 大肠津亏证
V010-N00347.englishNames: large intestinal fluid deficiency pattern/ syndrome
V010-N00347.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by constipation or difficulty in defecation accompanied by dry throat and reddened tongue with scanty coating

V010-N00347.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00347.label: 肠燥津亏证
V010-N00347.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of intestinal dryness and fluid depletion
V010-N00347.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by dry feces difficult to evacuate, infrequent bowel movement, abdominal distension and pain, or palpable mass in the lower abdomen, thirst, reddened tongue with scanty moisture and yellow dry coating, and string-like choppy

V010-N00351.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00351.label: 大肠虚寒证
V010-N00351.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of deficiency-cold in the large intestine
V010-N00351.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肺系证类｜大肠证类｜大肠虚证
V010-N00351.definition: 因阳气虚衰，虚寒内生，大肠功能减退，传导失常所致。临床以久泻或久痢，下利稀薄，完谷不化，腹痛隐隐，喜温、喜按，舌质淡，舌苔白润或滑，脉沉迟无力，或伴见食少，畏寒、肢冷等为特征的证候。

V010-N00351.label: 大肠虚寒证
V010-N00351.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of deficiency-cold in the large intestine; Large intestine deficiency cold pattern
V010-N00351.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肺系证类｜大肠证类｜大肠虚证

V010-N00351.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00351.label: 大肠虚寒证
V010-N00351.aliases: 大肠虚冷证； Large intestine deficiency cold pattern
V010-N00351.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of deficiency-cold in the large intestine; Large intestine deficiency cold pattern; Deficiency cold in the large intestine pattern
V010-N00351.pinyinNames: da chang xu han zheng; dà cháng xū hán zhèng
V010-N00351.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00351.definition: Characterized by chronic diarrhoea/dysentery, dull abdominal pain that alleviates upon warmth and pressure, cold intolerance and cold limbs. The tongue is pale with a white, slippery coating. The pulse is deep, slow and weak. This pattern often occurs when yang qi fails to secure the large intestine.

V010-N00340.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00340.label: 肠道实热证
V010-N00340.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of excess-heat in the intestines
V010-N00340.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肺系证类｜大肠证类｜大肠实证
V010-N00340.definition: 因肠道热盛，腑气不通所致。临床以发热，面赤，口渴，腹胀满或痛，大便硬结，或喘咳不已，舌质红，舌苔黄、少津，右寸脉实而有力，或脉沉数等为特征的证候。

V010-N00340.label: 肠道实热证
V010-N00340.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of excess-heat in the intestines
V010-N00340.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肺系证类｜大肠证类｜大肠实证

V010-N00340.label: 大肠热结证
V010-N00340.aliases: 肠道热结证； 肠热腑实证； 热结肠燥证； 肠道实热证； 大肠实热证
V010-N00340.englishNames: large intestinal heat bind pattern/ syndrome; syndrome/pattern of heat binding in the large intestine
V010-N00340.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肺系证类｜大肠证类｜大肠实证｜肠道实热证

V010-N00340.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00340.label: 大肠热结证
V010-N00340.aliases: 肠道热结证； 肠道实热证； 大肠实热证； Large intestine excess heat pattern； Excess heat in the large intestine； 肠热腑实证； 热结肠燥证
V010-N00340.englishNames: large intestinal heat bind pattern/ syndrome; Heat stagnation in the large intestine pattern; syndrome/pattern of heat binding in the large intestine
V010-N00340.pinyinNames: dà cháng rè jié zhèng; da chang re jie zheng
V010-N00340.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00340.definition: Characterized by fever, thirst, constipation, abdominal distension/hardness/fullness and abdominal pain with tenderness. The tongue is red with a dry, yellow coating. The pulse is deep and rapid. This pattern often occurs when exuberant interior heat blocks the intestinal qi.

V010-N00333.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00333.label: 大肠湿热证
V010-N00333.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of dampness and heat in the large intestine
V010-N00333.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肺系证类｜大肠证类｜大肠实证｜肠道实热证
V010-N00333.definition: 因湿热蕴结大肠，阻滞气机，损伤肠络，传导失常所致。临床以腹胀、腹痛，暴注下泻，或下痢脓血，里急后重，或腹泻不爽，粪质黏稠腥臭，肛门灼热，舌质红，舌苔黄腻，脉滑数，伴见发热，口渴，小便短黄等为特征的证候。

V010-N00333.label: 大肠湿热证
V010-N00333.englishNames: syndrome of dampnessheat in large intestine
V010-N00333.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00333.definition: 湿热内蕴，阻滞肠道，以腹胀腹痛，暴注下泻，或下痢脓血，里急后重，或腹泻不爽，粪质黏稠腥臭，肛门灼热，身热口渴，尿短黄，舌红苔黄腻，脉滑数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00333.label: 大肠湿热证
V010-N00333.englishNames: large intestinal dampness-heat pattern/syndrome; syndrome/pattern of dampness and heat in the large intestine; Large intestine dampness heat pattern
V010-N00333.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜肺系证类｜大肠证类｜大肠实证｜肠道实热证

V010-N00333.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00333.label: 肠道湿热证
V010-N00333.aliases: Large intestine dampness heat pattern； 大肠湿热证
V010-N00333.englishNames: Damp heat in the intestine pattern; intestinal dampnessheat pattern/ syndrome
V010-N00333.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00333.definition: Characterized by abdominal distension/pain, sudden, fulminant diarrhoea, diarrhoea with blood, tenesmus, a sensation of incomplete evacuation, sticky, strong-odoured stools, a burning sensation around the anus, fever, thirst, and scanty urine. The tongue is red with a yellow, greasy coating. The pulse is slippery and rapid. This pattern often occurs when internal damp heat obstructs the intestine.

V010-N00333.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00333.label: 肠道湿热证

V010-N00333.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00333.label: 大肠湿热证
V010-N00333.englishNames: large intestinal dampness-heat pattern/syndrome; syndrome of dampnessheat in large intestine
V010-N00333.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by discharge of purulent and bloody stools, abdominal pain, tenesmus, scanty dark urine, yellow and slimy tongue coating, and rapid slippery pulse

V010-N00333.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00333.label: 肠道湿热证
V010-N00333.definition: a syndrome marked by discharge of purulent and bloody stools, accompanied by abdominal pain, tenesmus, scanty dark urine, yellow and slimy tongue coating, and rapid slippery pulse

V010-N00306.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00306.label: 脾系证类
V010-N00306.definition: 泛指由外邪侵袭，或饮食、劳伤、水饮、瘀血等引起脾及其络属腑脏、经络病变的一类证候。

V010-N00306.label: 脾系证类
V010-N00306.englishNames: category of spleen system syndromes/patterns; Spleen system patterns
V010-N00306.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语

V010-N00306.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00306.label: 脾系证类
V010-N00306.englishNames: category of spleen system syndromes/patterns; Spleen system patterns; Patterns of the spleen system
V010-N00306.pinyinNames: pi xi zheng lei; pí xì zhèng lèi
V010-N00306.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候

V010-N00307.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00307.label: 胃气虚证
V010-N00307.aliases: 胃气亏证； 胃气亏虚证
V010-N00307.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜胃证类｜胃虚证
V010-N00307.definition: 因胃气虚弱，纳运失司所致。临床以胃脘痞闷、隐痛、喜按，不思饮食，或得食痛缓，神疲、乏力，舌质淡嫩，舌苔薄白，脉弱等为特征的证候。

V010-N00307.label: 胃气虚证
V010-N00307.englishNames: syndrome of deficiency of stomach qi
V010-N00307.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00307.definition: 胃气虚弱，纳运失职，以胃皖痞胀、隐痛，喜按,不思饮食，或得食痛缓，神疲乏力，舌淡嫩，苔薄白，脉弱等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00307.label: 胃气虚证
V010-N00307.aliases: 胃气亏证； 胃气亏虚证
V010-N00307.englishNames: Stomach qi deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of stomach qi deficiency; stomach qi deficiency pattern/syndrome
V010-N00307.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜胃证类｜胃虚证

V010-N00307.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00307.label: 胃气虚证
V010-N00307.aliases: 胃气亏证； 胃气亏虚证
V010-N00307.englishNames: Stomach qi deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of stomach qi deficiency; stomach qi deficiency pattern/syndrome
V010-N00307.pinyinNames: wei qi xu zheng; wèi qì xū zhèng
V010-N00307.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00307.definition: Characterized by gastric distension/tightness and dull pain that alleviates upon pressure or after eating food, a poor appetite, and fatigue. The tongue is pale and tender. The pulse is weak. This pattern often occurs when stomach qi fails to perform absorption and transportation.

V010-N00307.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00307.label: 胃气虚证

V010-N00307.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00307.label: 胃气虚证
V010-N00307.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by dull epigastric pain relieved by pressure, anorexia, pale tongue and weak pulse

V010-N00327.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00327.label: 胃阴虚证
V010-N00327.aliases: 胃阴不足证； 胃阴亏虚证
V010-N00327.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜胃证类｜胃虚证
V010-N00327.definition: 因阴液亏虚，胃失濡润、和降所致。临床以胃脘痞胀或隐痛，善饥、嘈杂，不欲多食，口燥、咽干，呃逆呕哕，气短声微，大便干结，舌质红而干裂，舌苔少或无，脉细数，伴见烦热、懊，手足心热，形体#消瘦等为特征的证候。

V010-N00327.label: 胃阴虚证
V010-N00327.englishNames: syndrome of deficiency of stomach yin
V010-N00327.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00327.definition: 阴液亏虚，胃失濡润，以口燥咽干，饥不欲食，胃皖隐隐灼痛，或胃皖嘈杂、痞胀，或干呕呃逆，大便干结，舌红少津，脉细数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00327.label: 胃阴虚证
V010-N00327.aliases: 胃阴亏虚证； 胃阴不足证
V010-N00327.englishNames: Stomach yin deficiency pattern; stomach yin deficiency pattern/ syndrome; syndrome/pattern of stomach yin deficiency; syndrome/ pattern of stomach yin deficiency
V010-N00327.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜胃证类｜胃虚证

V010-N00327.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00327.label: 胃阴虚证
V010-N00327.aliases: 胃阴亏虚证； 胃阴不足证
V010-N00327.englishNames: Stomach yin deficiency pattern; stomach yin deficiency pattern/ syndrome; syndrome/pattern of stomach yin deficiency; syndrome/ pattern of stomach yin deficiency
V010-N00327.pinyinNames: wei yin xu zheng; wèi yīn xū zhèng
V010-N00327.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00327.definition: Characterized by a dry mouth and throat, hunger but no desire to eat food, and a dull stomach ache with a burning sensation. Gastric upset/distension, retching, hiccups and constipation may also be present. The tongue is dry and red. The pulse is thready and rapid. This pattern often occurs when yin fluids fail to nourish the stomach.

V010-N00327.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00327.label: 胃阴虚证

V010-N00327.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00327.label: 胃阴虚证
V010-N00327.definition: a pattern/syndrome attributed to insufficiency of yin fluid to moisten the stomach and marked by dryness in the mouth, thirst, anorexia, constipation, retching and reddened peeled tongue

V010-N00317.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00317.label: 胃热证
V010-N00317.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜胃证类
V010-N00317.definition: 泛指因热邪犯胃，或饮食失节，五志怫郁，导致热蕴于胃，胃失和降，气火上逆，或兼夹伤阴、动血、血瘀等所引起的一类证候。

V010-N00317.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00317.label: 胃火炽盛证
V010-N00317.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of intense exuberant stomach fire
V010-N00317.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜胃证类｜胃热证
V010-N00317.definition: 因嗜食辛辣温燥，胃热化火，或五志怫郁，气火犯胃，灼伤血络所致。临床以口角皲裂、糜烂或溃脓，口舌溃疡，灼痛、剧痛，不能进食，口臭，渴喜冷饮，或牙龈脓肿、灼痛，或齿衄、溢血不止，舌质红或绛，舌苔黄或黑燥，脉洪数，或伴见胃脘灼痛，大便燥结，小便短赤，烦躁，神志狂乱等为特征的证候。

V010-N00317.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00317.label: 胃热炽盛证
V010-N00317.aliases: 胃热壅盛证； 胃中积热证
V010-N00317.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜胃证类｜胃热证
V010-N00317.definition: 因饮食失节，过食肥甘、醇酒辛辣，导致积热内蕴，壅滞于胃所致。临床以胃脘灼痛、拒按，嘈杂、泛酸，或多食、善饥，渴喜冷饮，大便秘结，小便短黄，舌质红，舌苔黄，脉数，可伴见牙龈肿痛，齿衄，口臭等为特征的证候。

V010-N00317.label: 胃火炽盛证
V010-N00317.englishNames: syndrome of exuberance of stomach fire
V010-N00317.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00317.definition: 火热炽盛,壅滞于胃，以胃皖灼痛，喜冷，发热口渴,或口臭,牙龈肿痛，齿,便结尿黄，舌红苔黄，脉数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00317.label: 胃热证
V010-N00317.aliases: 胃火证； 胃热壅盛证； 胃火炽盛证
V010-N00317.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of stomach heat; stomach heat pattern/ syndrome; Stomach heat pattern
V010-N00317.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜胃证类

V010-N00317.label: 胃火炽盛证
V010-N00317.aliases: 胃实热证； 胃火炽证； 胃热炽盛证； 胃热炽证； 胃火证
V010-N00317.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of intense exuberant stomach fire
V010-N00317.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜胃证类｜胃热证

V010-N00317.label: 胃热炽盛证
V010-N00317.aliases: 胃热壅盛证； 胃中积热证
V010-N00317.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜胃证类｜胃热证

V010-N00317.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00317.label: 胃火证
V010-N00317.aliases: 胃热炽盛证； 胃火炽盛证； 胃实热证； 胃热证； Stomach heat exuberance pattern； stomach fire exuberance pattern； Excess stomach heat pattern； Stomach heat pattern
V010-N00317.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00317.definition: Characterized by a burning stomach pain with tenderness, thirst with a preference for cold drinks, gum swelling and pain, gum bleeding, constipation and scanty, yellow urine. Hunger after eating food and a foul breath may be present. The tongue is red with a yellow coating. The pulse is rapid. This pattern often occurs when accumulated fire heat in the stomach affects the descending of stomach qi.

V010-N00317.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00317.label: 胃热证
V010-N00317.aliases: ZZPR50； 胃火证； 胃热壅盛证； 胃火炽盛证
V010-N00317.definition: a pattern/syndrome due to impairment of the stomach by pathogenic heat or caused by overeating of hot pungent food, mainly manifested by thirst, foul breath, hyperorexia, oliguria with dark urine, constipation, and ulceration of the mouth or gingiviti

V010-N00321.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00321.label: 胃气上逆证
V010-N00321.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of ascending counterflow of stomach qi
V010-N00321.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜胃证类｜胃实证
V010-N00321.definition: 因寒温不调，或药物、食物中毒，或饮食不节，情志抑郁等，致使胃气不降，逆而上冲所致。临床以突发恶心，剧烈呕吐，或呃逆、嗳气，呃声响亮、有力，舌苔厚，脉弦滑，或伴见寒、热、食、痰、虫等邪客胃脘相应征象为特征的证候。

V010-N00321.label: 胃气上逆证
V010-N00321.englishNames: syndrome of adverse rising of stomach qi
V010-N00321.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00321.definition: 胃失和降，胃气上逆,以暖气，呃逆，呕吐等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00321.label: 胃气上逆证
V010-N00321.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of ascending counterflow of stomach qi; Stomach qi uprising pattern
V010-N00321.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜胃证类｜胃实证

V010-N00321.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00321.label: 胃气上逆证
V010-N00321.aliases: Stomach qi reverse flow pattern； Stomach qi uprising pattern
V010-N00321.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of ascending counterflow of stomach qi; Ascending of stomach qi pattern; Stomach qi uprising pattern
V010-N00321.pinyinNames: wei qi shang ni zheng; wèi qì shàng nì zhèng
V010-N00321.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00321.definition: Characterized by vomiting, hiccups, and belching. This pattern often occurs when cold, heat, diet or emotions causes stomach qi to ascend.

V010-N00315.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00315.label: 脾阳虚证
V010-N00315.aliases: 脾阳亏虚证； 脾虚寒证
V010-N00315.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜脾证类｜脾虚证
V010-N00315.definition: 因脾阳亏虚，阴寒内生，运化失职所致。临床以食少、腹胀，脐腹疼痛，喜温、喜按，大便稀溏，畏冷、肢凉，或肢体困重，或下肢浮肿，小便不利，或白带量多、质稀，舌质淡胖，舌苔白润，脉虚缓或沉迟无力等为特征的证候。

V010-N00315.label: 脾阳虚证
V010-N00315.englishNames: syndrome of deficiency of spleen yang
V010-N00315.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00315.definition: 脾阳虚衰,失于温运，以食少，腹胀，腹痛绵绵,喜温喜按,畏冷肢凉，大便溏薄,或下肢水肿,或妇女带下量多，舌淡苔白润，脉沉迟无力等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00315.label: 脾阳虚证
V010-N00315.aliases: 脾虚寒证； 脾阳亏虚证
V010-N00315.englishNames: Spleen yang deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of spleen yang deficiency; spleen yang deficiency pattern/ syndrome
V010-N00315.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜脾证类｜脾虚证

V010-N00315.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00315.label: 脾阳虚证
V010-N00315.aliases: 脾虚寒证； 脾阳亏虚证； 脾阳不足证； Spleen yang insufficiency pattern
V010-N00315.englishNames: Spleen yang deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of spleen yang deficiency; spleen yang deficiency pattern/ syndrome
V010-N00315.pinyinNames: pi yang xu zheng; pí yáng xū zhèng
V010-N00315.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00315.definition: Characterized by cold abdominal pain that alleviates upon warmth, vomiting of clear water, cold limbs, cold intolerance, loose stools, and clear, profuse urine. The tongue is pale, enlarged and tender with a white, moist coating. The pulse is deep and slow. This pattern often results from spleen yang deficiency coupled with internal cold.

V010-N00315.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00315.label: 脾阳虚证

V010-N00315.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00315.label: 脾阳虚证
V010-N00315.aliases: 脾阳亏虚证； 脾虚寒证
V010-N00315.definition: a pattern/syndrome attributed to insufficient yang qi failing to warm and activate the spleen, usually manifested by cold limbs, coldness and pains in the abdomen, anorexia, abdominal fullness, chronic diarrhea, lassitude, emaciation and edema, the sa

V010-N00318.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00318.label: 脾气虚证
V010-N00318.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜脾证类｜脾虚证
V010-N00318.definition: 因脾气不足，脾失健运所致。临床以食少、腹胀，食后尤甚，大便溏薄，肢体倦怠，少气懒言，面色萎黄，舌质淡，舌苔白，脉缓弱，可伴见浮肿，消瘦等为特征的证候。

V010-N00318.label: 脾气虚证
V010-N00318.englishNames: syndrome of deficiency of spleen qi
V010-N00318.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00318.definition: 脾气不足，运化失职,以食少，腹胀，食后尤甚,大便溏泻,神疲肢倦，舌淡苔白，脉缓弱等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00318.label: 脾气虚证
V010-N00318.englishNames: Spleen qi deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of spleen qi deficiency; spleen qi deficiency pattern/syndrome
V010-N00318.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜脾证类｜脾虚证

V010-N00318.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00318.label: 脾气虚证
V010-N00318.aliases: 脾气亏虚证； Spleen qi deficiency pattern； Spleen qi depletion pattern； Spleen qi insecurity pattern； Insufficiency of spleen
V010-N00318.englishNames: Spleen qi deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of spleen qi deficiency; spleen qi deficiency pattern/syndrome
V010-N00318.pinyinNames: pi qi xu zheng; pí qì xū zhèng
V010-N00318.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00318.definition: Characterized by low food intake, abdominal distension that aggravates after eating food, loose stools, and lassitude. The tongue is pale with a white coating. The pulse is slack and weak. This pattern often occurs when spleen qi fails to transport and transform.

V010-N00318.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00318.label: 脾气虚证

V010-N00318.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00318.label: 脾气虚证
V010-N00318.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by dizziness, fatigue, sallow face, indigestion, abdominal distension, lassitude, anorexia and loose bowels

V010-N00309.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00309.label: 脾虚血亏证
V010-N00309.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of blood depletion due to spleen deficiency
V010-N00309.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜脾证类｜脾虚证｜脾气虚证
V010-N00309.definition: 因脾气虚弱，生血不足所致。临床以眩晕，食少、腹胀，大便溏薄，面色无华，爪甲苍白，消瘦，疲乏，舌质淡，脉细无力，或伴见闭经，月经后期、量少等为特征的证候。

V010-N00309.label: 脾虚血亏证
V010-N00309.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of blood depletion due to spleen deficiency; Spleen deficiency and blood depletion pattern; syndrome/pattern of blood depletion clue to spleen deficiency
V010-N00309.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜脾证类｜脾虚证｜脾气虚证

V010-N00309.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00309.label: 脾虚血亏证
V010-N00309.aliases: Spleen deficiency with blood insufficiency pattern
V010-N00309.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of blood depletion due to spleen deficiency; Spleen deficiency and blood depletion pattern; Spleen deficiency with blood deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of blood depletion clue to spleen deficiency
V010-N00309.pinyinNames: pi xu xue kui zheng; pí xū xuè kuī zhèng
V010-N00309.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00309.definition: Characterized by low food intake, abdominal distension, loose stools, dizziness, fatigue, amenorrhea, delayed period, scanty menstruation, and a pale face. The tongue is pale. The pulse is thready and weak. This pattern often occurs when spleen qi fails to generate sufficient blood.

V010-N00314.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00314.label: 脾不统血证
V010-N00314.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of spleen failing to govern the blood
V010-N00314.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜脾证类｜脾虚证｜脾气虚证
V010-N00314.definition: 因脾气虚弱，不能统摄血行所致。临床以各种慢性出血，或紫癜，或月经淋漓、量多、先期，崩漏，舌质淡，脉弱，伴见神疲、乏力，食少、腹胀，便溏等为特征的证候。

V010-N00314.label: 脾不统血证
V010-N00314.englishNames: syndrome of spleen failing to manage blood
V010-N00314.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00314.definition: 脾虚气弱，不能统摄血行，以各种慢性出血，或紫癫，或妇女月经过多、先期、淋漓不尽，崩漏，伴面色萎黄，食少，腹胀，便溏，神疲乏力，舌淡，脉弱等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00314.label: 脾不统血证
V010-N00314.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of spleen failing to govern the blood; pattern/syndrome of spleen failing to control the blood; Spleen failing to control the blood pattern
V010-N00314.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜脾证类｜脾虚证｜脾气虚证

V010-N00314.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00314.label: 脾不统血证
V010-N00314.aliases: 脾不摄血证； Spleen failing to hold blood within the vessels
V010-N00314.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of spleen failing to govern the blood; pattern/syndrome of spleen failing to control the blood; Spleen failing to control blood pattern; Spleen failing to control the blood pattern
V010-N00314.pinyinNames: pi bu tong xue zheng; pí bù tǒng xuè zhèng
V010-N00314.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00314.definition: Characterized by chronic bleeding, purpura, uterine bleeding, heavy menstrual flow, early menstruation, poor appetite, abdominal distension, loose stools and fatigue. The tongue is pale. The pulse is weak. This pattern often occurs when spleen qi fails to keep the blood within the vessels.

V010-N00314.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00314.label: 脾不统血证

V010-N00314.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00314.label: 脾不统血证
V010-N00314.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of spleen failing to control the blood; syndrome of spleen failing to manage blood
V010-N00314.definition: a pattern/syndrome that arises when weak spleen qi fails to control blood, resulting in various kinds of chronic bleeding such as purpura, flooding and spotting in women, accompanied by sallow complexion, anorexia, loose bowels, lassitude, lack of st

V010-N00311.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00311.label: 脾虚湿阻证
V010-N00311.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of spleen deficiency with dampness obstruction
V010-N00311.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜脾证类｜脾虚证｜脾虚兼夹证
V010-N00311.definition: 因脾气虚弱，湿邪中阻，或湿浊上泛，神水积滞所致。临床以头身困重，胸闷，脘痞、腹胀，食少，倦怠，便溏，小便浑浊，面垢，舌质淡，边有齿痕，舌苔腻浊，脉濡或缓，可伴见视物昏蒙，目胀、眵多，头痛，浮肿等为特征的证候。

V010-N00311.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00311.label: 脾虚湿困证
V010-N00311.aliases: 脾虚湿盛证； 脾虚湿滞证
V010-N00311.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of spleen deficiency with dampness encumbrance
V010-N00311.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜脾证类｜脾虚证｜脾虚兼夹证｜脾虚湿阻证
V010-N00311.definition: 因饮食、劳倦或思虑过度伤脾，或年老体弱，久病虚损，脾运化水湿功能失常所致。临床以脘腹痞胀或痛，泛恶欲吐，食少、纳呆，头身困重，倦怠乏力，肢体浮肿，大便稀溏或泄泻，小便短少，舌质淡胖，边有齿痕，舌苔白润或腻，脉濡缓，可伴见水肿，腹水，带下清稀、量多等为特征的证候。

V010-N00311.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00311.label: 脾虚湿蕴证
V010-N00311.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of spleen deficiency with dampness accumulation
V010-N00311.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜脾证类｜脾虚证｜脾虚兼夹证｜脾虚湿阻证
V010-N00311.definition: 因禀赋不耐，或饮食不节，脾虚运化失职，湿邪内生，蕴于肌肤所致。临床以纳呆，腹胀，大便溏薄，溲黄，头身困重，白带量多，舌质淡，舌苔薄白或腻，脉濡缓或细滑，或伴见湿疹，疱疹，阴疮，黧黑斑等为特征的证候。

V010-N00311.label: 脾虚湿困证
V010-N00311.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00311.definition: stagnancy due to spleen deficiency脾气虚弱,水湿内停，以食少，腹胀,大便溏泻,身体困重，或有微肿，舌淡胖，苔白润或腻,脉濡缓等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00311.label: 脾虚湿阻证
V010-N00311.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of spleen deficiency with dampness obstruction
V010-N00311.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜脾证类｜脾虚证｜脾虚兼夹证

V010-N00311.label: 脾虚湿困证
V010-N00311.aliases: 脾虚夹湿证； 脾虚湿蕴证； 脾虚湿盛证； 脾虚湿泛证； 脾虚湿滞证
V010-N00311.englishNames: Spleen deficiency with dampness accumulation pattern; syndrome/pattern of spleen deficiency with dampness encumbrance; pattern/syndrome of spleen deficiency with dampness encumbrance
V010-N00311.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜脾证类｜脾虚证｜脾虚兼夹证｜脾虚湿阻证

V010-N00311.label: 脾虚湿蕴证
V010-N00311.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of spleen deficiency with dampness accumulation
V010-N00311.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜脾证类｜脾虚证｜脾虚兼夹证｜脾虚湿阻证

V010-N00311.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00311.label: 脾虚湿困证
V010-N00311.aliases: 脾虚夹湿证； 脾虚湿蕴证； 脾虚湿盛证； 脾虚湿泛证； Spleen deficiency with dampness accumulation pattern； Spleen deficiency with dampness encumbrance pattern； Spleen dampness with dampness accumulation pattern； 脾虚湿滞证
V010-N00311.englishNames: Spleen deficiency with dampness pattern; Spleen deficiency with dampness accumulation pattern; syndrome/pattern of spleen deficiency with dampness encumbrance; pattern/syndrome of spleen deficiency with dampness encumbrance
V010-N00311.pinyinNames: pí xū shī kùn zhèng; pi xu shi kun zheng
V010-N00311.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00311.definition: Characterized by low food intake, abdominal distension, loose stools, and body heaviness or mild oedema. The tongue is pale and enlarged with a white, moist or greasy coating. The pulse is soft and slack. This pattern often results from internal retention of turbid dampness due to spleen qi deficiency.

V010-N00311.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00311.label: 脾虚湿困证
V010-N00311.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of spleen deficiency with dampness encumbrance
V010-N00311.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by epigastric distension, poor appetite, borborygmi, diarrhea, nausea, thirst but no desire to drink, lassitude, and dense and slippery tongue coating, the same as the pattern/syndrome of spleen deficiency with dampness accum

V010-N00313.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00313.label: 脾虚水泛证
V010-N00313.aliases: 脾虚水停证； 脾虚水困证
V010-N00313.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of water flooding due to spleen deficiency
V010-N00313.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜脾证类｜脾虚证｜脾虚兼夹证
V010-N00313.definition: 因脾虚失运，水液内停或泛溢所致。临床以面浮、肢肿，或有腹水，舌质淡胖，舌苔白滑，脉濡或弱，伴见食少，腹胀，便溏，神疲、乏力，面色淡白等为特征的证候。

V010-N00313.label: 脾虚水泛证
V010-N00313.englishNames: syndrome of water difusion due to spleen deficiency
V010-N00313.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00313.definition: 脾阳虚衰，温运失职,水湿内停，泛溢肌肤，以食少,腹胀,便溏，面浮肢肿，或有腹水，神疲乏力，面白，舌淡胖，苔白滑，脉濡或弱等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00313.label: 脾虚水泛证
V010-N00313.aliases: 脾虚水停证； 脾虚水困证
V010-N00313.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of spleen deficiency with water flood; syndrome/pattern of water flooding due to spleen deficiency; Spleen deficiency with water flooding pattern
V010-N00313.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜脾证类｜脾虚证｜脾虚兼夹证

V010-N00313.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00313.label: 脾虚水泛证
V010-N00313.aliases: 脾虚水停证； 脾虚水困证； 脾气虚水停证； 脾气虚水湿证； Spleen deficiency with qi stagnation pattern
V010-N00313.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of spleen deficiency with water flood; syndrome/pattern of water flooding due to spleen deficiency; Spleen deficiency with water retention pattern; Spleen deficiency with water flooding pattern
V010-N00313.pinyinNames: pi xu shui fan zheng; pí xū shuǐ fàn zhèng
V010-N00313.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00313.definition: Characterized by low food intake, abdominal distension, loose stools, lassitude, a pale complexion, and facial puffiness. Ascites may also be present. The tongue is pale and enlarged with a white, slippery coating. The pulse is soft. This pattern often occurs when spleen qi fails to transport and transform, resulting in water retention.

V010-N00313.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00313.label: 脾虚水泛证
V010-N00313.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of spleen insufficiency and water diffusion

V010-N00313.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00313.label: 脾虚水泛证
V010-N00313.englishNames: pattern/syndrome of spleen deficiency with water flood; syndrome of water diffusion due to spleen deficiency
V010-N00313.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by edema of the face and limbs or together with ascites, associated with reduced food intake, abdominal distension, sloppy stools, lassitude, lack of strength, pale complexion, pale plump tongue with white slippery coating, a

V010-N00324.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00324.label: 脾虚气滞证
V010-N00324.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of qi stagnation due to spleen deficiency
V010-N00324.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜脾证类｜脾虚证｜脾虚兼夹证
V010-N00324.definition: 因秉质脾虚，或久思伤脾，病后中气不复，气机阻滞，脾失健运所致。临床以脐腹胀痛，得嗳气或矢气则缓，肠鸣漉漉，便溏不爽，舌质淡，舌苔薄白，脉弦或紧，伴见食少，神疲、乏力等为特征的证候。

V010-N00324.label: 脾虚气滞证
V010-N00324.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of qi stagnation due to spleen deficiency; Spleen deficiency with qi stagnation pattern
V010-N00324.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜脾证类｜脾虚证｜脾虚兼夹证

V010-N00324.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00324.label: 脾虚气滞证
V010-N00324.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of qi stagnation due to spleen deficiency; Spleen deficiency with qi stagnation pattern
V010-N00324.pinyinNames: pi xu qi zhi zheng; pí xū qì zhì zhèng
V010-N00324.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00324.definition: Characterized by low food intake, abdominal distension/pain, loose stools with a sensation of incomplete evacuation, bowel sounds, flatus and lassitude. The pulse is wiry. This pattern often results from spleen qi deficiency with an obstructed flow of qi.

V010-N00325.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00325.label: 脾虚食积证
V010-N00325.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of spleen deficiency with food retention
V010-N00325.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜脾证类｜脾虚证｜脾虚兼夹证
V010-N00325.definition: 因脾虚失运，食积胃肠所致。临床以平素食少，容易腹胀，或食后脘痞，甚则脘腹胀痛，嗳腐、吐酸，腹泻不爽，大便腐臭，舌质淡，舌苔薄腻或腐，脉虚缓或弦滑，伴见面色萎黄，神疲、乏力，少气、懒言等为特征的证候。

V010-N00325.label: 脾虚食积证
V010-N00325.englishNames: syndrome of food retention due to spleen deficiency
V010-N00325.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00325.definition: 脾失健运，食积胃肠，以平素食少腹胀，经常腹泻,饮食稍有不慎则胱腹胀痛，暖腐吐酸，腹泻不爽，大便腐臭，舌淡苔腻等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00325.label: 脾虚食积证
V010-N00325.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of spleen deficiency with food retention; Spleen deficiency with food retention pattern
V010-N00325.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜脾证类｜脾虚证｜脾虚兼夹证

V010-N00325.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00325.label: 脾虚食积证
V010-N00325.aliases: 脾虚夹食证； Spleen deficiency with ingestion of food pattern
V010-N00325.englishNames: Spleen deficiency with food retention pattern; syndrome/pattern of spleen deficiency with food retention
V010-N00325.pinyinNames: pi xu shi ji zheng; pí xū shí jī zhèng
V010-N00325.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00325.definition: Characterized by low food intake, abdominal distension, frequent diarrhoea, frequent abdominal distension/pain, acid reflux, a sensation of incomplete evacuation after diarrhoea, and strong-odoured stools. The tongue is pale with a greasy coating. This pattern often results from food retention in the stomach and intestines due to spleen failing to transport and transform.

V010-N00326.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00326.label: 脾阴虚证
V010-N00326.aliases: 脾阴亏虚证； 脾燥证
V010-N00326.path: 脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜脾证类｜脾虚证
V010-N00326.definition: 因秉质阴虚，或饮食劳伤，久病伤脾，或外邪化燥，损伤脾阴所致。临床以不思饮食，食后腹胀，大便干结，唇燥、皲裂，口干、少涎，甚则唾沫皆无，舌质红或中裂，舌苔剥脱或无，脉缓、细涩或濡，伴见低热，消瘦，倦怠，乏力等为特征的证候。

V010-N00326.label: 脾阴虚证
V010-N00326.englishNames: syndrome of deficiency of spleen yin
V010-N00326.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00326.definition: 阴液亏虚，脾失健运，以纳呆，腹胀，便结，体瘦倦怠，涎少唇干，低热，舌红少苔，脉细数等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00326.label: 脾阴虚证
V010-N00326.aliases: 脾阴亏虚证； 脾燥证
V010-N00326.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of spleen yin  deficiency; syndrome/pattern of spleen yin deficiency; spleen yin deficiency pattern/syndrome; Spleen yin deficiency pattern
V010-N00326.path: 证候｜脏腑官窍证候类术语｜脾系证类｜脾证类｜脾虚证

V010-N00326.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00326.label: 脾阴虚证
V010-N00326.aliases: 脾阴亏虚证； Spleen yin depletion pattern； Insufficiency of spleen yin； 脾燥证
V010-N00326.englishNames: Spleen yin deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of spleen yin  deficiency; syndrome/pattern of spleen yin deficiency; spleen yin deficiency pattern/syndrome
V010-N00326.pinyinNames: pí yīn xū zhèng; pi yin xu zheng
V010-N00326.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00326.definition: Characterized by a poor appetite, abdominal distension, constipation, weight loss, lassitude, scanty saliva, dry lips, and a low-grade fever. The tongue is red with a scanty coating. The pulse is thready and rapid. This pattern often occurs when spleen yin deficiency affects the transportation and transformation of the spleen and stomach.

V010-N00326.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00326.label: 脾阴虚证
V010-N00326.definition: a pattern/syndrome attributed to deficiency of yin fluid with impaired splenic transportation, and marked by hunger with inability to eat, emaciation and lassitude

V010-N00402.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00402.label: 血寒证
V010-N00402.path: 气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类
V010-N00402.definition: 泛指寒客血脉，凝滞气血，或血虚寒凝，血行不畅所引起的一类证候。

V010-N00402.label: 血寒证
V010-N00402.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00402.definition: 寒邪客于血脉,凝滞气机，血行不畅，以肢体麻木冷痛，手足清冷，喜暖恶寒，唇舌青紫，妇女月经后期，痛经，经色紫暗夹块，苔白滑，脉沉迟涩等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00402.label: 血寒证
V010-N00402.englishNames: blood cold pattern/ syndrome; Blood cold pattern; syndrome/pattern ofblood cold; syndrome/pattern of blood cold
V010-N00402.path: 证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类

V010-N00402.label: 血寒凝滞证
V010-N00402.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of blood cold stagnation; syndrome/pattern of blood  cold stagnation
V010-N00402.path: 证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类｜血寒证

V010-N00402.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00402.label: 血寒证
V010-N00402.englishNames: blood cold pattern/ syndrome; Blood cold pattern; syndrome/pattern ofblood cold; syndrome/pattern of blood cold
V010-N00402.pinyinNames: xue han zheng; xuè hán zhèng
V010-N00402.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00402.definition: Characterized by pain in the hands/feet with a dark purple colour and cold sensation, the pain alleviates with warmth and aggravates with cold. Alternatively, lower abdominal pain, cold limbs and delayed period with a dark purple menstrual colour and clots may be present. The tongue is pale dark with a white coating. The pulse is deep, slow and hesitant. Often occurs when cold causes the qi and blood to stagnate.

V010-N00402.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00402.label: 血寒证

V010-N00402.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00402.label: 血寒证

V010-N00402.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00402.label: 血寒证
V010-N00402.definition: a pattern/syndrome that arises when congealing cold and qi stagnation inhibit the movement of blood and give rise to blood stasis, commonly manifested by cold pain of the extremities with dark purple skin or cramps in the lesser abdomen that are relie

V010-N00405.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00405.label: 血虚证
V010-N00405.path: 气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类
V010-N00405.definition: 泛指因各种原因导致血虚失养，或阴血不足，外邪侵袭，或兼夹风、寒、湿、热、痰、瘀等内生邪实所引起的一类证候。

V010-N00405.label: 血虚证
V010-N00405.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00405.definition: 血液亏虚，失于荣养，以面色淡白或萎黄，唇、甲淡白，头晕眼花,心悸多梦,手足发麻，妇女经少经闭，舌淡，脉细等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00405.label: 血虚证
V010-N00405.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of blood deficiency; Blood deficiency pattern; blood deficiency pattern/syndrome
V010-N00405.path: 证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类

V010-N00405.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00405.label: 血虚证
V010-N00405.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of blood deficiency; Blood deficiency pattern; blood deficiency pattern/syndrome
V010-N00405.pinyinNames: xue xu zheng; xuè xū zhèng
V010-N00405.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00405.definition: Characterized by a pale or sallow complexion, pale lips, tongue and fingernails, dizziness, blurred vision, palpitations, dream-disturbed sleep, hands/feet numbness, scanty menstruation with a pale menstrual colour, and delayed period or amenorrhea. The pulse is thready. Often occurs when blood fails to nourish the zang–fu organs, meridians and other body tissues.

V010-N00405.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00405.label: 血虚证

V010-N00405.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00405.label: 血虚证
V010-N00405.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by pale or sallow complexion, pale lips and nails, dizziness, dimmed vision, palpitations, numbness of extremities and fine pulse

V010-N00403.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00403.label: 血燥证
V010-N00403.path: 气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类
V010-N00403.definition: 泛指因津亏血虚化燥，肤腠失养，或虚风内动等所引起的一类证候。

V010-N00403.label: 血燥证
V010-N00403.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of blood dryness; Blood dryness pattern
V010-N00403.path: 证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类

V010-N00403.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00403.label: 血燥证
V010-N00403.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of blood dryness; Blood dryness pattern
V010-N00403.pinyinNames: xue zao zheng; xuè zào zhèng
V010-N00403.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00403.definition: Characterized by flaking of grey-white dandruff and dry scalp. Often results from blood/fluid deficiency, spleen deficiency or heat-damaging yin.

V010-N00404.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00404.label: 血热证
V010-N00404.path: 气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类
V010-N00404.definition: 泛指因血热内蕴，或热入血分，壅滞肌腠，灼伤血络，迫血妄行，内扰脏腑，化燥伤阴、夹湿动风等所引起的一类证候。

V010-N00404.label: 血分证
V010-N00404.aliases: 血热内扰证； 热炽血分证； 血热证； 热炽血分； 血热内扰； 温邪侵袭血分证
V010-N00404.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of blood phase; Xuefen Syndrome; blood aspect pattern/ syndrome; Blood phase patterns; Blood phase pattern
V010-N00404.path: 证候｜卫气营血证候类术语｜血分证类

V010-N00404.label: 血热证
V010-N00404.englishNames: Blood heat pattern; blood heat pattern/ syndrome; syndrome/pattern of blood heat
V010-N00404.path: 证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜血证类

V010-N00404.label: 血分证
V010-N00404.aliases: 血热内扰证； 热炽血分证； 血热证； 热炽血分； 血热内扰； 温邪侵袭血分证
V010-N00404.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of blood phase; Xuefen Syndrome; blood aspect pattern/ syndrome; Blood phase patterns; Blood phase pattern
V010-N00404.path: 传统医学证候｜卫气营血证

V010-N00404.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00404.label: 血分证
V010-N00404.aliases: 血热内扰证； 热炽血分证； 血热证； 热炽血分； 血热内扰； 温邪侵袭血分证
V010-N00404.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of blood phase; Xuefen Syndrome; blood aspect pattern/ syndrome; Blood phase patterns; Blood phase pattern
V010-N00404.pinyinNames: xue fen zheng; xuè fèn zhèng
V010-N00404.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00404.definition: Characterized by fever that aggravates at night, restlessness, insomnia, unconsciousness, delirium, a dark purple tongue and a wiry, rapid pulse. Alternatively, dark purple maculae, haematemesis, nosebleed, bloody stools, bloody urine, a dry tongue with a scanty coating and a thready, deficient pulse may be present. This pattern often occurs when heat in febrile conditions moves blood, stirs wind and consumes yin.

V010-N00404.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00404.label: 血热证
V010-N00404.englishNames: Blood heat pattern; blood heat pattern/ syndrome; syndrome/pattern of blood heat
V010-N00404.pinyinNames: xue re zheng; xuè rè zhèng
V010-N00404.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00404.definition: Characterized by haemoptysis, haematemesis, nosebleed, bloody urine, bloody stools with a bright red, sticky colour, and earlier period with heavy menstruation. Alternatively, red, swollen and painful sores/boils, restlessness, thirst, and fever may be present. The tongue is deep red. The pulse is slippery and rapid. Often occurs when exuberant fire heat in the zang–fu organs causes the blood to flow recklessly.

V010-N00404.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00404.label: 血热证

V010-N00404.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00404.label: 血热证

V010-N00404.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00404.label: 血热证
V010-N00404.definition: a pattern/syndrome that occurs when exuberant pathogenic heat enters the blood aspect and is manifested by fever, nose-bleeds, vomiting of blood, expectoration of blood, bloody stool, skin eruptions, or advanced periods with profuse bright-red menstru

V010-N00382.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00382.label: 津液亏虚证
V010-N00382.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of fluid and humor depletion
V010-N00382.path: 气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜津液证类
V010-N00382.definition: 泛指因外感、内伤，或中毒、烧伤，治疗不当等，伤津劫液，形体失却润养所引起的一类证候。

V010-N00382.label: 津液亏虚证
V010-N00382.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00382.definition: 津液亏损，脏腑组织失却濡养,以口燥咽干，唇焦或裂,渴欲饮水，小便短少，大便干结，舌红少津，脉细数无力等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00382.label: 津液亏虚证
V010-N00382.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of fluid and humor depletion; Fluid deficiency pattern; fluid-humor deficiency pattern/syndrome
V010-N00382.path: 证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜津液证类

V010-N00382.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00382.label: 津液亏虚证
V010-N00382.aliases: 津液亏损证； 伤津证； Fluid deficiency pattern
V010-N00382.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of fluid and humor depletion; Fluid deficiency pattern; fluid-humor deficiency pattern/syndrome; Fluids deficiency pattern
V010-N00382.pinyinNames: jin ye kui xu zheng; jīn yè kuī xū zhèng
V010-N00382.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00382.definition: Characterized by dry mouth, nose, throat and lips, thirst with a desire to drink water, scanty urine and constipation. The tongue is dry and red. The pulse is thready, rapid and weak. Often occurs when bodily fluids fail to nourish the zang–fu organs and tissues.

V010-N00382.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00382.label: 津液亏虚证

V010-N00382.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00382.label: 津液亏虚证
V010-N00382.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by dry mouth and throat, parched or cracked lips, thirst with desire for drink, oliguria, constipation, reddened tongue lacking moisture, and rapid fine weak pulse

V010-N00390.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00390.label: 气虚证
V010-N00390.path: 气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类
V010-N00390.definition: 泛指因先天禀赋不足，或后天调养不当，致使气虚失充或不摄、下陷、虚脱等所引起的一类证候。

V010-N00390.label: 气虚证
V010-N00390.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00390.definition: 元气不足，脏腑机能衰退，以气短乏力，神疲懒言，自汗，舌淡，脉虚等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00390.label: 气虚证
V010-N00390.englishNames: qi deficiency pattern/ syndrome; Qi deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of qi deficiency
V010-N00390.path: 证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类

V010-N00390.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00390.label: 气虚证
V010-N00390.englishNames: qi deficiency pattern/ syndrome; Qi deficiency pattern; syndrome/pattern of qi deficiency
V010-N00390.pinyinNames: qi xu zheng; qì xū zhèng
V010-N00390.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00390.definition: Characterized by shortness of breath, fatigue, lassitude, reluctance to talk, and spontaneous sweating. The tongue is pale. The pulse is deficient. Often results from hypofunctions of the zang–fu organs.

V010-N00390.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00390.label: 气虚证

V010-N00390.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00390.label: 气虚证
V010-N00390.definition: a pattern/syndrome of deficiency of genuine qi with diminished function of internal organs, marked by shortness of breath, lassitude, listlessness, spontaneous sweating, pale tongue and weak pulse

V010-N00323.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00323.label: 脾气下陷证
V010-N00323.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of qi collapse due to spleen deficiency
V010-N00323.path: 气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类｜气机失调证｜气陷证
V010-N00323.definition: 因脾气虚弱，中气下陷所致。临床以胃脘坠胀，食后加重，或肛门重坠，便意频数，或久泄脱肛，小便频数，甚或失禁，或子宫下垂，崩漏，胎漏，舌质淡，舌苔白，脉缓弱，伴见食少、便溏，消瘦、乏力，头晕、目眩等为特征的证候。

V010-N00323.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00323.label: 中气下陷证
V010-N00323.path: 气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类｜气虚证｜中气亏虚证
V010-N00323.definition: 因中气亏损，清阳不升，反而陷下所致。临床以小腹坠胀，尿频滴沥，甚则遗尿、失禁，或久泻不止，肛门重坠、脱肛，或阴挺，舌质淡，舌苔薄白，脉缓细，伴见脘腹坠胀，神疲、乏力，头晕、食少等为特征的证候。

V010-N00323.label: 脾虚气陷证
V010-N00323.englishNames: syndrome of sinking of qi due to spleen deficiency
V010-N00323.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00323.definition: 又称“中气下陷证”。脾气虚弱，中气下陷，以神疲乏力，头晕食少，腹胀便溏，或皖腹坠胀，食后益甚，或便意频数，肛门重坠，或久泻不止，或脱肛,或阴挺,或小便浑浊，或崩漏、胎漏，舌淡苔白，脉缓弱等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00323.label: 脾气下陷证
V010-N00323.aliases: 脾虚气陷证； 中气下陷证
V010-N00323.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of qi collapse due to spleen deficiency; Spleen qi sinking pattern
V010-N00323.path: 证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类｜气机失调证｜气滞证｜气陷证

V010-N00323.label: 中气下陷证
V010-N00323.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of middle qi sinking; sunken middle qi pattern/syndrome
V010-N00323.path: 证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类｜气虚证｜中气亏虚证

V010-N00323.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00323.label: 脾气下陷证
V010-N00323.aliases: 脾虚气陷证； 中气下陷证； Spleen qi sinking pattern； Middle qi sinking pattern； Qi sinking of the middle jiao
V010-N00323.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of qi collapse due to spleen deficiency; Spleen qi sinking pattern
V010-N00323.pinyinNames: pi qi xia xian zheng; pí qì xià xiàn zhèng
V010-N00323.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00323.definition: Characterized by a bearing-down sensation in the abdomen that aggravates after eating food. Frequent urges to defaecate with a bearing-down sensation of the anus, persistent diarrhoea, rectal prolapse, prolapsed uterus or cloudy urine may be present. Associated symptoms may include shortness of breath, fatigue, lassitude, reluctance to talk, dizziness, blurred vision, a pale, lustreless face, poor appetite and loose stools. The tongue is pale with a white coating. The pulse is delayed and weak. This pattern often develops from severe spleen qi deficiency and occurs when spleen qi fails to ascend.

V010-N00323.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00323.label: 脾虚气陷证
V010-N00323.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of spleen deficiency and sinking of qi

V010-N00323.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00323.label: 中气下陷证
V010-N00323.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by bearing-down sensation in the epigastrium and abdomen, protracted diarrhea, even prolapse of rectum or visceroptosis

V010-N00323.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00323.label: 脾虚气陷证
V010-N00323.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by epigastric bearingdown sensation, more prominent after meals, or urgency of defecation at short intervals with bearingdown feeling of the anus, or chronic persistent diarrhea, or prolapse of the rectum or uterus, associate

V010-N00392.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00392.label: 气脱证
V010-N00392.path: 气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类｜气机失调证
V010-N00392.definition: 因外感或内伤等原因，致使真气急骤外泄所致。临床以突然面色苍白，口唇青紫，汗出，肢冷，呼吸微弱，舌质淡，脉细数等为特征的证候。

V010-N00392.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00392.label: 元气败脱证
V010-N00392.aliases: 元气衰败证； 元阳衰败证
V010-N00392.path: 气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类｜气虚证｜元气不足证
V010-N00392.definition: 因外感、内伤耗损真元，阴不恋阳，元气暴脱所致。临床以骤然冷汗淋漓，四肢逆冷，口开、手撒，气息微弱，二便失禁，神志昏愦，甚则昏迷不醒，瞳神散大，舌质暗淡或紫，脉微欲绝等为特征的证候。

V010-N00392.label: 气脱证
V010-N00392.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00392.definition: 真气急骤外泄，以突然大汗淋漓，面色苍白，口唇青紫，目合口张，肢冷，呼吸微弱，甚者昏迷，二便失禁，舌淡，脉微欲绝等为常见症的危重证候。

V010-N00392.label: 气脱证
V010-N00392.aliases: 元气虚脱证； 元气衰败证
V010-N00392.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of qi collapse; qi collapse pattern/ syndrome; Qi collapse pattern
V010-N00392.path: 证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类｜气机失调证｜气滞证

V010-N00392.label: 元气败脱证
V010-N00392.aliases: 元气衰败证； 元阳衰败证
V010-N00392.path: 证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类｜气虚证｜元气不足证

V010-N00392.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00392.label: 气脱证
V010-N00392.aliases: 元气虚脱证； 元气衰败证
V010-N00392.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of qi collapse; Qi collapse pattern; qi collapse pattern/ syndrome
V010-N00392.pinyinNames: qi tuo zheng; qì tuō zhèng
V010-N00392.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00392.definition: Characterized by a sudden pale complexion, cyanotic lips, sweating, cold limbs and faint breathing. The tongue is pale. The pulse is thready and rapid. Often results from sudden and rapid leaking of qi.

V010-N00392.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00392.label: 气脱证

V010-N00392.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00392.label: 气脱证
V010-N00392.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by sudden appearance of profuse sweating, somber pale complexion, cyanotic lips, cold extremities, feeble breathing, even fainting or loss of consciousness with incontinence of urine, pale tongue and hardly perceptible pulse

V010-N00431.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00431.label: 营卫不和证
V010-N00431.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of nutrient qi and defense qi disharmony
V010-N00431.path: 气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类｜气机失调证
V010-N00431.definition: 因卫弱营强，腠理不固，或卫强营弱，阳气郁于肌表，内迫营阴所致。临床以发热，或微恶风寒，时有汗出，脉缓等为特征的证候。

V010-N00431.label: 营卫不和证
V010-N00431.englishNames: Nutrient qi and defense qi disharmony pattern; syndrome/pattern of nutrient qi and defense qi disharmony
V010-N00431.path: 证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类｜气机失调证

V010-N00431.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00431.label: 营卫不和证
V010-N00431.aliases: Nutrient qi and defence qi disharmony pattern
V010-N00431.englishNames: Nutrient qi and defense qi disharmony pattern; syndrome/pattern of nutrient qi and defense qi disharmony; Disharmony between the Ying nutrients and Wei-defence pattern
V010-N00431.pinyinNames: ying wei bu he zheng; yíng wèi bù hé zhèng
V010-N00431.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00431.definition: Characterized by spontaneous sweating without fever. Alternatively, patients may present with fever and spontaneous sweating, or neither. This pattern often occurs when yang qi becomes deficient or when stagnant yang qi in the surface of the body affects Ying nutrients and yin fluids.

V010-N00389.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00389.label: 气滞证
V010-N00389.aliases: 气郁证； 气结证； 气机郁结证
V010-N00389.path: 气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类｜气机失调证
V010-N00389.definition: 泛指因各种原因导致气机郁滞，内生或兼夹湿、痰、热、火、瘀浊等邪，影响经络、脏腑、官窍功能等所引起的一类证候。

V010-N00389.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00389.label: 气机阻滞证
V010-N00389.path: 气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类｜气机失调证｜气滞证
V010-N00389.definition: 泛指因各种原因导致气机不畅，或气郁而不散，阻滞脏腑、经络、官窍等所引起的一类证候。

V010-N00389.label: 气滞证
V010-N00389.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
V010-N00389.definition: 气机阻滞，运行不畅，以胸胁、皖腹胀闷疼痛，时轻时重，时作时休，或走窜不定，胀痛可随暖气、肠鸣、矢气而减，脉弦等为常见症的证候。

V010-N00389.label: 气滞证
V010-N00389.aliases: 气机郁结证； 气结证； 气郁证； 气机阻滞证
V010-N00389.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of qi stagnation; qi stagnation pattern/ syndrome; Qi stagnation pattern
V010-N00389.path: 证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类｜气机失调证

V010-N00389.label: 气机阻滞证
V010-N00389.path: 证候｜气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类｜气机失调证｜气滞证

V010-N00389.vocabName: WHO international standard terminologies on TCM
V010-N00389.label: 气滞证
V010-N00389.aliases: 气机郁结证； 气结证； 气郁证； 气机阻滞证
V010-N00389.englishNames: syndrome/pattern of qi stagnation; qi stagnation pattern/ syndrome; Qi stagnation pattern
V010-N00389.pinyinNames: qi zhi zheng; qì zhì zhèng
V010-N00389.path: 诊断、病证和体质术语｜证候
V010-N00389.definition: Characterized by migratory distension, fullness and pain in the subcostal region and abdomen that alleviate after sighing, belching, bowel sounds and flatus. The pulse is wiry. Often results from qi stagnation of the zang–fu organs or in the localized area.

V010-N00389.vocabName: 中医基本名词术语中英对照国际标准
V010-N00389.label: 气滞证

V010-N00389.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00389.label: 气滞证
V010-N00389.definition: a pattern/syndrome resulting from stagnation of qi, marked by intermittent thoracic, hypochondriac, epigastric and abdominal distention or pain, often ameliorated by sighing or belching

V010-N00389.vocabName: 传统医学名词术语国际标准
V010-N00389.label: 气郁证
V010-N00389.definition: a pattern/syndrome marked by feeling of distension in the chest, pain in the hypochondriac region, irritability, irascibility, anorexia and menstrual disorders in women, the same as the qi stagnation pattern/syndrome

V010-N00391.vocabName: GBT16751.2-2021-中医临床诊疗术语 第2部分：证候
V010-N00391.label: 气逆证
V010-N00391.aliases: 气机上逆证； 气机横逆证
V010-N00391.path: 气血阴阳精髓津液证候类术语｜气证类｜气机失调证
V010-N00391.definition: 泛指因肺、肝、肾、胃等脏腑气机逆乱，上逆或横逆等所引起的一类证候。

V010-N00391.label: 气逆证
V010-N00391.englishNames: syndrome of reversed flow of qi
V010-N00391.path: 中医药学名词（2004）｜诊断学｜诊法
